Name: Festival du Film de Demain
Description:
Le divertissement au service de l'éveil citoyen depuis 2022 !

Le Festival du Film de Demain (FFD), initié par le réalisateur Louis-Julien Petit (Discount, Carole Matthieu, Les invisibles et La Brigade), l'ancien communicant Mathieu Petit Bonnefond et Camille Carteret, est un nouveau rendez-vous culturel dédié aux films engagés.

Le FFD représente avant tout la conviction que la culture peut être un puissant vecteur de changement. Il ambitionne de devenir une plateforme d’expression pour des cinéastes engagés. Un lieu entre aux frontières du divertissement et de la réflexion pour permettre au public d’avoir de nouvelles clés de lecture sur des sujets qui façonnent la société d'aujourd'hui et celle de demain.

Le FFD c'est aussi un état d'esprit pionnier, puisqu'il s'agit du seul festival qui réunit, au sein d'une même compétition officielle, des longs-métrages de fiction sans distinction du schéma de production ou de diffusion (cinéma, télévision ou plateforme).

Name: Diabolo Films
Description:
Diabolo Films est une société indépendante de production cinématographique créée en 2009 par Gilles Podesta. L'ambition de Diabolo Films est de faire partager, au plus grand nombre, un cinéma de qualité en s'appuyant sur un réseau international de partenaires et coproducteurs.

"Les Mignonnes", une comédie de Thierry Sebban. Scénario de Thierry Sebban et Cécile Kiegel. En casting. Directeur de casting : Pierre-Jacques Bénichou.

"Roméo et Juliette", film d'animation CGI de Arthur Qwak. Scénario de Arthur Qwak, Sophie Decroisette et Frédéric Engel Lenoir. En développement.

"Pseudonym" (2016) de Thierry Sebban.  Prix de la critique Fantasporto 2015, Prix spécial du jury WorldFest Houston 2015, Prix du meilleur premier film ECU 2015, Mention spéciale au Mobile Festival de Skopje 2016, Mention d'honneur au Kolobrzeg Suspense film Festival 2016… Distributeur : Destiny Films. Ventes inter : Wide.

"Le Magasin des Suicides" (2012) de Patrice Leconte Film d’animation d’après le roman de Jean Teulé (Editions Julliard) Budget 10M€, 300 collaborateurs en France, Belgique et Canada 300.000 entrées France (ARP), 20 pays vendus (WildBunch) Sélections officielles aux Festival de Cannes, Annecy, Toronto, EFA…

Name: LA CABINA Festival Internacional de Mediometrajes de Valencia
Description:
INTERNATIONAL MEDIUM-LENGTH FILM FESTIVAL OF VALENCIA

La Cabina is an International Medium-Length Film Festival (films of between 30 and 60 minutes) intended to be a forum to showcase the latest cinema trends in an innovative length format in a festival setting.

The worldwide production of this specific film format is considerably high in both quantity and quality. The Festival boosts the profile of this format which enjoys high quality production comparable to the official section of any other prestigious festival.

The Festival wants all participants to learn from each other in an international forum with different ways of thinking, creating and understanding the fact of making cinema.
__________________________________________________________________________________

FESTIVAL INTERNACIONAL DE MEDIOMETRAJES DE VALENCIA

La Cabina es un Festival Internacional de Mediometrajes (películas de entre 30 y 60 minutos) celebrado anualmente en Valencia. El certamen tiene por objetivo crear un foro para la muestra de las últimas tendencias cinematográficas en un formato innovador en un festival.

Existe una gran producción de mediometrajes en todo el mundo. La Cabina muestra que las películas de esta duración tienen la misma calidad que las que podemos ver en cualquier sala de cine o festival de referencia.

La Cabina pretende que todos los participantes aprendan unos de otros en un foro internacional con distintas maneras de pensar, de crear y de entender el hecho cinematográfico.

Name: Sound Off Films
Description:
Sound Off is a boutique non-fiction studio, owned and steered by empowered women. We are committed to making an impact through crafting premium branded content and captivating non-fiction entertainment. For the last decade we have been pioneers in the progressive production landscape, positioning ourselves at the vanguard of socially-conscious filmmaking. We create entertainment-forward media that attracts audiences while still having a pulse on the most pressing issues of our time.

At Sound Off, we foster a symbiotic relationship with our clients and network partners and pride ourselves on our unparalleled commitment to friendly service, combined with the creation of groundbreaking content, and storytelling rooted in social consciousness. This three-pronged approach enables us to unveil the untapped potential of brands and narratives through compelling, forward-thinking, and powerful content.

Through our work, we seek not merely to tell stories but to inspire change, stimulate dialogue, and generate influence. Sound Off isn't just a production company, we are architects of impact, curating the interface between networks and brands and their respective audiences through authentic, provocative and immersive storytelling. We are the ones behind unforgettable narratives, shaping the future with stories that matter. 

Join us; let’s SOUND OFF together

Name: Light House Entertainment
Description:
Light House Entertainment (LHE), was established in November 2010 to educate and equip the younger generation for the growing entertainment industry and life opportunities in Nigeria and the world at large. Idum's Creation seeks to provide continuing education through the Arts and training in Acting, directing, dance and children’s theatre. In the emerging and vibrant Nigerian entertainment industry, it has become necessary to improve and develop skills in order to meet the international standards of filmmaking.

Since its establishment, IDC has trained well over 50 students. Many of them are actively engaged in the entertainment industry, while others have moved on to do other businesses. Our faculty comprises sound and competent academics in the courses we offer.

At Idum's Creation, we are committed to enabling all our students to profit from a culture of learning, aligned with our teaching ethos, We aim to support students so they can achieve their full academic potential, while also equipping them for the demands of continuous learning and self-reliance.

Name: Festival International du Film Francophone de Namur
Description:
Le 40e Festival International du Film Francophone de Namur aura lieu du 3 au 10 octobre 2025 !

Le FIFF Namur s’est imposé sur la scène nationale et internationale comme un acteur incontournable dans la diffusion et la promotion du 7ème art. En explorant des univers cinématographiques variés, en les faisant découvrir à un public multiple, en favorisant la création et en veillant à éduquer la jeune génération. Le FIFF Namur est alors un des festivals qui fait briller le cinéma francophone.

Name: Bay Owl Studios
Description:
Bay Owl Studios is a premier commercial recording and post-production facility, featuring five state-of-the-art studios equipped to handle a wide range of audio projects, from music production to film post-production. Our team of experienced engineers brings decades of expertise, ensuring every project is executed with precision and creativity.

With a hybrid workflow facilitated by the API Box II Console and high-end analogue outboard gear, we deliver seamless integration of both digital and analogue processes. We also license the latest industry-standard software and plugins, making it easy to bring in external sessions and continue working efficiently.

We offer customised packages tailored to meet the specific needs of each project, balancing delivery timelines, budgets, and audio quality without compromise. Special pricing options are available for independent artists, recognising the unique requirements of the creative community.

Conveniently located near Khar station, our facility provides easy access for clients across the city.

Name: Notodofilmfest
Description:
Notodofilmfest es un festival de cine que nace en el año 2001 con la vocación de apoyar y servir de escaparate a los jóvenes creadores audiovisuales a través de un nuevo medio, internet; y que además rompe con las barreras de producción y distribución de películas.

El festival es una iniciativa de La Fábrica a partir de una idea original de Javier Fesser y su objetivo es poner Internet al servicio del cine como fórmula para descubrir el nuevo talento, para poder experimentar con un nuevo medio al alcance de todos, y para conseguir una muy amplia difusión. Con dieciocho ediciones a sus espaldas, es ampliamente reconocido en España como la convocatoria de referencia del cine en Internet.

Notodofilmfest ha alcanzado una alta participación y audiencia internacional: más de 18.000 cortometrajes presentados a concurso en dieciocho ediciones, películas de 48 países diferentes, 20 millones de espectadores anuales y sustanciosos premios repartidos en diferentes categorías, que incluyen además becas de formación y ayudas a la producción de proyectos audiovisuales.

El jurado de cada edición está formado por realizadores reconocidos que producen además un cortometraje para el festival: Julio Medem, Guillermo del Toro, Bigas Luna, J. J. Campanella, Terry Gilliam, Alejandro Amenábar, Rodrigo Cortés, José Corbacho, Ernesto Alterio, Oliver Laxe, Eva Leira, Yolanda Serrano, Óscar Jaenada, Mariano Barroso, Claudia Llosa, Iciar Bollaín, Álex de la Iglesia, Javier Fesser, Eliseo Subiela, Achero Mañas, Juan C. Fresnadillo, Daniel Monzón, David Trueba, Isabel Coixet, Santi Amodeo, Javier Corcuera, Jaume Balagueró, Montxo Armendáriz, Manuel Huerga, Pablo Stoll, Gracia Querejeta, Chus Gutiérrez, Víctor García León, Fernando Colomo, Carlos Bardem, Javier Rebollo … son solo algunos de ellos.

Name: Stories by light
Description: Welkom bij Stories by Light – waar we merken en verhalen tot leven brengen door middel van doordachte en hoogwaardige foto- en videoproducties. Bij ons draait alles om de kracht van visuele storytelling. Met een scherp oog voor detail, een constante drive voor creativiteit en een duidelijke focus op het versterken van uw merkidentiteit, zorgen we voor producties die blijven hangen en inspireren.

Name: Kelvin
Description:
Kelvin is a cinema lighting brand developed by LED technology company Rift Labs made in Norway, Scandinavia with a proud history of manufacturing award-winning cinema lighting fixtures and lighting software for the global market in video and photo since 2010.  

We are on a mission to explore the spectrum of light to create amazing products loved by people. 

The headquarter of Kelvin is located in Oslo, Norway with offices in Berlin and Munich. 

To learn more about Kelvin, please visit: www.kelvinlight.com

Name: Akson Studio
Description: Założone w 1992 roku Akson Studio jest jednym z czołowych domów produkcyjnych w Polsce. Współpracowało z takimi wyjątkowymi twórcami jak Andrzej Wajda, Jan Komasa, Jerzy Skolimowski i wielu innych. Przez prawie 30 lat Akson Studio z sukcesem wyprodukowało blisko 100 filmów i seriali, pośród których znalazły się takie dzieła jak nominowany do Oscara "Katyń" (reż. Andrzej Wajda), zwycięzca Srebrnego Niedźwiedzia na Berlinale "Tatarak" (reż. Andrzej Wajda), czy jedna z największych produkcji w historii polskiej kinematografii "Miasto 44" (reż. Jan Komasa). Pośród ostatnich dokonań Akson Studio znalazły się filmy wybitnych młodych twórców jak wielokrotnie nagrodzony w Polsce i za granicą "Atak paniki" (reż. Paweł Maślona) czy "Jak najdalej stąd" (reż. Piotr Domalewski).

Name: Atuacena
Description:
A comunicação artística vem se tornando cada vez mais fundamental no mercado do entretenimento e publicitário. E nós do Atuacena notamos o quão superficial e padronizada está a comunicação audiovisual e fotográfica. 
 
Por isso, possuímos o propósito de ajudar marcas, pessoas e grandes produções a criarem imagens e filmagens com uma característica única e que se complemente com o objetivo desejado ao projeto. 

Para que isso aconteça contamos com uma equipe de profissionais ARTISTAS (diretores, fotógrafos, roteiristas, maquiadores, operadores de câmera, stylists, etc…) para que juntos elaborem um conteúdo que irá atingir o seu objetivo com mais eficácia. 

Por este motivo o Atuacena possuí o propósito de utilizar das linguagens artísticas em Filmes e fotos, para se comunicar no mercado do entretenimento e publicidade.

Name: Cineporto
Description:
Cineporto dell'Emilia-Romagna is a private hub for the production of films and documentaries located in the heart of Emilia-Romagna, Italy, just a short distance from Modena and Bologna. It is a project of @Scarabeo Entertainment, an Italian production company founded in 2019 by @Alessandra Stefani,  a producer and director.

The Cineporto catalyzes in one place all the work instrumental to film production. Its structure that covers an area of 1,500 square meters and architecture meets all needs of big film crews and shooting companies, allowing easily the access and transit of trucks for loading, unloading and equipment stock.

The Cineporto stands out for its commitment to the environment: it is built entirely with sustainability and energy efficiency criteria.
It offers a wide range of services, including:
- Possibility to shoot films in one place in order to create a unique and customized film setting.

- Support in post-production, with three rooms dedicated to audio and video post-production, both equipped with cutting-edge hardware and software design, to manage the entire workflow of film post-production, from editing to color correction to sound design.

 - Commitment to sustainability, using renewable energy sources and adopting eco-friendly practices in order to reduce the environmental impact of productions made within it.

For more information visit⟹https://www.cineportoemiliaromagna.it/

Name: L'Alternativa, 28th Barcelona Independent Film Festival
Description:
This year the Barcelona Independent Film Festival, l'Alternativa, reaches its 28th edition. For 28 years we've been offering filmgoers and professionals a unique opportunity to discover and enjoy screenings and activities that value creative freedom, diversity, innovation, commitment and thought-provoking reflection.

L'Alternativa has three competition sections in l'Alternativa Official: International Feature Films, International Short Films and Spanish Films. L'Alternativa Parallel presents tributes, premieres, little-known films, work by new directors and a programme of family screenings. And l'Alternativa Hall offers a rich, varied programme of free screenings, performances and debates in the CCCB Hall.

Alongside the screenings, l'Alternativa Activities includes masterclasses, debates with creators, roundtables, a symposium, creative workshops for children and grownups and Film Schools activities. In addition, l'Alternativa Professionals will be holding the 12th Professional Symposium and the 9th Mentoring Projects.

Name: LaTestuggine
Description:
LaTestuggine nasce nel 1999 come gruppo di lavoro concentrato nella produzione di grafica 3d e non per l’architettura.
Negli anni successivi, spinto da una costante voglia di crescere e imparare, amplia le proprie competenze e realizza i primi video e grafiche animate per corti e film documentari che partecipano a vari festival.
Oggi lo studio lavora principalmente nella realizzazione di video d’animazione e grafiche animate per film e documentari, affiancando a questo anche la produzione di grafica per aziende e organi statali.
Nel 2010 l'animazione di "Giallo a Milano" vince il " Prix du film éducatif, scientifique ou d'entreprise" al Festival di Annecy.

Name: TCS - Technological Cinevideo Services
Description:
TCS provides the motion picture industry with products and services that help film productions achieve success in the most demanding environments. We specialize in cameras, lenses and support for the digital cinema, 35mm/ 16mm film and broadcast/ live TV markets. 

Established 1978 in New York City, TCS has a long history supplying 16mm and 35mm camera gear to documentary and independent filmmakers, as well as feature film and TV shows. Beginning in the 90’s we helped camera crews transition to digital cameras by offering more traditional “cinestyle” configurations.  Our current lineup includes a broad range of the latest digital cinema products gear from deliverable ProRes/ DNxHD codecs to various log gamma and RAW flavors. Our goal is to remain at the forefront of technological developments,  simplify workflows, and support our clients with the personalized and helpful service we have come to be known for. 

TCS is a recognized leader in bringing new technologies to the professional rental market. We proudly offer the latest cameras from Arri, Canon, Red, Sony and Vision/Phantom as well as modern and overhauled vintage glass from Angenieux, Arri/Zeiss, Arri/ Fuji, Bausch & Lomb (Super Baltars), Canon Primes/Zooms, Cooke, Fuji, Leica, and Zeiss.  We also offer Cooke Anamorphic Primes and Angenieux Anamorphic Zooms as well as vintage Kowas.  For more information, please visit www.tcsfilm.com or go to www.twitter.com/tcsfilm.

TCS - Unleash Your Creativity!

Name: Encounters South African International Documentary Festival
Description:
Founded in 1999, Encounters is the leading Creative Documentary Festival in South Africa and on the African continent, offering ten days of diverse and exceptional programming of relevant, creative documentaries from around the globe, striving to take an innovative approach to developing audiences and building capacity in the local and regional industry.

Offering workshops, Masterclasses, filmmaking labs and access programmes, Encounters has become an important site of audience engagement, recently expanding the scope of its programming to encompass new media (Virtual Reality and interactive documentaries) and other forms of non-fiction storytelling, placing an emphasis on a contemporary, cross-disciplinary approach to both documentary reception and production. 

Aiming to promote access to film and television media, the Festival strives to advance human rights and democracy in South Africa as well as encouraging indigenous filmmaking and film literacy for aspiring and emergent filmmakers.

Encounters’ staff and Board believe in the power of film to transform, inform, challenge, support, engage and contribute to mutual understanding and dialogue. Our strategic partnerships with European festivals have created opportunities for South African filmmakers to network with international colleagues, increasing opportunities, business growth and access to global markets that will create sustainable jobs in the sector. 

The Encounters’ film programme is inclusive and open and pairs award-winning documentaries alongside locally-made student films. 

As important for the advancement of filmmakers, is the growth of audiences. The Festival also operates an Outreach Programme, which ensures films travel outside the city centres. Our Inreach Programme provides transport and tickets for screenings, workshops and Masterclasses for film students and previously disadvantaged communities, including members of diverse NGO’s.

Name: Dreamscreen Australia
Description:

From high-end vfx delivered in-camera, to simulated travel, to set extensions, Virtual Production is the latest technological REVOLUTION in filmmaking providing real time efficiencies and solutions to filmmakers across the world. 

Dreamscreen Australia is a the forefront of this new generational technological shift in filmmaking.

Name: Pathé Touch Afrique
Description:
Pathé BC Afrique est une société de distribution cinématographique qui opère sur l'ensemble des territoires d'Afrique francophone.

Créée à Paris en octobre 2020, la société Pathé BC Afrique est co-fondée par le groupe Pathé, le producteur franco-tunisien Wassim Beji (WY Productions) et Jean-François Camilleri (Echo Studio, ancien président de The Walt Disney Company France, Benelux et Afrique francophone et fondateur de DisneyNature).

Pathé BC Afrique est dirigée par Benjamin Reyntjes et distribue un line-up composé de films en provenance de divers éditeurs de films, studios américains, distributeurs français ainsi que de vendeurs internationaux sur les territoires suivants : Maroc, Tunisie, Algérie, Sénégal, Côte d’Ivoire, Cameroun, Madagascar, Togo, Burkina Faso, Tchad, République Démocratique du Congo, Djibouti, Gabon, Bénin, Niger, Guinée et Congo.

Pour répondre aux enjeux majeurs que rencontre la filière cinématographique africaine, Pathé BC Afrique fait de sa priorité la mise en œuvre d’une combinaison d’outils durables, localisés et adaptés aux différents territoires, pour permettre aux films de rencontrer leur public : relations presse, promotion des films, marketing salle, campagnes de communication et grands événements cinéma.  

La société fonde son développement sur des valeurs fortes - responsabilité, modernité, transparence - et s’engage à accompagner toute la filière cinématographique africaine vers plus de croissance et de divertissement.

Name: Pauta Musical Produções
Description:
Nós, da Pauta Musical produzimos Concertos Sinfônicos de Música Clássica, assim como concertos onde introduzimos MPB, Jazz e ouros estilos. Realizamos eventos como congressos e lançamentos de marcas ou produtos com intervenções musicais como: Aberturas impactantes, intermezzos emotivos e finales grandiosos que deixarão o público sensibilizado por aquele momento inesquecível. 
Também realizamos eventos de mediano e pequeno porte com grupos menores, cameratas, grupos vocais em varias combinações.
Os nossos músicos e solistas são os melhores do mercado, participantes das principais orquestras do país e em muitos casos com importante atuação no exterior.
Também realizamos composições ou arranjos esclusivos para a sua marca ou evento.

Name: Bilverkstadspodden
Description:
Sveriges första och enda podcast där vi speglar hela fordonsbranschen. Gästerna kommer ifrån samtliga segment i branschen. Lätta fordon, tunga fordon, däckverkstäder, skadesidan, serviceverkstäder, rekond, bilförsäljning med mera är ett antal exempel på detta. Detsamma när det gäller de olika rollerna. Vi har ägare, vd:s, koncernchefer, mekaniker o.s.v. Även leverantörer och utbildningsföretag kan ni höra på i denna podd liksom rally och racingstjärnor, ja allt som har med fordonsbranschen att göra med andra ord. 

Podcastvärd: Michael Bergvall 
mb@svenskafordonsbranschen.se
Mob.nr: +46 76 328 19 90

Name: San Francisco Film Preserve
Description: SFFP's mission is to restore, preserve, and provide access to the world’s cinematic heritage, ensuring that films—of all genres and eras—remain accessible for future generations. Through education, advocacy, and collaboration, we aim to inspire a deeper appreciation for the art of film while safeguarding its cultural significance for years to come.

Name: GoodThing Productions
Description:
We work with the best creative talent from across the globe to realise compelling storytelling across feature narrative, documentary and television.

Australian based with an international focus, here at GoodThing Productions, we develop and produce projects with a clear pathway to audience.

Name: Festival Stop Motion Montréal
Description:
Festival Stop Motion Montréal is the world’s first film festival dedicated solely to showcasing the art of stop motion animation.

Each September in Montreal, discover new stop motion film screenings from across the globe, hands-on animation workshops for all levels and ages, special masterclass conference guests, networking receptions, meet the filmmakers, festival parties and more!

Name: Boipeba Filmes
Description:
A Boipeba Filmes é uma produtora brasileira que nasce da vontade de contar histórias únicas para audiências e plataformas globais. Da animação ao live-action, a produtora atua como um hub criativo de histórias capazes de emocionar espectadores ao redor do globo.

Com a experiência internacional de seu fundador, Carlos Saldanha (“A Era do Gelo” e “Rio”), a Boipeba dedica-se à criação de séries e filmes para streamings e salas de cinema. Entre suas produções audiovisuais, destacam-se “Cidade Invisível” (Netflix, 2021), “How to Be a Carioca” (Star+, 2022), “Iemanjá – Deusa do Oceano” (Warner, em breve) e “100 Dias” (Disney, em breve).

Name: Les yeux doc
Description:
La plateforme publique de cinéma documentaire Les yeux doc, portée par la Bibliothèque publique d’information, propose aux bibliothèques françaises et à leurs usager·ères un catalogue de plus de 480 films documentaires, régulièrement actualisé et éditorialisé. La collection met l’accent sur les films documentaires d’auteur·rice ou de création, issus de grands festivals ou remarqués en salles, le plus souvent labellisés par la Commission de sélection d’Images en bibliothèques.

L'équipe Les yeux doc accompagne les bibliothécaires pour leur permettre de valoriser au mieux les films disponibles sur la plateforme et de proposer des médiations en ligne ou dans dans leurs espaces.
Elle organise chaque année une journée d'échanges professionnels sur le cinéma documentaire en bibliothèque, ainsi que le Prix du public Les yeux doc, et participe activement au Mois du doc en tant que partenaire d'Images en bibliothèques.

Name: MasiFilm
Description:
MasiFilm è una Società di produzione audiovisiva indipendente, fondata a Roma nel 2013 da Massimiliano Di Lodovico. Nata come casa di produzione principalmente cinematografica, nel corso del tempo si è evoluta fino ad abbracciare le più diverse declinazioni della produzione in ambito audiovisivo con l’obiettivo di applicare il linguaggio cinematografico alle diverse tipologie di media.

MasiFilm è attiva nella produzione esecutiva di lungometraggi, cortometraggi, docufilm, serie TV, pubblicità. La società ha inoltre restaurato e riaperto, in collaborazione con Indigo Film, la sala cinema Caravaggio a Roma.

MasiFilm crede profondamente in tutti i progetti che realizza e negli artisti di cui supporta il lavoro, ed è dotata delle capacità tecniche per offrire al pubblico e ai clienti prodotti di alto —livello.

Since then we have grown into a well-oiled, slick and skilled team that can’t wait to bring you fun, engaging and dazzling content.

Com um incontestável know-how em projetos digitais, cada trabalho é tratado como único. Com enorme paixão e engajamento por profissionais especializados em cada área e etapa de criação, a Veez garante qualidade e originalidade em cada projeto.

Bons vídeos geram bons resultados, por isso a Produtora Veez é especialista em soluções customizadas de conteúdo audiovisual. Com foco, engajamento e paixão por novos projetos, desenvolvemos soluções sob-medida para cada trabalho.

Trabalhamos com diversas técnicas de vídeo, Filmagem e Edição, Animação 2D, Animação 3D, Whitebord Animation e Motion Graphics, com foco para criação de Vídeo Institucional, Vídeo Marketing, Vídeo para Treinamento, Vídeo publicitário e Criação de Conteúdo.

Name: LYNX Film
Description:
LYNX Film is a new Dutch film production company founded by Julia van de Graaff. With a keen eye for stories with underlying social issues LYNX produces films that are cinematographically enticing. 

https://bio.site/lynxfilm

LYNX Films first feature, UNDER WATER by Edgar Kapp and Kuba Szutkowski, had its world premiere in 2022 at Film by the Sea. It was nominated in the 1-2?Competition at the 38th Warsaw International Film Festival and nominated for Narrative Feature Award (out of 5400 submissions) at Austin Film Festival.
The theatrical release in Dutch film theatres by distributor Amstelfilm was in 2023. 
The Bay Area Premiere at CineQuest Film & VR Festival California took place in August 2023 and its Los Angeles Premiere at the 24th Valley Film Festival in August 2024. 

Julia is one of the co-writers of 'Under Water' and played the antagonist, Nel, an avid 70 year old doomsday prepper.

SOBER, a short by Joël Duinkerke, after a screenplay by Julia van de Graaff in which she played the leading part, premiered internationally at Raindance in 2021 (out of 12000 submissions in shorts).
Also that year, at Topaz Film Festival (a.k.a. Flicks by Chicks) it won Best Foreign Short. SOBER was nominated for Best Dutch Short at Film by the Sea 2021 and at the New Renaissance FF Amsterdam 2023, where it received a 'special mention'.

Julia is one of four shareholders of Cinebeat B.V. that will operate the brand new Cinema The Pulse on the Zuidas of Amsterdam and which will have nine screens, including three for Cinema-on-demand. It will open summer 2025.

Name: XYi Design Limited
Description:
Over the past 24 years, XYi Design has established itself as a trusted supplier to some of the largest film studios around the world specialising in the adaptation and localisation of theatrical campaigns across all media in multiple territories.

Working closely with both international and local clients, XYi Design draws on the extensive skill base provided by its dedicated creative and production teams to offer professional and original solutions across the full spectrum of the marketing mix.

We adapt the original artwork into multiple sizes and formats localising a variety of campaign media across materials and markets whilst maintaining the semblance of the original creative.

We manage, produce and handle each and every aspect of the campaign process from the initial reach-out and collation of local requirements, through to the approval process and finally, the delivery of the approved materials. Name: Regent Park Film Festival
Description: Regent Park Film Festival (RPFF) is a non-profit cultural and educational media arts organization. It is Toronto’s longest-running, free community film festival, and is the sole community film festival in Canada’s largest and oldest public housing neighbourhood. RPFF is a staple in the community. In addition to our annual festival in November, we offer year-round screenings, our annual School Program, workshops and community events at no cost.

Name: Suitable Pictures
Description:
SPLLP has two Divisions : Production Scope (Production Services Division) and Suitable Pictures (Original Content Division)

Alan McAlex founded Suitable Pictures in 2019 with a commitment to fostering both established and emerging voices. The company thrives on innovative, cinematic storytelling, crafting hyperlocal narratives with universal resonance. A prime example is Alan’s latest project, Boong, a Manipuri-language film that premiered at the 2024 Toronto International Film Festival (TIFF).

In 2024, two of his projects premiered at Cannes. Santosh (Un Certain Regard), produced by BBC and BFI, was also selected as the UK’s official entry for Best International Feature Film at the Oscars. Sister Midnight (Directors’ Fortnight), produced by Film4 and BFI, was equally well-received. Both films were nominated for the 2025 BAFTA Awards.

Earlier in his career, Alan produced Liar’s Dice (2014), which premiered at Sundance, became India’s official entry for Best International Feature Film at the Oscars, and won National Awards for Best Actress and Best Cinematography. His 2015 film Killa (The Fort) won the Crystal Bear at Berlinale and was released in India, France (La Forteresse), and Sweden (Fortet).

He later produced Nil Battey Sanatta (2016), Moothon (2019), and Fire in the Mountains (2021), all of which received critical and commercial acclaim. Moothon premiered at TIFF 2019, opened MAMI, and was named one of the Top 25 Malayalam Films of the Decade in one of the most prominent Indian Publications (The Hindu). Fire in the Mountains debuted at Sundance 2021 and won the Gender Sensitivity Award at the Critics’ Choice Awards 2024.

Expanding into episodic content, Suitable Pictures co-produced A Suitable Boy with BBC Studios, directed by Mira Nair, which premiered on Netflix. Their latest series, Poacher, a crime drama about ivory poaching in India, premiered at Sundance 2023 and was released on Amazon Prime Video.

Beyond Suitable Pictures, Alan launched Product

Name: Buddy Film Foundation

It is our belief that the best way to integrate into society and build a new life, is by going to work. Work offers stability, income, social contacts, growth and a certain social status.

We adapt the original artwork into multiple sizes and formats localising a variety of campaign media across materials and markets whilst maintaining the semblance of the original creative.

We manage, produce and handle each and every aspect of the campaign process from the initial reach-out and collation of local requirements, through to the approval process and finally, the delivery of the approved materials. This ensures the creative choice for each aspect of the campaign resonates to maximum effectiveness with local audiences.

Our focus is on supplying fast, unified, high quality executions at very competitive rates.

Name: Toma Virtual S.A.
Description: Productora integral de VFX y animación

Name: Filmfestival Oostende
Description:
The Ostend Film Festival (FFO) is a warm and accessible festival that has been celebrating outstanding cinema since 2007. Each year, we showcase a unique blend of acclaimed local productions, rising European talent, and remarkable international films — from high-profile premieres to bold, auteur-driven cinema.

As a festival with a heart for both film and audience, FFO is committed to creating space for immersive experiences, meaningful encounters, and thoughtful reflection. Whether you're a passionate cinephile or simply curious, you'll feel at home with us.

In addition to red carpet moments, masterclasses, and industry events, we deliberately foster an inclusive and welcoming atmosphere where every voice matters.

FFO is active all year round. Through film screenings, educational initiatives, collaborations with cultural partners, and content-driven projects, we stay engaged locally and beyond. This year-round presence helps us build a sustainable and rooted film culture with international resonance.

Located on the shores of the North Sea, FFO connects people through stories — with a sharp eye for quality European cinema and a selection that surprises, moves, and enriches.

Name: Arkedia Films
Description:
Productora audiovisual con base en Bilbao.

Ofrecemos servicios de producción y postproducción de vídeo y fotografía a todo tipo de clientes y empresas.

Contamos con amplia experiencia en el sector, con un estilo propio adaptado a los códigos visuales más actuales.

A la hora de afrontar un proyecto, definimos claramente los objetivos con el cliente, lo que nos ayuda a aportar creatividad, calidad y un acabado cuidado.

Name: Human Rights Film Festival Zurich
Description: Founded in 2015, the Human Rights Film Festival Zurich takes place yearly at Kino Kosmos in Zurich. Over six days, we will show artistically strong films that explore human rights issues – avoiding stereotypes or moralistic finger-pointing. Afterwards there will be discussions with directors, protagonists and experts. In this way, what we have seen can be placed in a larger context. We believe in the power of cinema as an art form and in the film festival as a meeting place for people who want to deal with a complex world.

Name: Boot Polissh Films
Description:
We are an award-winning production company with a reputation for creative excellence. Our endeavor is to explore and craft engaging storytelling across platforms.

Since our inception in 2011, we have become one of the leading producers of content — from advertising commercials to music videos to animation, digital and branded content and now even feature films — with over millions of views online so far and counting.

At the core we stand for creative originality, integrity and excellence.

Our Founder/Executive Producer is an award-winning Producer Ashit Ghelani.

Description:

Name: Event Cinema Association
Description:
Cinemas are a vital part of our cultural landscape offering a place for audiences to enjoy film and other forms of cultural activity such as music, dance, opera, theatre and sport.
 
The Event Cinema Association (ECA) is a non-profit organisation, whose mission is to support and promote event cinema for content providers, distributors and exhibitors looking to offer audiences a wider range of experiences.   The ECA also provides information and analysis for distributors and exhibitors of event cinema to help grow the sector, and support in tackling the technical and commercial issues that affect it.

Name: NFDC-National Film Archive of India
Description:
National Film Archive of India (NFAI) was established as a media unit of the Ministry of Information and Broadcasting in February 1964. It is a member of the International Federation of Film Archives. In March 2022, it was merged with National Film Development Corporation. 

Its three principal objectives are: to trace, acquire and preserve for posterity the heritage of Indian cinema; to classify, document data and undertake research relating to films; to act as a centre for the dissemination of film culture.

Name: Reykjavik Visual
Description: Reykjavik Visual is dedicated to serving the production of feature films, television and commercials. Reykjavik Visual is an Icelandic sister-company to Copenhagen Visual . We help filmmakers solve creative production challenges and realise their unique visions. We jump at the opportunity to work closely with directors, producers and other creatives, to bring their vision to life. In order to do so most efficiently, Reykjavik and Copenhagen Visual work closely together to ensure the best possible outcome for our clients.

Name: Kinepolis Film Distribution
Description:
Kinepolis Film Distribution (KFD) is sinds 1997 actief als onafhankelijke filmdistributeur in België en Luxemburg. Klein begonnen wist KFD zich in de daaropvolgende jaren op te werken tot één van de grootste onafhankelijke filmverdelers. Als specialist op het vlak van Vlaamse films heeft KFD een vaste stek veroverd in het Belgische filmlandschap.
De activiteit filmdistributie legt zich toe op de distributie van internationale en nationale films in België en Luxemburg. Kinepolis Film Distribution (KFD) werkt hierbij nauw samen met Dutch FilmWorks (DFW) uit Nederland.


Depuis 1997, Kinepolis Film Distribution (KFD) est actif en tant que distributeur indépendant de films tant en Belgique qu’au Luxembourg. Durant toutes ces années KFD a su se hisser parmi les plus grands distributeurs de films indépendants.
L’activité distribution de films ce concentre sur la distribution de films internationaux et nationaux en Belgique et au Luxembourg. Pour cela, Kinepolis Film Distribution (KFD) travaille en étroite collaboration avec Dutch FilmWorks (DFW) aux Pays-Bas.

Name: CINEMAX
Description:
CINEMAX, založený v roku 2006, je najväčšou a najmodernejšou sieťou multikín na Slovensku, s 14 kinami a 66 sálami v 12 mestách po celej krajine. Naším cieľom je prinášať divákom rozmanité filmové zážitky – od hollywoodskych blockbusterov až po nezávislé a európske snímky. Ako člen siete Europa Cinemas sa zameriavame aj na podporu kvalitnej európskej kinematografie. Naše kiná sú vybavené špičkovými technológiami, vrátane IMAX v BORY Mall s najväčším plátnom na Slovensku, DOLBY ATMOS pre špičkový zvuk, 4D technológie D-BOX a pohodlných Premium Plus sedačiek. Neustále inovujeme a prinášame divákom maximálny komfort a jedinečný filmový zážitok.

CINEMAX, founded in 2006, is the largest and most modern cinema chain in Slovakia, operating 14 cinemas with 66 screens across 12 cities. Our goal is to offer a diverse movie experience, from Hollywood blockbusters to independent and European films. As a member of the Europa Cinemas network, we are committed to promoting high-quality European cinema. Our cinemas feature state-of-the-art technology, including IMAX at BORY Mall, with the largest screen in Slovakia, DOLBY ATMOS for premium sound, 4D D-BOX technology, and comfortable Premium Plus seating. We constantly innovate to provide our audience with maximum comfort and a unique cinematic experience.

Name: PUSH Visual Effects
Description:
PUSH is a Creative studio based in sunny and trendy Lisbon.
We set out to create alternate realities, explore new narratives and build new worlds.
Merging Creative Direction with Visual Engineering, we are on a mission to take storytelling to a new level.

PUSH YOURSELF TO NEW IDEAS.

Description:
Epic Films maakt grootse videos. Met hoge production én emotional value. Met impact op je kijker. Episch in kwaliteit, en in het maakproces. We zijn wendbaar als een speedboot, maar degelijk als een tanker. We gaan tot het uiterste om merken te versterken. 

Sinds 2023 bieden we als micro agency nu ook duurzame events & teambuildings aan. Check Epic Glow via onze LinkedIn pagina of website www.epicglow.be.

Description:
The Digital Production Symposium brings together the world’s premier creators of digital visual effects, animation, and interactive experiences.

Scientists, engineers, artists, and producers share ideas, insights, and techniques that bring innovation to real-world production.

Description: Melbourne based video production and photography business, capturing and crafting engaging and emotive films and images.

Name: Gloriamundi Producciones SL
Description:
Gloriamundi Producciones es una compañía de producción española fundada en 2012 por el galardonado productor argentino Pablo Enrique Bossi. 



Una de las señas de identidad de Gloriamundi es la de crear puentes de colaboración creativa entre distintos países y talentos para producir obras audiovisuales excepcionales capaces de cruzar fronteras. 


Desde su creación, Gloriamundi Producciones, ha estado a cargo de grandes títulos como Sólo para dos (2013), de Roberto Santiago; Francisco, el padre Jorge (2015), de Beda Docampo Feijoó; Kóblic (2016), de Sebastián Borensztein; Tini, el gran cambio de Violetta (2016), de Juan Pablo Buscarini; Nieve negra (2017), de Martín Hodara; No dormirás (2018), de Gustavo Hernández; y la Gallina Turuleca (2019), de Víctor Monigote y Eduardo Gondell, La gran aventura de los Lunnis y el libro mágico (2019), de Juan Pablo Buscarini; Lo nunca visto (2019) de Marina Seresesky o series de ficción tales como Limbo (2021), Entrelazados (2021), El grito de las Mariposas (2021) y El mejor infarto de mi vida (2022).



Actualmente Gloriamundi se encuentra en fase de post producción de la serie de ficción fantástica Hay algo en el Bosque (2022), de Nicolás Amelio Ortiz y Gastón Haag, que se estrenará en febrero de 2024 en Disney + Latam; y Bellas Artes (2023), de los aclamados directores Mariano Cohn y Gastón Duprat, que narra en clave de humor sarcástico una serie de historias y personajes en torno a la gestión y dinámica de un Museo de Arte Moderno. La serie cuenta con un elenco excepcional tanto nacional e internacional, y se estrenará en 2024 simultáneamente en Disney+ Latam y Movistar+ España.

Description:
Dubbing of series, movies, trailers, documentaries, toys, promos, audiobooks, and more.

MilVox has a team of excellent translators, subtitlers, voiceover artists, sound engineers, editors and directors.

Name: Nouveau Media UK
Description: Four years ago the founder, Peter Wilson, started Nouveau Media UK. Since then they have grown into a solid business in an incredibly short amount of time with their headquarters based in the beating heart of London. They have built a reputation based on their visual flair and gripping storytelling. NMUK has been exceeding in producing and directing compelling stories.

Name: CineGlobe Film Festival
Description:
CineGlobe is the international festival of short films inspired by science, that takes place at CERN. 

Situated just outside Geneva, Switzerland, CERN (the European Organization for Nuclear Research) is the world’s largest physics laboratory. 

 After 14 successful editions - and many great “orbits” in neighbouring towns, plus our October Science Week stop - CineGlobe is back in 2026 with the theme Transitions. 
 See you in early June at the CERN Science Gateway Campus.

The mission of the CineGlobe Film Festival is to challenge the commonly perceived divisions between science and art by demonstrating that they are both essential to interpreting our world.

Name: ASAP Distribution - Film & TV Consumables (Acton Stationers & Printers Ltd)
Description:
ASAP DISTRIBUTION Film & TV Consumables – Acton Stationers and Printers Ltd.

Acton Stationers and Printers (now trading as ASAP Distribution) was formed in 1976 by John French. Over the years it established itself as a reliable and efficient supplier to the Film and TV industry, understanding its unique demands. We are first point of contact for the majority of feature productions when setting up their offices and purchasing supplies through pre-production, during filming and when moving into post production. Having provided a service to the Film and TV industry for over 45 years, the company has evolved to suit the needs of productions, sourcing specialist products and providing a delivery service which meets the high demands of the industry.

Over the last few years we have expanded our product range so much so that we are now much more than just a stationery and print supplier. We haven’t changed who or what we are, the ASAP DISTRIBUTION branding just strengthens the fact that we deliver goods when needed and is a perfect acronym for Acton Stationers and Printers.

We are the leading suppliers for stationery, printing, camera consumables and art supplies to the Film and TV industry.

Nish (Director) and Yatin (Manager) have continued to exercise the company’s ethos of striving to provide the best service possible to its client base.

We are incredibly proud to be an independent supplier, and have built our reputation by providing the highest quality of service and products with a customer focussed approach.

Name: NYU Sports Film Festival
Description:
The NYU Sports Film Festival (NYUSFF) is a sports-themed film festival that was created to showcase and celebrate the powerful intersection of sports and film.

Co-produced by the NYU Production Lab and NYU Athletics, the student-run festival draws engaging short films that highlight nuanced stories in sports from all over the world.

NYUSFF began virtually in 2021, partnering with SNY to create a television special about the festival. In 2022, the 2nd Annual Special was broadcast multiple times, featuring four award-winning films and event highlights from the festival. Creators of the Religion of Sports Final Four were awarded with cash prizes an additional screening at the Catalyst Content Festival. NYUSFF has featured speakers from executives at HBOSports, NFLFilms, ESPN, and Religion of Sports, as well as acclaimed guests such as Billy Crudup, Reinaldo Marcus Green, and Spencer Paysinger.

Name: Momo Film Co
Description: Momo Film Co, part of Beach House Pictures and Blue Ant Media, is a Singapore-based film and TV company founded in 2018. We are committed to producing high-quality asian drama for viewers around the world, telling new and authentic asian stories with taste and ambition, and collaborating with established media partners along with new creators.

Name: Jikoni Studios
Description:
Jikoni [Swahili] noun: kitchen

In Swahili, Jikoni means kitchen. At our core, that’s what we are. A space to cook, to create, and to share. Jikoni was built with the creator and production crew in mind-- the walls are mobile, the surfaces are neutral and the ambiance is whatever you’d like to make it. My team and I are here to make sure your visions become reality, and your creations come to life.


Jikoni offers kitchen studio rental and food video production services. Lead by our studio founder, Kiano Moju.

Kiano Moju is a Los Angeles-based culinary producer and on-screen personality, as well as the founder and principal of Jikoni. She was previously a producer with BuzzFeed’s food video vertical, Tasty, where she produced such viral successes as Party Rice Around Africa,  How to Make Moist Carrot Cake, Making Rainbow Croissants, and Making a 4 Flavor Cheesecake.

In 2019, Kiano departed BuzzFeed and launched Jikoni. She holds a Bachelors of Science degree in Communications and Rhetorical Studies from Syracuse University, and a Master of Arts in Publishing from University of the Arts London. 

In May 2020 our company launched our online food community site,  Jikoni.co in efforts to create space for Black and under-represented voices in food media to tell their own stories -highlighting the food of the African diaspora through editorial content and events.

Name: Next Sound Lab
Description:
Next Sound Lab conçoit des expériences immersives qui prennent vie grâce à l’audio. 

En s’appuyant sur la force du récit, l’interactivité et la spatialisation sonore, nous créons des expériences qui développent les imaginaires, ancrent de nouvelles idées et invitent à écouter le monde autrement.

Nos expériences s’intègrent aux événements, expositions ou dispositifs culturels pour renforcer l’impact des démarches de médiation, de sensibilisation ou d’engagement. Qu’il s’agisse d’entreprises, de musées ou d’institutions, nous concevons des formats qui suscitent l’émotion, favorisent l’appropriation des récits et laissent une empreinte durable. 

Parce qu’une émotion marquante reste en mémoire, nous faisons de l’écoute une expérience qui rapproche, interpelle et donne envie d’agir.

Name: Estúdio Olhar Artístico, Lda
Description:
Criado com o objectivo de incentivar e promover a arte, criatividade e pesquisa, o projecto enquadra-se na Inclusão dos Jovens às Tecnologias de Informação e Comunicação através de cursos, palestras, capacitações, workshops.

Uma ideia criada por jovens da área de televisão e cinema e acolhida por pessoas experientes e instituições credíveis como a Associação Moçambicana de Cineastas e o Instituto Nacional das Indústrias Culturais e Criativas, o projecto iniciou a 5 de Maio de 2014 com um curso de Produção de Vídeo.

O curso tinha o objectivo de apresentar aos formandos, as três fases de produção de qualquer produtos audiovisual:
A pré produção, produção e pós produção.

Três cursos consecutivos foram ministrados envolvendo 150 jovens, num período de um ano. Foi introduzido mais dois cursos denominados, Técnicas de Interpretação e Captação de Imagem, o outro é o de Edição de Vídeo, recentemente mais um curso foi introduzido, Técnicas de Apresentação para Televisão.

O projecto contribuiu igualmente na comunicação e sensibilização em matéria de Migração Digital.

Conta neste momento com 1400 pessoas formadas.

Name: Beelddenkers
Description:
Bij Beelddenkers weten we dat je beter zichtbaar wilt zijn op een authentieke manier.
Om dat te kunnen doen, heb je een video nodig die jouw verhaal helder en onderscheidend vertelt.
Het probleem is dat je nog geen video hebt die echt laat zien wie je bent en waar je voor staat. Daardoor loop je kansen mis en blijft je waarde onzichtbaar.
Wij geloven dat waardevolle organisaties zichtbaar mogen zijn.
We begrijpen hoe frustrerend het is als je verhaal niet overkomt—alsof je kansen misloopt. Daarom halen wij jouw verhaal naar boven en brengen het creatief en helder in beeld.
En dit is hoe we dat doen:
Vertel ons je verhaal
Wij werken het uit in een creatief plan en script
We brengen je verhaal tot leven in een authentieke video
Dus: maak direct een afspraak.
En ondertussen kun je alvast onze korte vragenlijst invullen om in 2 minuten te ontdekken welke video jou helpt zichtbaar te worden.
Zodat je stopt met wegkijken terwijl concurrenten de aandacht krijgen—en in plaats daarvan authentiek zichtbaar bent en vertrouwen wint bij je doelgroep.

Name: Filmbüro Baden-Württemberg
Description:
Das Filmbüro Baden-Württemberg wurde 1982 gegründet und hat sich mit seiner Gründungssatzung dem Aufbau und der Förderung des Film- und Medienstandortes Baden-Württemberg verschrieben. Heute gibt das Filmbüro nicht nur den etablierten Filmschaffenden ein Forum sondern auch dem Nachwuchs, der seine Filme im Wettbewerb um den Jugendfilmpreis zeigt und durch die Verbindung mit der Filmschau Baden-Württemberg Kontakte zu den Profis bekommt. Mit dem Indischen Filmfestival Stuttgart präsentieren wir Filme aus einer ganz anderen Kultur und beleben die Deutsch-Indischen Beziehungen nachhaltig. Mit unseren Festivals und Projekten stellen wir die künstlerisch-kreative Arbeit der Filmschaffenden in den Mittelpunkt und bieten den Talenten mit ihren Ideen und deren Umsetzung in allen Gewerken der Filmherstellung die große Bühne.

Name: Doc Alliance
Description:
Doc Alliance is the result of a long-term creative partnership of seven key European documentary film festivals. Our aim is to advance the art of documentary film, support its diversity and continuously promote creative documentary films.

The Doc Alliance festivals are: 
CPH:DOX
Doclisboa
DOK Leipzig
FIDMarseille
Ji.hlava IDFF
Millennium Docs Against Gravity
Visions du Réel

With joint forces the Doc Alliance festivals created DAFilms.com, a VOD platform to makes you discover 4,000+ outstanding documentary and experimental films. DAFilms presents a continually-updated, curated selection of the finest auteur-driven documentary cinema from the world of film festivals. 

In 2008, the seven festival partners introduced the annual Doc Alliance Award competition honoring feature-length films by emerging European filmmakers. A second award category for short films was added in 2021. The Doc Alliance Award competition is an important support system for new talents to continue on their film career, both helping bolster their position as artists seeking financial support for upcoming films and in helping their work reach new audiences at home and abroad. Each festival annually nominates one feature-length and one short film from its pro- gramme for the prizes. The winners are decided by an independent jury.

From 2023, the network will expand its circle and annually invite a guest festival to also nominate candidates for the Doc Alliance Awards and host the award ceremony. This year, we welcome Dokufest in Prizren as our guest partner!

Name: Brenden Theatres
Description:
Brenden Theatres currently operates nearly 100 screens of “Movie Magic” at seven locations in the East Bay of Northern California, Southern Nevada, Arizona and Colorado.

Mr. Johnny Brenden is the owner, President and CEO of the Brenden Theatre Corporation. He comes from a family with a long history in Motion Picture Exhibition. His grandfather, Mr. Ted Mann, was a pioneer of the theatre exhibition industry – who built and operated the former Mann Theatre Corporation. His grandmother is the Hollywood Star of yesteryear, Rhonda Fleming.

As a young teenager, Johnny Brenden learned the movie business early working at his grandfather’s theatres as a cashier and usher while also working World Film Premieres at the Mann’s Chinese Theatre in Hollywood and prestigious Westwood Theatres.

As a young man, Johnny moved into the corporate side of the business in film buying and theatre operations. He soon saw an opportunity to pursue his dream of starting his own theatre company and, in May 1990, started the Brenden Theatre Corporation by opening his first movie theater in the City of Pittsburg near Walnut Creek in Northern California.

The festival is dedicated to providing a new supportive platform that allows young and independent film makers the opportunity to showcase their work to the industry, and kick-start their careers.

Supported by BAFTA award-winning film director Mike Newell and Academy Award winning actress Vanessa Redgrave, KIFF’s submissions for 2024 are currently open on Film Freeway. 

An integral part of Kingston’s culture-led resurgence, KIFF aims to bring the community together for three days of screenings, workshops and events.

Description:
Fonco was founded in 1997 in San Francisco by Fon Davis as a design and fabrication studio specializing in miniatures and special effects. Over the two decades Fonco has been joined by an amazingly diverse, creative and driven group of artists, many of whom have worked for companies including Lucasfilm, ILM, Digital Domain and Disney. In addition to Fonco's incredible talent, Fonco has expanded into a 16,000 square foot facility that includes content creation, production, new media, live streaming, story development, art department, concept art, casting, product design, prop fabrication, model making, set construction, creature fabrication, special effects, pyro robotics, costumes, photography, cinematography, stop motion animation, stage rentals, standing sets, pop-up sets, beauty and special effects make up, fight choreography, fight training classes, post production services, editing, color grading, performance capture, VR development and virtual production always with a focus on visual story telling. The Fonco Studios family, in short, are creative world builders.

The friendly artists at Fonco are all known for wearing many hats, so you don't just get their experience and talent, and you're not just getting a team - what you're getting is a family that is capable of taking on the most creatively challenging projects.

We invite you to bring your project to Fonco Studios, where we believe creativity, attention to detail and hard work equal realizing your vision to its greatest potential.

Name: Gilden Media Productions
Description:
Gilden Media Productions is a full-service audio, video, photography, and live-event production company located just outside of Dallas, TX, and services clients nationwide. As a one-stop-shop creative agency, Gilden Media Productions creates high-quality content that sets your brand apart while raising brand awareness and fine-tuning your brand's online voice and presence.

Gilden Media Productions' History

In 2017, both founders, Sam Paige and Samantha Clark, produced their first film "Love at First Sight" while still working and going to school. This film captured the attention of those with influential opinions in the fast-changing creative world of film, which set the pace for the new company named Gilden Media Productions. The name "Gilden" inspired by A Knight's Tale (2001), starring Heath Ledger, both Sam Paige's favorite film and actor. The two co-founders put their creative mind's to the test over the years that followed. Gilden Media Productions went from making micro-short films to working on preproduction on three feature films.

Gilden Media Productions' Highlights

Some highlights in Gilden Media Productions' journey are getting to film the behind the scenes interviews for the REELZ TV series Murder Made Me Famous, working on their first feature film A Day in March, and getting to work with the band Anova and Nine Zero.

We, at Gilden Media Productions, specialize in social media marketing content creation for local businesses, startups, and artists, in addition to providing demo reels, headshots, and various photography services for actors. Since 2019, the focus at Gilden Media Productions has shifted more on producing full-length feature films. As a company, Gilden Media Productions is most proud of its quality. You can always find someone cheaper, but you won't find another company that cares about your project the way we do.

We try our best to offer the best quality content, but all the credits to quantity and quality belong to our incredibly dedicated team at DMT. Name: Music & Cinema Marseille
Description:
Ciblée sur la jeune création cinématographique et la création musicale pour l’image, la politique artistique du Festival international Music & Cinema Marseille (MCM) est aujourd’hui unique en Europe. Créée en 1999, la manifestation est devenue un rendez-vous incontournable pour le milieu professionnel national et international et se positionne comme un référent de la composition musicale pour l’image.

Avec 350 films présentés chaque année, le MCM réunit plus de 1 000 professionnel•les et 30 000 spectateur•trices autour de projections en avant-première, de rencontres inspirantes et d’événements musicaux exceptionnels ouverts à tous les publics.

Sa programmation s’articule autour de quatre axes :
• Favoriser l’émergence de jeunes talents
• Promouvoir la diversité culturelle au travers de programmes internationaux
• Former et permettre aux talents de créer
• Créer un pôle d'éducation à l'image

Pour les professionnels, le Festival s’est affirmé comme un espace de formation et de création unique en Europe, avec la mise en place de nombreux dispositifs d’aide, d’accompagnements et de mises en relation : production de films, création de ciné-concerts, résidences de composition musicale pour l’image, résidences d’écriture de scénario, co-fondateur du Master InMICS et le 1er Marché européen de la composition musicale pour l’image qui en est l’illustration la plus éclatante avec 80% des projets, français ou européens qui trouvent à cette occasion leur compositeur !

Name: Attic Work
Description:
Não há hoje quem não faça um filme, já tenha feito ou esteja a planear fazer.

Um smartphone transforma imediatamente o seu dono num realizador premiado. 

E sabes que mais? Ainda bem que assim é, significa que há uma enorme apetência no mercado para histórias contadas através de um filme, exatamente aquele que é o nosso território – o nosso sótão (para alguns a sua praia).

Podes sempre fazer o teu filme e deixar-nos aqui apeados, claro que podes mas a questão não é essa, pois também podes resolver o problema do autoclismo que está a pingar, ou planear sozinho a estratégia para uma nova campanha.

A questão é se valerá mesmo a pena entregares-te a essas funções, tendo de passar por todo um processo de aprendizagem que nós temos, conhecemos e até vendemos barato?

Name: Zero35 Filmes
Description:
Zero35 Filmes | Produtora Audiovisual Consultiva Especializada em Comunicação Corporativa
Desde 2014, trazemos qualidade de cinema para a comunicação corporativa. Nossa equipe é formada em cinema com experiência em grandes produções audiovisuais, filmes e séries. Agora, aplicamos essa expertise em soluções estratégicas para empresas.
Criamos conteúdo para empresas que precisam comunicar melhor, treinar equipes distribuídas ou fortalecer sua presença digital. Não somos apenas executores, mas parceiros estratégicos. Mergulhamos na cultura da sua empresa para entregar soluções personalizadas. Cuidamos de todas as etapas: estratégia à entrega final, com atendimento dedicado.
→ Vídeos de Treinamento e Desenvolvimento - Transformamos conteúdo complexo em material claro e escalável.
→ Comunicação Interna Estratégica - Vídeos institucionais, onboarding e campanhas que conectam.
→ Conteúdo para Redes Sociais e Marketing - Vídeos comerciais, animações e conteúdo otimizado para engajar.
→ Transmissões ao Vivo, eventos corporativos, palestras com qualidade profissional.
Processo Simples (você não precisa entender de vídeo):
Consultoria → Roteiro → Produção → Entrega no prazo
*Atendimento em todo o Brasil

A EXPLORA Filmes é uma empresa que atua no mercado audiovisual e de publicidade produzindo conteúdos variados, oferecendo soluções em comunicação que buscam entender as necessidades e demandas de cada cliente. 

Acreditamos que o vídeo é a melhor ferramenta para atingir diferentes públicos, em qualquer momento e lugar, amplificando sua forma de comunicação e fazendo com que sua palavra seja não só ouvida e vista, mas entendida por todos.

Description:

Binnen de Koning van Engeland zit de brasserie OSCARS, met een keuken die gedefinieerd kan worden als verrassend, creatief en vers. In combinatie kan er genoten worden van een volledig avondje uit.

Name: MOTELX - Lisbon International Horror Film Festival
Description:
MOTELx – Lisbon International Horror Film Festival aims to stimulate the production of genre films in Portugal, to screen the best of horror features and short films produced all over the world, and to contribute to educating younger audiences and to help contextualize recent production trends by programming selected retrospectives.

The festival hosts the MOTELx Award – Best Portuguese Horror Short Film, whose recipient will win a money prize and the Méliès d'Argent.

Past MOTELx special guests include Coffin Joe, George Romero, Stuart Gordon, John Landis, Mick Garris, Eli Roth, and Dario Argento.

MOTELx is an adherent member of the European Fantastic Film Festivals Federation (EFFFF).


Submissions are open all year round. Deadline for each edition is 15 June. Regulations and online submission form available at www.motelx.org.

Name: The Movie Institute
Description:
The Movie Institute is dedicated to the training of life and leadership skills in young people and adults by utilizing the creativity and discipline of the motion media arts and sciences. 

Kids are our future. The Movie Institute believes young people succeed when they are empowered with the skills that help them to leave high school as workforce ready, good citizens.

MI instills leadership and success skills in kids through collaboration and problem-solving challenges that are part of the movie making experience. Our programs are fun, but the skills youth gain from our mentors and from one another develop positive character and values, good decision making, and talents that last a lifetime.

MI Background
Founded by film and video industry professional Keith Randal Duncan in 2000, the Movie Institute with Martha Duncan, The Movie Institute is a 501 (c) 3 non-profit organization dedicated to the empowerment of young people as well as adults for positive character growth and successful career development by providing mentoring and training for success. 

The Movie Institute also produces professional digital films and video through the mentoring process for businesses, charities and individuals. With the addition of MI North Studio in Plano, Texas, MI provides studio production services, studio rentals, and expanded teambuilding events that provide professional experience for our older students at competitive pricing for clients.

Name: Amarena Pictures
Description:
Amarena Pictures è una casa di produzione con regia integrata.

Nasce nel 2010 distinguendosi per adattività e tempi rapidissimi a fronte di un’efficacia e una qualità di alto livello. Corrispondendo alle esigenze video di top clients delle migliori agenzie pubblicitarie, realizza spot pubblicitari -con declinazioni diverse, come branded content, VR o videogames- che vanno on air in tv, sul web, sui social, su canali di comunicazione interna o corporate.

“Amarena rappresenta quel gusto unico fatto di un lato human e uno estetico che si sente in tutti i contenuti che produciamo.

Questo deriva proprio dal nostro amore per ciò che è umano: anche quando filmiamo gli anelli di Bulgari o un'Alfa Romeo, si sente la comunque la componente umana nelle immagini; si sente la relazione con la storia di chi ha creato il prodotto e di chi lo sceglie: oggi il prodotto stesso non è di per sé più importante del desiderio, della storia e della scelta del consumatore."

Abbiamo collaborato, tra gli altri, con FCA, Coca-Cola, Netflix, Lavazza, Bulgari, Tim, Mercedes, Mazda, Procter & Gamble, Beiersdorf, Istituto Superiore di Sanità, Ministero della Salute e Presidenza del Consiglio. 

Alessandro Merletti De Palo e Giovanni Caloro sono due registi che hanno scelto di trasformare la preparazione, il set e la post produzione in un unico percorso piacevole, creativo, non meccanico o focalizzato solo sul margine.

Il nostro obiettivo: unire precisione, qualità e prontezza, mantenendo un clima piacevole, artistico e disteso dal rapporto B2B al set.

Grazie all’apporto di tutte le nostre professionalità coinvolte e dei nostri producers, gli “amarena guys”, siamo sempre presenti, disponibili, friendly... col desiderio di diventare impeccabili. 

Con Amarena tutto è realizzabile con cura e precisione, in un mood piacevole e intelligente.

THAT’S AMARENA.

sito: amarenapictures.com
mail: amarena@amarenapictures.com

Description:
h7o7 is a duo based on the crossed visions of Hadi Moussally and Olivier Pagny. From directing to post-production through production, h7o7 is fascinated by the image, both in its aesthetic dimension and in its semantic vision. Alternative, experimental and innovative, their projects are on the frontier of experimental, documentary and fashion, seeking to extract their deep meaning while emerging from the codes of the medium. The duo multiplies artistic collaborations in a permanent quest for creative sharing and accessibility to the greatest number.
The main objective of h7o7 is to enable the making and promotion of films and photos where they privileged the mixture of genres between experimental, documentary, fashion and fiction. This is where the «hybrid» vocation starts.
Since 2014, h7o7 created 10 awarded films and photos artistic projects. And in 2021, they received more than 45 awards, 70 nominations and 300 festival selections.

𝗠𝗨𝗦𝗜𝗖 𝗣𝗨𝗕𝗟𝗜𝗦𝗛𝗘𝗥, 𝗟𝗔𝗕𝗘𝗟 & 𝗠𝗨𝗦𝗜𝗖 𝗟𝗜𝗕𝗥𝗔𝗥𝗬
earmotion Audio Creation is one of Germany’s most successful independent production music labels. For over fifteen years, we’ve been providing TV stations, film productions and agencies worldwide with the perfect music - featuring a catalog of over 16,000 tracks and a network of more than 300 composers. Our key markets include Germany, Austria, Switzerland, France, Brazil, and the USA, with hundreds of daily placements.

𝗥𝗜𝗚𝗛𝗧𝗦 𝗠𝗔𝗡𝗔𝗚𝗘𝗠𝗘𝗡𝗧 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝗣𝘂𝗯𝗹𝗶𝘀𝗵𝗲𝗿𝘀, 𝗟𝗮𝗯𝗲𝗹𝘀 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗔𝗿𝘁𝗶𝘀𝘁𝘀
With more than 15 years of experience, we at earmotion ensure that your copyrights are legally protected and your metadata is effortlessly accessible. 
Our rights management services guarantee transparent licensing, work registration, seamless royalty tracking, and hassle-free usage for your production. We also make sure that your tracks and works are registered with all relevant audio monitoring services, so that broadcasters and PROs using these services can generate cue sheets with your usages.

𝗔𝗥𝗧𝗜𝗦𝗧 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗗𝗨𝗖𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡
We have successfully released commercial artist music with multi-million streams and placements. In collaboration with our partners, we release compilations and remixes, continuously expanding our presence in the global music market.

Name: Um Segundo Filmes

Name: 4Film Ltd.
Description:
4film production company has produced 30 films and 20 European co-productions of different genres. 

Our films have won more than 70 awards at film festivals and were distributed in more than 190 countries worldwide. Our current slot includes multiple international co-productions of feature fiction films such as „Burning Days“ by director Emin Alper, Sales Agent: The Match Factory, „Butterfly Vision“ by director Maksym Nakonechnyi, Sales Agent: Wild Bunch (both films premiered at the Cannes Film Festival 2022, Un Certain Regard), feature fiction film “Infinity Pool” by director Brandon Cronenberg with Alexander Skarsgård and Mia Goth in the leading roles which was premiered at Sundance Film Festival 2023, and at Berlinale 2023 (European premiere), distributed by Universal Studio. 

Our current feature fiction film Beautiful Evening, Beautiful Day by Director Ivona Juka, is a candidate for the Best International Feature Film at the 97th Academy Awards and for the prestigious GOYA Award, by the Academy of Cinematographic Arts and Sciences of Spain.

Name: PANGERA
Description: We are “NONCONFORMISTS” by nature. We believe innovation isn’t optional, it’s a necessity. It’s safe to say we embrace change as our comfort zone and see every project as an opportunity to create something new. We are curious, hungry for creativity, aesthetics are our breakfast, we serve strategy for lunch, and we drink at least three shots of audiovisual a day like coffee. What we do? Plenty of people do it, right? Wrong!!! We partner with brands that also believe in the power of going beyond the obvious. Our vision is simple: to build a future where creativity and strategy go hand in hand, crafting stories that connect, inspire, and above all transform.

Name: Oskar Films
Description: Oskar Films is a motion picture production company that creates short-form and full-length documentaries that are always apolitical.
