Name: Pimiento Médias
Description: With a keen eye and an open mind, Pimiento looks outside the typical frame to give life to authentic and captivating stories. Making the most of our creators’ and partners’ talents and subjects, our productions transcend ordinary formats and genres. They take the world on a journey, crossing borders and expanding minds one screen at a time. Pimiento is a workshop for turning dreams into reality, and reality into dreams.

Name: La Vingt-Cinquième Heure
Description: La Vingt-Cinquième Heure est une société fondée en 2012, autour d’une ambition : explorer de nouveaux territoires de narration audiovisuelle et élaborer, pour chacun de ses projets, une stratégie de fabrication et de diffusion s’appuyant sur les nouveaux outils numériques.

Name: Dark Castle Entertainment
Description: Dark Castle Entertainment is an independent film and television production and development company creating atmospheric, visually striking films. With a diverse IP library of film and television titles and deep connections within the entertainment industry and a global outlook, we tell stories that test the boundaries of human experience.

Name: Mann Robinson Studios
Description: Mann Robinson Studios is a company based out of 1035 Donnelly Ave SW, Atlanta, Georgia, United States.

Name: CinemAsia
Description:
CinemAsia is the Gateway to Asian cinema in The Netherland and is the longest running platform for European-Asian film, media and cultural exchange in The Netherlands since 2004.

We run a yearly Asian film festival screening the largest Asian blockbusters to independent films and inspiring documentaries as well as having quarterly screenings, educational programs and activities that promotes the participation of the Asian Diaspora in the European film and media industry  for a more diverse and inclusive community.

CinemAsia FilmLAB is our educational program to create, exhibit stories of the Asian European Diaspora and has produced over 40 short films, numerous industry panels and workshops as well as training many up and coming multicultural talents in the film industry.

Name: OFF - Odense International Film Festival
Description:
OFF is Denmark's international, Academy Award-Qualifying short film festival, and with its launch in 1975, it is also the country’s oldest film festival. OFF is an alternative film festival, born with passion and creativity; a spirit that the festival has maintained and nurtured ever since.

OFF supports and celebrates the short film genre without compromise, but at the same time Odense International Film Festival is a festival for the audience, and every year we experience a massive support from the locals in Odense. Hundreds sign up as volunteers, and even more visit our festival for the high quality experience we deliver. OFF works all year round to support Danish film culture, and to offer and develop diverse film experiences for people to enjoy.

Name: 242 Filmes
Description: Produtora de cinema e audiovisual localizada no oeste da Bahia. Na área de produção desenvolvemos projetos de ficção, documentário e animação em curta metragem, longa metragem e narrativas seriadas. Na área de prestação de serviço atuamos com consultoria de projetos de cinema, audiovisual institucional, filmagem, edição e montagem.

Name: PIPSER - film production company
Description: Founded in 2012 by producer Miljenka Čogelja and documentary film director Đuro Gavran, Pipser is a company dedicated to bold storytelling, addressing social issues, and nurturing emerging talent. Pipser's breakthrough came with the international success of Safe Place (2022), Juraj Lerotić’s debut feature, which premiered and won multiple awards at the Locarno Film Festival. The film has been screened at 74 festivals, earning 52 awards, and was nominated for European Discovery at the European Film Awards and Best International Film at the Goya Awards 2024. Among other projects, Pipser also produced the award-winning documentary One of Us and the documentary series Good Economy by Đuro Gavran. Pipser’s diverse slate includes feature fiction and documentary films, documentary series, and hybrid forms, with a focus on international co-productions, original TV formats, and innovative ideas.

Name: SMARTHOUSE | creative impact studio
Description:
SMARTHOUSE I CREATIVE IMPACT STUDIO. 
We help purpose driven brands and filmmakers tell their story.

Smarthouse is an award-winning creative impact studio based in Amsterdam. We started out as a production company in feature films and commercials. Working for international brands like Tesla, Twitter, Tele2, The World Health Organisation, Toyota and many others that don’t start with a T.

The pandemic gave us time to reflect and made us realise that making commercials for brands that are about more, not better, didn’t make us happy. So today, we only work with brands and filmmakers  that are good for people and planet.
And if we say only, we mean only. Start ups and scale ups are purpose driven from the start and heart.
And we discovered that we have a lot in common with start ups, as getting a film of the ground follows the same steps as starting a start up. You develop your product/service, we develop the script. Then we produce it, identify our target audience, and launch it with an event and a campaign.

Films & Docs
Film highlights include a series of 6 short films produced together with the International Film Festival of Rotterdam that all premiered at IFFR and have traveled the festival world, production services for the Netflix Original series Trailerpark Boys and the Italian mafia film Black Souls, and the first Smarthouse feature film 'La Holandesa', shot entirely in Chile, was selected for Toronto (TIFF) and IFFR and nominated Best Film and Best Actress at the Dutch Film Awards. The documentary 'Puck & Hans - Made in Holland' premiered at the Netherlands Film Festival, toured the cinema's and is Holland's most watched fashion film. Our new fashion doc about the world's first sustainable couturier Ronald van der Kemp is in the making, just as our experimental art film with highly acclaimed video artist Guido van der Werve.

Name: Creative Solutions
Description: Headquartered in Southern California, Creative Solutions designs and manufactures premium products for broadcasters, film and video production companies, and independent content creators. Comprising the brands Teradek, SmallHD, and Wooden Camera, Creative Solutions products are used around the world for sports, news, live events, film, and television production. Creative Solutions has manufacturing and R&D centers in the US, UK, Europe and Israel. Our products are available via our numerous global partners, our showrooms in Los Angeles, as well as our webstores.

Name: CKMOVA
Dorothy St Pictures
Description: Dorothy St Pictures is driven by a desire to shine a light on the people, places and things that have been under-explored whilst providing a home for filmmakers, both new and established, to tell authentic, original and distinctive stories.

Name: Film Platform Rotterdam
Description:
Film Platform Rotterdam is de sectororganisatie voor alle Rotterdamse filmmakers: van groot productiehuis tot gepassioneerde beginneling. We richten ons op netwerken, kennisdelen en gezamenlijke promotie van Rotterdamse makers, organisaties en producties. Met als doel de Rotterdamse filmwereld te verenigen en een podium te bieden.
==============================================================================
Film Platform Rotterdam is a new organization for all types of filmmakers in and around Rotterdam. From large production houses to impassioned starters. We are orientated around robust networking, knowledge sharing and collective promotion of Rotterdam makers, organisations and productions. We operate with the goal of offering a stage for, and improving, the Rotterdam film world.

Name: Beta Cinema
Description:
BETA CINEMA, a subsidiary of Jan Mojto’s European media group Beta Film, is a world sales and co-financing company for quality feature films that combine great stories, commercial viability and artistic integrity. BETA CINEMA’s footprint ranges from Oscar winners to worldwide B.O. and streaming hits, such as THE LIVES OF OTHERS, IL DIVO, DOWNFALL and two time Oscar-nominee NEVER LOOK AWAY, to Netflix hit CALIBRE and multiple award-winning B.O. successes like WOMAN AT WAR, SYSTEM CRASHER and Oscar shortlisted I'M YOUR MAN.

Privacy Policy: shorturl.at/dlrDQ

Name: ZEFERINO,S.A
Description:
Zeferino was set up by a group of professionals involved in the production of films. Their specific needs in terms of professional lighting led them to establish the company in 1989.

Our goal is to offer solutions, operating as specialists in providing a wide range of audiovisual lighting products for the leading operators in the audiovisual sector, 24 hours a day, 365 days a year.

Our services are aimed at cinematographers, photographers, lighting technicians, producers, gaffers, electricians and other professionals involved in advertising, film, television, video, shows, events and other similar projects.

Today, Zeferino is a prominent, well-established firm that stands out thanks to the quality and availability of materials, innovation, commitment, efficiency and the level of service provided in all fields of professional lighting.

Name: Assassins Guild VFX
Description:
During my tenure as a VFX supervisor (show side, vendor side and in-house), I noticed a problem; Overseas vendors will say “yes” and promise the world, but rarely did any of them live up to their promises.

It seemed common in our experience that once you found a great vendor who did what they said they could do and deliver on time they would become too busy to take on work, and you would have to start over again. Putting the project into jeopardy that you could ill afford.

In response to this, I was inspired to create The Assassins Guild, an outsource management for all VFX Outsource needs, Roto/paint/Tracking, focused on ensuring your projects are managed here with North American sensibilities but still retain the overseas cost benefits. We rely on a stable of curated and pre-approved vendors with whom we have worked in the past to ensure you are being taken  care of from turn over to delivery.

Given our close working relationships with these vendors we know exactly what their manpower looks like, plus their strengths and weaknesses and can easily load balance your projects to make sure they are being taken care of most efficiently, all without you having to lift a finger.  You'll get what you asked for the first time allowing you to go back to your regular business while we take care of all the communication and approvals.

At The Assassins Guild, we provide outsource management in:

 Roto/Paint 
 Tracking/Matchmove
 Beauty work
 De-aging

*We may be able to offer limited lite comp work based on availability. 

Let us save you time and money with our all encompassing services to help you:

 Load balance large amounts of shots. 
 Done with a single vendor (us) Just Drop and go. 
 Save valuable Post Budget and time
 Have fast turn around with little management
 TPN Certified Vendors available

To begin, Please reach out through email or DM and let us know about your project and needs. 

Or visit → www.theassassinsguild.com

Name: KINELUX Studios
Description:
Since 2016, we've been aiming at providing high quality post-production services, with a pinch of magic in the process. Technological resources, combined with well developed scripts, bring films to life through fantastic scenarios, daring action and impressive visuals. Our production team is composed of professionals trained and specialized by leading institutions in Canada and the United States!

Aside from post-production services, we have also produced and participated in the execution of contents of our own: the internationally renowned short-film “The Drifter” (2018); the documentary “Ameaças do Céu” (2020), released on the History Channel; the animated short-film Willy's Search (2021), selected at the FANTASPOA and CINEFANTASY festivals; and our biggest undertaking yet: "Helga - A Human Requiem" (2022), which is currently circling the globe, across various festivals. 

In addition to the film market, we also provide services for the advertising world, working not only with VFX and animation, but also with pack shots and 3D graphics. 

Get to knows a little better at www.kinelux.com.br!

Name: Dinard Festival du Film Britannique & Irlandais
Description: Fondé en 1989 par Thierry de la Fournière, le Festival du Film Britannique fait découvrir aux professionnels et aux cinéphiles toute la richesse d’une production dynamique et originale. Le Festival du Film Britannique de Dinard et la production cinématographique britannique ont connu une progression parallèle. Alors que le nombre de films produits en Grande-Bretagne doublait au début des années 90, le Festival a vu grandir sa notoriété et sa fréquentation. De la chronique sociale à la comédie déjantée, le cinéma anglais est d’une grande vigueur. Fidèle à son esprit d’origine, le Festival de Dinard est devenu un vecteur important pour tous les films désireux de conquérir le marché européen. L’événement permet également aux nombreux distributeurs présents de découvrir des films qui pourront ainsi trouver un réseau de salles après le festival.

Name: Soma Entertainment
Description:
Soma Entertainment Ltd, founded by multi-award-winning director, producer, and writer Arun Kumar, is a UK-based production company with over 30 years of industry success. We specialize in delivering global stories with creative integrity and commercial discipline across documentaries, feature films, and premium drama.

Proven Track Record:

The Truck of Dreams: Financed by India’s Sahara Motion Pictures, winner of the World Cinema Award – Best Feature Film, Washington Film Festival (2005).

The Big I Am: British gangster thriller rescued mid-production by Arun Kumar, delivered on time and budget. Distributed worldwide by E-One with commercial success.

Current Slate:

Feature films in financing and attachment phases, tailored for international audiences and global sales.

Premium scripted drama series under development for global streamers, broadcasters, and studios.

Strategic Partnerships:

Ars Nova Capital: Equity partner co-financing all projects.

West Coast Pictures (LA): Led by Oscar-winning producer Sven Ebeling, offering Hollywood talent and distribution reach.

Why Partner with Soma?

Over 30 years of creative and production expertise.

Award-winning international recognition.

Proven record delivering complex projects on budget and schedule.

Strong financing and transatlantic partnerships.

Projects aligned with global market demand.

Vision:
Where creative integrity meets commercial impact, Soma Entertainment Ltd is building an international content brand focused on culturally rich, commercially viable films and series with global reach.

Soma Entertainment Ltd: Global stories. Smart financing. Proven delivery.

Name: Beatcraft Productions
Description: Beatcraft Productions specializes in delivering exceptional sound services for a variety of projects, including music production, sound design, and audio post-production. Our team of skilled audio engineers and creatives is dedicated to transforming ideas into high-quality soundscapes that resonate with audiences. Whether you’re an artist seeking the perfect track, a filmmaker needing immersive audio, or a brand looking to enhance its identity, we tailor our services to meet your unique needs. With a passion for innovation and an unwavering commitment to excellence, Beatcraft Productions is your partner in bringing your sonic vision to life.

Name: Flystudio
Description:
We are the Pioneer Studio in CGI & VFX Production in Malaysia specializing in Film and Television Visual Effects, Animated Films, Animated TV Production, VR Game Production & PACHINKO production.

Flystudio is one of the few companies in Malaysia capable of producing large, international projects. We are equipped with an in-house CG team, pipeline planners, producers, VFX supervisor, creative directors and concept designers.

With 20 years of technical team experience and having produced multiple critically acclaimed international film projects, we have worked alongside many international companies from Japan, Korea, Taiwan, Singapore and China

Beyond CGI production and VFX, we are also a talent center, providing professional training for budding animators and artists. We are committed to equipping and preparing talents with the best skills to excel in this industry.

At Flystudio, we are always devoted and committed to providing high-quality, high-efficiency professional services for over a decade and many years to come!

Name: ARCADÈS
Description:
Beaucoup disent que le DVD est mort… Pourtant, chez Arcadès, nous prouvons chaque jour que les supports vidéo physiques ont encore de très beaux jours devant eux. 

Distributeur et logisticien indépendant, nous accompagnons les éditeurs dans la commercialisation de leurs titres en DVD, Blu-ray et 4K Ultra HD. Nous sommes distributeur exclusif de labels prestigieux comme ARTE Editions, Carlotta Films, Crunchyroll, Potemkine, Ad Vitam, Blaq Out, Diaphana, Pyramide, L’Atelier d’Images, René Château, Coin de Mire, et bien d’autres. Grâce à notre force de vente intégrée, nous assurons une large diffusion des œuvres auprès du public, tout en maximisant les opportunités de revenus pour les éditeurs.

Pour cela, nous avons tissé un réseau de plus de 2 500 points de vente partenaires à travers toute la France, incluant des enseignes comme la FNAC, Cultura, Leclerc, Carrefour, Auchan, des supermarchés, des librairies, des médiathèques, ainsi que des marketplaces et plateformes e-commerce comme Amazon ou Rakuten. Nous mettons à leur disposition un vaste catalogue de plus de 6 000 références, allant du cinéma français et international aux films indépendants, classiques, documentaires, Animés et animation. Nous les aidons à proposer une offre attractive pour les collectionneurs, cinéphiles et revendeurs, et les accompagnons proactivement dans leur stratégie d’animation commerciale, afin de maximiser leurs ventes.

Audio post production for Film and Television.

Name: Women Of The Lens Film Festival CIC
Description:
Empowering through knowledge and celebration is one of the primary tenets of this festival, which aims to bring heartwarming stories to film loving audiences.

Starting in November 2017, Women Of The Lens Film Festival highlights the experiences and achievements of filmmakers, meanwhile showcasing courageous stories from underrepresented women.

Women Of The Lens Film Festival is dedicated to Black women in the film and media industries and delivers its main annual, live events in November, with additional events throughout the year. 

The Festival is dedicated to building a professional community which supports the growth of women in the moving-image industries.

We focus on British work - as well as including productions from around the world. The platform has already programmed a number of films from the USA, Kenya, Nigeria, China, the Caribbean and many other film communities from abroad. 

As Black women storytellers with stories for all to enjoy and share, we sincerely welcome working with anyone who will support the ethos and spirit of Women Of The Lens Film Festival.

We welcome you should you join us on our exciting growth. 

Visit our archives to view the many productions we've programmed. 

View latest updates online: www.womenofthelens.com

www.womenofthelens.com
Facebook, Twitter, Instagram: @womenofthelens

Name: Soma Entertainment
Description:
Soma Entertainment was formed by multi-award-winning Director + Producer Arun Kumar.

Soma Entertainment has produced documentaries, music videos and was responsible for the production on two feature films.

The Truck of Dreams is a charming, rite of passage, ethereal drama set in India. Financed by an Indian movie studio (Sahara Motion Pictures), it won the World Cinema Award for Best Feature Film at the 2005 Washington Film Festival in Washington USA.

The Big I Am is a commercial British gangster thriller set in London. It was financed by City of London-based oil and gas traders. The original director and producer were fired halfway through the production for going over budget and over schedule and the production was halted. The financiers brought Arun Kumar in to direct the movie and complete the production with his own team. The film was delivered to the revised budget and schedule and it has been distributed globally by E-One. 

Soma Entertainment Ltd has a slate of feature film projects in development with budgets ranging from £1.5M / $1.9M to £22M / $27M +. 

Soma Entertainment Ltd is also developing scripted drama series currently under consideration by global streamers, broadcasters & studios.

Soma Entertainment Ltd has close relationships with Los Angeles - based West Coast Pictures (http://www.west-coast-pictures.com/index0.html) headed by academy-award-winning producer Sven Ebeling 
and with Prive London (https://galleryprive.com) headed by Hiren Kothari.

Name: Quantum Spin Studios
Description:
Quantum Spin Studios is a majority woman-owned media company, whose interdisciplinary expertise spans entertainment, worldbuilding, and emerging technology. Recent work includes Dr. Strange in the Multiverse of Madness, WandaVision, Loki, Thor: Love and Thunder, and Spider-Man: No Way Home.

Team members have produced projects for and collaborated with Marvel Studios, The Walt Disney Company, NBCUniversal, Apple, Showtime, Netflix, Global Citizen, Alphabet, Lionsgate, Nintendo, Future of Storytelling, Mythical Entertainment, New Museum, as well as the Cannes, Sundance, and Tribeca Film Festivals.

Name: Young Horizons
Description:
Young Horizons is one of the key branches of the New Horizons Association. It is responsible for distributing and supporting high-quality films and series for young audiences. The Young Horizons brand includes several complementary areas: theatrical distribution (Young Horizons Distribution) and online distribution (Young Horizons VOD); film education for preschools and schools (Young Horizons Education); development and promotion of film and series in Poland and across the world (Young Horizons Industry); and the peak event of the year – TAURON Young Horizons International Film Festival. 

This page focuses on industry related news.


You can find here information about the films distributed by Young Horizons Distribution, and activities around Young Horizons Industry, such as international co-production forum, script and project development workshop, networking programmes.  

Save the dates!
10th Young Horizons Industry, international co-production forum: 28-30 September 2026, Warsaw, Poland.

Name: TELEPOOL
Description:
First-class cinema films, feature films and series that find their audience through us and delight them worldwide - that's what TELEPOOL has stood for for over 60 years. As one of the leading international content groups, we develop, finance, license and distribute high-quality productions.
Whether celebrated blockbusters or hand-picked art house productions, family entertainment, animation, Bavarian series, French comedies, tough action or exciting thrillers - we celebrate the diversity in our program. Our film highlights include the French cinema hit “Pretty Best Friends”, the neo-noir masterpiece “Drive”, the action hit “Transporter 3”, “King Richard” with Will Smith, “Killer's Bodyguard” with Ryan Reynolds and Samuel L. Jackson and the successful animated fairy tale “Maurice the Tomcat” – in the German version with the voices of Bastian Pastewka and Janin Ullmann.

Since May 2024 TELEPOOL and its brands GLOBAL SCREEN and EUROVIDEO are part of the Vuelta Group.

Name: DOXY FIXY
Description:
Amsterdams filmproductiebedrijf DOXY & FIXY verbindt, onder leiding van Janneke Doolaard, Sylvia Baan en Harmen Jalvingh, relevante onderwerpen met een originele visuele stijl. DOXY voegt haar documentaire ervaring toe aan FIXY; geaarde fictie, die wortelt in de werkelijkheid. FIXY inspireert DOXY op haar beurt. Daarnaast maken sport gerelateerde films deel uit van ons speelveld.

Amsterdam-based film production company DOXY & FIXY connects relevant subjects with an original visual style. DOXY adds its documentary experience to FIXY; grounded fiction, that roots in reality. FIXY in turn inspires to DOXY. In addition sports-related films are part of our playing-field.

Name: Barcelona International Film Festival
Description:
Barcelona International Film Festival, The independent awards, is an international competition celebrating the best and major independent films and filmmakers from around the globe. The most adventurous audiences are waiting for your film on this digital and online new normal, and we have prepared an entire festival experience in addition to wonderful opportunities for filmmaking business and networking. 

Online screenings and exhibitions
Professional Talks
Lively filmmaker conversations 
Digital networking activities
Worldwide digital press coverage
Social media and online push with high-quality content
Performances 
Glamorous Awards Night Online Event


Our mission is to discover and support high quality and ambitious films or projects. We are always looking to promote filmmakers’ projects with the right audience, distributors, funding, media press, platforms and more in order to place your film in front of potential investors, sales and opportunities to put your project in a market place. 
We want to promote and support new independent filmmakers providing them the best opportunities to me
We are aiming to watch and review your projects and help you promote and find a space for your creativity within the film industry.et people, make contacts as well as being recognized with awards for their talent. We strive on and are keen to showcase your film to new audiences.

Name: Produktionsallianz Campus
Description: Die Produktionsallianz Campus GmbH, als Tochter der Allianz Deutscher Produzentinnen und Produzenten – Film, Fernsehen und Audiovisuelle Medien, setzt sich aktiv für die Förderung von Nachwuchstalenten sowie für die Aus- und Weiterbildung in der audiovisuellen Produktion ein.

Name: AMB Cinemas
Description: The Asian Cinemas, under the tutelage of Mr. Narayandas K. Narang, has carved a niche in the South Indian Film Broadcasting industry. The brand has become synonymous with ‘affordable high-quality entertainment experience’! After close to a decade’s pilgrimage of making cinema available to the mass populace of Telangana, the Asian Cinemas in collaboration with Superstar Mr. Mahesh Babu Ghattamaneni and Mrs. Namrata Shirodkar Ghattamaneni are launching AMB cinemas – the first-of-its-kind luxury arm of the Asian Cinemas.

Name: Cobblestone Filmproduktion
Description:
For us creativity comes first and is always a collective effort. That’s why we work with an award-winning roster of directors and a handpicked selection of crew members. It’s about tailoring our collective creativity and technical knowhow to the needs of our clients. Our reel includes beautiful cinematic films, documentary-style spots that capture real-life emotion, great comedy and storytelling.

Our digital content studio GRAVEL focuses on digital-at-the-core content conception and production for Social Media and brand websites. www.gravel.studio

Name: The Vineyard VFX
Description: Episodic and film vfx are the heart of our company. Our team have decades worth of combined experience ranging from small tv projects to the highest-end blockbuster films. We’ve taken everything we’ve learned over the years and re-imagined that into something that fullfills the needs of today’s fast paced production cycles and the ever increasing quality.

Name: Snotrava
Description: Snotrava helps creatives turn their talent into sustainable careers.

Name: VALKYRIES PRODUCTIONS
Description: More than yet another production company, Valkyries productions is a young innovative start-up in new technologies, from .

Name: Icaro Films
Description:
Somos Icaro Films, una productora audiovisual que desarrolla contenidos documentales, argumentales y comerciales con nivel cinematográfico. Somos un equipo de profesionales que además de garantizar eficiencia en los procesos, logramos hacer de estos experiencias gratas e inolvidables, gracias a la cercanía con nuestros clientes, proveedores y colaboradores.

Proyectos y premios: 

- “Las señas faltantes” corto documental ganador de la “beca de sectores sociales” IDARTES, 2018. Selección oficial del festival WeCamFest 2020 y exhibición especial en el festival internacional “Todos Somos Diferentes” Santiago de Chile, 2022.

- “La Voz Pijao” corto documental hecho gracias a la beca “Viva Voz” 2020.

- “La Senda de los Pijao” corto documental ganador del estímulo “Abre Cámara” del MinTic 2020

- “Traspatio: Viviendo el closet con estilo” corto documental ganador de "primer puesto a obra audiovisual” del festival Expresarte, IDARTES 2017. Invitado a DocMontevideo a Pitch de series 2017 en Montevideo, Uruguay y seleccionado como parte de 15 proyectos a nivel global del Global Short Docs de One World Media en 2018, Londres, Reino Unido.

- “Regresión” corto de ficción ganador de “Mejor director”,“Mejor guion”,“Mejor corto” de proyecto 48, Bogotá, 2016. Ganador de "mejor actriz" del festival Filmapalooza en Seattle, Estados Unidos, 2017, y selección de muestra especial en el festival de Cannes 2017.  

- “Noobs” Serie web de 5 capítulos ganadora de “Mejor serie web 2015” en el festival de cine corto de Popayán y muestra paralela de Bawebfest en Buenos Aires, Argentina.

Name: Akkord Film Produktion GmbH
Description: Akkord develops and produces feature films and TV series with a focus on animated, international co-productions. Akkord is one of Germany’s leading animation producers and has built solid relationships all over the world with co-producers, studios, broadcasters, local distributors, subsidy funds and international distributors. This network of worldwide partners secures Akkord’s co-financing abilities as well as access to the best creative talents and top-notch projects. Akkord’s productions are seen through with passion and love and regularly receive international awards. As Vice Chairman of „Animation in Europe“ and Board member of Produzentenallianz and the German Film Academy, Akkord’s founder and CEO, Dirk Beinhold, contributes to the animation industry along with Co-CEOs Valentin Greulich and Imke Fehrmann who is an active mentor for Women in Animation and on the advisory board of FMX.

Name: Cizzara Studios
Description:
We are film production studio set in the Vadodara city of Gujarat, founded and headed by C'zar Amit Patel in year 2016, with complete turnkey operation that includes conceptualization, scripting, shooting, artist management and post production in the field of Corporate Films, Ad Films, Documentaries and TV Production, Feature Film, Motion Graphic films, 2D/3D Films, Pre Wedding Films. We tailor-make films to suit specific requirement.

We have in-house post production setup with facilities like Sound & music recording, mixing, dubbing, video editing, color grading & Vfx/animation.

Looking forward to Linkedin.

Name: THE PARTY FILM SALES
Description: The Party Film Sales is the union of Jour2Fête and Doc & Film International’s sales departments teaming up to distribute their respective catalogues and common new acquisitions. The structure handles both fiction films and documentaries as well as TV content. Past best-sellers include films by Frederick Wiseman, Gianfranco Rosi, and Chantal Akerman as well as Papicha by Mounia Meddour, Félicité by Alain Gomis, Two of Us by Filippo Meneghetti and Golden Bear winner Touch me not by Adina Pintilie. Upcoming titles include Home Front by Lucas Belvaux and Slalom by Charlène Favier.

Name: Natlab
Description:
In 1923 vestigde Natlab, toen nog bekend als Philips Natuurkundig Laboratorium, zich in Eindhoven aan de Kastanjelaan. 

Na jaren gediend te hebben als ruimte voor onderzoek, staat Natlab nu bekend als filmtheater waar je terecht kan voor cinematografie, van arthouse tot YouTube, voor de betere film, een interessant ontmoeting, de nieuwste ontwikkelingen binnen theater en podiumkunsten maar ook voor een heerlijke maaltijd in het restaurant kan je terecht bij Natlab. Samen met Broet en Baltan Laboratories realiseert Natlab een culturele ontmoetingsplaats voor jong en oud, met film als basis. 

Natlab staat voor inspiratie, een leuke avond in goede sfeer, voor vernieuwing en verdieping, creativiteit en actualiteit.

Name: Ji.hlava International Documentary Film Festival
Description: The Ji.hlava International Documentary Film Festival is a celebration of creative documentary film and the largest event of its kind in Central and Eastern Europe. The festival approaches documentary films primarily as unique artworks dealing with significant topics.

Name: Batesmotelpro
Description:
Batesmotelpro is an online video production agency that specializes on digital video content and viral videos.
We create the ideas, shoot the videos and spread them on the web. Our videos are usually comedy-driven and targeting young adults. We are also specialized on Youtube.

Our activities started with our first viral video post on Youtube channel in 2006. Through years we expanded our business and our crew, to create original high quality video contents for brands and also non-branded public purpose. We also made a movie of our viral video "Patlak Sokaklar".

Description: Striving to give you highly complex and top class visual effects.

Name: Canica Films
Description:
Canica Films is a creative production company with 15+ years in the local and international market. We produce TV commercials, digital & branded content across Latin America and the U.S. Hispanic market, representing top local and international directors. Committed to excellence, we apply international standards to every project—whether commercial TV, documentaries, film, or photography. Our multidisciplinary team includes creatives who are also musicians, painters, and visual artists, enriching each production with unique vision and artistry. 

We’ve led award-winning campaigns for leading agencies, earning over 70 awards at major international film and advertising festivals—including more than 15 Cannes Lions. Notable projects: Perussian Prices, Life Saving Soap Operas, Vertical Bikes, and Sight Walks. We’re driven by excellence, artistry, and global standards—creating work that stands out for its quality and heart.

Name: Savage Media
Description: Savage Media is a video production and creative services company based in Nashville, TN, specializing in high-end video series production, live-streaming for digital platforms, and cross-platform video distribution. Savage Media’s portfolio of work spans everything from sleek, simple corporate videos, to ambitious, story-driven documentaries, to broadcast commercials. Savage Media's clients include national healthcare and food brands, professional sports teams, and regional businesses alike.

Name: Inside Pictures
Description: Inside Pictures is looking for 20 ambitious film executives and entrepreneurial producers who are determined to expand their knowledge of how the international business of film really works, extend their network of high-level contacts, raise their profile and become skilled, knowledgeable and adaptable leaders.

Name: Roto Dignity
Description: Roto Dignity mainly focuses on Rotoscoping, Keying, and Paint specially realistic for feature films, commercials and TV shows. Roto Dignity cater to their outsourcing needs to their client with high quality output and affordable budgets.

Name: Brisbane International Film Festival (BIFF)
Description:
Since the first festival in 1992, BIFF has brought the best of international cinema to Brisbane audiences in ways that surprise and delight. 

2021 heralds a new era for the much-loved festival with a bold new approach to the 27th festival that will see excellence in programming combined with unforgettable events and a renewed focus on industry and education.

By bringing conversation to the fore, BIFF 2021 will highlight the greatest new strokes in international cinema alongside a celebration of the movie experience and local industry. 

For 11 days in October, Brisbane will welcome filmmakers and audiences from all over Australia for a festival that invokes all the best parts of our subtropical city for the state’s biggest and most fantastic film event.

Name: Internationale Kurzfilmtage Winterthur
Description: Internationale Kurzfilmtage Winterthur is held every year in November. It is considered the most significant short film festival in Switzerland and is a popular public festival and also an important venue for the international short film industry.

Name: Cinegrell
Description:
Located in Zurich, Switzerland and Berlin, Germany. Combined with camera rental and post-production, equipped with the current grading, compositing, and restoration tools we cover the full range of services. For every workflow we have the right solution, be it the latest digital formats or the oldest type of film stock.

For your film production Cinegrell offers you an end-to-end service. We advise you on selecting the right camera equipment, assembling the ideal package and, as required, take care of the workflow on set and throughout postproduction.

Cinegrell Zürich runs the only remaining film laboratory in Switzerland and offers comprehensive services of the highest quality for 16mm and 35mm film.

We continuously invest in the most recent equipment, regularly attend exhibitions, and training to keep up to date with newest technology in both analogue and digital production and filmmaking.

Name: DocPoint - Helsinki Documentary Film Festival
Description: DocPoint – Helsinki Documentary Film Festival is one of the largest documentary festivals in the Nordic countries and the only festival solely dedicated to non-fiction films in Finland. Founded in 2001, DocPoint is a not-for-profit organization that strives to promote creative documentary film and culture in Finland, and creates dialogue between international professionals and audiences.

Name: Artes Filmes
Description: O mundo está carente de pessoas que estão sempre prontas a aceitar um desafio. Com isso, pouco se faz de novo no mercado e muitas empresas acabam sempre buscando soluções mais fáceis para pensar e agir. A Artes Filmes está preparada para mudar tudo isso. Queremos mostrar como fugir do convencional na comunicação e partir para vídeos que possam resolver de forma mais relevante e efetiva, chegar a metas com muito mais emoção e criatividade. Nós estamos prontos, mas e você? Aceita o desafio?

Description: Septembre Productions is a motion pictures and film company based out of 45 avenue Victor Hugo Batiment 270 Cedex, Aubervilliers, France.

Name: Black Photon
Description:
Black Photon is Warsaw based studio specialized in feature film and TV post production.

We offer unique technological solutions combined with an artistic, dedicated approach and the highest comfort of work.

Our facility is located in Sielce. Under our roof, we have, among other things, editing rooms, TV and OTT color grading rooms, as well as a cinema, where we can do color grading with the help of Flagship Barco: a high-contrast RGB 4K laser projector.

We built Black Photon to be a friendly place with a uniquely designed, full technical infrastructure that meets the global standards of film post-production studios.

A location sound recording agency.

Name: CLUSTER
Description:
VFX Boutique / Virtual Production 

Cluster Films is a full service, high end video production studio for film, advertising and events. Our background in the visual effects industry allows us to create stunning imagery while optimizing all aspects of our workflow. We provide all inclusive packages where we collaborate with clients from concept development, pre-production, production and post-production/visual effects all the way to final delivery.

Name: Films For Future
Description:
For one month, the Films For Future Festival is transforming Zürich into a place for dialogue, emotion and change.

Since 2013, the Films For Future Festival has been bringing together films, people and ideas, for a sustainable, just future. Under the motto "See - Understand - Do" we create spaces for dialogue, reflection and action.

Throughout the month of November, we show around 90 carefully curated films at selected locations in Zürich. Each film screening is accompanied by discussion panels, workshops and events with international and local experts. Our festival focuses on emotional experiences, interactive formats and new perspectives. 

Organized by a dedicated team of volunteers and professionals, we reach thousands of visitors every year and motivate them to think along and act, far beyond the festival. Films for Future is more than cinema.

Name: VERDAUNT
Description: Delivering excellence through integrity, reliability, and innovation in the custom space.

Name: CPC London
Description:
CPC London is the only Film lab in the world that solely specialises in producing affordable 35mm motion picture film prints for filmmakers, cinemas, & distributors. CPC uses state-of-the-art technology to print direct to positive 35mm film straight from your data source, eliminating ALL stages involving expensive negative intermediates.

CPC London are the preferred supplier of The British Film Institute (BFI) for Photochemical Film Laboratory Services. CPC are also members of the Disney Studio Content Security Program.

Services include: 35mm Film Prints, TrueGrain Scanning, Moviestrips, Film Art, Paper on Film Archive, Film Strip Creator.

Contact us at office@cpclondon.com or visit our website at cpclondon.com

Name: The Backlot Perth
Description:
The Backlot Perth is a purpose built private screening room for film and corporate presentations. Nestled between Northbridge and Leederville, on the outskirts of Perth’s CBD, The Backlot Perth features a 50 seat screening and presentation room, lounge and bar area, providing plenty of options for hosting your important guests.

The ideal location for staff training, product launches, client presentations, social club gatherings and interstate conferencing, we can tailor the venue services to meet the specific requirements of each individual client. From recent movie releases to corporate digital presentations to DVD/Blu-ray. The Backlot Perth is equipped to show it all.

Name: PlanMedia Films
Description:
Dzięki dobremu planowaniu jesteśmy w stanie zrobić film w tempie ekspres. Tak było w lipcu 2019, kiedy to od Klienta NowaEra – lidera wydawnictw edukacyjnych - wpłynęły dwa zamówienia na filmy reklamowe, jedno po drugim. Na realizację każdego z nich mieliśmy jedynie 10 dni roboczych. Podzieliliśmy się zadaniami i już po 3 dniach, byliśmy gotowi do kręcenia mając między innymi wybrane lokacje i aktorów, dopracowany scenariusz, harmonogram i storyboard. Aby zminimalizować ryzyko błędu i lepiej wyobrazić sobie efekt końcowy poświęciliśmy jeszcze jeden dzień na przygotowanie previsa zwanego również brudnofilmem. Pozwoliło to nam wykonać wstępny montaż i przekonać o słuszności założeń produkcyjnych.

Zdjęcia zajęły 12 godzin w obu przypadkach, z których każdy różnił się koncepcją, formą i stylem. Najważniejsze jest to że Klient, który gościł na planie, po zakończeniu zdjęć podszedł do mnie i reżysera i będąc pod dużym wrażeniem gratulował nam organizacji pracy i pełnego profesjonalizmu. Oczywiście na taki sukces zapracowała cała kilkunastoosobowa ekipa, a filmy dotarły do tysięcy uczniów i rodziców pomagając w zawiłych procesach rekrutacyjnych i zakupie podręczników na nowy rok szkolny. https://planmedia.pl/project/nowa_era_szkola_srednia_bez_tajemnic/
https://planmedia.pl/project/nowa_era_sklep_internetowy/

Name: Flare Film
Description:
FLARE FILM produziert seit 2008 Spiel- und Dokumentarfilme für den nationalen und internationalen Markt. 
Leidenschaftlich, verlässlich, mutig, partnerschaftlich: Das Team von Flare Film legt Wert auf langanhaltende und vertrauensvolle Beziehungen zu unseren Filmemacher*innen und Partner*Innen. Von der ersten Idee an sind wir an einer engen Zusammenarbeit auf Augenhöhe interessiert – in Bezug auf alle wichtigen kreativen und finanziellen Aspekte eines Filmprojektes. Kreative Partnerschaften basieren auf Vertrauen und Respekt. Wir schaffen dazu den Raum für eine konstruktive Auseinandersetzung und die gemeinsame Leidenschaft für Kino und TV. 
Seit 2020 produzieren wir ebenfalls hochwertige fiktionaler Serien. 
****
FLARE FILM has been producing feature films and documentaries for the national and international market since 2008. Passionate, reliable, courageous: the Flare Film team values long-lasting and trusting relationships with our filmmakers and partners. From the very first idea, we are interested in working closely together as equals on all important creative and financial aspects of a
film project. Creative partnerships are based on trust and respect. To this end, we create the space for constructive debate and a shared passion for films and stories. Since 2020 FLARE expanded its focus on the development and production of high-quality fictional series.

Name: Luz Audiovisual Produtora
Description:
A Luz Audiovisual é uma produtora de fotos e vídeos com soluções audiovisuais atuando no Brasil e exterior desde 2014. Possuímos aa boas práticas da Governança Corporativa em nossos processos como LGPD. 

Missão

Oferecer soluções criativas e inovadoras em formato audiovisual para empresas e instituições, agregando valor à comunicação e marketing de nossos clientes, conectando sua marca com todos os seus respectivos públicos.

Visão

Ser referência no mercado da construção civil pela excelência e qualidade dos serviços prestados na produção de vídeos e fotos nos mais diversos formatos. Promover o cenário cultural digital. Ser reconhecida nos mercados de pesquisa de mercado, tecnologia, arquitetura e EAD.

Valores

Ética
Transparência
Comprometimento
Efetividade
Foco nos resultados dos clientes

A Luz Audiovisual é formada por um time de parceiros estratégicos, mentores, apoiadores e especialistas. Contamos com uma rede ativa de parceiros qualificados em São Paulo/Brasil, Los Angeles/EUA e Sydney/Austrália.

Da roteirização (storytelling) a edição, produzimos na Luz Audiovisual fotos e vídeos aéreo e terrestre em 360°, Full HD, 4k, 8k nos seguintes formatos: vídeo de produto, conceito, institucional, lançamento de campanhas, cobertura de eventos, produção cultural digital, web série, streaming e mídias digitais para empresas, agências de marketing e publicidade.

Contamos ainda com um time profissional de marketeiros digitais que possuem as mais variadas habilidades e boas práticas do mundo digital. Criamos do storytelling até aos mais variados formatos de vídeos (feeds, stories, IGTV, Reels entre outros) para redes sociais: Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, Linkedin e Youtube.

Nossas principais Hashtags: #luzaudiovisualsp #luzaudiovisualprodutora #somosaluz #vempraluz

Description: Dartmouth Films are pioneers in Britain of independent documentaries—finding new ways of funding, making and distributing films which have impact.

Name: BLACKBEE

Name: Firefly Films NZ
Description: Firefly Films is a boutique Film & Television production company with a focus on excellence, prioritising key relationships with top creative and financial partners to tell relevant, unique and captivating stories for global audiences. Anchored in New Zealand but with a keen eye on the international marketplace, the company’s broad slate includes local projects as well as international co-productions.

Name: Lucy Finance (SOFICA La Banque Postale Image)
Description:
Lucy Finance est une société d'investissement et de conseil spécialisée dans le secteur de la production cinématographique et audiovisuelle.

Créée en 2002 par Hugues de Chastellux, ancien Directeur Général Adjoint de l’IFCIC (Institut pour le Financement du Cinéma et des Industries Culturelles) et membre pendant 10 ans de la commission d’agrément des films français au CNC, Lucy Finance a développé des relations étroites avec les acteurs majeurs du secteur.

Par l'intermédiaire de ses SOFICA « La Banque Postale Image » et « Manon », Lucy Finance a investi 120 millions d'euros dans plus de 500 œuvres, telles que : « Dheepan », « Séraphine », « Grâce à Dieu », « Marguerite », « Qu'est-ce qu'on a fait au Bon Dieu ? », « Les femmes du 6e étage »,  « 9 mois ferme », « Mon roi », « Saint-Amour », « Sauver ou périr », « La tête haute », « C’est quoi cette famille ?! », « Rebelles » et « Persepolis ».

Lucy Finance accompagne également les producteurs et distributeurs indépendants dans des missions de conseil et de direction financière.

Name: Digima
Description:
Digima’s mission is to help cinema owners achieve success with their digital cinema, offering them efficient and reliable technological solutions, allowing them access to new high quality digital content and helping them create new relationships with the audience as well as the possibility to interact directly with them. 

Digima is divided into three areas: 
- technology with Simply Cinema, 
- movie and live events (alternative content) with Free Days
- interaction with the public through You Active

Name: Maine Outdoor Film Festival
Description:
Outdoor Adventure and Conservation films from around Maine and across the world. 
The annual flagship festival is held in Portland each summer in late July. Following that, MOFF travels throughout Maine for a tour of uniquely curated screenings from August through October. 
MOFF donates a portion of its proceeds to Teens To Trails.

Name: Movitoon
Description:
Somos uma empresa jovem e inovadora, especialista em criação de vídeos animados, buscamos transformar a forma com que as empresas fazem comunicação, unificando os sensos humanos de audição e visão, que prendem a atenção dos telespectadores nas animações, fixando a mensagem principal dos vídeos de um modo muito mais eficiente e eficaz.

Você sabia que ao unir os sensos humanos de audição e visão aprendemos 94% mais. E também, que retemos 85% da informação que aprendemos após 03 horas e 65% após 03 dias.

É nisso que acreditamos!

Nossos vídeos são personalizados e podem ser utilizados em diversas aplicações, como por exemplo:

- Inbound Marketing
- Endomarketing
- Treinamentos
- Institucionais ou corporativos
- Apresentações de produtos e serviços
- Apresentações de empresas e startups
- Site e redes sociais como Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, WhatsApp, Youtube, entre outros.

Contamos com equipe qualificada em todas as fases do desenvolvimento do seu vídeo, desde a revisão do script, narração profissional em estúdio e videomaker de criação.

Vídeos criativos para seu negócio!

Name: Milano Film Fest
Description:
Milano Film Fest vuole rappresentare il festival della città di Milano, riflettendo la sua identità dinamica e cosmopolita. È un evento diffuso e multidisciplinare che va oltre il cinema: accoglie le serie TV, l’immagine come linguaggio centrale, e connette il mondo visivo con la cultura urbana.

Milano Film Fest è una piattaforma aperta e innovativa, dove il cinema si fonde con le altre forme di espressione artistica, parlando al presente con uno sguardo al futuro, in un formato che riflette la creatività e l’energia della città che lo ospita. La milanesità si esprime nel modo di vivere il festival, che abbraccia diversi spazi della città, trasformandoli in luoghi di incontro e dialogo.

Name: VideoTaxi
Description:
Making regular, great-value video shouldn't be hard. We’ve looked at every pain point in the content creation process and replaced it with something that works better.

By subscribing to our innovative service – via a fixed monthly or annual fee – you get quality, high-volume digital content on demand. 

Strategy, script writing, logistics, videography, photography, editing, animation and design is all included. It’s the future of content creation.

Name: Olhar Distribuição
Description:
Cada filme tem seu universo único. Personagens mergulhadas em indagações pessoais, permeadas de realidades sociais diversas, às vezes abrutas, outras injustas.  Mas cada uma com suas cores, sua cultura, seus sorrisos.

Transpor as fronteiras que limitam tais mundos, ficcionais ou reais, e leva-los a outros olhares, cercados de realidades distintas, a fim de provocar a reflexão e a sensibilização é o desafio da Olhar Distribuição.

Assim, em parceria com o Olhar de Cinema – Festival Internacional de Curitiba e em consonância com seu propósito de buscar filmes que dialogam com a contemporaneidade nasceu a Olhar Distribuição.

Name: Ambient

Experience and curiosity helped to successfully develop our own products and to enlarge our product range of innovative equipment.

Practical needs were the incentive to invent new products like our industry standard time code range or microphone booms and accessories.

In addition we provide qualified in-house service for the products we distribute.

Name: International Thai Film Festival (ITFF)
Description: International Thai Film Festival (a.k.a. ITFF) is a prestigious international film gala event, founded with the aim to support the Thai film and entertainment industry, local filmmakers and film businesses, and to further encourage international collaborations between talented filmmakers, content creators, industry professionals, production studios, distributors and all creative artists without borders. The film screening and networking events of ITFF (held annually, every year in the middle of September, in Bangkok, Thailand) brings together film and entertainment industry professionals and film enthusiasts from different parts of the globe. Alongside screenings of a wide variety of quality film productions from around the world, there are panel talks sessions, a market and networking opportunities, and last but not least; the prestigious ITFF Awards (International Film & Entertainment Industry Awards of Thailand – awarding talent, originality and excellence in filmmaking). The Festival provides a memorable and unique experience for all visitors, and all attendees can gain from it and grow personally and/or business wise. ITFF showcases what the world of cinema can truly offer, presents industry insiders, business opportunities, knowledge and a very pleasant experience for everyone. ITFF is an international film event not to be missed by local and foreign filmmakers, industry professionals and movie enthusiasts. For further information, please visit; www.thaifilmfestival.com

Name: FLUXA Filmes
Description: A FLUXA Filmes é uma produtora audiovisual brasileira com cinco anos de trajetória e ampla experiência em formatos de não-ficção. A empresa, que trabalha com equipes majoritariamente formadas por mulheres, é reconhecida por sua curadoria de novos talentos do mercado para cada uma de suas produções.

Oferecemos uma estrutura completa com diversos estúdios de gravação, que dispõem de uma decoração versátil e elegante.

Name: Sudamerican Voices
Description:
At Sudamerican Voices, we believe in the transformative power of voice. Our mission is to bring words to life, evoke emotions, and create unforgettable connections through storytelling. We are passionate about training and collaborating with the best talent in communication, voice-over, dubbing, and sound production, utilizing the expertise of our professionals and cutting-edge technology to deliver the highest quality in every project. Our essence is rooted in excellence, professionalism, and continuous learning. We are committed to empowering our students, helping them develop their skills and reach their full potential. We believe that every voice has a story to tell, and it is our responsibility to help it be heard.

Our goal is clear: to become the leading reference in the sound industry across Latin America and the world. Every step we take, every project we complete, every student we train brings us closer to this dream. At Sudamerican Voices, we connect talent, communication, and sound to do what we do best: create magic through voice.

SUD DUBBING / SUD PODCAST / SUD VOICE-OVER / SUD KIDS / SUD STUDIOS
+1000 proud students

+15 years of history and experience
+9 collaborating countries
+13 professional studios for training, recording, mixing, video casting, streaming, music production, sound design, and Foley.
www.sudamericanvoices.com

Name: RIFF | Reykjavík International Film Festival
Description:
The Reykjavík International Film Festival - RIFF, is Iceland's premier cinematic event, held annually in late September for eleven captivating days. Since its inception in 2004, RIFF has grown to become the largest film festival in Iceland. As a celebration of global storytelling, RIFF showcases a diverse array of dramas and non-fiction films from over 40 countries, offering a unique platform for both established and emerging filmmakers to present their work. The festival is committed to highlighting innovative and independent cinema, featuring an exciting lineup of feature films, documentaries, and shorts that span a multitude of genres and styles.

In addition to film screenings, RIFF hosts a variety of events, including Industry Days, Think Tank, Young Voices Think Tank, panel discussions, workshops, and seminars, providing invaluable opportunities for networking and professional development within the industry. The festival emphasizes sustainability and inclusivity, reflecting its dedication to fostering a progressive and engaging cinematic culture.

YouthRIFF, RIFF's daughter festival, promotes quality cinema and cinema-related events for young audiences and children, nurturing the next generation of film enthusiasts.

RIFF is proud to spotlight specific themes and regional focuses each year. This thematic focus allows attendees to explore the cultural and artistic contributions of different regions, enriching their festival experience.

Follow us for updates on RIFF, exciting news and fun trivia on all things film!

Name: Urban Factory
Description:
Launched in 2011, Urban Factory produces films by talented directors from all around the world, without restriction of genre nor budget. 

Urban Factory presented in May 2023 IF ONLY I COULD HIBERNATE at Cannes Festival 2023, Official Selection, Un Certain Regard, the first feature film of Zoljargal Purevdash, a coproduction between France and Mongolia (Amygdala). 

Urban Factory presented in 2022 PLAN 75 at Cannes Festival 2022, Official Selection, Un Certain Regard (Camera d’Or Special Mention), the first feature film of Chie Hayakawa, a coproduction between France, Japan (Loaded Films) and the Philippines (Fusee).    

We also completed in 2022 the post-production of 2 feature documentaries: Francescca I l’amor, a Spanish-French coproduction directed by Alba Sotorra, and Il nous reste la colère, directed by Jamila Jendari and Nicolas Beirnaert. We also started the production of Les enfants du large, Virginia Tangvald first feature documentary, coproduced with Canada (micro_scope). We just finished the shooting of The shameless, by Konstantin Bojanov, a Swiss-French-Bulgarian coproduction, which has been shot in Nepal in February-March 2023. We also coproduce Sima’s song by Roya Sadat, a coproduction between Spain (Alba Sotorra) and The Netherlands (Baldr Films). Besides, we have several fictions, documentaries and animations in development, such as My Traitor, written by Santiago Amigorena and Marion Quantin, adapted from the novels My Traitor and Return to Killybegs by Sorj Chalandon, Dream of Grape Garden by Sahra Mani, Let us not be strangers by Julien Trauman. 

Our previous releases also include a French-Brazilian coproduction Good Manners, directed by Juliana Rojas and Marco Dutra, a French-Argentine coproduction La Luz incidente by Ariel Rotter, and The benefit of the doubt by Samuel Tilman.

Name: Ischia Film Festival
Description:
“Il luogo è la storia”.

Il cuore dell’Ischia Film Festival è il concetto di narrazione cinematografica quale mezzo privilegiato per implementare il dialogo interculturale e responsabilizzare sull’importanza della salvaguardia e la promozione dei territori. Nato all’interno del progetto Cinema & territorio che diffonde e incoraggia il Cineturismo (neologismo coniato dall’ideatore, Michelangelo Messina) su base internazionale, ospita un concorso cinematografico che premia, ogni anno, opere che abbiano saputo aprire una finestra per il resto del mondo sull’identità culturale del territorio in cui sono state girate. 
Il Festival è aperto a lungometraggi e cortometraggi, indipendentemente dal linguaggio: finzione, documentario, animazione. 
Visto il suo profondo legame con il ruolo chiave della location nell’opera audiovisiva, il Festival ha la sua casa nell’incantevole Castello Aragonese, maniero in mezzo al mare situato di fronte all'isola d' Ischia, cui è collegato da un ponte di circa 200 metri. Tra mistero, tradizione e panorami mozzafiato, lo scrigno del Castello con i suoi profumi e colori trasporta ospiti e spettatori in una dimensione fuori dal tempo; le proiezioni e gli incontri d’autore sotto il cielo stellato, in cinque straordinarie location della roccaforte, restituiscono all’esperienza del cinema il suo originario significato di viaggio di stupore e ricerca.

Name: 101 Music Pty Ltd
Description:
We the music makers employ a unique sensibility & a boutique business model, both of which enable us to always keep our promise to provide you with the perfect music for your needs.....delivering 

‘EMOTIONAL SOLUTIONS THROUGH MUSIC’.

101 Music Pty Ltd is owned and operated by two-time Emmy Award winning music score composer Art Phillips, https://101.audio/bio-art-phillips/, who has an exceptional understanding about what producers, directors and editors need. With over 85 music albums under 101 Music, Art has also scored original music for over 2000 hours of television and composed & produced over 65 production music albums (some 1200 music titles) for the major production music libraries. Phillips is also a recipient of three Gold and Platinum record awards, production music awards, and APRA screen music awards.

In addition to the 101 catalogue, 101 Music Pty Ltd represents over 80 independent production music libraries (450,000 tracks) in the Australasian territories. 


WHO WE ARE

101 Music Pty Ltd is an Australian company with the Aussie creative-bred standards of honesty, fairness and sensitivity, including respect for indigenous worldviews. We believe in local content and ensure that our catalogue and the other production music labels that we represent all adhere to local standards. 85% of the 101 Music catalogue is written by Aussie composers, and even the other 15% (written by sought after overseas composers) involves hands-on Australian creative talent.

As artists, when your work becomes our work, it matters to us.

Name: Usina da Imaginação
Description:
Há mais de 20 anos, usamos a arte e a criatividade para inspirar crianças e comunidades e com elas transformar o mundo.

Realizamos pesquisa, formação em comunicação, arte e audiovisual, produção cultural, produção audiovisual e mobilização comunitária para processos de valorização e transformação cultural em diferentes meios, envolvendo especialmente crianças e jovens. Entre os nossos objetivos está promover a equidade de raça e gênero, além de criar espaço para o diálogo e o vínculo inter-geracional.

Também atuamos por meio de campanhas e advocacy em prol da primeira infância, com objetivo de influir na criação e aprimoramento de políticas públicas que impactem na ocupação das cidades.

Conheça nossos projetos - Favela News, Pirilampo Criativo, Inspiração, Canal Canoa, entre outros - em nosso site: www.usinadaimaginacao.org

A frente da Usina da Imaginação estão Rita de Cácia Oenning da Silva e Kurt Shaw, que têm apoio de uma equipe espalhada por todo o Brasil.

Name: Cucalorus Film Foundation
Description:
The 31st annual Cucalorus Festival returns to downtown Wilmington, NC, November 19–23, 2025. This non-competitive celebration showcases 120+ films from around the world and draws filmmakers, performers, and activists to explore art, new ideas, and the ongoing work of undoing racism.

Festival programming spans social justice, dance on camera, emerging voices, southern stories, horror and the bizarre, and the year’s best indie films.

Voted “One of the Coolest Film Festivals in the World” and a 10-time winner of “50 Film Festivals Worth the Entry Fee” by MovieMaker Magazine, Cucalorus offers a retreat-like setting that sparks creative connection, lasting friendships, and bold collaborations.

More information is available at www.cucalorus.org.

Name: UCO | L'Union des Chef·fes Op
Description: L'Union des Chefs Opérateurs is an association bringing together female and male directors of photography exercising their profession on all types of productions: fiction films, documentaries, advertisements, corporate movies, music videos, interactive films, animation ... In their diversity, as collaborators of creation with directors, the members of L'Union des Chefs Opérateurs have in common the vocation to bring in their sensitivity, their technical knowledge, and the relevance of their looks to the aesthetics, the narration and the conditions of production of the works. The purpose of L'Union is to - promote exchanges, reflections and transmission between its members - communicate in order to make themselves known and give visibility to its members - communicate about the profession of cinematographer to ensure its place in the creation process and explain to professionals from other departments the technical, logistical and legal conditions necessary for the production of images, works and programs - encourage gender parity within the profession by promoting it within the association.

Name: Tonks
Description:
Com 12 anos de atuação no desenvolvimento de sites, aplicativos e soluções de intranet para o mercado de exibição e distribuição de cinema, a Tonks ampliou a sua atuação e fundou, há oito anos, a Revista Exibidor, a mais completa publicação especializada no trade do cinema, a Revista e Portal Exibidor. 

Desde 2014, é também responsável pela realização da EXPOCINE, a maior convenção do mercado cinematográfico na América Latina. 

Ente os demais produtos da Tonks, destacam-se o Portal Exhibitor Latino, o TonksProg, TonksHost, Cine TKS e Claquete.com. 

Atualmente mais de 100 empresas já contrataram e/ou desenvolveram soluções com a Tonks. Com o objetivo de facilitar os segmentos operacional, administrativo e financeiro das empresas, as soluções tecnológicas da Tonks já estão em mais de 10 países, além do Brasil. Entre eles, grandes mercados emergentes como México e Chile e mercados já consolidados como os Estados Unidos. Convidamos você a conhecer as nossas soluções e entrar em contato conosco.

Uma empresa com DNA de inovação e expertise no mercado de entretenimento.

Name: DONART Film
Description:
DONART Film Ltd. was established as a successor to several merged entities with the aim of creating a leading film and entertainment company operating in the Central European region and the United Kingdom. Our priority activity is the production and production of feature films intended for cinema distribution.

We hold dozens of international festival awards. Our goal is not only to push the boundaries of cinema itself, but we also explore sensitive social issues through our projects. We also support new and first time creators, work on series, shoot commercials, help foreign productions with locations, provide financing for interesting projects, run a casting agency and PR agency DONART MEDIA.

Description: Stickman Sound owned by Fernando Delgado CAS  is a production sound and communications company. We specialize in field recording and communications.

Name: Black Women In Post Production (BWIPP)
Description: Black Women In Post Production (BWIPP) is a network and enterprise founded to address the disparity of Black and Black Mixed heritage women within post production in the UK Film and TV industry.

Name: European Film Center CAMERIMAGE
Description: The European Film Center CAMERIMAGE (ECFC) is a state cultural institution founded at the end of 2019 by the Ministry of Culture and National Heritage, the City of Toruń and the Tumult Foundation, the aim of which is to build a permanent seat of the EnergaCAMERIMAGE International Film Festival in Toruń. In addition to this task, ECFC is to conduct substantive actions as part of the annual co-organization of the Festival and other exhibition, cultural, educational and scientific projects in the field of Polish and world audiovisual culture.

Name: dme.studio
Description: DME STUDIO is a one-stop-shop creative studio that specializes in full-service video production, 2d & 3d animation and web design and development services. It's based in Daytona Beach, FL with its European headquarters located in Belgrade, Serbia.

Name: LPT | Line Production Turkey
Description:
Line Production Turkey is a line production film company based in Istanbul. We’re known with our Line Producers for resourceful contacts, amazing locations, great crew, problem-solving skills and scrupulous attention to budget. We provide full production and post-production services in Turkey.

Line Production Turkey takes care of your film shooting needs in and outside of Turkey. Backed by a highly skilled, vastly experienced team, we hand hold your film productions, providing the most modern equipment, shooting permissions, subsidy- grants guidance and logistics facilitation in a hassle free manner. Name: Birns & Sawyer, Inc
Description: Birns & Sawyer is Los Angeles’ original motion picture camera rental house, founded by Jack Birns and Cliff Sawyer in 1954. The company quickly established itself as the premiere one stop shop for professional filmmakers to buy or rent their gear.

Name: CINENOVA Film Festival
Description:
Founded in 2019, CINENOVA is the first Interuniversity Film Festival in Portugal, to which university students from all over the world can submit their short films. Its mission is to reinvent the relationship between Cinema and Knowledge, between the Student-Filmmaker and the University.

In 2020, the year of its 2nd edition, CINENOVA received more than 800 short films from a total of 77 countries. More than 600 people attended the festival.

Headquartered in Lisbon, at NOVA-FCSH, CINENOVA is an initiative of the Communication Department. It is internally supported by the Dean's Office and the Student Association and organized entirely by students and university professors.

Name: AcadeStudio Inc.

We have many cards up our sleeves, such as Voice Over Services, Dubbing Services, Content Interpretation Services, Language Translation Services & Content Localization Services. We make sure that we have many great things to offer to our potential customers and clients in the industry of Media, Content Creation, Academia as well as the Manufacturing Industry.

Name: Backyard Dream Productions
Description: Backyard Dream Productions is your all-in-one solution for virtual production, video production, and live event services. With cutting-edge technology and a team of experienced professionals, we bring your creative visions to life. From immersive virtual environments and stunning visual effects to captivating videos and seamless live events, we offer unparalleled expertise and a commitment to delivering exceptional quality. Name: Golden Girls Filmproduktion und Filmservices
Description:
Wer
Golden Girls =

Arash T. Riahi
Arman T. Riahi
Jakob Serdaroglu
Julia Horvath
Julian Reinisch

Was
Wir sind eine Gruppe von Regisseuren und Produzenten, die in den Bereichen Experimental- und Spielfilm, Dokumentation, Werbung und Musikvideo tätig ist. 

Wir bieten ein breit gefächertes Service für die Kino- und Fernseh-Filmproduktion. Neben unseren gut ausgestatteten Broadcast-Schnittplätzen genießt vor allem unsere hochauflösende 2K-Realtime Postproduktionskette einen hervorragenden Ruf. Dazu gehören Offline- und Online-Schnitt, 2K Conforming, Compositing, Motion-Graphics, Screen-Design, Titel Design, Farbkorrektur, Mastering, 35mm Filmaufzeichnung und Digital Cinema Playout. Mit unseren Partnern im Haus bieten wir weiters komplette Sound- und Musikproduktion, DVD-Authoring, Software-Programmentwicklung und die Herstellung von speziell angefertigten Geräten für die Filmproduktion an.

Wie
Die unterschiedlichen Herausforderungen der oben genannten Bereiche nehmen wir frei von irgendwelchen Dogmen an, sonst sieht ja alles gleich aus. 

In unserer Freizeit erforschen wir die Grenzen des filmisch Möglichen. Das macht viel Freude (gute Laune bei uns). Die Erkenntnisse dieser Grenzerfahrungen wirken sich positiv auf unsere Produkte aus (gute Laune bei unseren Kunden und bei uns).

Wo
Um unsere Homebase in Wien 7 ist ein für alle Bedürfnisse passendes Umfeld für die Herstellung von Medienproduktionen gewachsen: Digitalschnitt, Grafik, Musik & Ton, Kostüm - alles unter einem Dach.

Warum

Eine Auswahl von 100 an uns verliehenen Preisen möchten wir nicht unerwähnt lassen.

Name: Vegas Movie Awards
Description:
Welcome to a film festival like no other, where cinematic dreams take flight and filmmakers become part of a prestigious family. At our festival, we don't just showcase films; we create an immersive experience that blends the heart of a welcoming community with the prestige of a world-class event.

𝐀𝐛𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐕𝐞𝐠𝐚𝐬 𝐌𝐨𝐯𝐢𝐞 𝐀𝐰𝐚𝐫𝐝𝐬:
Vegas Movie Awards (VMA) is an esteemed international film festival dedicated to celebrating excellence in indie cinema. Part of the broader social initiative within the 501(c)3 Fromtheart Foundation, the festival not only provides a prestigious platform but fosters hope and community among underprivileged youth through art. Join us, be part of the legacy, and let's create magic in the film industry together.

- Cinematic Excellence Unveiled -
Enter a world where creativity is celebrated, and films grace an international stage. We've honored talents with Academy Awards, Emmys, Golden Globes, and BAFTAs, establishing our festival as a true launchpad for greatness.

- A Filmmaking Family -
Join our visionary family nurtured for four years by Vegas Movie Awards and Fromtheart Foundation. Your investment as a 501(c)3 organization goes into supporting our community of artists.

- Prestige Meets Passion -
Experience a festival that blends family warmth with cinematic prestige. Feel embraced by a community valuing uniqueness. Over $10,000 in awards, including iconic VMA Statuettes, were distributed during our last gala, honoring the best films of 2022-2023.

- Igniting Las Vegas Filmmaking -
Vegas Movie Awards transforms Vegas into a global filmmaking hub. Our inaugural Annual Gala marked a new era, raising awareness about filmmakers' crucial role in awakening global consciousness.

- Join the Movement -
Vegas Movie Awards, with a fearless character, revives values like empathy and connection. With your support, we aim to be the hottest event in international filmmaking in Las Vegas and beyond.

www.vegasmovieawards.com

Name: Astronaut Films
Description:
Astronaut es una agencia de producción audiovisual y multimedia de Barcelona apasionada por la creatividad, la tecnología, las nuevas tendencias y Youtube. Creamos soluciones de marketing en vídeo, acciones de street marketing, guerrilla marketing, Youtube marketing, entre otras, innovadoras y creativas para sorprender a la audiencia y ayudar a las marcas o conseguir nuevos fans.

Algunas de nuestras campañas, con muy poca inversión se han convertido en referencias virales en la red, como por ejemplo el Lip Dub de la Universidad de Vic o el Scene Mob de ECOM, con unos más de 2.000.000 y 400.000 visitas en Youtube respectivamente.

Description: For thirteen years, Ori Imagem e Som has been dedicated to audiovisual creation, development and production.
