The production company focuses on feature films, series and documentaries, as well as short films. Its projects highlight stories of social impact, both in independent and commercial productions, always with the aim of reaching the general public.

Name: The Morrison Studio
Description:
We are an international multi-disciplinary collective of designers, filmmakers and VFX artists with a specialism in computer generated imagery and graphics (as well as more traditional methods), for the production of motion pictures, moving image and video. While we are perhaps best-known for our work in the feature film industry, creating memorable title sequences and graphic design (on and off-screen) for some the world’s highest-grossing blockbusters, we are also highly active in the creation of visual effects and motion graphics for television and branding purposes.

Led by one of the industry’s most prominent creatives Richard Morrison, personally responsible for more than 150 title sequences. Their credits span Hollywood blockbusters such as Batman, Enemy at the Gates, A Fish called Wanda and A Passage to India to cult classics like Brazil, Sweeney Todd and Quadrophenia for directors as varied as Sir David Lean, Kenneth Branagh and Stephen Frears to Jean-Jacques Annaud, Ridley Scott, Tim Burton and The Wachowski's.

Their most recent completed work includes One Direction: This Is Us for Morgan Spurlock, HBO's new film Muhammad Ali's Greatest Fight for Stephen Frears, Welcome to the Punch directed by Eran Creevy; Executive Producer Ridley Scott, and Hossein Amini's The Two Faces of January; starring Viggo Mortensen and Kirsten Dunst. 

Currently, they are working on the Wachowski's Jupiter Ascending for Warner Bros.

For more information visit: www.themorrisonstudio.com

Name: Pesaro Film Festival
Description: Ideata e progettata a Roma da Lino Miccichè e da Bruno Torri alla fine del 1964, ma realizzata a Pesaro fin dalla prima edizione (29 maggio – 6 giugno 1965), la Mostra è promossa, finanziata e gestita dall’Ente omonimo con il contributo degli enti locali, della Regione Marche e dello Stato. Nel corso del tempo, accanto alle edizioni principali la Mostra pesarese ha realizzato numerose iniziative collaterali: contemporaneamente alla Mostra, l’Evento speciale, dedicato al cinema italiano; in autunno, inizialmente ad Ancona, poi sempre a Pesaro, la Rassegna internazionale retrospettiva; ancora in autunno il Convegno internazionale di studi sul cinema, inizialmente a Urbino, poi a Pesaro, e manifestazioni cinematografiche varie, in molte città marchigiane ma anche a Roma, New York, Berlino e Parigi.

Name: Cabezahueca Films
Description:
We are a Latino-owned, multilingual and multicultural Emmy-awarded video production and animation company. We enjoy being an extension of your internal team, whether you are looking for a crew to supplement your in-house capabilities, or need full-service production from script to post-production.

We create video-driven stories that effectively communicate your idea to your audience. We focus on listening to and collaborating with our clients to bring a strategic and creative vision to life.

Name: MIRAGE
Description:
MIRAGE is a festival dedicated to the art of cinema. It offers a social space where audiences can immerse themselves both inside and outside the theatre. It’s a place where film intersects with other art forms and expressions, allowing the audience to engage with the most visionary artists and filmmakers from around the globe. Most importantly, MIRAGE is a social festival, a place to share experiences, and a place to be surprised, fascinated, challenged, and delighted by the art of cinema, as well as exhibitions, talks, parties, and concerts.

MIRAGE Professionals is all about the craft and process of filmmaking, with a special focus on creating a hub in Oslo for the professionals behind the collaborative art of cinema: cinematographers, sound designers, directors, and editors to meet and discuss their work.

The word "MIRAGE" originates from Latin; "mirari" meaning "to wonder at" or from French "mirer" meaning "to reflect or mirror." The term is most commonly used to describe an optical illusion or refraction of light that creates a reflection or distorted mirroring of the visible.

MIRAGE –2025 will be held in Oslo from 8th - 12th October.

Name: Associazione Culturale Cinedehors
Description: Cinedehors nasce a Fossano nel 2017 dall’esperienza nella gestione del Cinema Teatro I Portici di Arianna Airaldi e Giacomo Cuppari con l’obbiettivo di mettere a disposizione le proprie competenze e il proprio entusiasmo per godere, insieme al più ampio pubblico, dei migliori film in luoghi inconsueti e con modalità innovative. Ispirati dalla tradizione delle arene estive di cinema all'aperto, si è voluto reinventare un format nel quale i proiezionisti e il pubblico uniscono le forze per creare un evento, riportando socialità e condivisione. Si è scelto di sperimentare modi di fruizione particolari come il cinema in pellicola, il cinema dai palazzi, il silent cinema, le sonorizzazioni e il drive-in. Il cinema diventa un mezzo universale che può creare inclusione e condivisione, quando va ad animare una piazza vuota, a riconsegnare uno spazio alla cittadinanza. Il dehors è un nuovo hub della socialità, dove piazza virtuale e piazza reale possono ritrovare un punto d’incontro. Ovunque ci sia un potenziale pubblico ci possono essere le proiezioni di Cinedehors. Cinedehors insegue la capacità di creare la piazza dove non c’è o dove non c’è più. Per questo le proiezioni sono portate non solo nei centri storici, ma anche in luoghi periferici come stazioni di benzina, piazze di quartiere, siti industriali, aree dismesse, stazioni ferroviarie, scenari di convivenze multiculturali. In questo senso si cerca di attivare percorsi partecipativi corredati sempre da picnic e degustazioni, visite guidate, passeggiate e percorsi in bicicletta e musica dal vivo o Dj-Set. L’attenzione è massimamente rivolta alla riuscita tecnologica delle proiezioni e alla perfetta aderenza dell'allestimento ai luoghi. Per questi motivi Cinedehors si serve di schermi AIRSCREEN (schermi gonfiabili per eventi con diversa affluenza di pubblico) di cui l’associazione è partner ufficiale per l'Italia con impianti di proiezione e di diffusione audio di alta qualità.

Name: Kraken Media

Kraken Films es, además, un laboratorio de creación cinematográfica para actores, directores, escritores, directores de fotografía, directores de arte, productores y editores.
Un lugar en el que confluyen artistas que comparten un mismo objetivo: contar buenas historias.

Name: TDP FILMS
Description:
TDP FILMS
A full Finance, Production and Post-Production Services company powered by an international team.
LOS ANGELES | NEW YORK | PARIS | PRAGUE

Created in 2010, TDP is a financial, production and post-production service provider for low to medium tiered feature productions and scripted TV.

Through our international network of offices in the US, France, Czech Republic and China, we act as line-production partners, providing full production and location services.  
Our global footprint provides TDP extensive local knowledge to procure the most competitive bids, local access to tax incentives and rebates as well as a limitless pool of local expertise.

TDP has a robust and trusted filmmaking network that provides the most skilled global resource support and solutions between the US, Europe and Asia. 

TDP understands the fluid nature of production and works with clients to provide a la carte services and full production packaged services. Due to the volume of work we bring to our vendors, we are able to provide services to our clients at a heavily discounted rate, thereby offering extremely competitive bids.  

TDP not only provides peace of mind in reliability and experience but also provides a cost efficient alternative to approaching production.

Name: LA KASETA Ideas Factory
Description:
La Kaseta Ideas Factory is an independent audiovisual production company, with more than 20 years of experience in the audiovisual sector. 

Since its inception La Kaseta has focused its objectives on documenting current affairs and social issues. Issues that often get forgotten or do not find their space in major world MassMedia.

The tagline is the best summary of our philosophy.

We try to explain with images what we can’t explain with words.

La Kaseta focuses its objectives on visually document those social conflicts, nationally and internationally, that in one way or another seem muted and deserve to be disclosed in a comprehensive manner while maintaining our objectivity and professionalism. But La Kaseta also works as an audiovisual production company that offers its services to advertising, television and Internet and has a network of the best professionals in the artistic and audiovisual world of the moment.

La Kaseta’s films, documentaries, and reports have won various international awards, and have been shown at major film and documentary festivals around the world.

Name: IFFG International FilmFestival Gorinchem

filmo is a non-profit commitment to national film history and film culture, the local audience and Swiss film.

Name: SALA EQUIS
Description: Multiespacio de ocio cinematográfico y cultural situado en pleno corazón de Madrid. Edificado sobre un antiguo palacete del siglo XIX que en su día albergó al antiguo Cine Alba. Hoy en día recoge una sala grande no convencional que nos traslada a un lugar de encuentro urbano y cosmopolita. Cuenta además con un cine coqueto de programación diaria que aborda cada mes diferentes ciclos temáticos. En el espacio se realizan proyecciones abiertas al público, exposiciones culturales y por supuesto propone una oferta gastronómica acompañada por música. Este rincón se ha convertido en referencia para muchos en el madrileño barrio del rastro.

Name: ArtHood Entertainment
Description:
ArtHood Entertainment GmbH was founded by Said Nur Akkus in October 2018 in Berlin, Germany and has established itself as a worldwide distributor as well as producer (in collaboration with ArtHood Films) of high-quality feature and documentary art house films. The company‘s focus is on films produced, set or originating in the Middle East (MENA), a region gaining more and more political, economic and cultural importance in times of globalisation as well as attracting visitors from all over the world with its rich and diverse culture and history.

For its portfolio of third-party and in-company productions, ArtHood Entertainment offers multi-channel distribution opportunities both via traditional media such as festivals, theatrical and TV as well as modern exploitation channels in the form of VoD and digital streaming platforms.

Name: 30 Segundos Produções
Description: Produzimos fotografia publicitária e vídeos especiais para utilização em marketing digital. Ganhe a atenção das pessoas. Vídeos conectam pessoas ao seu produto.

Name: BendFilm
Description:
BendFilm is a non-profit arts and culture organization located in Bend, Oregon, that produces an annual independent film festival and related programming throughout the year. The company is comprised of individuals who believe that art is best channeled through creative genius, not commercial interests. We find that film festivals are best experienced in a relaxed atmosphere where the next venue is a block from the last and the words "velvet rope" apply to fashion choices rather than exclusive access ordeals.
 
Our contribution is to provide brave and talented independent filmmakers exposure, opportunity and, well, CASH. The creation of film without the burden of box office concerns is a luxury BendFilm cultivates for filmmakers. One of our favorite pursuits toward that end is creating new ways to add cash to the BendFilm awards. For those who demonstrate mastery in the craft of film making, BendFilm salutes them and then provides capital that will help them to continue their work.
 
Additional motivators include the cultural betterment and economic stimulation of our home: Central Oregon. There is no better proof that our efforts are appreciated than to stand on Wall Street during the festival and watch the enthused expressions on fellow Bendite's and out-of-town faces. It's a rush that keeps us on task during the less fun times of creating this event.
 
Finally, we believe that the stories told through independent film are vital in a small city like Bend, and that by supporting independent film, we are cultivating generations who will understand the value of cinematic arts from an early age. We see access to arts education and exposure to diverse perspectives as vital components for Bend's culture and community.

Name: Volt Filmes
Description:
A Volt Filmes é uma produtora de filmes publicitários, independentes e demais produções cinematográficas.

Nós construímos parcerias criativas e selecionamos cuidadosamente os nossos recursos e fornecedores para criar conteúdos sob medida para cada cliente e compatíveis com seu orçamento.

Buscamos trazer novas experiências em nossos filmes ao combinar storytelling e a estética cinematográfica com a interatividade e dinamicidade de uma geração focada na internet e celular. 

Um dos focos da Volt Filmes é a criação de conteúdos para web, pensados para web.  Reconhecemos as diferentes interfaces digitais, a linguagem de cada uma delas e, sobretudo, a importância cada vez maior dessas mídias nas vidas das pessoas. 

Com criatividade e abusando de novas tecnologias, extraímos o máximo de cada proposta, garantindo destaque e individualidade a cada filme.

Name: Aap tot Aap
Description:
'Ape to Ape' (2025) is a short graduation documentary by Meike Schaapveld and has won the Grand Jury Prize of New York City's Raw Science Film Festival '25 (for the first time by a student film) and has been nominated for the KNF-Award at the Netherlands Film Festival (NFF, Student Competition).

Logline:
"When filmmaker Meike (22) attempts, in a cinematic experiment, to control her visible emotions - such as blushing and crying - in order to appear as a strong leader, she discovers with the help of chimpanzees and science that vulnerability may in fact be her greatest strength for creating connection."

The crew consists of 28 students and alumni from HKU University of the Arts Utrecht, the Netherlands Film Academy, the University of Amsterdam, Leiden University, and Utrecht University.
The film was made in collaboration with, among others, cognitive psychologist Mariska Kret and Amersfoort Zoo. It is screened at multiple places across the Netherlands and in NYC, USA.

Name: E.T.C. Droni.
Description:
E.T.C. con il proprio personale ha maturato una pluridecennale esperienza, a livello nazionale, nel settore della gestione di tutte le entrate degli enti locali e non, gestendo progetti complessi di riordino delle banche dati per il recupero di somme evase o eluse ,che hanno prodotto risultati economici significativi in importanti capoluoghi di Regione e di Provincia.

Volendo rimanere sempre al passo con i tempi si è formato un ramo d'azienda che si occupa di fornire vari tipi di servizi con i Droni che vanno da riprese aeree, monitoraggio ambientale, alle video emozionali e molti altri. 

Tailor-made service: Molto amato dai nostri clienti, una consulenza di 1H gratuita con il nostro esperto di Marketing durante il quale si prenderà visione dei canali social, e del sito internet per valutare come il nostro servizio può dare valore aggiunto alla tua azienda e valorizzare la crescita, garantendo un risparmio economico e di tempo grazie a questa tecnologia.

Per qualsiasi informazione non esitare a contattarci. 

328-6084914

info@etcdroni.com

Name: Windrush Caribbean Film Festival
Description:
The Windrush Caribbean Film Festival returns from 14–29 June 2025, with events across selected UK locations and globally online.

Now in its sixth year, WCFF celebrates the legacy of the Windrush Generation and the richness of Caribbean and Black British cinema. This year’s theme, Belonging, Being, Becoming, explores identity, cultural grounding, and the ongoing journey of Caribbean people in Britain — from arrival to rootedness, from resistance to renaissance.

WCFF brings together filmmakers, thinkers, and communities to reflect, connect, and reimagine the narratives that shape us — as we build towards Windrush 80 in 2028.

Follow for programme updates, screenings and opportunities to get involved.

Name: Angle Psy
Description: Angle Psy produit des œuvres cinématographiques au Québec et au Canada. Fondée par de jeunes entrepreneurs accompagnés de nombreux artistes en croissance. Cette organisation tente de faire valoir la beauté du septième art en plus de corriger des problèmes d’injustice sociale.

Name: Umiharu Produções Culturais e Cinematográficas
Description:
Há 16 anos a Umiharu se dedica à criação, desenvolvimento, gestão e realização de Projetos Culturais e Audiovisuais, de alcance social nas áreas da ciência e educação, sempre orientados por conceitos humanistas de Sustentabilidade e Ética. Desde sua fundação, traz em seu DNA a idealização e difusão da Cultura Humanista, democratizando o acesso ao conhecimento, com temas de impacto e pertinência atual.

São Projetos relacionados a causas, alinhados com os Objetivos de Desenvolvimento Sustentável (ODS), da ONU. Envolvendo comunidades, empresas e poder público, contam com o apoio de parceiros, como ONU Mulheres, Pacto Global da ONU e Childhood Brasil, e contribuem para construção de uma sociedade mais justa e feliz.

Com qualidade e inovação, a Umiharu agrega valor à marca de seus patrocinadores: Coca-Cola Femsa, Rabobank, Usiminas, Gerdau, Nestlé, 3M, Duratex/ Deca, Braskem, C&A, Klabin, Pernambucanas, Novartis, Sandoz, HSBC, Banco Sumitomo, ABN Amro, App 99, Arteris, EY, Unilever.

MULHERES LUZ DA TRANSFORMAÇÃO – Filme Documentário, teve seu pré-lançamento mundial em 2024, na Sede das Nações Unidas, em Nova York, a convite do Pacto Global da ONU, para participar do CSW68 – Comissão sobre a Situação das Mulheres.

MULHERES ILUMINANDO O MUNDO – Série de Filmes para o empoderamento das mulheres e a equidade de gênero. Filme vencedor de diversos Prêmios Internacionais. Os produtos agregados impactaram 7 milhões de pessoas.
Acesse o site: http://www.mulheresiluminandomundo.org

MUNDO SEM PORTEIRA – um alerta contra a exploração sexual de crianças e adolescentes. Documentário vencedor de diversos Prêmios Internacionais.
Acesse o site: http://www.mundosemporteira.umiharu.com.br

A CURA TEM CARA – Filmes documentários para saúde, bem-estar e ânimo da população. Impacto a 3 milhões de pessoas.
Acesse o site: http://www.acuratemcara.umiharu.com.br

ÁGUA, ARTE E SUSTENTABILIDADE – Projeto Itinerante: Teatro, Vídeos, Exposição de Arte Brasileira, Manuais do Aluno e Educador.

Name: Outpost Post-Production
Description: Outpost provides world class creative talent, award winning post production services and state of the art facilities in the heart of Belfast.

Name: COLLECTIVE Films
Description: A creative family of passionate humans who tell human stories through the medium of picture and sound.

Name: Docwerkers
Description: Wij zijn Docwerkers, een productiehuis voor organisaties en bedrijven met een maatschappelijke missie.  Wil je harten en geesten veroveren en mensen aansporen tot actie? Je kan bij ons terecht voor elk type video, mét een slimme strategie voor het juiste publiek en de meeste impact.

Name: Holocene Studios
Description:
Holocene Studios is an indie film production house, forged under the common goal of breaking new grounds within the motion picture format. We focus our uncompromising creativity towards original storytelling, creating work rooted in authenticity and the human experience.
 
We offer a wide range of services within the film production process. Everything from line production, service production to a complete production workflow – from idea to delivery. We’re proud of having collaborated with clients from all around the world on film productions of all shapes and sizes.

Name: Sakaspace
Description: We are your Jakarta-based professional production company specializing in culture and lifestyle audio-visual production. We provide an efficient yet standardized workflow that helps you to produce high-quality audiovisuals to strengthen customer affinity or break the silo to express your creative message.

Name: Gloria Palast
Description:
1956 wurde der Gloria Palast von einer der wichtigsten Größen des deutschen Films, der Produzentin Ilse Kubaschewski, als Münchens modernstes Filmtheater eröffnet und avancierte zu einem beliebten Schauplatz glanzvoller Filmpremieren. Den Namen Gloria Palast trägt dieses Kino seit jeher zu Recht, denn dieses besondere Flair und das exklusive Ambiente einer Filmpremiere ist auch heute noch bei jeder Vorstellung zu spüren.

2012 wurde der Gloria Palast durch die KINOPOLIS-Gruppe als erstes Premium Kino Münchens wiedereröffnet und steht seitdem für Kinogenuss auf höchstem Niveau. Besonders breite Ledersessel inklusive Fußhockern und eigenem Tisch, eine erlesene Speise- und Getränkeauswahl sowie der exklusive Service am Sitzplatz machen jeden Kinobesuch zu einem ganz besonderen Genuss. Neben Blockbustern und ausgewählten Filmhighlights überträgt der Gloria Palast zudem Live-Konzerte und Opern und avancierte in kürzester Zeit zu einem der meistgefragtesten Kinos für Klassikveranstaltungen in München und Umgebung. Der Gloria Palast am Karlsplatz im Herzen Münchens ist daher nicht nur ein Stück Filmgeschichte, sondern ein Ort für ganz besondere Anlässe, die in Erinnerung bleiben.

Der Gloria Palast bietet bis zu 240 Besuchern (192 Plätze im Parkett/48 Plätze im Balkon) Wohlfühlkino von seiner schönsten Seite und kann auch für geschlossene Veranstaltungen gebucht werden (events@cine-art.de).

Name: Studio Apenzaken
Description: Studio Apenzaken produceert commercials, portretten en informatiefilms voor de zakelijke en educatieve sector. Een filmproductie wordt op maat gemaakt en toegespitst op de beoogde ontvangers. Met het doel om de kernboodschap visueel te beleven. Onze communicatiespecialisten adviseren u graag in het toepassen en implementeren van een filmcampagne binnen uw organisatie of bedrijf om het effect en de beleving zo hoog mogelijk te maken.

Name: Filmscape Productions
Description: We believe in creativity through contrast, and that no two things can be completely unrelated. We are a group of creative, talented, and diverse minds on a mission, all gathered together under one company for one purpose: to connect people, products, and ideas through video and film production. We do what we do because we love doing it. We’re a family — not in the traditional since, but in the way you think of any tight nit community with similar interests and passions.

Name: The Barn
Description:
THE BARN is an indie movie musical production company based in Los Angeles. Co-founded by Jeffrey Simon and Matt Andrews, they have a development slate of musical features and are seeking financing.

Their musical short film STEAM! won the Savannah Film Festival Best in Show award and is distributed by RevryTV as an Original Film.

Name: vertelburo.nl
Description:
Bij VertelBuro leggen we levensverhalen vast op film in opdracht van zowel organisaties als particulieren. Deze verhalen verrijken exposities en websites en zijn aanvulling op het behoud van onze geschiedenis bij archieven. Het levensverhaal van een dierbare is ook voor een familiearchief van grote waarde. Het brengt mensen tot elkaar en blijft behouden voor de komende generaties. Een bijzonder document dat in de tijd enkel in waarde zal toenemen.

Een levensverhaal is niet enkel een weerspiegeling van het leven van één persoon, maar ook dat van een familie, een generatie, tijdperk, maatschappelijke beweging of een specifieke groep mensen. In samenwerking met musea, archieven en kennisinstituten werken we veelal aan series levensverhalen waarbij individuele vertellingen zich bundelen in een thema. Wij passen daarbij de Oral History interview methode toe. We stellen vragen die de geïnterviewde doen teruggaan in de tijd, naar gebeurtenissen en mensen die hen hebben gevormd. 

We werken in opdracht en initiëren zelf ook oral history projecten wanneer deze onze bijzondere belangstelling heeft zoals over de Nederlandse Thuisbevalcultuur. 

Meer informatie op www.dethuisbevalcultuur.nl

Name: Fixafilm Sp. z o.o.
Description: FIXAFILM is an end-to-end postproduction facility providing stellar finishing-up services to Polish and international producers. From dailies to masters, our tech-savvy team delivers top-notch content in any required colour space or format, enabling smooth final integration of all key elements. The company is housed in a Warsaw-based Dolby Vision certified studio with editing suites, colour-grading rooms, and a VFX department.

Name: Postudio ltd.
Description:
POSTUDIO is elevating Post Production by harnessing AI. 
Merging technology with human skill, we're redefining efficiency and creativity, setting new standards of excellence in post-production.

We offer work with the advanced software and tools for post production with an emphasis of immersive tech like XR, AI and Unreal.

Name: Making Waves Film Festival
Description: Making Waves Film Festival supports and exhibits pioneering work by international talent and local independent filmmakers. Founded in 2012 the Making Waves International Film Festival encourages entries from local, UK and International filmmakers, and hosts a screening event each year to exhibit the Official Selections to a live audience, who are also responsible for selecting the Audience Award for Best Film.

Name: Cornucopia Pictures
Description:
We are a production house based in Mumbai, India that creates & curates entertaining and engaging live action content for children from 8-16 years of age. We produce feature films, short films, TVCs and web series and branded content for brands that believe in thoughtful, conscious and entertaining stories.

Most of children’s content today is centred around ‘doing’ and not ‘being’. Cornucopia Pictures seeks to create content that lets children be mesmerised into storytelling in a fun, engaging, entertaining manner.

Name: Walskium
Description: Walskium is Madrid based audiovisual creative studio focused on developing innovative content. We have an extensive experience working in partnership with lots of agencies, corporations, institutions and, of course, other studios.

Name: LEO Production Studio
Description:
We are Leo Production, a UAE and Los Angeles-based creative studio specializing in advanced, high-quality VR content. From immersive storytelling to interactive experiences, we bring innovation and cinematic precision to the world of virtual reality.

Our team of visionary directors, designers, and technologists collaborates across continents to craft next-generation VR experiences for global brands, agencies, and entertainment leaders.

At Leo Production, we don’t just create visuals—we build entire worlds. Whether it’s branded content, experiential media, virtual training, or narrative storytelling, our mission is to push the boundaries of what’s possible in immersive media.

Come share our passion for virtual creation.

#WeAreLeo

Name: ORIGINALS FACTORY
Description: ORIGINALS FACTORY is a new "Original" movie company dedicated to all rights movie acquisitions, production(s) and co-production(s). The “home” for Original movie contents, from co-production to distribution (VOD, SVOD, TV). The company's purpose is all media distribution, focusing on innovative premium digital distribution (Premium VOD | Day & Date | E-CINEMA, exclusive SVOD). ORIGINALS FACTORY is a disruptive feature movies studio co-founded by former senior executives of CANAL+ Group, TF1 Group, ... with a combined strong experience in major media groups, digital and company creations.

Name: A7 Filmes
Description:
A7 FILMES | Não existe luxo sem arte.

A7 Filmes é a produtora audiovisual brasileira que transforma cinema em ativo estratégico. Criamos narrativas autorais com excelência artística e impacto global, conectando investidores a um segmento de alto valor agregado.

Nosso compromisso é com qualidade, originalidade e a construção de um catálogo que reflete o que há de mais refinado na sétima arte. Inspirados pelo cinema clássico e contemporâneo, elevamos a experiência cinematográfica a um patamar de prestígio e sofisticação.

Mais do que entretenimento, o cinema é um investimento cultural e estratégico. Com um portfólio autoral e curadoria de excelência, oferecemos oportunidades exclusivas para quem busca retorno financeiro, branding e posicionamento de marca. Transformamos impostos em ativos estratégicos com potencial de impacto duradouro.

Atualmente, temos em nosso portfólio os longas-metragens "O Retrato de Sarah", "Soturno" e "Cavaleiro de Rodas", filmes que expressam nossa visão para o cinema independente no Brasil: obras que unem identidade artística forte, precisão narrativa e um olhar estratégico para o mercado. Acreditamos que o cinema indie pode ser um vetor de sofisticação e impacto global, consolidando-se como uma marca cultural e financeira relevante, assim como aconteceu com A24 e Neon no cenário internacional.

A A7 Filmes é o ponto de convergência entre arte e luxo. Vamos construir esse legado juntos?

Name: MouseTrap Films, LLC | Film Festival Flix | Guild Screeners | VIPexTV
Description:
At MouseTrap Films, we’ve built a better mouse trap. Our app based, secure, streaming platform has been empowering festivals, artists, and individuals around the world since 2011. 

Our Brands:
FILM FESTIVAL FLIX - powering festivals and events. 
GUILD SCREENERS - powering awards campaigns, PR, and industry screenings. 
VIPexTV - powering music artists, athletes, influencers, and milestone private events. 
WHITE LABEL APPS - for Enterprise Clients

Users can watch on the device they own. Simply log in, select your film, and watch. Over 100,000 households (over the age of 65), in more than 50 countries, have enjoyed watching, with engagement rising more than 5x compared to live attendance. 

Our content security is MPA (Motion Picture Association) / TPN (Trusted Partner Network) Gold Shield Assessed. We offer all Studio mandated content security controls.

Our expert technical, operations, and support staff take care of you from A-Z. You can remain focused on your content, communications, and audience development. 

With your dashboard, you’ll have access to real time analytics, insights, and demographic information to help you efficiently grow. With complete transparency and automatic payouts, you never have to worry.

With MouseTrap Films you own your audience, content, sponsors, and advertisers.

Name: Cinedoc
Description:
Het is onze missie om verhalen die vertelt moeten worden, een podium  te geven.  Daarom werken wij heel graag voor en met organisaties / mensen die ook graag positieve impact maken in de wereld. 

Campagnefilm, promo, portret, (korte) documentaire, recruitmentvideo, youtubeserie, social content, brandfilm, explainer, interview, multicam livestream, kortom alles wat onder het kopje film en video valt. Elk verhaal komt het best naar voren in z’n eigen vorm, wij adviseren jou daar graag over.

Name: Insolita Film
Description:
Film Production and Cultural hub
The direct link between artist and entrepreneur

Insolita Film is a cinematographic and creative production hub born from the dynamic idea of putting together cultural and universal contents, quality and sustainability. Oriented toward the international market, Insolita Film is always focused on the experimentation of new forms of film production and distribution. 

Among the innovative aspects of Insolita Film is the creation of CIAK-in, a digital 
 network where entrepreneurs and artists can collaborate.
Insolita Film’s goal is to share methodologies of creative industries with other entrepreneurs, sensitizing them to invest in culture and to receive in return concrete advantages. The mission behind this strategy is to innovate the system of Cultural Production putting the private sector as the first source of financing for artistic projects.

Name: Fringe! Queer Film & Arts Fest
Description:
Since 2011, Fringe! Queer Film & Arts Fest has been an entirely volunteer-run organisation rooted in London's queer creative scene. At an annual festival, and throughout the year, we showcase an eclectic mix of films, arts and events celebrating LGBTIQA+ stories from around the world, welcoming everybody.

film submission deadline 15 May 2022: https://bit.ly/FringeSubs2022
festival dates: 20-25 September 2022

Fringe! started in 2011 as a community response to arts cuts carnage, and since then we’ve ‘expanded exponentially to become one of the most innovative and exciting festivals on the circuit.’(Londonist)

From feature films to experimental installations, workshops and lively debates to wild parties, Fringe! hosts a multitude of diverse events to tickle every one of the senses. You'll see us flooding East London's cinemas, art galleries, pop-up venues and basement clubs with the powerful, provocative and strange.

As we continue to develop and our Fringe! family continues to grow, some things stay the same: a lot of our screenings and events are free or affordable, we remain open to new voices and ideas, and we’ll always be queer: celebratory but critical as hell.

Name: HAVE Films Sàrl
Description:
Have Films is a Luxembourg-based video production company. Founded by the two brothers Nicolas & Olivier Havé, we produce visual media of the highest standard, optimized for online usage and viral spread. We are young, agile and raised with the latest technology, making us more than ready for the challenges and opportunities the market presents today. 

Todays market moves fast and demands simplicity - yet quality can’t be compromised. To deliver the best content we therefore work under different dynamics than traditional production houses. We are a community. This means that we have a small core of people surrounded by a network of Luxembourg’s best young filmmakers, photographers, record companies and directors. With this model we can work more quickly and be more flexible than any other production house while still delivering the best quality. 

There is no job too big or too small for us to tackle - in everything we do we are fueled by our passion for building brands. We shoot sports cars, dogs, ski jumps, accountants, yachts, dj's, astronauts, shoes, love, parties, old people, young people and much more. Feels like something missing on the list? Give us a call or drop us an e-mail!

Name: Happenstance Films
Description:
Happenstance Films crafts award-winning documentaries defined by capturing the unexpected. With every film, we strive for extraordinary stories full of moments that leave a lasting imprint. To do so requires meticulous research and planning, empathy, and a little luck.

We’re proud to have made films for Channel 4, National Geographic, Al Jazeera, UNICEF, Unilever, Mastercard, Bupa, and the British Film Institute.

Name: The Positive Alternative
Description:
The Positive Alternative documentary series provides both dramatic yet empowering stories about how little changes can create a big positive impact on our lives, on climate change and the world at large.

In season 1 The Positive Alternative shares the story of 4 Australian farmers whose lives and farms are fundamentally impacted by climate change. Yet provide sustainable products and consumer solutions for a more vibrant and sustainable food system. Each episode covers one crucial topic within the food industry: sustainable diets, reducing food waste, sustainable production, low emission meat.

Let's make climate change a shared problem; from farm to fork.

Films by Tim Arnold AV
Written and produced by Sanne Kragten
In close collaboration with Dr. Anika Molesworth
Colours by Suriya Black

Name: Oh No Gravity
Description: We are a film and animation studio that creates impactful visuals for brands. We produce everything from social media content to commercials and content for events and trade shows—always with a strong focus on storytelling and design. Based in Gothenburg and Stockholm.

Name: AFOS (Attraction Film of Sweden)
Description: AFOS is a high-end boutique production company with a focus on producing commercials, branding films, and feature films. We're the go to choice for any production, big or small. We produce films all over Sweden and the rest of the world. We have a passion for storytelling and we're always delivering quality content. Our goal is to exceed our customers expectations!

Name: Red Noise Films
Description:
Productora audiovisual ubicada en Madrid especializada en publicidad con servicios desde el proceso creativo y la producción de vídeo, hasta la postproducción.

Cuenta con una gran variedad de ofertas de grabación y técnicas como servicio de grabación aérea, slow-motion, 4K, motion graphics, efectos especiales y mucho más.

Name: Alexive Media
Description: Kippenvel, enthousiasme, ontroering… WOW! Een succesvolle video neemt je mee door de juiste combinatie van beeld, geluid en verhaal. Welk verhaal wil jouw organisatie vertellen door middel van video? Dat is een hele belangrijke vraag waar we je graag bij helpen. Bij Alexive Media geloven we namelijk in de kracht van video. Daarom gaan we voor jou verder dan een simpele videoproductie… We creëren een beleving! Een videobeleving waarin we zorgen dat jouw boodschap wordt verteld op een manier die raakt. Benieuwd naar wat dat betekent? Neem maar eens een kijkje in ons portfolio.

Name: Dallas Filmmakers Alliance
Description:
The Dallas Filmmakers Alliance is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. 

We believe that every great film begins with a great story and collaboration is the precursor to success. The Dallas Filmmakers Alliance is a community organization of producers, filmmakers, and artists. The DFA envisions collaboration between filmmakers, education through workshops, classes, and competitions, public support to important causes in our community, and organizes productions by combining our collective talent. We strive to make Dallas synonymous with film.

Our Mission: We want to create a trusted community for filmmakers who are interested in collaborating, learning, and advancing the development of film in Dallas.

Film is not something we do, film is a lifestyle.

Name: Leaning Tree Media
Description:
Here at Leaning Tree Media, we offer a full video production service to help you tell your brands story in an interactive, professional, and fun manner. From our bases in Mayo and Kilkenny, we help to bring your brand to life, with high quality video marketing content available throughout Ireland. We strongly believe that video is a powerful tool for businesses, and we are committed to supporting your businesses goals. Whether you are looking for educational videos, inspirational content, promotional videos or our video workshops.

Leaning Tree Media is not just a video agency, we like to think of ourselves as an extension of your marketing team. In fact, we are proud to welcome our clients into the production process, and we find this can be a fun and interactive way to work together to deliver professional content to promote your business story. At every stage of the process, we will uncover the details which make your business unique, so that your video content sets you apart from the competition.

Our knowledgeable team know exactly how to create video content which fits with your marketing strategy, campaign development and social media branding. Whether you are looking to create video content as an SME, commercial client, corporate business, or a state body, you can be sure that our scripting and storyboarding will provide many useful ideas.

We work proficiently with our clients from the initial concept through to the development of their productions, with each client benefitting from our expertise and knowledge. The best thing about our job is that every day is as exciting as the next, as we get to create a wide variety of video marketing content for our clients. No production is too big or too small for our team of professional videographers, photographers, animators, and post-production specialists, and we are excited to be able to work with you and your business.

Name: JK Media Group
Description: A multifaceted company of innovative production and creativity that is always ready to listen and respond to the needs of our clients. We are equipped with a platform that allows us to provide our clients with high quality services in all areas of production. A empresa é resultado da união de engenheiros de televisão, técnicos de VT, produtores, editores, roteiristas, tradutores e intérpretes, formados no que há de mais moderno em tecnologia de manipulação, tratamento e processamento de imagens, conversão de formatos e sistemas, além de todos os serviços que envolvem a geração, transformação, digitalização, armazenamento e multiplicação da imagem eletrônica, seja ela em meio analógico, digital, magnético, ótico ou rede de dados.

Nossa estrutura conta com estúdios próprios de gravação de Libras, Audiodescrição e Dublagem, 5 ilhas de edição, e Central Técnica Multiformato.

Os equipamentos da Video Shack Laboratório Audiovisual são sempre atualizados e renovados para a manutenção do mais elevado apuro tecnológico e da melhor relação custo-benefício para seus clientes.

Name: Espoo Ciné International Film Festival
Description:
Espoo Ciné International Film Festival has established itself as a showcase of contemporary European cinema in Finland. The festival presents some of the most interesting new films, both from established creators and emerging talents. Special attention in the festival’s program is given to issues of minority representation.

The new Crip Ciné Film Festival, focused on disability cinema, will take place in Espoo and Helsinki from 12 to 16 April, 2025. The 36th edition of the Espoo Ciné festival will be held from 22 to 31 August, 2025. The programme will be announced during the summer!

Alongside Espoo Ciné and the new Crip Ciné, the festival also hosts Junior Ciné, an event dedicated to children and young audiences. Additionally, Espoo Ciné represents Finland in the WRAP! project, which brings a selection of engaging European films for children and young people to schools.

Name: BendFilm, Inc
Description:
BendFilm is a non-profit arts and culture organization located in Bend, Oregon, that produces an annual independent film festival and related programming throughout the year. The company is comprised of individuals who believe that art is best channeled through creative genius, not commercial interests. We find that film festivals are best experienced in a relaxed atmosphere where the next venue is a block from the last and the words "velvet rope" apply to fashion choices rather than exclusive access ordeals.
 
Our contribution is to provide brave and talented independent filmmakers exposure, opportunity and, well, CASH. The creation of film without the burden of box office concerns is a luxury BendFilm cultivates for filmmakers. One of our favorite pursuits toward that end is creating new ways to add cash to the BendFilm awards. For those who demonstrate mastery in the craft of film making, BendFilm salutes them and then provides capital that will help them to continue their work.
 
Additional motivators include the cultural betterment and economic stimulation of our home: Central Oregon. There is no better proof that our efforts are appreciated than to stand on Wall Street during the festival and watch the enthused expressions on fellow Bendite's and out-of-town faces. It's a rush that keeps us on task during the less fun times of creating this event.
 
Finally, we believe that the stories told through independent film are vital in a small city like Bend, and that by supporting independent film, we are cultivating generations who will understand the value of cinematic arts from an early age. We see access to arts education and exposure to diverse perspectives as vital components for Bend's culture and community.

Onze content voelt dichtbij en vertrouwd, maar heeft tegelijkertijd een filmische kwaliteit.

Sinds onze oprichting in 2017 staan duurzaamheid, natuur, persoonlijke verhalen en de kracht van generaties centraal in alles wat we doen. We laten ons inspireren door de natuur – verdwalen graag in bossen en bergen – en werken samen met partners die dezelfde passie delen.

Among filmmakers, buyers, distributors, sales agents, and journalists, KVIFF is considered the most important event in all of Central and Eastern Europe.

www.kviff.com

Name: FINCH
Description:
FINCH is a film production company.

We make documentaries, live experiences, TV commercials, feature films and digital content. We hold several patents and actively develop and license products, innovations, and inventions that push the boundaries of conventional storytelling.

Founded in 2011, our work has been recognised with top honours including an Academy Award Nomination, an International Emmy Nomination, multiple Gold Cannes Lions and the Grand Prix for Good, two D&AD Black Pencils and several Yellow Pencils, a Grand Prix at The New York Festivals, multiple Gold at CICLOPE, Gold at LIA, a number of Gold Pencils at the ONE show, the AdFest Grande Lotus for Humanity.

The company has created live experiences for Unilever, Pedigree, SkyTV/Game of Thrones, Jack Daniels and Western Australia’s RAC, among others.In 2017 FINCH was recognised as Production Company of the Year by SPIKES Asia, was ranked Asia Pacific #1 Production Company and one of the World’s Top 5 Production Companies by the GUNN REPORT, one of the Top 6 Production Companies in the World by Shots Magazine, Asia Pacific #1 Production Company by BestAds, and AdNews Production Agency of the Year.

2017 also saw FINCH create two social good initiatives; Creatable and The Lion’s Share.

CREATABLE, a STEM based creative technology school curriculum that ignites passion and self belief in teenage girls as they prepare for the future of work.

THE LION’S SHARE, founded by Director Christopher Nelius and FINCH, launched at the United Nations General Assembly in 2018 with partners the UNDP and MARS Corporation. It is a simple but powerful idea that sees the corporate world make a small contribution each time an animal appears in their advertising, raising money for wildlife conservation and animal welfare. Sir David Attenborough is special ambassador, alongside UNDP ambassador, Nikolaj Coster-Waldau.

Most recently FINCH was recognised as 2018 regional production company of the year at LIA.

Description: Autoedit Productions boasts a team of top-notch professionals in the industry, providing exceptional 2D and 3D Animatics services. We specialize in creating a wide range of visual media, including Ad-Films, Corporate Films, Audio Visuals, TVC & TVC Adaptations, and dubbing services in all Indian languages.

Name: Crazy Legs Productions
Description: From development to deliverables and everything in between, Crazy Legs has the experience and the infrastructure for producing feature films, episodic television, and branded entertainment of almost any genre. Our team has a combined two centuries of production know-how, financial acumen, and creative skills – all dedicated to the art of cinematic storytelling. Utilizing our camera & lighting business, a 13-suite post-production facility in the heart of downtown Atlanta with remote synch to Los Angeles, and Georgia’s unbeatable tax-incentives – Crazy Legs delivers high-end projects at cost-effective prices. Our roster of award-winning writers and feature-film directors assures that everything we produce conveys a unique, creative vision. In an industry built on relationships, Crazy Legs leverages our extensive network within the Producers Guild of America and our representation by Creative Artists Agency to open doors and close deals.

Name: Motion Impossible
Description:
Founded in 2014 by award-winning cameraman Rob Drewett & remote-control expert Andy Nancollis, MI has transformed how film, TV & live broadcasts are captured. What started as a passion project between two industry insiders has now evolved into a global leader of camera movement & stabilisation.  

The journey began with M-Series, a fully stabilised, remote-controlled dolly system. Initially embraced by the VR/360-degree filmmaking world, it allowed creators to move cameras through spaces in ways previously impossible – offering smoother & more precise control. But innovation rarely stops at one breakthrough. In 2019, AGITO became the world’s first modular, remote-controlled dolly system, built to work just as effortlessly on a studio track as it does across off-road terrain. It has since been used on many projects, from Planet Earth II to Chanel runway shoots, UEFA Champion’s League Finals & feature films like Marinette.  

Building on this success, MI has continued to enhance & expand the AGITO range. The latest evolution, AGITO Gen 2 offers improved control, smarter connectivity, sharper processing & increased flexibility – making it the most advanced system in its class. For DOPs demanding even great control over their shots, there’s AGITO Cine – a dedicated system for feature films & HETV filmmaking. Taking innovation further, the company introduced MagTrax, a magnetic tracking system that allows AGITO to follow a hidden path with absolute precision. Ideal for studio environments & live broadcasts, MagTrax removes the need for visible tracks, enabling complex camera moves while keeping sets clean and unobstructed. 

But what makes MI stand out isn’t just its tech – it's the people behind it. Drewett and Nancollis didn’t just create a product; they built a company that listens. Working closely with industry pros, they continuously refine their solutions to push the boundaries of what’s possible.

Want to know more? Get in touch: info@motion-impossible.com

Name: CACTUS CINE SRL
Description:
We are Cactus Cine, a group of people that created a job out of their obsession and a passion out of their work.

We learned by doing, filming and studying everything we could. We were given birth by shorts. We did well. At 20, we were traveling and winning awards in Havana, Berlin, Mexico, Canada, Buenos Aires, Portugal and Rome.
We worked on several documentaries, editing and filming. And we used our ability for short narrative fiction for corporate image and product advertising. We acquired Professionalism. We grew.
And TV showed up to stay to this very day. We grew up in its frenzy and it allowed us to create a structure of people prepared to respond under any circumstance while maintaining our quality and style. We provide services and formats for various public and private broadcasting television signals . From this solid foundation we spiraled up towards cinema: we made our own movies. And it rewarded us again. We won the Mar del Plata International Film Festival, went to Berlin, Warsaw, San Sebastian, London, Amsterdam, Napa Valley ...
We have a natural creative calling, with a large capacity for production.With 10 years of undisputed Aesthetic Quality Work and High Professional Consistency, we continue to grow as the most beautiful desert plant does, protecting the water of creativity with the hard thorns of rigorous work, because every film deserves it. But above all, because any idea set into motion deserves it.

Name: VIDEOCINE ENTRETENIMIENTO
Description:
El 24 de enero de 1978 surgió Televicine, hoy Televisa Cine, que a lo largo de 37 años se ha dedicado a la producción y distribución de películas nacionales e internacionales.

El Chanfle, de Roberto Gómez Bolaños, fue la primera película que produjimos entre 1978 y 1979 y, hasta el momento, hemos realizado más de 250 filmes.

Actualmente, tenemos casi el 20% de participación en el mercado a través de los sellos VIDEOCINE Distribución y VIDEOCINE Producción.

VIDEOCINE Distribución es considerada la distribuidora más importante del cine mexicano porque lleva títulos propios y de otros productores nacionales y extranjeros a diversas salas del país. VIDEOCINE Producción se encarga de la realización y coproducción de cintas mexicanas, asociándose con importantes firmas como Altavista Films, Argos Cine, Plural Entertainment, Cinépolis Producciones, Lemon Films y el IMCINE.

Para expandirse a otros mercados, Televisa Cine buscó alianzas estratégicas en Estados Unidos. De esta manera, firmamos un convenio con Lionsgate y creamos PANTELION Films. Gracias a esto, hemos llevado películas taquilleras de VIDEOCINE al público hispano que radica en la Unión Americana.

Televisa Cine contribuye con éxito al resurgimiento de la industria cinematográfica y promueve el desarrollo artístico y técnico de México. Estamos en constante búsqueda de nuevos valores para la creación de historias atractivas que entretengan a todo tipo de público a nivel global.

Name: PIDS ENGHIEN
Description:
Le PIDS ENGHIEN est une manifestation créée par le Centre des arts d'Enghien-les-Bains dédiée aux effets visuels, croisant les enjeux créatifs, techniques et économiques d'un secteur en perpétuelle évolution. Découvrez les dernières tendances et innovations en matière d’effets visuels numériques, de CGI, de motion capture, de 3D et de technologies de rupture dans le cinéma, la télévision, la publicité, les jeux vidéo et les transmédias !

Cet événement se décline autour de plusieurs temps forts :
- Les conférences professionnelles présentant le meilleur de la création numérique mondiale (étude de cas, tables rondes, rencontres, keynotes…).
- La Career Fair : espace « recrutement » pour les sociétés d’animation et de VFX.
- Digital Creation GENIE Awards : remise de prix et de célébration de la création numérique française.

Le PIDS ENGHIEN est un événement Paris Images produit et organisé par le Centre des arts d’Enghien-les-Bains. Il est soutenu par la Région Ile-de-France, le département du Val-d'Oise, le groupe Barrière, Film Paris Region, le CNC et Cap Digital.

Name: New Mexico Film Office
Description: The New Mexico Film Office serves the film and television industry locally, nationally and internationally. As the first film office created expressly to market an entire state to the industry, the New Mexico Film Office has maintained a leadership position in the industry for over 50 years. In addition to offering a competitive range of production tax incentives, our office also works diligently to build a permanent base of trained and certified technical crew members.

Artisan has specialized in handling 2d paint, stereo paint, rotoscopy, matchmove, matte painting, background extension, crowd replication and composting.

Our team of artisans is mix of well experienced & talented individuals who deliver you the best of what industry has to offer with the cutting edge technology and digital delivery format. 

We are magicians with mouse instead of wands.

Name: Cork International Film Festival
Description:
- The 70th Edition takes place in Cork and online from November 6th to 16th 2025.  
- Cork International Film Festival is worth over €2.5m to the Cork economy
- Sign up for CIFF News eLetters here: https://bit.ly/CIFFezine

ABOUT US 
As Ireland's first and largest film festival, Cork International Film Festival is a local, national and international celebration of cinema, running in November each year in Cork City and county. 

Award-winning films from the international film festival circuit, new discoveries and cinema classics are selected by our experienced curatorial team to be shown on the big screen in Cork along with an online highlights programme nationwide. The Festival showcases the latest and best international and Irish features, documentaries and shorts, and includes programmes for schools, families, and specialist Industry Days, including Doc Day, cementing the Festival as the destination festival for documentary in Ireland. Programme strands include Culinary Cinema (film and food), Green Screen (film and environment & climate activism), Disruptors (maverick filmmakers) and Illuminate (film and mental health).

Name: Barrandov Studio a.s.
Description:
Barrandov Studios is one of the largest and oldest film studios in Europe. For more than seventy years, the studios have been the location of choice for over 2,500 Czech and International films. The studios’ primary objective is to ensure the presence of all film-related fields and services in one convenient location on the famed hill behind Prague where Barrandov’s founding fathers, the Havel brothers, built the now legendary studios in the 1930s.

Barrandov Studio complex offers all film-related fields and services in one convenient location. The core of Barrandov Studio remains its sound stages (incl. 4,000 sq m large MAX stage) and the exterior backlot with a clear natural horizon, which is also part of the Barrandov premises. But the studios lot has also production offices and backstage facilities, set construction workshops, the large costume&props department, post-production houses, SFX teams or camera and lighting equipment rental at your disposal.

Name: Galeria Distribuidora
Description: A Galeria Distribuidora é uma companhia brasileira que distribui longas-metragens nacionais e internacionais. A inovação e o dinamismo são as diretrizes para o trabalho da Galeria, que participa de forma colaborativa desde a concepção dos projetos com as maiores produtoras do Brasil. Now working on our new project, The VHS Gang

www.theglow.es

Name: Screen Flanders
Description:
With financial support and a strong network, Screen Flanders makes local and international audiovisual productions possible.

Screen Flanders is the Flanders government's economic measure to support feature films and series in the Flanders Region. The aim of the measure is to provide an economic stimulus to the Flanders audiovisual sector and to put the region on the map as an attractive partner for international co-productions.

Screen Flanders is also your first stop for information on all aspects of audiovisual production in the Flanders Region, from potential film locations, permits and financing to audiovisual facilities.

Screen Flanders is an initiative of VLAIO in collaboration with the Flanders Audiovisual Fund (VAF), where VLAIO provides the annual budget and VAF handles the applications, promotion and communication.

Name: CICAE International Confederation of Arthouse Cinemas
Description:
The CICAE (Confédération Internationale des Cinémas d’Art et d’Essai) is a non-profit association bringing together over 2400 arthouse cinemas with more than 4400 screens, in 45 countries in the world, thanks to the collaboration of 15 national and regional arthouse cinema networks (Belgium, Canada-Québec, Chile, France, Germany, Italy, Hungary, the Netherlands, Poland, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, Venezuela and arabic-speaking countries), as well as individual cinemas, not yet represented by a national network, and festivals across the world.

 Encouraging arthouse cinemas to come together under a common umbrella at the national and international level. 
 Obtaining support for arthouse films from government bodies. Fostering the distribution of high quality films from all countries, in all countries.
 Promoting the screening of art films in order to increase audiences and foster production through targeted cultural initiatives.

The activities of the CICAE:

 Art Cinema Award
The CICAE has a jury composed by cinema exhibitors in each of its festivals members; the aim of the award is to promote a relevant film to the artistic and cultural point of view to his network of cinema theatres.

 Arthouse Cinema Training
The CICAE’s annual Arthouse Cinema Training is a one-week intensive programme bringing together arthouse exhibition professionals from around to world to gain in-depth insight into the management of a movie theatre.

 Arthouse Cinema Hub
The Arthouse Cinema Hub is the place to learn, connect, and share your ideas about programming, marketing, business, audience development and cinema space with the arthouse cinema industry worldwide.

 European Arthouse Cinema Day
European Art Cinema Day aims to strengthen cinemas in regions that don’t have their own arthouse unions, develop support structures and increase the visibility of arthouse films in general.

Name: Café Royal

Name: Grupo SehLoiro
Description:
BR
Somos um hub de inovação e entretenimento formado por quatro verticais de negócios que reúnem iniciativas ligadas à cultura de live streaming, aos jogos eletrônicos e assessoria de influenciadores. A história da SL remonta a mais de 10 e assim celebramos e nos divertimos ao longo desse caminho com nossos pilares: SL Studios, SL Moderação, SL Educa e o YoGamers do Bem. 

Na SL Studios, oferecemos os serviços de produção de conteúdo, assessoria de influenciadores, licenciamos, apoiamos e desenvolvemos jogos eletrônicos.

No pilar SL MOD, criamos uma metodologia pioneira para moderação e integração de bots para plataformas digitais: Twitch, YT, Shorts e Tik Tok. 

No pilar educação, capacitamos profissionais que desejam seguir na carreira gamer através da plataforma SL Educa e com nosso Instituto YoGamers do Bem, promovemos a inclusão e a transformação sociocultural, o combate à fome, a ajuda em causas de desastres naturais e a cultura do voluntariado. 

ENG
We are an innovation and entertainment hub formed by four business verticals that bring together initiatives linked to live streaming culture, electronic games and influencer consultancy. SL's history goes back more than 10 years and so we celebrate and have fun along this path with our pillars: SL Studios, SL Moderação, SL Educa e o YoGamers do Bem. 


At SL Studios, we offer content production services, influencer consulting, licensing, supporting and developing electronic games. In the SL MOD pillar, we created a pioneering methodology for moderating and integrating bots for digital platforms: Twitch, YT, Shorts and Tik Tok.

In the education pillar, we train professionals who wish to pursue a gaming career through the SL Educa platform and with our YoGamers do Bem Institute, we promote inclusion and sociocultural transformation, the fight against hunger, aid in natural disasters and the culture of volunteering.

Description:
