-Lorena Conca (lorena@huincacine.com)

Communications
-Gisela Minnelli (gisela@huincacine.com)

Name: Spot Locations - Location Agency
Description:
Spot Locations is a location agency based in Barcelona and covering all of Spain. The agency has over 15 years of experience, an extensive network of locations and a strong location team that will help your production run smoothly in just the right Spot. 

To spark your imagination, take a look at a selection of locations on our site. 

These are just a small sample of what we  have to offer, so please tell us what you need and our team will be happy to find the perfect location for you.

Our services include:

References: We provide you with the best references to help you win your projects

Location scouting: Our professional scouts will get you spectacular images and even drone shots if you need them

Permitting: We can manage every kind of permit you might need so your productions always go off without a hitch

Location managers: We work with highly experienced location managers that will support you on the field with their local  know-how..

Name: Kino Flo Lighting Systems
Description: Kino Flo is a manufacturer of professional LED-based lighting equipment for cinema and television and production. Located in Burbank, California, Kino Flo is best known for developing proprietary LEDs based on a color science technology that ensures color quality for lighting both close-ups and on large studio spaces.

Name: Seventy 7 Productions
Description:
We are a full service Detroit based production company. We do production, post production and production services for commercials, short & long form social content, music videos, 360/VR and more. 

While our services are scalable for projects of all varying sizes and scopes, our innate need to see your jaw hit the floor never ceases.

Our award winning directors & cinematographers have had the pleasure of working with some of the biggest names in sports and entertainment including Basketball great Magic Johnson, Green Bay Packers’ Clay Matthews, Artist Kendrick Lamar, PGA Golfers Rickie Fowler and Jimmy Walker, Henry Winkler, Denis Leary and more. 

We have the best tech and are often the first in the market and sometimes the only in the Midwest to acquire the tech. We know having that tech in-house gives us more experience and makes us better artists.

We are always driven to meet and surpass expectations for every shot, for every beat, for every moment we craft.

We are proud to be a certified Minority Business Enterprise (Hispanic) and to be participating in Free the Work.

Name: FERN.
Description:
Creative film productions. Reduced climate- and environmental footprint. Based in Copenhagen. Born in 2020.

Seeking to challenge outdated ideas within the industry in several ways, Fern not only wants to flip the script when it comes to race, gender, sexuality, politics, and religion. We are taking it up a needed notch and challenging the lack of climate consciousness when it comes to media production. 

It is our belief that we all have a responsibility to do everything in our power to fix the world we live in – that also includes the creative industry.

Name: Lantica Studios
Description:
Lantica Studios is an innovative media company that provides world class studio facilities and production services to the media, tv and film industries. 

Based in the Dominican Republic.
Location: Juan Dolio, San Pedro de Macorís

Name: Wildlife Film Festival Rotterdam - WFFR
Description:
WILDLIFE FILM FESTIVAL ROTTERDAM (WFFR) focuses on the screening of wildlife, environmental and conservation films. The next edition will take place from 2 - 8 November 2026. 

The festival features the best wildlife films from all over the world and hosts more than 200 public screenings and events. We welcome more than 30,000 visitors each year. Filmmakers can win prizes in 10 different categories. Winners will be announced during the famous Flamingo Award Ceremony.

Name: Inevitable Foundation
Description: Investing in disabled writers and filmmakers so they can achieve artistic and financial freedom.

Name: Pyramide Productions
Description:
Fondée par Fabienne Vonier et Francis Boespflug en 1989, Pyramide Productions a produit et coproduit plus de 50 films français et internationaux.

Since its founding in 1990 by Fabienne Vonier and Francis Boespflug, Pyramide Productions has produced or coproduced more than 50 French and international movies.

Name: Cinema Audio Society (CAS)
Description: The Cinema Audio Society was formed in 1964 for the purpose of fostering community among mixers, educating and informing the general public and the motion picture and television industry about good and effective sound usage, and to achieve deserved recognition for sound mixers as major contributors to the field of entertainment.

Name: Like do Brasil Produtora
Description: Somos uma das maiores produtoras de filmes e séries independente do país. Na nossa produtora, não apenas fazemos filmes, mas também contamos histórias que cativam e emocionam as pessoa. Além disso oferecemos também a oportunidade para que centenas de novos talentos realizem o sonho de se tornar ator e atriz de cinema.

Name: VORTEX Media
Description:
Vortex Words + Pictures is an award-winning, boutique Canadian production house that is dedicated to surfacing new talent and producing unforgettable independent film and television. Vortex is known for creating compelling, high-quality, content with international appeal.

Founded and operated by iconic Canadian producer Bill Marks in 1982, Vortex got its start as a successful comic book publisher, Vortex Comics, before evolving into  Vortex Words + Pictures.

Name: Dadá Films & Entertainment
Description:
El Dadaísmo propugnaba la libertad del individuo, la espontaneidad, lo inmediato, la intemporalidad, la contradicción, el “no” donde los demás dicen “sí”… En Dadá Films & Entertainment preferimos decir “sí” o “tal vez” donde los demás gritan un “no”. ¿Porqué? Pues porque  sabemos que todo lo que puedes imaginar es real. Esa es nuestra obsesión desde que nos despertamos hasta que volvemos a despertar. Nuestro trabajo consiste en soñar con proyectos que todavía no existen y hacerlos realidad, convertirlos en algo tangible, materializarlos en películas, documentales, cortometrajes, videoclips, piezas publicitarias, corporativas y todo eso que tienes en tu mente y todavía no te has atrevido a sacar.
El momento es ahora. Somos Dadá.

Name: Biônica Filmes
Description:
Since 2012 Biônica has developed and produced content for cinema and television. Its first project was the first season of the series “PSI” for HBO Latin America, which was nominated for “Best Drama Series” at the International 2015 Emmy.

The company debuted in feature films with “Os Homens são de Marte… E é pra lá que eu vou!” (Men are from Mars… and it’s where I’m going!) which had 1,8 million tickets sold and won the “Best Feature Comedy” award at the Grande Prêmio do Cinema Brasileiro (Brazilian Cinema Grand Prix), in 2015.

Since then, Biônica Filmes released “Reza a Lenda” (Holy Biker), by Homero Olivetto, one of the winners of Special Jury Prize First Features Competition in 2016 Tallin Black Nights; “La Vingança” (El Revenge), by Fernando Fraiha (a co-production Brazi -Argentina); “Divinas Divas” (Divine Divas), by Leandra Leal, winner of Audience Award – Global at 2017 SXSW; and “TOC – Transtornada Obsessiva Compulsiva” (Neurotic Quest for Serenity), by Teo Poppovic and Paulinho Caruso, released in 2017, and selected for the 2018 SXSW.

In 2018, Biônica Filmes produced “Laços” (Monica And Friends – Bonds) by Daniel Rezende, the first live action feature film based on “Monica and Friends”’ comic books; “Meu Álbum de Amores” (How to Mend a Broken Heart) by Rafael Gomes, a musical romantic comedy with original score by Arnaldo Antunes; and “A Travessia de Pedro” (Pedro Through the Blue Ocean) by Laís Bodanzky, a co-production with O Som e a Fúria from Portugal. Furthermore, Biônica released “Uma Quase Dupla” (The Fuzz) by Marcus Baldini, which had more than 600 thousand tickets sold.

In 2019, Biônica Filmes is developing the international coproduction with Argentina, “Cordilheira” (End of The World Residency) by Fernando Fraiha and based on Daniel Galera’s book, the documentary and feature films based on the most iconic Brazilian Rockstar Rita Lee and the feature film “Toll” by the awarded director Carolina Markowicz.

Name: Mcqueen Films
Description:
Creatively driven & multi awarded Production Company. 
Telling excellent stories through Commercials, Branded Entertainment, Short Films & Documentaries.

Name: A Team Productions
Description:
A TEAM productions werd in 2009 opgericht door Hendrik Verthé en Kobe Van Steenberghe en is gekend van onder andere 'Image' (2015), 'Black' (2016), 'Patser' (2018), 'Torpedo' (2019) and 'Yummy' (2019). Met hun kortfilms, documentaires en langspeelfilms vielen zij al meermaals in de prijzen op internationale festivals zoals de Berlinale, Hot Docs, Tiff Toronto,...

Ambitieuze projecten met entertainende en ontroerende verhalen. Dat is wat Van Steenberghe en Verthé tot het tot de verbeelding sprekende medium cinema bracht. De passie voor het grote scherm en de drang om een publiek te verbazen en te beroeren. Hun filmografie is een eclectisch geheel van erg uiteenlopende producties, wat hen tot één van de meest opvallende Vlaamse productiehuizen van het moment maakt. Hun volgende film –en televisieprojecten zijn even intrigerend en uitdagend als de succesvolle films die ze reeds produceerden. Steeds verrassend en vernieuwend voor de audiovisuele sector in de Benelux met tegelijk een hoog internationaal karakter en production value.

Name: beORIGINALS
Description:
A beORIGINALS é uma companhia de criação de formatos audiovisuais e produções originais para streaming, TV, cinema e plataformas digitais. 

Fundada por Guga Lemes, profissional com 20 anos de experiência, que criou e produziu séries exibidas na HBO, no Globoplay, no Canal Sony, na Band e no SBT. Seu currículo traz prêmios no Cristal Festival (França), no Wave Festival (Brasil) e no El Ojo (Argentina). 

A beORIGINALS nasce com dez projetos. Entre eles, "Mulekes", "Cangaço Urbano", "A Cratera" e "Montão".

Um dos diferenciais da produtora criativa é sua notável lista de curadores independentes, que reúne grandes nomes da indústria. 

Entre eles, André Abujamra, Paulinho Moska, Baboo Matsusaki, Bebete Viégas, Chica Barros, Gabriel Gallindo, Jean Leme, Mari Bechara, Nanna de Castro, Renata Netto, Tatiana Farah e Wagner Almeida.

Name: Agat Films - Ex Nihilo
Description: Agat Films - Ex Nihilo is a french motion pictures and film company based in Paris.

Name: Motion Picture Association - Canada (MPA-Canada)
Description:
The Motion Picture Association – Canada (MPA-Canada) is the voice and advocate of the major international producers and distributors of movies, television and streaming programming in Canada and is an affiliate of the Motion Picture Association, Inc. (MPA).  

Through the production of long-running television series, feature films, and post-production, visual effects, and animation projects, the global studios we serve – including Disney, Netflix, Paramount Global, Sony Pictures, NBCUniversal and Warner Bros. Discovery – make substantial investments in Canada. 

On behalf of the MPA member studios, we work with governments and local industry partners to support initiatives that strengthen the film, television and streaming industry in Canada.  

Learn more about what we do:  https://www.mpa-canada.org/what-we-do/

Name: Media Access Company Brasil
Description:
Com mais de duas décadas de experiência no mercado da dublagem, Media Access Company é uma referência consolidada regionalmente na America Latina, com sedes nas cidades de São Paulo e Rio de Janeiro no Brasil, Buenos Aires, Cidade do Mexico e Bogotá. Fundada no Brasil em 2003 com o nome de Acrisound S/A, a empresa iniciou sua jornada com uma única sala de dublagem. Ao longo dos anos, a quantidade de clientes foi aumentando, fomos crescendo até que em 2011 passamos a nos chamar: Tv Group Digital Brasil e atualmente, em 2024, adotamos o nome Media Access Company Brasil. 



Atualmente, contamos com um total de 11 salas de dublagem e 4 salas de mixagem, sendo uma delas equipada com a tecnologia Atmos, enquanto as demais apresentam configuração 5.1

Especializados em superproduções que demandam total sigilo em todas as etapas do processo, investimos significativamente em proteção de dados e treinamentos frequentes para todos os funcionários, garantindo os mais altos padrões de segurança. Além disso, orgulhamo-nos de contar com os mais renomados dubladores, diretores de dublagem e equipe técnica do país, garantindo resultados de excelência em cada projeto que realizamos.

Name: Resin
Description: Resin is a visual effects studio with a specialty in long form series and feature film visual effects.

Name: Aniventure
Description: Established in 2014, Aniventure is a global animation studio that brings engaging and entertaining animated stories to life with high-quality animation for all audiences around the world.  We partner with A-list filmmakers and talent for our content and have assembled a team of industry leaders and world-class creatives who provide expertise in development, financing, production and marketing. For more information visit Aniventure.com

Name: ROYAL POST
Description: We are a post-production facility based in Paris and we deliver world-class editing, color grading and visual effects for feature films, commercials and music videos.

Name: Simit Bhagat Studios
Description:
• We are a Mumbai-based award winning creative agency focussed on the third sector. We work on a range of thematic areas - whether it’s about migration, trafficking, climate change, education or gender. Our purpose is to capture and communicate stories for a cause. We believe that when told with heart, storytelling can help organisations amplify their impact.
• Our clientele includes Tata Trusts, Asian Paints, Centre for Microfinance and Livelihoods, Aga Khan Agency for Habitat, Child Rights and You (CRY), Mangrove Foundation among others.
• Our feature length documentary film 'In Search of Bidesia' won the Best Music Documentary Award at The Royal Anthropological Institute Film Festival, 2021 in United Kingdom. Our films have been screened at many national and international film festivals.

Name: FIDMarseille, Festival International de Cinéma
Description:
Chaque année début juillet, le FIDMarseille, Festival International de Cinéma de Marseille , propose un programme de 130 films à près de 23 500 spectateurs, dans des cinémas, théâtres, bibliothèques, galeries d’art, amphithéâtres en plein air, à Marseille. Le festival présente un grand nombre de films en première mondiale, de premiers films, et s’impose aujourd’hui comme un gisement de nouvelles cinématographies, productions documentaires aussi bien que fictions.

Le FIDMarseille organise également le FIDLab, plateforme de soutien à la coproduction internationale, le FIDCampus, atelier de formation d’étudiants méditerranéens, et de nombreuses projections hors les murs pendant toute l’année.
--------
Every year in early July, the FIDMarseille —Marseille’s International Film Festival— proposes a programme of 130 films to approximately 25,500 spectators, in cinemas, theaters, libraries, art galleries, and in open-air amphitheaters throughout the city. The festival presents a large number of films in their world premiere as well as first films. Today, the FIDMarseille is recognized as a source of new cinemas, both documentary productions as well as fiction films.

In addition, the FIDMarseille organizes the FIDLab, a support platform for international co-production; the FIDCampus, a training workshop for international students; and numerous, offsite screenings throughout the year.

Name: Silver Sound Inc
Description:
Silver Sound is an Emmy Award-winning NYC post-production sound studio and team of location sound mixers dedicated to providing an incomparable level of professionalism and artistry in everything we do.

We’re proud to have been a staple of the NY filmmaking scene for over 18 years.

We host NYC's premiere audio storytelling contest, the BiAnnual Sonic Dash

Name: TIME
Description: The Time Group

Name: Planet Emmy Media
Description:
Planet Emmy is the 'New World' of entertainment duly incorporated into filmmaking, talent management, show hosting, event compering, media content production, image and production marketing, branding and Tv Show promotion, digital marketing.

We unleash the 21st century skills to whet our consumer's appetite by bringing classic entertainment to your doorsteps and fingertips.

Name: Beyond Films
Description:
A Beyond Films é uma produtora de conteúdo original de séries, docs, filmes e publicidade que faz parte da ODDZ Network, do ex-jogador e empresário Ronaldo Nazário.

Entre as suas produções já lançadas, estão: o documentário “Ronaldo, o Fenômeno”, em parceria com a Globoplay; a série documental “A Virada”, coprodução sobre a SAF Cruzeiro com o Sportv; e a série “Cara a Cara”, documentário que relembra grandes penalidades máximas do futebol brasileiro, também com o Sportv. Outros documentários, filmes, séries ficcionais e conteúdos originais estão em produção.

Com negócios presentes na América Latina e que somam um know-how de mais de uma década, o grupo conta ainda com a agência de marketing esportivo e entretenimento, Octagon Latam, e a agência de viagens corporativas e turismo MICE para esportes, Wayz Travel Co.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Les Films Pelléas
Description:
Les Films Pelléas est une société de production cinématographique fondée par Philippe Martin en mars 1990.

Depuis plus de 30 ans, les Films Pelléas a produit plus de 90 longs-métrages.

La société regroupe aujourd’hui deux producteurs : Philippe Martin et David Thion. Depuis 2016, Les Films Pelléas assure également la direction artistique de la 3e Scène, plateforme numérique de l’Opéra de Paris. Balthus, filiale des Films Pelléas, est en charge de la production exécutive des contenus de la 3e Scène, tout en expérimentant des stratégies digitales adaptées au monde culturel.

Name: FILMFEST HAMBURG
Description:
FILMFEST HAMBURG  ist ein Festival für das Publikum. Jedes Jahr im Herbst begeistert es über 45.000 Kinofans. An zehn Tagen werden auf elf Leinwänden rund 110 nationale und internationale Spiel- und Dokumentarfilme als Welturaufführung, Europapremiere oder deutsche Erstaufführung gezeigt. Dabei reicht das Programmspektrum in zehn  festen und jährlich wechselnden Sektionen von cineastisch anspruchsvollen Arthouse-Filmen über innovatives Mainstreamkino bis hin zu einem bunten Film- und Veranstaltungsprogramm für die kleinsten Kinobesucher·innen.
Als Plattform für kulturellen Austausch und Dialog wird ein Großteil der Filme von den Filmschaffenden persönlich in Hamburg vorgestellt. Zahlreiche Veranstaltungen machen FILMFEST HAMBURG zu einem wichtigen Treffpunkt für Kinobegeisterte und die Filmbranche gleichermaßen.

Name: Sardinha em Lata, Lda
Description: Animation studio and production company based in Lisbon, Portugal established in 2007.

Name: BMP Creative
Description:
“We’re a machine with heart; built for creativity that moves fast, scales smart, and still feels human.”

That’s who we are now. But we didn’t start here.

We began as Big Machine Productions: a two-man team with big vision and an even bigger appetite for making things. Commercials, films, branded content—you name it, we cut it. Every project was a sprint, every edit a late-night collaboration powered by passion, Red Bull, and the kind of creative chaos that feels electric… until it starts feeling heavy.

As the work grew (and partners like Netflix came into the picture) the pressure changed. Notes piled up. Versions multiplied. Teams got buried. Brand-side leaders needed consistency across massive campaigns. Agency partners needed someone who could take on overflow without creating more chaos. What used to feel exhilarating started to feel unsustainable.

That’s when we realized the truth that now defines us: talent scales only when process does.

So we evolved.

Big Machine became BMP Creative, a creative-tech hybrid built for teams who need clarity, speed, and storytelling that holds up under pressure.

The “machine” honors the systems we’ve built: workflows that keep campaigns coherent, handoffs clean, and collaboration painless. 
The “heart” is the people. We’re editors, producers, writers, and project leads who care about the story as much as the schedule. People who know what it takes to protect creative energy inside brand teams drowning in deliverables and agencies fighting daily fires for their clients.

Today, we’re a collective of go-getters, systems thinkers, and dynamic doers behind some of the best stories on the internet. On a scale of 1-10? We operate at 15.

We’re not here to chase trends. We’re here to build systems that make creativity durable.

If you’re looking for a partner who can keep up with the volume of a global brand and the innovation and pace of a scrappy agency, we’re it.

Name: iNDIEFLIX Group Inc
Description: Unlock a world of award-winning independent films, series, and documentaries that will challenge, intrigue, and inspire you.

Name: Scanbox Entertainment
Description:
Established in 1980, Scanbox Entertainment is one of the leading independent film distributors in Scandinavia, releasing approximately 30 theatrical titles annually, and a total of 40+ titles direct-to-DVD and VOD. The company’s line-up covers all genres, but primarily focusing on upmarket content and local productions. Scanbox has recently entered an exclusive output deal with Amazon Studios on the Scandinavian market, including titles both acquired and produced by Amazon, solidifying its placement on the Scandinavian market.

The Scanbox headquarter is situated in Copenhagen, with local offices in Oslo, Stockholm, Göteborg and Helsinki.

Sigurjon Sighvatsson is Chairman and CEO of the company.

Name: Bare Arms Ltd.
Description:
Bare Arms operates on the principles of efficiency, safety and authenticity. Our mission is to support the imagination of the theatrical industries by supplying military solutions to creative problems. We work across film and television, theatre, advertising, music videos and the gaming sectors.

Set up and managed by ex-forces personnel who have adapted their experience to the industry. Bare Arms provides a body of services to assist in productions that have military, firearms police and secret service themes.

By working alongside writers, directors and producers, our advisers can help develop the story from concept to production by providing unique real-world scenarios and technical detail. Our instructors can train cast members in military bearing, firearms and tactics, in order to achieve a more authentic level of performance.
 
Bare Arms has the resources to bring together teams of highly trained people to deliver a project on time and within budget. We supply the following: firearms and tactics instructors; trained specialist performers; highly experienced armourers; firearms, weapons, uniforms, costume props, vehicles and aircraft.

We specialise in providing a combination of connected services in an organised and efficient manner, therefore saving productions time and money.

Name: Stewbean Productions LLC
Description:
Producing unique and interesting films that shine a light on talented women on both sides of the camera. Part of the United Front Films collaborative.

The award-winning feature film Rockumentary "Mock and Roll" premiered in Austin, TX with 6 nominations including Best Comedy, and was named Best Feature and Best Original Score during the Film Festival circuit. Special appearances by Foghat (Slow Ride) drummer Roger Earl, musician Michael Stanley (My Town), and comic Alex Ortiz (HBO, Comedy Central).

Producer of Christmas Collision (2021), Forbearance (2022), A Reluctant Heart (2023), and Heartland Harmony (2023).

Executive Producer for Cedric Gegel's Cadia: The World Within (Corbin Bernsen, James Phelps) and Vanessa Leonard's A Story Worth Living.

Name: Officina Immagini
Description:
We are an audiovisual production and post-production agency. We are highly specialized and everyone plays his role.
Safe hands, hearts capable of being excited and the need to look at beauty, allow us to have a look at the world that makes each of our works a cinematographic work.
We watch, tell, and put together.
And then?
And then we make the final product the most beautiful thing you've ever seen.
Why?
Because we come from all over the world. We have seen, studied and tried.
And this makes us lions. And lions, you know, don't have predators.

Name: Mile High Films
Description:
Mile High Films is a Denver, Colorado video production company directing EMMY-winning video content for brands, businesses, and agencies for over 20 years. We specialize in commercials, corporate videos, branded content, event coverage, and creative storytelling that resonates with audiences.
From small businesses to global brands, we produce high-quality video for clients across Colorado and throughout the U.S. Our services include concept development, production, directing, filming, video editing, drone videography, post-production, and more.

Whether you need a local Denver film crew or a full-service production partner, we bring professionalism, creativity, and a results-driven approach to every project.

 Check out our demo reel and get in touch to bring your story to life.

Name: OWARD - Réseau de cinéastes et sociétés
Description:
OWARD est un outil de Réseau et de Portfolio pour professionnels de l'audiovisuel et du cinéma.

Le Réseau est 100% gratuit et réunit des milliers de professionnels du film autour d'un moteur de recherche, d'une messagerie et d'outils de composition d'équipes. 

Le Portfolio permet à tous les professionnels de créer en quelques minutes, et sans aucune compétence en informatique, un site internet, déjà mis en forme et optimisé pour le référencement, pour présenter et partager son travail et ses projets.

Name: Fantasia International Film Festival
Description: Since its inception in 1996, the Fantasia Festival is now recognized as the biggest and most important event of its kind in North America, a leader on the genre film scene and one of the country’s most popular film festivals. With a varied programming and an emphasis on the imaginative cinema of Asia, Europe and the Americas, Fantasia’s offerings range from unique and powerful personal visions to international commercial crowd-pleasers rarely seen in North-America. Its 2011 line-up of over 120 feature films and several hundred shorts will include extraordinary new works from living legends of World Cinema and brilliant emerging talents from a wealth of countries.

Name: Wooden Camera
Description:
Wooden Camera designs, manufactures, and retails innovative camera accessories for professionals. Wooden Camera prides itself in providing unique products, excellent customer service, and shipping orders the same day they are placed.

Wooden Camera is a part of the Creative Solutions Division, allowing us to grow our offerings and partner with some of the best filmmaking solutions in the industry.

Name: Zazen Design & Production
Description: ZAZEN är din kreativa byrå med experter inom film, fotografi och animation. Vi har vår bas i Stockholm men du hittar vårt arbete över hela världen. Hos oss får ditt projekt vårt fulla fokus, all vår kunskap och kärlek, under hela vägen. Det är därför vi uppnår hög kvalitet på ett enkelt och effektivt sätt.

Name: Village Roadshow Studios
Description: Village Roadshow Studios are a set of film studios located in Oxenford, Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia. Situated adjacent to the Warner Bros. Movie World Theme Park, the Studios offer world-class film production facilities comprising of nine Sound Stages, three water tanks, ten production offices, editing suites, wardrobe, makeup, construction, paint and carpentry shops.

Name: FilmmakerLife
Description:
About FilmmakerLife

FilmmakerLife is a global media platform and creative network celebrating excellence in independent cinema and the art of storytelling.
We connect filmmakers, producers, and visionaries through a dynamic ecosystem that spans magazine publications, film festivals, red-carpet events, and digital media.

From exclusive interviews with emerging and established creators to our prestigious events worldwide, FilmmakerLife has become a recognized bridge between independent talent and international industry leaders.

We empower creators through:
 FilmmakerLife Magazine – spotlighting visionary directors, producers, and rising stars
 World Class Film Awards & Film Events – honoring outstanding achievements in global cinema
 Beyond Hollywood & Hall of Fame Editions – curated coffee-table books celebrating creativity beyond the mainstream
 FilmmakerLife YouTube Channel – insights, trends, and marketing strategies for modern filmmakers

Our mission is simple yet powerful:
to amplify independent voices, elevate creative excellence, and redefine how filmmakers connect with the world.

Join the movement.
 www.filmmakerlife.com

Name: Grifa Filmes
Description:
Commanded by brothers Fernando Dias and Mauricio Dias, OSCAR’s qualified with 2 documentaries, The Cleaners and Piripkura, and thrice nominated for the EMMY Awards, Grifa Filmes is a high-quality Brazilian producing company focused on documentaries and series for the international market. Specialized in national and international co-productions, for over 20 years Grifa Filmes has been creating awarded productions for television and Theaters. The company is one of the most important and award-winning content producers in Brazil.

GRIFA FILMES' projects have been exhibited and distributed by the most important players in Brazil and the world such as Discovery, HBO, NATGEO, BBC, NHK, ARTE/ZDF, France 3, France 5, GloboNews, RecordTV, TV Cultura, TV Brasil, SescTV, BAND, Canal Curta!, Canal Brasil, Prime Box Brazil, besides streaming platforms. Among the main productions, we can highlight On the trail of Langsdorff Expedition, Animals of Brazil, Whales in Abrolhos, Doctors of Joy, 500 Almas, Brazil from pre-History, Assiette Brésilienne, Who Cares?, Architects, Singers of Brazil, Inspira.mov Brazil and Critical Uncertainties.

Awarded in Brazil and in the world, GRIFA has already participated in countless festivals and international exhibitions in which it has won 35 awards, 19 for "Best Film"; 4 FIESP/SESI awards; 4 awards in Gramado; 4 awards at the Festival de Brasília; 2 awards and 8 official selections at "É Tudo Verdade"; 1 award and 3 official selections at the Festival do Rio; 2 films supported by UNESCO and one film integrating the MOMA official collection in New York.

Name: Film Barking and Dagenham
Description: MAKE IT HERE: Locations | Creative Futures | Crew | Local Suppliers | Future home of Eastbrook Studios & The Wharf Studios

Name: Abundantia Entertainment
Description: Abundantia Entertainment is India's premier content company focused on developing and producing progressive, insight-based and uniquely Indian stories for a global audience. It was founded in 2013 by Vikram Malhotra, who was formerly the Chief Operating Officer of Viacom18 Motion Pictures.

Name: Duo Productions
Description: Duo Productions est une compagnie de production de séries télévisées basée à Montréal. Elle est fondée par les auteurs et producteurs Anne Boyer et Michel d'Astous.

Name: Sound Canvas Ltd
Description:
Sound Canvas is an innovative sound design studio, run by multi-award winning sound designer Tom Joyce. We specialise in cinematic, organic, fresh and story-focused sound for all forms of visuals and pride ourselves on delivering ‘outside the box’ ideas to create truly original soundscapes. With the help of a hand picked pool of sound designers and composers, we offer a genuinely bespoke sound track to your project, whether it’s making dialogue crystal clear or creating intricate audio environments from scratch.

With 15 years experience in post production, working alongside top directors and creatives, Sound Canvas is a studio that is obsessed with the power of sound to draw you into a story and take you on an adventure into new sonic worlds.

We specialise in cinematic, organic and hybrid sound design and we're experts in mixing for the many varied delivery requirements you may have, including DOLBY ATMOS. You’ll hear our work at film festivals, art exhibitions, on broadcast television and, of course, in many forms across the Internet. We pride ourselves on delivering outstanding creative and look to collaborate rather than to accumulate, so we do our very best to offer creative sound design and mixing for all budgets.

For all enquiries email us at:

info@soundcanvas.co

Name: Films Boutique
Description: FILMS BOUTIQUE is an independent Berlin-based international sales company specialising in the distribution of innovative feature films by filmmakers from all over the world. Only 10 to 15 new titles are added to our line-up per year as we are going back to basics: treat films as works of art and concentrate on a limited number of high profile titles. We are proud to serve our producers and distributors, who trust us in building up long-lasting relationships and a repute of new and confirmed talents.

Name: Nametag Films
Description:
We are a full-service video production company capable of taking creative direction from clients and utilizing that information to help guide the process.  The work is then facilitated by our seasoned producers by hiring a team of skilled professionals to produce content that appears to have cost more than the budgeted amount allowed for the project.   The end result is always quality.  Our brand is built on the ability to create spots that represent a unique balance of creative integrity, atmospheric lighting and beautiful cinematography.  The end result makes our clients a hero.  

At Nametag Films we believe collaboration is key to great work, and we are grateful to have clients who agree. 
We partner with ad agencies and brands to tell the stories worth sharing on TV and in the all emerging medias. 
We believe and act as though anything is possible. Our business is client centered and creatively focused.

Our belief is that every job is unique and deserves unique attention. 
Nametag's secret sauce is simple:  pair young imaginative Directors with smart seasoned Producers, the most amazing crews, and with lots of hard work we end up with award-winning spots everyone can be proud of.

We promote a casual, friendly and fun atmosphere on our sets, and believe in treating people well from clients to crew. Another big philosophy of Nametag is giving back. Nametag is committed to giving 10% of all our net income to local charities.

Services We Offer Include

Content Services: Recipe Development, Photography, Video Production, Copywriting, Graphic and Creative Design Social Media Services: Community Management, Content Calendar Development, Social Media Strategy Development, Paid Advertising, Facebook Messenger Bots, Native Digital Advertising Marketing Services: Amazon Marketing and A+ Content Development, Influencer Marketing, E-mail Marketing & Newsletters Content Strategy Services: 360 Integrated Marketing Roadmap, Recipe Database Audit, Social Media Content

Name: Cross Productions srl
Description:
Cross Productions è una delle principali società di produzione indipendenti italiane fondata nel 2013 da Rosario Rinaldo e partecipata da Beta Film Gmbh.

Da allora si è affermata con produzioni per il mercato nazionale e internazionale, grazie anche alla continua ricerca di originalità e inclusività dei contenuti che caratterizza la Società. 

Cross Productions si concentra sulla realizzazione di prodotti per la TV lineare e per alcuni dei più importanti broadcaster e OTT players (Netflix, Prime Video, Sky e Rai, Mediaset).  Contemporaneamente investe nella ricerca e sperimentazione di nuovi modelli produttivi per i mercati emergenti.

Cross Productions ha prodotto oltre 270 ore tra serie e miniserie, tra cui "Rocco Schiavone", la serie più vista su Rai 2 negli ultimi 10 anni e venduta in circa 100 Paesi; "Il Cacciatore", vincitore della miglior interpretazione al Canneseries 2018 e venduta in più di 50 paesi; "Una Grande Famiglia", tra le serie di Rai Uno più viste;  "Prisma" e "SKAM Italia", serie basata sul popolarissimo format norvegese, che è fra le versioni più viste in tutto il mondo.

Name: Antaviana VFX & Postproduction
Description: Antaviana Films is a film company specialising in post-production and digital effects. We are a team of professionals with a groundbreaking career behind us, enjoying today a well-deserved renown and prestige in the sector. Whilst some of us have been working together for over 20 years, others have been joining us along the way, always providing us with fresh and different points of view, accompanied by technological avant-garde expertise and international experience; notwithstanding their unique talents and their curiosity, a trademark of forthcoming generations.

Name: Westwind
Description:
Welcome to Westwind Media. We were founded by award-winning episodic content creators to expand their creative storytelling tools with sound. Over 20 years later, we’re still delivering the highest-level audio post production services for episodics, movies & emerging media.

Looking for a high technology environment with a low stress vibe? We’ve got you covered. Westwind offers Sound Supervision, Sound Design & Editorial, Foley, ADR, and 5.1, 7.1 and Dolby Atmos Mixing. You’ll find us in the heart of Burbank, but our full audio services can easily be had in Hollywood and Santa Monica too.

Name: Festival du Film Kazakh
Description:
Le festival du film kazakh est une manifestation européenne portée par l'Association française du cinéma kazakh depuis sa création en 2019 par André Raphaël IVANOV et consacrée au cinéma du Kazakhstan.

La mission du Festival est de présenter le meilleur du cinéma kazakh, de développer la coopération cinématographique et de favoriser la co-production entre le Kazakhstan, la France et d'autres pays.

Name: World Film Festival in Cannes - Remember the Future
Description:
Welcome to our worldwide IMDb Qualifying monthly & annual competition of all genres for international Filmmakers, Songwriters, Singers & Bands, dedicated to Feature & Short Films, Indie, Documentaries, Experimental, Animations, Music Videos, Commercials, Web/TV Series and many more.

World Film Festival in Cannes has become a not-to-be missed cultural event of international scope that is already a huge success with the new generation. Recognized by the professionals of Cinema, Music and the International Press, but not only, it also seduces the older generation. 

Among the awarded films at the "World Film Festival in Cannes - Remember the Future" are starring some of the world-renowned stars & celebrities such as: CLINT EASTWOOD, BRUCE WILLIS, JANE GOODALL, JOHNNY DEPP, IGGY POP, YOKO ONO, S.H. THE DALAI LAMA, SIR RICHARD BRANSON, JENNIFER LOPEZ, DEBBIE HARRY, JEFF DANIELS, PRISCILLA PRESLEY, ROBERT F. KENNEDY JR, JON VOIGHT, MALCOLM MCDOWELL, MICKEY ROURKE, ANDY GARCIA, DONALD SUTHERLAND, NEIL YOUNG, DEEPAK CHOPRA, ERIC ROBERTS, TIPPI HEDREN, DAVID LACHAPELLE, MICHAEL MADSEN, ANITA EKBERG, LANCE HENRIKSEN, LINDSAY WAGNER, LAMBERT WILSON, to name a few.

The “Luciole d’Or” (Golden Firefly), which epitomizes the “World Film Festival in Cannes”, is on a mission — to unearth rare gems, highlighting a New Generation of emerging talents and a Future Wave of Filmmakers deserving greater visibility and recognition.

Part of World Film Festival in Cannes's mission is to highlight Films and Documentaries (Short & Feature) from Filmmakers covering the following themes: Cause-Driven, Human Rights, Women Films, Humanitarian, Social Justice, LGBTQ+, Nature & Environmental Protection, Health, Education, Disability, Covid.

For more details, visit our website. Thank you

Name: Latido Films
Description: Latido Films is an international sales agency specialized in commercializing the best of Spanish-speaking and European films all over the world. Our main goal is to pursue new talents and to support established directors in order to create a catalogue which includes a high-quality variety of titles.

Name: FilmNorth
Description: FilmNorth’s mission is to empower artists to tell their stories, launch and sustain successful careers, and advance The North as a leader in the national network of independent filmmakers. We achieve our mission by nurturing a vibrant, diverse community of film and media artists; providing education and resources at every stage of their careers; and celebrating their achievements.

Name: Mission Digital
Description:
Founded in 2011, Mission is a provider of digital workflow solutions, including on-set DIT, digital dailies and video playback services, and our unique online dailies service Easel.
 
With offices in London and Cardiff, Mission has serviced projects across the globe, with locations including Abu Dhabi, Qatar, Azerbaijan, Turkey, Diego Garcia Island, Nepal, Italy, Prague and Greece amongst others.
 
Each of our dedicated technicians is trained to work using the same methodology and to the same high standards, meaning Mission can pride itself on providing a consistent, scalable service built for mobile deployment. Our bespoke digital workflows allow us to service any production from point of capture through to post production.
 
Mission has been fortunate enough to work with a impressive collection of talented cinematographers, and to see our services utilised across a wide range of projects including Everest, The Guernsey Literary and Potato Peel Pie Society, Trust and His Dark Materials. We also service short form work, commercials and independent short films.
 
With constant reinvestment in the latest technology, Mission is proud to service the most cutting edge of projects currently shooting here in the UK, as well as supplying both our expertise and resources to independent productions. We are here to champion emerging Producers, Directors, Cinematographers and of course DIT and Video Operators too.

Name: Human Rights Film Festival Berlin
Description: HRFFB shows stories of courageous humans. The films document human rights violations & give insights into current crisis. The Festival offers new perspectives & a platform to engage in human rights discussions. Join the HRFFB & subscribe to our NEWSLETTER. Visit hrffb.de

Name: imagineNATIVE
Description: The imagineNATIVE Film + Media Arts Festival is an international festival in Toronto that celebrates the latest works by Indigenous peoples on the forefront of innovation in film, video, radio, and new media. Each fall, the festival presents a selection of the most compelling and distinctive Indigenous works from around the globe. The festival's screenings, parties, panel discussions, and cultural events attract and connect filmmakers, media artists, programmers, buyers, and industry professionals. The works accepted reflect the diversity of the world's Indigenous nations and illustrate the vitality and excellence of our art and culture in contemporary media.

Name: LZ Films Portugal
Description:
Criada por profissionais apaixonados por cinema, televisão, documentários, videoclipes, web e todos os novos meios de comunicação.
Somos uma produtora que pensa e age de forma completa oferecendo soluções criativas e inovadoras e práticas.
Contar histórias registrados acontecimentos e facilitar a comunicação pela luz câmara emoção.
Fazemos da comunicação uma experiência de impacto.

Name: Last Potato Filmes
Description:
A Last Potato possui uma equipe talentosa, experiente e dedicada, que vibra a cada projeto conquistado, oferecendo excelentes qualidades técnicas e artísticas em conjunto com os profissionais de comunicação. 

Visite: lastpotatofilmes.com.br

Contato: lastpotato@lastpotato.com.br
WhatsApp: 21 99984-4442 / Paulo Henrique

Name: Atlantic International Film Festival
Description:
The Atlantic International Film Festival is an eight-day celebration of film, media and music from around the world. It’s a festival that turns Halifax – a charming and historic coastal city – into a week-long international hotspot for the arts, abuzz with film lovers and filmmakers alike.

Offering a first-look at the best international films of the festival season, AIFF is a champion of local filmmakers, committed to bridging the gap. We attract some of the biggest players in film, media and music from around the world. All of our film selections are chosen with our community in mind and our special events are designed to bring us all together. A not-for-profit organization, AIFF depends heavily upon its strong ties to the surrounding and thriving arts community.

AIFF began as a small grassroots operation in St. John’s, Newfoundland in 1981, relocating to Halifax the following year. Just three decades later, AIFF has blossomed into one of Canada’s premier film festivals. Whether for industry folk, unabashed movie fans or curious onlookers, AIFF offers countless opportunities to engage through film. The Atlantic International Film Festival is now a year-round celebration, growing beyond our eight-day cornerstone event in September to include: AIFF Partners, AIFF Kids and AIFF Outdoor. 

Together, as a filmmaking community, we watch movies, we talk movies, and we make movies.

Name: AAA Entertainment ZA
Description:
VISION
To be the world’s leading sales and distribution company and enable African content to have the largest global audience and distribution.

Mission
To assist African content creators to develop, produce and deliver at the best possible standards for the local and global market demand, in order for us to deliver the best quality content and projects to our global network of buyers and investors.

AAA Entertainment is one of the few all round African sales and distribution companies, that both exports African content to the world market, as well distributes content within Africa to all linear and non-linear platforms and theatrical outlets. We understand the African market and audiences, as well as the indigenous artists and engineers of African content and IP, and AAA Entertainment works to maximise the synergy between these two.
AAA Entertainment is one of the few Netflix content partners in Africa and also works with several global aggregators and distributors for the biggest digital content platforms like Amazon, iTunes, Google Play, Hulu, Sony, X Box and Vudu to name a few.
Based on the belief that this continent is brimming with great stories and talent, that present the African film and television industry with a new opportunity in high production value, AAA looks to reach a global audience with indigenous stories by ensuring the best quality in every step of the value chain.
Our Services Include
•	Sales of feature films, scripted and unscripted television series, TV formats, short films
Distribution of films and television content within the continent of Africa
•	Packaging of content; including posters, trailers, websites, social media marketing and activations
•	Executive production and production of local and international projects looking to shoot or do post production in South Africa.
•	Access and facilitate various co-production incentives and funds for eligible productions
•	Developing and co-developing IP and packages of film and TV projects

Name: Camisa Listrada
Description:
Camisa Listrada has just completed 20 years and is one of the most successful production companies in the Brazilian audiovisual market, in partnership with players as Netflix, Fox, Paramount, Telecine and TV Globo.

In 2020, it released its first original Netflix movie, “Just Another Christmas”, which was watched by 26 million households in several countries, such as the USA, Germany, Spain, Italy, France, besides, of course, Brazil. The film is also on the list of TOP 3 titles most watched by Brazilian Netflix subscribers in the last 10 years.

At the movies, Camisa Listrada gathered almost 10 million tickets in Brazil with the films “Come on, mom!”, “The beachnickers” and the franchise “The honest candidate”, which had the remake rights negociated for several countries. The South Korean version, launched in 2020, dominated the box office on its opening weekend.

Currently, the production company is preparing for new challenges, with several projects under development with the main world players in the audiovisual market.
Location: RIO DE JANEIRO, Rio de Janeiro

Name: Circo Filmes
Description:
Contar boas histórias é o que nos diverte. Sejam elas grandes, pequenas, pra vender ou pra entreter.
O mais importante sempre será a história, independente de onde venha ou de quem a faça.
Focando sempre nas pessoas, no trabalho em equipe, nos talentos de cada um, afinal, nada é mais coletivo e colaborativo que fazer filmes.
Embaixo dessa lona, só fica quem sabe fazer.
Divirtam-se!!!

Name: MOON Films
Description:
We call it CREATIVE FIRST.

We believe it starts with a great script.

MOON creates state-of-the-art advertising films in all shapes and sizes on behalf of clients of all shapes and sizes.

Highest production values, striking visual style and excellent client relationships - that’s what we aim for.

MOON FILMS founder is Magda Betlejewska an experienced commmercial producer who’s talent is not only to bring the final result but also to make everyone comfortable in the process.

MOON brings you a reccomendation of specially selected directors and crews.

Please give us a shot at your project and let us take you the higher level of production experience and advertising results.

We believe breathing life into each one takes a unique eye for memorable casting,
a standout cinematic look, a light- handed edit, subtle music and a singularly masterful telecine colour-mood.

And, of course, a realistic and professional CREATIVE FIRST Production Schedule.

We love brave. We love human. We love goose bumps

Name: Pug'n'Play
Description:
Soluções completar para que as suas ideias saiam do papel. Para você, marca ou creator.

• Produção de vídeo • Canais para Youtube • Web séries • Infocursos • Branded content • Transmissões ao vivo •

Chegou a hora de você ser mais. Bora produzir?

Name: Confluential Films
Description:
Founded by multi-hyphenate filmmaker Tommy Oliver, The Confluential Company is an Emmy and Sundance-winning production company, production services company, and financier devoted to championing inclusive, authentic, and culturally specific projects, where those who should be telling a given story will be the only ones doing so.
 
We develop, produce, and finance across film, TV (scripted and unscripted), and documentaries, and a few of our past projects include the Emmy-winning Going to Mars: The Nikki Giovanni Project (HBO), Fancy Dance starring Lilly Gladstone (Apple TV+), AFI Audience-Award winner Juice WRLD: Into the Abyss, The Perfect Find starring Gabrielle Union, Keith Powers, and Gina Torres  (Netflix), the critically acclaimed HBO documentary 40 Years A Prisoner (TIFF), the ground-breaking docuseries Black Love on OWN, the Sony thriller The Perfect Guy (opened #1 in the country), and the award-winning indies 1982 (TIFF), Jinn (SXSW), and Kinyarwanda (Sundance).

Name: Neighborhood Film Company
Description: We are a community of filmmakers who believes there is a soul to every story. Creating films for brands is what we do. Apprenticing the formerly incarcerated for competitive careers is why we do it.

Name: Stiller Studios
Description:
Welcome to one of the worlds technically most advanced studios in its field.

Stiller Studios is an internationally multi-awarded "tech marvel" production company with a world-class network of creative talent. Our objective is to create high-end feature films and series with relatable characters and engaging stories, utilizing our game-changing proprietary technology.

Here at Stiller Studios, our focus is on pushing creative boundaries through innovative technology. We develop customized solutions for virtual production, 3D animation, green screen workflows and real-time filmmaking techniques.

Our state-of-the-art studio facility in central Stockholm is fully equipped for groundbreaking projects using cutting-edge tools like VR, deep data and motion capture. Through close collaborations with top talent globally, we aspire to become an industry leader in digitally-driven storytelling.

At Stiller Studios, we provide filmmakers with the resources needed to realize even their most ambitious visions. Our production model is centered around quality, flexibility and an empowering work environment where artistic exploration is encouraged. With an emphasis on the power of storytelling, our goal is to offer new perspectives to audiences worldwide.

Exciting projects are always underway and we welcome opportunities to challenge conventional wisdom around visual storytelling. Together, we can shape the future of the filmmaking medium.

Let's continue the conversation - we look forward to hearing your ideas!

Name: Best Ever Food Review Show
Description: Best Ever Food Review Show is a team of hungry storytellers on a mission to hunt down and document the most unique cuisine from around the world, encouraging empathy, understanding and appreciation of different cultures through their food.

Name: Hatch Films CIC
Description:
Hatch Films CIC is an established community impact film production company. A NatWest Top 100 Leading Social Enterprise and one of the only not-for-profit production companies in the U.K. We provide training, work experience, networking and employment opportunities for diverse talent who may face barriers to working in the industry with a focus on those from the Global Majority, LGBTQ+ and low socioeconomic backgrounds.  

We also provide services in the form of video production, animation and photography to a range of clients including National Portrait Gallery, BBC, Frieze, NACFB, Kick It Out, OMD UK and more.  

The work we do with client's feeds into our development of talent, we pay those who we are supporting in training, junior or assistant roles as well as all profits from our client services being used to fund our social enterprise.  

We fill a critical gap in provision for the many talented young people who lack the contacts, resources or belief necessary to develop a career in the creative industries. 90% of our trainees have since gone on to work within film or media.

We are a CIC and as such everything goes back into the training and development of the young people we engage with.

www.hatch-films.com
hello@hatch-films.com

Name: Magicbox
Description: Magicbox mobilizes virtual production inside an LED studios to make it accessible to any production.

Name: Rockset Filmes
Description:
A Rockset é uma empresa especializada em Produção Audiovisual. No mercado desde 2015, a empresa surgiu para atender um dos setores mais rentáveis da economia brasileira, a realização de conteúdo de qualidade capaz de atender às principais marcas do país e do mundo.

Com uma equipe de mais de 50 colaboradores é uma empresa acolhedora e também exigente o que aproxima e qualifica um corpo criativo e processos específicos adaptados para cada projeto, com capacidade para atender às principais marcas do país e do mundo.

Existem muitas estratégias que podem agregar valor a sua marca.
Acesse nosso site www.rockset.com.br

Name: Berkshire Film Office
Description: Locations and permissions to film for Berkshire, UK. A not-for-profit project set up and run by Resource Productions CIC, working on behalf of all six councils.

Name: Paragon Pictures
Description: Paragon Pictures is a film and entertainment company that focuses on the development and production of original IP for the Indonesian & global market. The company is founded by Robert Ronny (Legacy Pictures) and Andi Boediman (Ideosource Entertainment). Films produced: Sobat Ambyar, Backstage & Losmen Bu Broto.

Name: ÉCU - The European Independent Film Festival Internships
Description:
ÉCU - The European Independent Film Festival is dedicated to the discovery and advancement of the best independent films from around the world.

The next, 20th edition of the festival, will take place on the 9th, 10th, and 11th of May 2025 in Paris, France.

ÉCU has forged a path for independent film since 2006 and the scope of its presence has grown to a global scale, and the festival is often referenced as being the European equivalent of Sundance, an honor that we don’t take lightly.

ÉCU – The European Independent Film Festival provides the perfect arena for indie filmmakers to express authentic cinematic storytelling in the most compelling ways possible. As one of the World’s truly stand-out independent film festivals, we embrace innovation and creativity and allow directors in competition to showcase their films to audiences who appreciate and love independent cinema. Filmmakers who are selected into ÉCU’s Official Selection join an active community of creatives who continually push the boundaries of indie cinema.

Thanks to our over 50 partner festivals, partner organizations, film centers, and film commissions, ÉCU goes on an annual world tour called ÉCU-On-The-Road, which allows award-winning films (as well as many of the Official Selection films) to have their films screened to a broader, global audience. ÉCU-On-The-Road showcased films in over 77 countries around the globe in 2016 – 2018 at special ÉCU mini-festivals, partner festivals, cultural institutions, and film schools, including an amazing seven-day special festival in São Paulo, Brazil. The event was made possible through the support of Caixa Cultural, São Paulo, and was a huge success. ÉCU also held special events in Berlin, and Cannes and was part of festivals in Lebanon, Italy, Russia, the USA, Romania, Austria, Denmark, and other countries. This gives ÉCU filmmakers great exposure to audiences that they may never have reached.

We are proud to be a filmmakers’ festival!

Name: AVM Productions
Description: A name synonymous with the world of motion picture, AVM is the oldest active film production house and studio in India. Founded by AV Meiyappan in 1946, this is one of the few active studios in Asia, with over 170 films in all major Indian languages. AVM has always been an institution that produces fascinating movies and has launched numerous prominent actors. In addition to the shooting floors, AVM Studios has recording, dubbing and a preview theatre with state of the art equipment. The complex also houses the latest facilities for production and post production processing.

Name: Little Monster Films
Description: Little Monster Films is an Academy, BAFTA, and multiple Emmy Award-winning production company founded by Chai Vasarhelyi and Jimmy Chin. We are committed to telling character-driven stories underneath the backdrop of thrilling and otherworldly visuals in both our documentary and scripted projects. Our mission is to capture humanity at its best, aiming to reflect a diverse world both in front of and behind the camera. We strive to present grounded narratives with intensity and depth while showcasing the extraordinary among us and the power of what we can individually achieve.

Name: Schmuby Borderline Films
Description: Partenaire privilégié en coproduction de plusieurs projets initiés par Autour de Minuit  Schmuby /Borderline Films a coproduit également des projets d’autres sociétés et développe une activité de producteur exécutif et de prestataire de services

Name: Chicago Film Scene
Description: The Chicago Film Scene is a group of filmmakers, writers, actors, producers, artists, gaffers, grips and more. We meet every Wednesday in Lincoln Park, and our focus is building and supporting the Chicago film industry and community.

Name: Film London Ontario
Description:
We are a no-cost business concierge to help connect your production to the resources you are looking for. We are committed to welcoming you to London as a friendly place to film your next project. 
We're here to help you connect with the right resources.

Services:

Location support
Resources
Industry promotion
Connecting

Name: Industrial Scripts - Screenplay Consultants
Description:
Founded in early 2010, Industrial Scripts is now one of the world’s leading screenplay and story analysis companies, with over 1,000 verified client testimonials.

Our script consultants have significant industry credentials, writing script coverage for companies and studios including Paramount Pictures, Warner Bros., Universal and many more. 

Working with screenwriters, authors and filmmakers of all levels and from myriad locations, we also deliver intensive training both online and offline. 

While our OVERDRIVE and Talent Connector programmes hone and promote writing talent to the industry, our popular blog – Character-Driven – educates, informs and entertains. We believe that rigorous script development is the foundation of great cinema and TV and is, indeed, essential – without it, the end product is certain to fail…

Name: Inside Out Toronto 2SLGBTQ+ Film Festival
Description:
Inside Out is a not-for-profit registered charity that exists to challenge attitudes and change lives through the promotion, production and exhibition of film made by and about 2SLGBTQ+ people of all ages, races and abilities.

For nearly three decades, Inside Out has brought Toronto's 2SLGBTQ+ community together in celebration of the best queer film from Canada and around the world. Through our annual Festivals in Toronto and Ottawa, our filmmaker initiatives, our youth engagement and our year-round events and screenings, Inside Out is engaged every day in challenging attitudes and changing lives.

Name: Agence Lise Arif
Description:
L’agence Lise Arif est née en 1993, avec tout de suite une approche originale – nous ne représentons que des auteurs et des réalisateurs.

Avec la multiplication des chaînes, l’arrivée de nouveaux supports de diffusion, il fallait constituer le terreau d’un audiovisuel français, une famille où se côtoient jeunes auteurs et artistes confirmés. L’agence est aujourd’hui un lieu d’échanges, de rencontre, de synergies, d’émulation, d’amitiés. 

C’est un creuset d’évolution des carrières, un lieu de découverte et d’émergence des talents.

Télévision, cinéma, nouveaux médias, les oeuvres des talents représentés marquent l’époque.

Name: FAPAV - Federazione per la Tutela delle Industrie dei Contenuti Audiovisivi e Multimediali
Description:
FAPAV was founded in 1988 as a no-profit association for the protection of  Intellectual Property, copyright and related rights and to contrast all the forms of illegal copying of movies and audiovisual contents in order to protect  its own members and the entire audiovisual sector.
 
FAPAV’s permanent members are: ANEC, ANEM, ANICA, MPA and UNIVIDEO. Some of the most important Italian companies of TV production and distribution of audiovisual and cinematographic works are FAPAV’s members.

Name: Yorkshire and North East Film Archive
Description: The Yorkshire and North East Film Archive totals some 70,000 items documenting the rich and diverse lives, landscapes, cultures and traditions of our two regions captured on moving images, from the earliest pioneering days of filmmaking in the late 19th century to the present day.

Name: FILMKULTUR Filmproduktion & Vertrieb GmbH
Description: Produktion und Vertrieb gesellschaftsrelevanter Dokumentarfilme

Name: CUBE
Description:
CUBE is an insight-led video and animation company. We produce captivating content, uniquely tailored to each and every project brief connecting you with your clients, prospects or staff.

Our in-house team of professional videographers and animators are directed by experienced creatives and each project is managed by a dedicated account manager to ensure the project is on-brief and delivered on-time with a 5-star service.

We offer the full video production package, from initial strategy planning, creative ideation and scripting right through to production services and post-production.

Name: Early Light Media
Description: Inspiring People Through Film Is Our Super Power. We Produce Video: Branded Documentaries, Commercials & Digital Campaigns To Amplify Positive Messages And Build Emotional Connections. When Paired With Thoughtful Strategy & Conscious Companies, It’s A Recipe For Deep Impact.

Name: Down Under Film Festival
Description:
Down Under Film Festival (DUFF) has been a vital hub for enthusiasts of Australian and New Zealand cinema and culture since 2011. Every year, the festival brings fresh filmmaking from Australia and New Zealand to Berlin, offering a platform for these incredible films and new audiences to meet at the heart of Europe. 

In 2024 DUFF will launch its first edition in Copenhagen!

Ranging from independent productions to blockbusters, from student and professional short films to inspiring documentaries – diversity is one of the cornerstones of the program. 

As a non-profit registered association, DUFF is always open to long-lasting, and tailored partnerships as well as sponsoring opportunities. Amongst the festival's trusted partners are the Australian and New Zealand Embassies in Berlin, Tourism Australia, Adina Apartment Hotels, EXBERLINER, Zitty Magazine, Berliner Fenster, StudioBinder, gnarles, Lingual Consultancy, STA Travel, Aesop, Jameson Irish Whiskey, Our Vodka, Candide Schokoladen, Lockwood Berlin, BierBier, Netball Berlin, and many more.

Name: La Commission du Film Luberon Vaucluse
Description:
La Commission du Film Luberon-Vaucluse, ou "Film Vaucluse", poursuit une mission d’intérêt général en favorisant l’accueil et le développement des tournages cinématographiques et audiovisuels dans le département de Vaucluse : longs et courts-métrages de fiction, séries TV et téléfilms, web séries, publicités, documentaires, reportages, clips...

Nos services sont entièrement gratuits et s'adressent aux producteurs, réalisateurs et autres porteurs de projets audiovisuels, afin de faciliter les tournages sur notre territoire. 
Nous collaborons également à des projets liés à l’économie créative, au tourisme et au patrimoine vauclusien, et effectuons la promotion du territoire auprès des professionnels de la production.

Les grands axes de nos missions et services sont les suivants :
Accueil de tournages 
Référencement de décors, pré-repérages et accompagnement aux repérages
Appui à l’obtention des autorisations de tournage
Assistance au recrutement local de techniciens, artistes et figurants
Mise en relation avec des personnes ressources et des prestataires

Accompagnement aux scénaristes et auteurs-réalisateurs
Information, documentation et mise en réseau
Aide au développement de projets
Expertise Creative Friendly
Promotion et valorisation du Vaucluse
Promotion et communication
Participation aux rencontres des professionnels de l'audiovisuel
Evénementiel
Médiation publique et sensibilisation à l'accueil de tournages
Suivi de l’activité économique et culturelle

Name: Explainer
Description:
Explainer is a “Förklaringsbyrå”. What does that mean, you ask? Well, let us explain!

We started with a simple idea: sometimes, the “boring stuff” about your business is actually the most important stuff. But how do you get people to care about it—let alone engage with it?

That’s where we come in.

At Explainer, we believe that important information doesn’t have to be dull. Why should commercials and ads have all the fun while the things that really matter—like your product, service, or values—get lost in complicated jargon? 

We’re here to change that.

Whether you’re selling security doors, protein powder, or championing circular economy, we’ve spent the past ten years helping businesses explain what they do in ways that are clear, engaging, and even fun(!).

Sometimes, that’s through cutting-edge 3D animations. Other times, it’s a simple 2D explainer video, an insightful interview, or a dynamic presentation. Whatever the format, the goal is always the same: to turn your message into something people understand and remember.

People are sick of sales gimmicks and tired old clichés. They crave authenticity, and we help you deliver it. Because here’s the thing - your audience wants to see how your product works, why your service matters, and what your company stands for.

At Explainer, everything we create is built on understanding—you, your audience, and the impact you want to make. Information is powerful, and when it’s packaged the right way, it can unlock your full potential.

Let’s get things explained!

Name: Brw Filmland s.r.l.
Description:
Brw Filmland is an Italian based advertising production house with an international high quality roster of directors. 

Since our beginnings in 1974 we were named Brw & Partners that makes us the very first and oldest Italian Production Company, we have been thrilled to partake collaborative endeavors with big names in the Italian film industry such as Fellini, Scola, Salvatores, Guadagnino, Muccino as well as critically acclaimed prize winning foreign directors.

We are part of BRW Group with our London sister company Independent Films and Tex, the group post production facility.
 
Our international reputation has been sealed in gold when we were granted the honor of winning the Grand Prix Award for the best commercial at the Cannes Lions International Festival of Creativity in 2011 with the Nike “Write the future” campaign, this made us the only Italian Production Company to be appointed with the highest award in the industry.
With more than 5000 commercials produced, Brw Filmland offers its institutional professionalism for national and international productions.
We like to film and watch since 1974.

Name: Pyramide Films
Description:
Pyramide a été fondé en 1989 et est aujourd’hui un des plus importants distributeurs indépendants français.

La société a débuté avec MILOU EN MAI, de Louis Malle, qui fut l'un des actionnaires de Pyramide qui a, par la suite, distribué ses derniers films, FATALE et VANYA 42ème RUE.

Dès le début de son activité, Pyramide s'est consacré aux auteurs comme Jim Jarmush (MYSTERY TRAIN), Sean Penn (CROSSING GUARD), Claire Denis (BEAU TRAVAIL), Benoit Jacquot (LA FILLE SEULE, LE SEPTIEME CIEL, LA FAUSSE SUIVANTE) Catherine Breillat (SALE COMME UN ANGE), Mike Leigh (NAKED) ou Aki Kaurismäki dont Pyramide a suivi la carrière depuis le début pour finalement co-produire L'HOMME SANS PASSE, LES LUMIERES DU FAUBOURG, et enfin LE HAVRE.

D'autres metteurs en scène ont trouvé leur place à Pyramide comme Youssef Chahine (LE DESTIN), Woody Allen (ACCORDS ET DESACCORDS), Nikita Mikhalkov (SOLEIL TROMPEUR), Alain Resnais (SMOKING, NO SMOKING), Shohei Imamura (DE L'EAU TIEDE SOUS UN PONT ROUGE), Patrice Chéreau (SON FRERE), Philippe Faucon (SAMIA, LA TRAHISON, DANS LA VIE), Tonie Marshall (VENUS BEAUTE INSTITUT), Tony Gatlif (EXILS), Denys Arcand (LES INVASIONS BARBARES), Nuri Bilge Ceylan (UZAK, LES CLIMATS, LES TROIS SINGES), Fatih Akin (DE L’AUTRE COTE, SOUL KITCHEN), Catherine Corsini (PARTIR), les frères Larrieu (PEINDRE OU FAIRE L’AMOUR), Mahamat-Saleh Haroun (DARATT, UN HOMME QUI CRIE), Céline Sciamma (TOMBOY), Apichatpong Weerasethakul (ONCLE BOONMEE), Alain Cavalier (IRENE), William Friedkin (KILLER JOE), Christian Petzold (BARBARA), Emmanuel Mouret (FAIS-MOI PLAISIR, L’ART D’AIMER, MADEMOISELLE DE JONCQUIERES).

Pyramide gère à présent un catalogue de plus de 250 titres.

Name: MEMENTO DISTRIBUTION
Description: MEMENTO FILMS DISTRIBUTION is a motion pictures and film company based out of 9 CITE PARADIS, PARIS, France.

Name: Lahaye Media
Description:
En Lahaye Post trabajamos exclusivamente para la industria del video digital.
Ofrecemos servicios integrales de postproduccion a producciones altamente exigentes y competitivas del sector publicitario, cinematográfico y/o televisivo.
Para responder a esa demanda  estamos organizados en diferentes áreas y grupos de trabajo, cada uno a cargo de un profesional especializado, que nos permite obtener mejores resultados en menos tiempo.
Location: Palermo, Ciudad autónoma de Buenos Aires

Name: QUERÔ
Description:
O QUERÔ é uma Instituição sem fins lucrativos de Santos/SP que busca promover o acesso à arte e a cultura e estimular a transformação humana e cidadã de jovens de baixa renda e moradores de comunidades por meio do audiovisual, visando colaborar com a redução da desigualdade social.

Realiza anualmente três projetos principais: Oficinas Querô, Querô na Escola e Querô Comunidade que utilizam o trabalho coletivo como impulsionador de mudanças sociais e de expressão para as classes populares. Além do Programa Conexões Querô, que busca oportunidades para os capacitados no Querô seguirem suas carreiras, possibilitando experiências na Baixada Santista, em São Paulo, em outros estados do Brasil e até no Exterior.  

Conta também com a PRODUTORA QUERÔ, que atua no mercado audiovisual produzindo desde vídeos corporativos a projetos autorais para TV e Cinema, com temáticas de impacto social.

Em atuação desde 2006, o QUERÔ tornou-se uma referência de escola sociocultural de audiovisual, documentado pela BBC e reconhecido pelo UNICEF.

ACOMPANHE O QUERÔ NAS REDES SOCIAIS:
