Name: CREATIVE SOUND - Paris
Description:
Conseil et suivi pour tous vos projets de post-production sonore
 
Mixage TV et Cinéma tous formats - Montage son – Sound design – Post-synchro – Doublage – Bruitage

On ne le dira jamais assez :

Le son, c’est 50% d’un film. D’ailleurs, ne parle-t-on pas d’œuvre AUDIO - Visuelle ?

Conseil et suivi de projets en postproduction audio : prestations optimales adaptées au projet et budget de chaque client
Post Synchro - Doublage : 2 auditoriums équipés Rythmo 35mm et Synchronos
Montage Son – Sound Design : sonothèque complète et constamment renouvelée (20th Century Fox, Sony Pictures, GGC, Digiffects, Hollywood Edge, Lucas Film, Sound Ideas, Universal, Valentino, Warner)
Bruitage : 2 auditoriums équipés pour l'enregistrement de bruitage
Mixage en 7.1 et 5.1 : auditorium agréé Dolby Digital & dts

Name: Rencontres 7e Art Lausanne
Description:
Les Rencontres 7e Art Lausanne sont un rendez-vous annuel international impliquant le public dans une réflexion sur le cinéma. Son ADN : des rencontres incarnées entre le public et ses invités prestigieux et la projection de chefs-d'œuvre sur grand écran.

Initié par l’acteur originaire de Lausanne Vincent Perez, l’événement célèbre l’histoire du cinéma par des projections, dans les salles obscures lausannoises, de films qui ont marqué l'histoire du cinéma, accompagnées de masterclasses et de conversations publiques passionnantes entre ses invités (acteurs, réalisateurs et producteurs) et des experts de différents domaines.

Entre patrimoine et prospective, Les Rencontres 7e Art Lausanne invitent toutes les générations à participer à une réflexion autour du 7e Art. Dans ce but, l’événement se dote d’un puissant incubateur créatif et d’une signature unique dans les milieux du cinéma, en s’associant avec d'importantes écoles du canton de Vaud, comme l’ECAL, l’UNIL, l’EJMA ou l’EHL.

Grâce au soutien de la ville de Lausanne et de la Cinémathèque suisse, de ses partenaires officiels BNP Paribas et Beau-Rivage Palace, et de ses autres partenaires comme Pathé Suisse, Piguet Galland & Vous, Pax et la Fondation Jan Michalski pour l'Écriture et la Littérature, le festival se donne les moyens, loin de toute compétition, de porter un nouvel éclairage sur le 7e Art et de placer Lausanne comme un lieu essentiel pour parler de cinéma, réfléchir, innover et donner du sens.

Facebook.com/LesRencontres7eArtLausanne
Instagram.com/Rencontres7Art
YouTube.com/@Rencontres7eArtLausanne
TikTok.com/@rencontres7eartla

Name: Les Grignoux, asbl
Description:
L'asbl les Grignoux, entreprise culturelle d’économie sociale, gère treize salles de cinéma sur trois sites liégeois — le Parc, le Churchill et le Sauvenière — et un site namurois — Le Caméo.

Ces cinémas valorisent les meilleurs films récents en version originale sous-titrée (avant-premières avec réalisateurs et équipes du film, soirées spéciales, conférences-débats avec le monde associatif, etc.) 

Les objectifs généraux du travail de l’asbl sont d'offrir une alternative à la culture dominante et de permettre au public le plus large possible de découvrir des films de qualité dans des conditions optimales (d’accessibilité financière, d’accueil, de projection, d’information, etc.) 

Occupant une centaine de travailleurs, l’association fonctionne en autogestion et accueille environ mille quatre cents personnes par jour, toutes activités confondues.

Les Grignoux développent un vaste programme de matinées scolaires sur l'ensemble de la Fédération Wallonie-Bruxelles : « Ecran large sur Tableau noir ». 

Ils organisent également une cinquantaine de concerts par an au café le Parc et à la brasserie Sauvenière. Le Caféo est ouvert quant à lui à Namur depuis septembre 2017.

Name: DEUSDARÁ FILMES
Description:
Deusdará é uma produtora transmídia. Já nasceu conectada com as novas tecnologias, redes sociais, processos colaborativos, cocriação, convergência, multiplataforma. Especializada em produzir audiovisual para a nova era da informação e do conhecimento, gerando narrativas não-lineares, construídas com ampla participação dos milhares de produtores de conteúdo conectados em rede.

Além dos serviços corporativos, criados para provocar conversações em rede, Deusdará desenvolve produções próprias, que servem como laboratório para o desenolvimento de serviços avançados para clientes e marcas corporativas, agregando o que há de mais contemporâneo em termos de produções transmídia e projetos multiplataforma.

Name: Cinefilm Produções
Description: A Cinefilm é uma empresa especializada na criação, planejamento e execução de projetos audiovisuais end-to-end, gerando conteúdo premium, com os melhores resultados de produção.

Name: Strasbourg European Fantastic Film Festival
Description:
The Strasbourg European Fantastic Film Festival, founded in 2008, is a major French platform for fantastic cinema, and one of Europe’s most comprehensive genre events.

Dedicated to fantasy films in the broadest sense - fantasy, horror, science fiction, thrillers, animation - the festival offers an eclectic program and attracts an audience from various backgrounds. 

It also offers many events including one of the biggest Zombie Walk in Europe, Master Classes, the Fantastic Village, workshops for children, conferences and exhibitions.

Name: Expocine
Description:
A EXPOCINE nasceu em 2014 como uma convenção dedicada a fazer a ponte entre
os setores de exibição e distribuição, e entre eles e seus fornecedores, no coração da
indústria: a cidade de São Paulo. Rapidamente se consolidou como o maior evento do
mercado. Em 2019, ampliou sua programação ainda mais para oferecer conteúdo e
conexões relevantes também para os produtores, tornando-se tornando o grande hub
da tela grande. Em 2023, o período de realização foi ampliado, com as atividades se
estendendo por 4 dias de encontros, painéis, e mais recentemente, workshops. Mais
informações pelo site.

Name: dhruvans.vfx
Description:
Creative Design Services Studio
dhruvans.vfx the team talented creative artists that can provide high quality work in your given time at the best prices. 
VFX & Animation & 3D Generalist & supervisor 
3D Design for products, Previsualization, assets broadcasting etc..

Name: Aaron Film
Description: Founded in 2002, Zurich based Aaron Film develops and produces audiovisual projects regarding contemporary and past issues of social and political life with a main interest in social interaction. We pursue the aim of creating valuable authorial films with an artistic form.

Name: Videoimagem
Description: A Videoimagem é uma produtora especializada no mercado corporativo, de convenções e institucionais a e-learning e treinamentos. Documentários, animações, podcasts, redes socias, conteúdos interativos, gamificação: temos competências para uma ampla gama de formatos, sempre com preocupação estética e com a alma de cada cliente!

Name: Goiabeira Filmes
Description:
Goiabeira Filmes e Produções is an independent film production company based in Rio de Janeiro, specializing in narratives centered on female protagonists, diversity, and social impact. Our stories are rooted in the city of Rio.

Our feature-length documentary, "As Pastoras – Voices of Samba’s Women" (2018), which explores the lives of the Portela samba singers, received Honorable Mentions at the 2019 Houston International Black Film Festival and the 2019 Visões Periféricas Festival. It was also licensed by Canal Brasil and TodesPlay.

Another feature-length documentary, "Say My Name" (2020), about two transgender women, was showcased at the 12th Co-Production Meeting of the Guadalajara International Film Festival, Mexico. It won the pitching competition at CINEBRASiLTV, premiered on cable TV in March 2020, and went on to receive the Best Documentary Award at the 2nd Díli International Film Festival, Timor-Leste, as well as Best Feature Film at the 6th FICL - International Film Festival of León, Mexico. "Say My Name" is now available on Amazon Prime, NET NOW, VivoPlay, iTunes, Google Movies, Microsoft Movies, Looke and Todes Play.

Name: HOLE Films | Creative Film Agency
Description:
Jesteśmy kreatywną agencją filmową, która obsługuje zarówno klientów bezpośrednich, jak i wspiera agencje w realizacji nawet najbardziej nietypowych pomysłów filmowych. 

Wyróżnia nas wyjątkowy proces produkcji koncentrujący się na Kliencie oraz swobodnym przejściu przez realizację filmu. Kochamy tabelki i excele. 

Nie zwalnia nas to jednak z kreatywności wkładanej w każdy projekt. Terminowość i sumienność mamy na naszych tablicach. 
Rzetelność przy wycenie i wypracowywanie oszczędności dla naszych Klientów, na rzecz oczekiwanego celu, sprawia nam niezwykłą radość. 

Efekt przynoszący korzyści sprzedażowe i wizerunkowe jest naszym priorytetem.

Name: Nick Alexander Films
Description: Nick Alexander Films is your creative partner for captivating visual stories, promoting your products and elevating your services. From concept to screen, we craft stunning videos that leave a lasting impact. Contact us to schedule your discovery session!

Name: Lotus Production
Description:
Lotus Production si occupa di produzione e post produzione cinematografica e televisiva e video.

Tra i film di maggior successo, prodotti da Lotus Production, troviamo Perfetti Sconosciuti di Paolo Genovese, La Pazza Gioia di Paolo Virzì, A casa tuttti bene di Gabriele Muccino, Italiano Medio di Maccio Capatonda.

Tra le ultime produzioni Lotus Production, Gli anni più belli di Gabriele Muccino, Supereroi di Paolo Genovese, Time is up di Elisa Amoruso, la miniserie Alfredino – Una storia italiana di Marco Pontecorvo e la serie Sky original A casa tutti bene di Gabriele Muccino.

Name: El Documentalista Audiovisual
Description:
¿Tienes en mente un proyecto audiovisual y no sabes de donde obtener las imágenes de archivo? ¿Tienes un presupuesto ajustado y necesitas que el pago de derechos no se coma tus fondos? ¿Quieres saber cómo gestionar tu archivo personal audiovisual? o simplemente ¿Quieres contactar con nosotras?

No lo dudes y mandanos tu propuesta laboral o consulta a eldocumentalistaudiovisual@eldocumentalistaudiovisual.com y te responderemos lo antes posible.

Además de las labores de asesoramiento en gestión de archivos y producciones audiovisuales ofrecemos  cursos de formación relacionados con la Documentación Audiovisual.

Name: Mariposa Filmes
Description:
Fundada em 2008 com a finalidade de atender o mercado audiovisual com locação de equipamentos, produção de engenharia e logística, nos tornamos parceiros em grandes produções de cinema, televisão, publicidade e música.

Em 2014 decidimos que estava na hora de alçar voos ainda maiores e passamos também a produzir e gerar conteúdos para televisão e web, além de filmes publicitários e institucionais.

A Mariposa representa a liberdade e a transformação; é justamente por isso que escolhemos esse nome para nossa produtora, pois acreditamos que a liberdade criativa de gerar conteúdo é transformar ideias em historias e pensamentos em imagens.

Escrevemos, produzimos e Filmamos, filmes publicitários, programas para televisão, séries para Web, projetos de desenvolvimento digital, vídeo- clips, gravação de DVD, documentários, cobertura de eventos, filmes institucionais e corporativos.

Name: Finish Post Productions
Description: Finish Post Productions is made up of Finish Post, Boston Common Space, and Motion Cyc Studio. Each of these facilities can be found within the Salvi Creative Center, which gives all of our client's easy access to a seamless cyc stage, coloring suites, VFX suites, and production offices. For all of your production needs, from start to Finish!

Name: Westec Media Limited (WML)
Description:
Westec Media Limited (WML) is the biggest content distributor in the Kingdom of Cambodia. Established in 2011, WML played a key role in growing the movie industry in Cambodia. WML has distributed more than 1,000 titles theatrically since its establishment and currently distributing an average of 150 titles annually in Cambodia and other regions. WML also does multi-territory distribution under Westec Media International (WMI), which currently covers Indonesia, Vietnam, Philippines, Malaysia, Brunei, Singapore, Thailand, Myanmar, Laos, Mongolia and Nepal.

WML works hand in hand with major and independent studios around the world.

Name: Honest Films
Description: We're the creative studio that makes people believe. We partner with storied brands to create short films and commercials that carve out a home in the hearts of their customers. It’s the carefully crafted result of mixing truth with beauty, and art with good old-fashioned, honest work.

Name: MillK - The Film Content Company
Description:
Connecting with global audiences through exceptional visual storytelling.

We are a team of talented film creatives and TV programme-makers producing an array of film content for our varied client base with global brands, broadcasters and creative agency partners.

We're innovative and smart, using data analytics and market insight to ensure film content provides a return on investment for our clients. We also offer expertise in new technologies and interactive content delivery to enable our clients to reach new audiences.

Give us a shout, we'd love to talk.

Name: PRAGDA | Latin Cinema
Description: PRAGDA is the leading educational film distributor for the newest Latin American, Spanish, and Latinx cinema. We spend a great deal of time searching for the fines documentaries and features produced each year, and we bring them to educational institutions around the world. To learn more, visit pragda.com

Name: Environmental Film Festival in the Nation's Capital
Description:
The Environmental Film Festival in the Nation’s Capital (DCEFF) is the world’s premier showcase of environmentally themed films. Since 1993, our mission has been to celebrate Earth and inspire understanding and stewardship of the environment through the power of film.

Each March in Washington, D.C., we host the largest environmental film festival in the world, presenting 100+ films to audiences of more than 20,000. Collaborating with over 110 partners, including museums, embassies, universities, and theaters, the Festival is one of the leading annual cultural events in Washington, D.C., winning the 2017 DC Mayor’s Award for Excellence in Creative Industries.

DCEFF is a proud member of the Catalogue for Philanthropy’s 2020-21 class of nonprofits.

Name: A Nathi Sound
Description: Founded by Nathi Luthango, a music composer and final mix engineer, who has worked on world class TV and commercials for almost a decade, A Nathi Sound offers versatile, efficient and high-end audio post-production services to projects for TV, radio, film, and online.

Name: Nippon Connection - Japanese Film Festival
Description:
Nippon Connection is the biggest platform for Japanese cinema worldwide and will take place for the 26th time from June 2, 2026 in Frankfurt am Main / Germany. The unique film and cultural program offers Japan for all the senses, from tradition to modernity, on six days.

The festival is organized mainly on a voluntary basis by the non-profit Nippon Connection registered association. The organization team consists of around 70 members, with many students among them. In 2013, festival director Marion Klomfass was honored by the Japanese Foreign Minister for her merits in the field of German-Japanese cultural exchange. She was awarded the Order of the Rising Sun, Gold and Silver Rays in 2023.

Name: Animus Studios
Description:
We help brands big & small find their fascinating and unleash it into the wild with the power of video. 

Video Production - Filmmaking - Documentaries - Motion Graphics - Visual Effects - Animation

We're proud to call Rhode Island home.

Name: Ojo Urbano Films
Description:
Somos una productora audiovisual,
Producimos y realizamos vídeos musicales, fotografías, shows , Comerciales y contenido para redes sociales.

Name: 714 Production
Description:
Société de création et de production audiovisuelle, 714 Production replace la vidéo au cœur de la communication par un regard créatif et une expertise technique.
Notre offre s’adapte aux différents canaux de diffusion, conscients de l’avancée du digital et de son impact sur votre entreprise.
Nous réalisons des vidéos institutionnelles, des films publicitaires et des documentaires.

Instagram : @714prod
Facebook : 714 Production
Viméo : 714 Production

Name: FilmBath
Description:
Welcome to FilmBath, the heart of the film world in Bath and home of FilmBath Festival (previously Bath Film Festival), the F-Rating, FilmBath Awards which include the IMDb Awards, FilmClub and pop up screenings. 

FilmBath Festival has been screening brilliant films in Bath for over 30 years. Every autumn the festival presents a great programme crammed with the films everyone will be talking about next year including new-to-view features, shorts and docs from across the world, plus insider talks, talent awards and special strands focusing on films made by women, classic cinema, family viewing, sci-fi, art & design and more.

Name: DF Media Services
Description: DF Media Services BV is a full service audio production company for documentaries, commercials, film, television and online.

Name: Watersprite Film Festival
Description:
Watersprite Film Festival is the world's largest student film festival - supporting emerging filmmakers from around the world.

The Festival receives over 1000 submissions a year in short animation, fiction and documentary films from over 100 countries worldwide. 30-40 filmmakers are nominated for 15 award categories at live juries, and the selected filmmakers are offered full travel and accomodation bursaries to come to Cambridge in March for a festival of screenings, events, industry networking and workshops. Watersprite is also a hub for education and learning in the East of England, offering
over 30 events free of charge to the public at the jam-packed festival weekend.
Past and present industry sponsors include BBC Three, Netflix, 
Youtube, ARRI, Porsche, and the festival offers awards and mentorships to winning filmmakers, supported in the past by Neil Gaiman, David Yates and the UK’s top talent agencies (United Agents, Independent Talent Group, Casarotto Ramsay & Associates and Curtis Brown).

We welcome inspiring award-winning speakers each year to chat with our audiences about their journeys in Film & TV. Over the years, Watersprite has welcomed guests such as Olivia Colman, Lenny Henry, Mike Leigh, Eddie Redmayne, Naomi Ackie, Evanna Lynch, Bill Nighy and Biyi Bandele.

Name: veodi - jouw videopartner
Description: Wij zijn Maxim, Joey en Boris. Drie broers met passie voor video en al het creatieve wat daarbij komt kijken. Sinds 2013 hebben wij onze krachten gebundeld om samen online video content te creëren voor talloze bedrijven, merken en evenementen.

Name: The Yellow Shutter
Description: Professional photography and video production house.

Name: Full Spectrum Features
Description: FULL SPECTRUM FEATURES is a Chicago-based 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization committed to increasing diversity in the independent film industry by producing, exhibiting, and supporting the work of women, LGBTQ, and minority filmmakers. We also aim to educate the public about important social and cultural issues, utilizing the power of cinema to foster understanding in our communities.

Name: Hungry Eyes Media
Description:
Hungry Eyes Film & Television is an award-winning transmedia production company that delivers compelling and powerful stories. Whether film, television or digital media Hungry Eyes is renowned for quality programming that inspires and entertains.

Hungry Eyes Film & Television, co-founded by the husband-wife team Jen Holness and Sudz Sutherland, is a transmedia production company that tackles cross-cultural, cross-genre and cross-media subject matters. Hungry Eyes has done pioneering work with hard-hitting television dramas, documentaries and feature films.

Name: Move Media Agency
Description: Move Media is an award-winning video production agency. We work hand-in-hand with agencies and brands across the nation as consummate collaborators. We work from full-fledged creative and scripts or help build new content from the ground up. Our team is dedicated to producing big agency quality without the big agency headaches. We are here for you and made to move.

Name: Five2Eight Post
Description:
Welcome to Five2Eight Post, an Audio Post-Production Facility based in Randburg, Johannesburg. We specialise in final mixing, tracking, music composition and sound design for television, film and radio.

Our team is able to offer and deliver on the full spectrum of audio post services; which include, but is not limited to, multi-track digital recording, music composition, and arrangement, SFX search, sound design for AV and presentations, as well as voiceover and session musician source.

At the core of Five 2 Eight Post's operations and initiatives are collaboration, growth, development, partnership, sharing, and service. Above and beyond committing ourselves to ensure quality/high-end audio post-production service. Five 2 Eight Post aims to create a culture that prioritizes individual development – placing both customer and employee satisfaction and success as a priority.

Name: Blue Elements

Name: MarguttaStudios Srl
Description:
MarguttaStudios è uno dei principali fornitori di front e back-end, post-produzione e servizi connessi, alle industrie cinematografiche e televisive, per l’Italia e l’estero.

Mette le sue radici nel 2018, ed è rapidamente diventata sinonimo di performance superlativa e massima espressione dello sviluppo tecnologico e dell’innovazione dell’industria. Situati nel cuore di Roma, in uno degli ambienti più storici e suggestivi, i nostri studi, le sale di doppiaggio e le sale di proiezione 2K/4K, tra cui il primo DOLBY  ATMOS  Mixing/Projection Studio in Italia, sono il perfetto equilibrio tra il progresso e lo stile. 

Che si tratti di immagini o suono, la conservazione, il restauro e l’archiviazione delle vostre risorse multimediali, o completi servizi di contenuti digitali, abbiamo la giusta combinazione di personale altamente qualificato e l’apice della tecnologia per superare qualsiasi tipo di sfida .

Consegniamo tutti i nostri servizi seguendo tassativamente linee guida MPAA applicando stringenti protocolli di sicurezza attraverso sistemi di archiviazione digitale su misura, gestione del workflow e strumenti di monitoraggio.

In poche parole, MarguttaStudios è oggi la risposta completa a tutte le esigenze, front e back-end, produzione, post-produzione e distribuzione, per il settore cinematografico e televisivo

Name: Institute of Documentary Film, Prague
Description: Founded in 2001, the Institute of Documentary Film (IDF) is a non-profit training and networking centre based in Prague, Czech Republic, focused on the support of Central and Eastern European documentary films and their wider promotion. Our activities support filmmakers through all stages of completion – development, funding, production, post-production, and distribution. Our activities include: Ex Oriente Film – a training programme for Central and East European filmmakers and creative documentaries; East Doc Platform – the largest co-production, funding and distribution platform tailor-made for Central and East European documentaries; East Silver – a market for Central and East European documentaries, providing festival services and awarding the best documentaries; KineDok – alternative distribution of creative documentaries. We provide a wide range of information at our portal dokweb.net and on our social networks. We closely work with key international festivals, broadcasters, distributors, sales agents, markets, and training initiatives and serve as the gateway to Eastern European documentary film.

Name: Ghostsong - Cinema Independente
Description:
Ghostsong is an independent production company focusing on fantasy, horror and sci-fi films.
Based in Lisbon, Portugal.

Name: Uno Sguardo Raro - the rare disease international film festival
Description: UnoSguardoRaro Rare Disease International Film Festival selects and promotes the best video works from around the world on the theme of living with a rare disease, with disability and, in general, with diversity. The project is born in 2016 from Claudia Crisafio, actress and author, and Serena Bartezzati, rare and communication professional, who share the certainty that, as Ingmar Bergman says: "There is no art form like cinema to strike the consciousness, shake the emotions and reach the secret rooms of the soul." The first goal of UnoSguardoRaro RDIFF is to break the wall of isolation that often surrounds those who face the complicated journey with a rare disease or  a disability by telling, through the works that take part to the Festival, stories of similar journeys faced by so many people in different countries of the world. The second is to help change the public’s mindset about diversity. Even today, unfortunately, people who do not fit into the concept of "normality" are excluded and discriminated against by society. USR RDIFF with its events, short films and films shows that we are all equal, beyond the physical or intellectual abilities, feelings, emotions, passions are the same and this is what puts us all on the same level. Disability does not make people better or worse, but a society that creates physical and moral barriers makes life very difficult for those who have needs other than the normal parameters provided by society. USR RDIFF wants to make a step towards a more inclusive society, wants to be a tool to support campaigns for equal rights, for a world  where integration is the norm and not the exception. In this annual event of international  we see works of quality and high emotional impact.

Name: Difusor Arte Filmes
Description:
Criada pelos sócios fundadores, Thyago Robl e José Paulo Cruz

A Difusor Arte Filmes é uma produtora que trabalha com o foco na realização de vídeos institucionais e documentários.

Em nossas produções ao longo de 10 anos, compreendemos o audiovisual como linguagem artística e por isso nos empenhamos para que as obras sejam únicas, criativas e emocionantes.

Uma história bem contada faz toda diferença!

Estamos em busca de novos desafios e histórias para contar, queremos ampliar as experiências e fazer parcerias.

O que você está pensando para o próximo projeto, vamos trabalhar juntos?

Name: Byfarm marchio Mokrea SRL
Description:
BYFARM è una consolidata realtà del video making in continua evoluzione. Opera in diversi campi della comunicazione visiva, con particolare attenzione alla documentaristica al servizio del marketing del territorio.
BYFARM è in grado di redigere e gestire dettagliati piani media, finalizzando prodotti di elevata qualità tecnica parallelamente a budget contenuti.

Name: Solanus Films
Description:
At Solanus Films, we believe cinema is more than storytelling — it’s a search for meaning. Our mission is to create films that challenge, inspire, and elevate the human experience. Whether through hard-hitting documentaries, thought-provoking feature films, or explorations of faith and science, our work is rooted in curiosity, conscience, and craft.

We produce stories that matter — stories that give voice to the forgotten, explore the mysteries of existence, and examine the systems that shape our world. From social justice to spiritual inquiry to scientific wonder, our films seek to illuminate truth and invite meaningful reflection.

 What We Do:
	•	Feature Films with Purpose
	•	Documentary Storytelling
	•	Projects Focused on Justice, Faith, and Science

 Our Values:
	•	Integrity in Storytelling
	•	Curiosity Without Compromise
	•	Cinematic Craft with Social Impact

Name: Cambodia International Film Festival (CIFF)
Description:
Cambodia's largest international cultural event. 
Over 130 films from 40 countries yearly gathering over 20,000 audience in 10 venues across Phnom Penh.

A wide spectrum of activities and goal toward the filmmakers and the Cambodian society:
- ENGAGING THE AUDIENCE:
Educating and exchanging on contemporary and environmental issues
Freedom of expression and Human Rights
Engaging themes dedicated to the Cambodian audience
A young audience but also a broader spectrum of mature patrons
A Window onto the World

- A CREATIVE NETWORKING FOR THE FILM INDUSTRY:
New Cambodian talents promotion
International film promotion
A professional Film Hub to learn
A platform for the Khmer Diaspora
A bridge between Europe and Asia, and the rest of the world

CIFF is a free of charge event followed by the young Cambodian generation and leads actions in the frame of the UN SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT GOALS including:
- No Poverty
- Good Health and Well Being
- Quality Education
- Gender Equality
- Decent work and economic growth
- Industry, innovation and infrastructure
- Reduce inequalities
- Climate action
- Peace, justice and strong institutions
- Partnerships for the goals

A NATIONAL AND INTERNATIONAL SUPPORT NETWORK  
Supported by Ministry of Culture and Fine Arts of Cambodia, UNESCO, and also Heinrich Boll Fondation,  Purin Foundation.

CIFF works with numerous Embassies and institutions such as the Korean Embassy, the Japan Embassy, the French Embassy, the French Institute, the Czech Film Archive, the Czech Embassy, The Asian Film Commissions Network, The Film Development Council of Philippines, the Indian Embassy, Unifrance, the Swedish Embassy, the US Embassy...

CIFF  partners and collaborates with numerous prestigious Festivals such as Cannes IFF (France), Busan IFF (Korea), Tokyo IFF (Japan), Mons IFF (Belgium), the Hong Kong Filmart, Short Shorts (Japan), Cambodia Town Film Festival (USA), the Film Festival and Forum on Human Rights (Switzerland), the Asian Film Awards...

Name: Film Access Scotland
Description:
Film Access Scotland is the national sector development body representing, connecting and supporting organisations and individual practitioners working in the Film Access Sector. 

Our growing network of members and associates offers opportunities to participate in inspiring and engaging Film Access activities to people of all ages and backgrounds across Scotland, especially those experiencing disadvantage or exclusion.

Film Access work occupies a hugely important place in our society and culture and its positive impact is far-reaching in terms of social inclusion, personal development, employability, health and wellbeing, active citizenship and social, community and environmental justice. Our members and associates use film as an expressive tool to unlock the potential of individuals, groups and communities to bring about positive and lasting social change.

Film Access Scotland is a Scottish Charitable Incorporated Organisation (SCIO): Number SC051146.

Name: Flow Stereo
Description: At Flow Stereo, we specialise in creating bespoke music, sound design, and immersive soundscapes for film, television, advertising, and games. As a team, we’ve had the privilege of working on projects for Vinted, Greenall’s Gin, dCS Audio, Brit Alliance, OrangeBox, and feature films like Dark Moon. Our approach is built on the belief that sound should be part of the storytelling from the very first frame, blending creative artistry with technical precision to craft audio experiences that engage audiences and elevate every visual narrative.

Name: Tricoastal Productions LLC
Description:
Tricoastal Productions was founded by award-winning NYC-based actor and filmmaker Shannon Harris to produce her first film, comedic narrative short "THREE birds," which she also wrote, directed, and in which she leads the diverse cast. 

The name Tricoastal Productions, "TCP" for short, is both biographical and aspirational. Along with NYC, Shannon has lived in LA and London - three entertainment capitals of the world - and aims to be tricoastal in the future. TCP's broader mission is producing the work of and amplifying the voices of underrepresented artists and their stories. 

"THREE birds" won Best Comedy; and Shannon's second film "grist," which she also wrote, produced, directed, and played the lead role, won Best Cast at the 2022 NYWIFT Online Shorts Festival. "grist" also won Best Narrative and Best Actor (Stephen Cofield, Jr.) at the 2021 Mott Haven Film Festival. The two films, the first and second in a planned three-part series of shorts based on idioms, have been official selections at over 15 local and national film festivals.

Name: Highwind Assets

Highwind Assets LTD is an outsourcing company that provides  high quality organic and hard-surface assets for the VFX and video-game industry.  The company was founded by two brothers, Jason and Stefan Brown.

Over many years of working in the VFX industry, we have met many great artists and have welcomed a selected few onboard to help us achieve the high quality standard we strive for. 

Having a small team that not only works well together, but understand each other is critical to us and allows us to achieve professional results, in a timely fashion.

Name: Prorom Entertainment Kft. (Big Bang Media)
Description:
A Big Bang Media Kft 2011-ben alakult a müncheni székhelyű Prorom Media-Trade GMBH magyarországi vállalataként. Független filmforgalmazóként célunk, hogy egyedi és különleges filmek jogait szerezzük meg, melyek páratlan élményt nyújtanak nemcsak a moziba járóknak.

Portfóliónk több, mint 150 filmet tartalmaz a kis költségvetésű filmektől a nagyobb független filmes produkciókig, mint a Blue Jasmine az Oscar díjas Cate Blanchettel, a Pedro Almadóvar rendezte Megtört ölelések, Steven Soderberghtől a Magic Mike, Wes Anderson nagysikerű Holdfény királysága, Woody Allen rendezte Rómának szeretettel, Asterix & Obelix – Isten óvja Britanniát 3D Gérard Depardieu-vel, Az emlékek őre Jeff Bridges-zel és Meryl Streeppel, vagy a Don Jon Joseph Gordon-Levittel és Scarlett Johanssonnal.

Mozifilmek forgalmazása mellett filmjogok értékesítésével is foglalkozunk, filmjeink megtalálhatóak a UPC, a Magyar Telekom videótárában, DVD-n és a televíziók (MTVA, RTL, TV2) kínálatában. 


Big Bang Media Kft was formed in 2011 as the Hungarian subsidiary of the Munich based Prorom Media-Trade GMBH. As an independent film distributor company our aim is to acquire rights of original films that brings unique experiences not only to movie goers.

Our portfolio contains over 150 films from small-budget movies to bigger independent film productions such as Blue Jasmine with Academy Award winner Cate Blanchett, Pedro Alamdóvar’s Broken Embraces, Steven Soderbergh’s Magic Mike, the acclaimed Moonrise Kingdom from Wes Anderson, Woody Allen’s To Rome with Love, Asterix & Obelix: God Save Britannia – 3D with Gérard Depardieu, The Giver with Jeff Bridges and Meryl Streep, or Don Jon with Joseph Gordon-Levitt and Scarlett Johansson. 

Besides theatrical releases Big Bang Media Kft also sells film rights. You may find our films in UPC’s and Magyar Telekoms’ VoD, on DVDs and on all major TV channels such as MTVA, RTL and TV2.

We’ve worked with some more recognizable brands like Google, GoPro, Sharp, Daimler, and TransUnion however we love working with tech startups.  Our creations have helped clients to showcase the voice of their existing customers, acquire new business, launch meaningful products and amplify their company mission to achieve goals.   We serve technology companies as well as have a passion  for schools and non - profit organizations.

Name: shinflik
Description:
MISSION

To bring together a global community of filmmakers with stories that enlighten, inspire and entertain. 

CORE VALUES

To our community: Trust is the cornerstone of every relationship. Honesty and transparency are essential building blocks to establishing trust. We actively listen to feedback and suggestions to continually improve our products, services and organization. We make every effort to make a difference.

At Shinflik: Collaboration promotes creativity, innovation and change. To make this happen: we defer judgement, we encourage wild ideas and build on ideas of others. Transparency and accountability make us a reliable company. We believe in the positive effects of diversity (i.e., race, age, sexual orientation, religion). 

We support all filmmakers around the globe who are passionate about telling stories that bring forth understanding, critical thinking and positive change.

Name: Millimeter
Description: Passionately dedicated to the visual communication industry and to the craft of film making.  Established in 2008, Millimeter is one of the first Saudi creative production company in Saudi Arabia, based in Jeddah and operating across Saudi Arabia offering a full scope of equipment and services coupled with our local and international talents and crew to pursue excellence in all types of productions services and photography.

Name: Drickx Create
Description:
Jij hebt een visie en weet exact wat jouw bedrijf te bieden heeft. Maar hoe breng je dit precies over op jouw doelgroep? Hoe zorg je voor de maximale impact, zonder afbreuk te doen aan je merk? 

Dat is het moment dat je mij inschakeld. Want niets is informatiever en krachtiger dan bewegend beeld. Ik denk mee en leg jouw visie op een creatieve manier vast op video. Een video waarbij je de aandacht van de kijker van begin tot eind grijpt. Die ervoor zorgt dat mensen even genieten en nog belangrijker even de beleving ervaren zoals je dat op voorhand had gewild. 

Mijn belofte aan jou? Een video die oprechte impact maakt tot in de kleinste details. Of het nu gaat om een promotiefilm, commercial of aftermovie, ik sta voor je klaar! Daarnaast krijg je de garantie dat je de video binnen 3 dagen na de opnamedag in je mailbox hebt zitten.

Name: Cinéma LUX (Caen)
Description:
Conçue et construite à CAEN en 1960 par des bénévoles du quartier Sainte Thérése et des compagnons bâtisseurs sous l’impulsion de l’abbé Villain, curé de Sainte-Thérése, la salle paroissiale est achevée après 4 ans d’efforts. Baptisée "LUX", référence à la lumière, elle est inaugurée le 25 février, en présence de l’évêque de Lisieux, du préfet du Calvados, du sénateur-maire, Jean-Marie Louvel, et de nombreuses autres personnalités du moment

De nos jours, l'association cinéma LUX brille nationalement dans le milieu Art et Essai via 3 salles de cinéma, une cafétéria, une boutique, un fort soutien bénévole ainsi qu'une équipe passionnée portant de nombreux projets innovants en faveur de la culture pour tous !

Name: Yudi Project
Description:
Yudi Project is a motion graphic service that serves anything such as events, weddings, memories, gaming, webinar, bumper, etc. Not only that but also serve graphic design services such as posters, tickets, banners, logos, etc.

Name: El Abrazo Films
Description:
Productora Audiovisual especializada en documentales y programas de televisión. Name: Australian Film Future Foundation
Description: The Australian Film Future Foundation is a non-profit organisation dedicated to preserving and protecting Australia's rich cinematic heritage. Working in partnership with the National Film and Sound Archive and independent producers, our mission is to enable Australian film and television producers and rights holders to rescue, restore and fully digitise their screen content. We believe too much of Australia's motion picture history has already been lost due to decaying film stock and the passing of time.

Name: Birdie Experiences
Description: Birdie is an innovative video producer working in the tourism industry. We provide a quick and fun filming experience that results in a unique video souvenir of your holidays. Professional, personalized, inexpensive, delivered in the next day via email, ready to share on social media. An amazing memory!

Name: Cinema Town Studios
Description:
IMPORTANT UPDATE: 
our stage is temporarily closed!

Dear valued visitors,


We regret to inform you that Cinema Town Studios has undergone significant changes recently.

Due to an unfair demand from our landlord, we were compelled to demolish our entire standing set and sound stage.

This decision was not taken lightly, and we understand the disappointment it may cause to our clients and partners.

However, despite this setback, we want to assure you that Cinema Town Studios remains committed to delivering top-notch production services
While we may not have our standing sets at the moment, we continue to offer a comprehensive range of services including casting, producing, acting demo reels, and professional photography services.
Our team is dedicated to providing you with the same level of excellence and creativity you've come to expect from Cinema Town Studios.
We are actively exploring options to rebuild and enhance our facilities in the future.
Thank you for your understanding and continued support during this challenging time.
Please feel free to reach out to us for any inquiries or to discuss your upcoming projects.

Name: Moonrise Pictures
Description:
Moonrise is an independent entertainment company that specialize in the production and international distribution of film, television and other media properties with strong commercial appeal and identifiable audiences from around the world. 

With the flexibility of an independent, the company focuses on acquisitions and strategic planning regarding the sales and licensing of world-class content. 

The company also boards audiovisual projects as creative and/or financial co-producer and advisor in order to maximize value and ROI opportunities for such projects. We are proficient in structuring international alliances and strategic planning regarding the sales and licensing of independent films in the foreign and US markets. Evaluating media projects, offering consultancy services and packaging through a wide contact directory is an available option for producers seeking funding and international distribution for their productions.

Name: Film Manufacturers Inc
Description: Film Manufacturers Inc is a production company based out of 1633 Broadway, New York, NY 10019

Name: VRAIVRAI FILMS
Description:
La société VraiVrai Films est née en 2011 du désir de Florent Coulon de coproduire des documentaires d’auteurs du continent africain. Aujourd’hui, nous nous attachons à produire des longs-métrages documentaires et des fictions qui nourrissent un dialogue intime et politique entre ici et là-bas. 

Par la complémentarité des regards des producteurs associés, français, béninois et cubain, notre ligne éditoriale traduit un questionnement profond sur le concept d’altérité et vise une réinvention des relations entre le Nord et le Sud, encore fortement marqués par l’histoire de l’esclavage et de la colonisation. 

Nous faisons le pari d’une aventure cinématographique, avant tout humaine, en privilégiant la découverte de nouveaux auteurs dont le regard singulier permet de contribuer au mouvement des idées sur les enjeux du monde d’aujourd’hui et de demain.

--

VraiVrai Films was launched in 2011 from Florent Coulon's ambition to co-produce documentaries by authors from the African continent. Today, we are dedicated to producing feature-length documentaries and fictions that foster an intimate and political dialogue between 'here' and 'there'. 

Through the complementary views of our French, Beninese and Cuban associate producers, our editorial line reflects in-depth questioning of the concept of otherness and aims to reinvent North-South relations, still strongly impacted by the history of slavery and colonization. 

We believe in a cinematographic journey, above all a personal one, by focusing on the discovery of new authors whose singular vision contributes to the movement of ideas about the challenges of the world today and of tomorrow.

Name: Stuck On On
Description:
STUCK ON ON is an award-winning audio and visual post production studio in Austin, Texas. We specialize in sound + color + deliverables for film, TV, commercials and online. Long and short-format and everything in between.

Audio specialities include: sound design, SFX editing, dialogue editing, audio mixing, voice over and ADR.

Picture specialties include: color correction, digital intermediate (DI), online finishing, mastering and deliverables.

Projects include: Emmy winner TOWER, Oscar Nominated Boyhood and Before Midnight, Cannes Palme d'Or Nominee Mud, Cannes Critics Week and FIPRESCI Prize Winner Take Shelter and IAWTV and Streamy winner RWBY Seasons 1-4.

Our long format work has screened all over the world including Cannes, Berlin, Sundance, Venice, Toronto, Sydney, SXSW, Locarno, Hot Docs and The Democratic National Convention. Experience delivering to PBS, Netflix, Amazon, YouTube Originals, Hulu, Apple, Discovery and various VOD platforms.

Clients include: Detour Pictures, Rooster Teeth Productions, Neon, Alamo Drafthouse, H.E.B., Siete, Sony Pictures Classics, Stubb’s BBQ, YETI, Dell, Crate & Barrel, United Airlines, WholeFoods Market, Cannondale Bikes, GSD&M, FilmNation Entertainment and the State of Texas.

Name: 180˚ Productions
Description: We’re 180° - a full service film and media company based in Louisville Kentucky. Visit our website to learn more about our feature film, documentary and commercial work!

Name: Boston Filmworks
Description: We're a Boston based non-profit production company offering affordable services to schools and community organizations. Our team of master storytellers is led by Emmy-nominated documentary filmmaker and veteran TIME magazine photojournalist Steve Liss.

Name: ENTRENOVA
Description:
A Entrenova é uma agência de desenvolvimento de conteúdos transmídia e educação digital. Criamos experiências de aprendizagem inovadoras que unem storytelling, tecnologia e design instrucional para gerar impacto real.

Desde 2017, produzimos materiais educacionais em múltiplos formatos — vídeo, áudio, roteiros interativos, cursos online e soluções personalizadas — para empresas, escolas, plataformas e universidades que buscam educar com mais criatividade, clareza e conexão.
Location: São José dos Campos, São Paulo

Name: KEYSTONE FILMS
Description:

Name: AMELIO MEDIA presents RESILIENCE
Description:
Our intent is to tell the raw story – the raw story of the “military experience” downrange, the dynamic while deployed, the pivotal moments when they return home, and ultimately how they navigate the CIVILIAN workplace, the community and most significantly, their home with their loved ones. THE RAW Story has many layers AND we intend to delve and dig deep during intense interviews as they share how they navigate the terrain of civilian life after multiple deployments, how they maintain emotional healthy relationships within their community of fellow Veterans as well as their “tribe.”

Further, we will tell the raw story of Veteran suicide and talk to surviving family members, and how they are coping, and what they’ve done to honor their family members memory.Another element of this documentary will highlight grassroots organizations, Veteran owned non-profit organization, Hidden Wounds https://hiddenwounds.org/ Project Josiah https://projectjosiah.org/. Celebrate Freedom Foundation, gocff.org, Project Refit, projectrefit.us, Heroic Gardens, heroicgardens.org The Lazy Lab Hunting Club lazylabhc.org Awareness 22, https://awareness22.com/, The Giordano Foundation, giordanofoundation.org and Freedomsings  https://www.freedomsingsusa.org/

We will talk to major players at the Department of Veterans Affairs. We will ask bold questions to these experts. (e.g., How can they better serve Veterans and their families? What can VA providers do better and also discuss the paradigm shift to client centered -and their whole health initiative. 

 We will delve into the latest research on how to best serve Veterans and their families, University of South Carolina’s Dr. Aubrey Sugeit will present straightforward evidence of combating PTSD. We will interview other Professors at Rutgers University in NJ conducting research involving effective therapies for Veterans to heal from PTSD. 
We will ask bold questions to politicians fighting on the frontlines every day for V

Name: effenove srls
Description:
EFFENOVE è una società di produzioni cinematografiche e di visual effects 3D con sede in Basilicata.

Siamo un laboratorio di ricerca orientato al racconto e allo studio della realtà reale e virtuale. Il gruppo di lavoro dirige lo sforzo maggiore del processo creativo e produttivo alla realizzazione di prodotti visivi (video, film, documentari, scansioni e modelli 3D) destinati a divulgare conoscenza e informazioni, con l’obiettivo di rendere fruibile o conosciuto il patrimonio culturale, materiale e immateriale.

La ricerca di storie (e sulle storie) da raccontare è il punto di partenza. Lavoriamo con una mentalità tipica del processo artigianale della produzione, basata sul continuo dialogo tra i reparti artistici e quelli produttivi.

La linea aziendale individua caso per caso l’approccio più funzionale alla costruzione di un racconto, scelta che deve essere il punto di equilibrio tra linguaggio narrativo e investimento di risorse. Non è un caso che la tecnica sia, per effenove srls, lo strumento utile a superare talvolta i limiti della tecnologia.

Tramite droni con risoluzione 4K e prestanti fotocamere reflex/digitali parti del mondo reale (monumenti, paesaggi, persone) vengono trasformate in modelli 3D ad altissima risoluzione; mediante l’elaborazione con software specifici per il 3D, questi modelli consentono l’inserimento di animazioni e oggetti virtuali in scene reali.

Realizziamo questi processi sempre a partire da una ricerca rigorosa delle fonti, dei fatti o delle informazioni a cui la storia protagonista fa riferimento. Il metodo “artigiano” della costruzione dell’output visuale non è mai declinato senza un preliminare approfondimento, che nella maggior parte dei casi richiede il ricorso anche ad singoli esperti e team misti.

Name: Pasifika Film Fest
Description:
The Pasifika Film Fest (PFF) showcases the art of Pacific storytelling through film while also working to inspire Pasifika writers, directors and actors to explore links to their culture.

Since 2013 PFF has grown from a small community based festival running out of a repurposed factory in Marrickville; to an international, multi-city event.

PFF network at a grass-roots level with a broad cross-section of Pasifika community organisations and persons including sporting teams, dance groups, youth organisations, fashion labels, small Pasifika-run businesses, community leaders, radio stations, celebrities and so on.

PFF is not just a film festival, it’s an experience which extends beyond the screen. We provide opportunities for collaboration and exposure for a diverse range of groups and organisations within the community. Importantly, we aim to foster recognition of and pride in the  skills, talents and achievements that often go unheralded in Pacific Islander & Maori communities.

Future projects: PFF is developing a model to travel the festival around the Pacific and to other international locations by developing relationships with relevant stakeholders at a global level. 

PFF is committed to the development of opportunities for Pasifika filmmakers and creatives to become involved in the production of their own stories through film and script-writing workshops, internships and other related projects such as PITCH PLEEZ (launched at PFF 2016) and the PFF 48 Hour Film Challenge (launched at PFF 2018).

We are committed to creating discussion around cultural identity and the modern-day issues that Pasifika cultures face. We move beyond the stereotype to source and showcase stories that audiences can identify with, in which they can both recognise themselves and in which they feel represented. This is powerful.

El objetivo del Festival Inclús es dar visibilidad a trabajos audiovisuales elaborados alrededor de la temática de la discapacidad y con un punto de vista diferente, con tal de dar a conocer la realidad más profunda de las discapacidades, y así romper tabúes respetuosamente.

La 12 edición de Inclús se celebrará del 26 de noviembre al 2 de diciembre, en CaixaForum Barcelona.

En el marco de una ciudad como Barcelona, pionera en innovación e inclusividad, con la voluntad de ser una ciudad que hacen las personas, hace falta una iniciativa como Inclús, un espacio para dar visibilidad al colectivo de personas con discapacitad.

El Festival Inclús es una plataforma donde promover obras audiovisuales cuya temática sea la discapacidad. Conocer su realidad desde un punto de vista diferente es nuestra razón de ser. Siendo la discapacidad física y/o mental el eje central, los mejores cortos y películas de ficción y documental, de autores así como de entidades del tercer sector, se proyectarán y los mejores serán premiados. 

Inclús se centra en producciones audiovisuales, pero también presenta otras actividades y disciplinas con el fin de dar visibilidad a este sector, y contribuir a cambiar el punto de vista en relación a las diversidades funcionales. Por eso, dentro del festival, se invitarán a agentes relevantes del sector para que expongan su testimonio, y se impartirán talleres inclusivos.

Queremos ser un festival que año tras año elimine el componente y atribución injusta de la persona con discapacidad como víctima, para impulsar una visión constructiva e inclusiva, que permita al público conocer esta realidad y las posibilidades para el conjunto de la sociedad.

Name: Missing Movies
Description:
As an ad hoc group of film lovers and professionals, we have come together to create Missing Movies to empower filmmakers, distributors, archivists, and others to locate lost materials, clear rights, and advocate for policies and laws to make the full range of our cinema history available to all. The board consists of Ira Deutchman, Mary Harron, Nancy Savoca, Rich Guay, Geoffrey Fletcher, Amy Heller, Dennis Doros, and Susan Bodine.

There is an immediate need to address this issue. The truth is that movies are simply not as available today as they were during the heyday of VHS when some brick-and-mortar video stores carried tens of thousands of titles. Now, with a few giant companies controlling the most popular streaming services and trying to outdo one another with original content, many older movies are being left behind.

Thousands of movies are either completely lost or are deemed too small to warrant the expense, and thus are completely unavailable. This is especially true of work created by women and people of color. As a result, we end up with a skewed history of filmmaking and crucial gaps in our cultural knowledge and legacy.

Missing Movies will work to demystify and help decipher the economic, legal, and practical hurdles that filmmakers face when they want to make their older works available.

Name: Cinemien
Description:
Cinemien is an independent, all-rights film distributor who, for over 40 years, unites professionalism with passion for movies and a good eye for new talent. We distribute films In the Netherlands, Belgium and Luxemburg in cinemas, on DVD, Video on Demand and television. The company is headquartered in Amsterdam, in addition there is an office in Antwerp.

We buy our movies on the major international film festivals and high quality is paramount in our purchase policy. Several international award-winning films were brought to the public by Cinemien and we created opportunity for new, talented filmmakers who we continue to follow throughout their careers. 

Highlights of our catalog are: the award-winning Carol (Todd Haynes) and 45 Years (Andrew Haigh), the Golden Palm winners Festen (Thomas Vinterberg) and The Piano Teacher (Michael Haneke), the films of the French director François Ozon: Sous le Sable, 8 Women, Swimming Pool and Dans la Maison, the successful German film Good Bye Lenin (Wolfgang Becker), Gegen die Wand (Fatih Akin), Die Fremde (Feo Aladag), Lore (Cate Shortland) and the Oscar -winning film The Lives of Others (Florian Henckel von Donnersmarck), the acclaimed Italian film Gomorrah (Matteo Garrone), Le Meraviglie (Alice Rohrwacher), Il Divo and The great Beauty (both by Paolo Sorrentino), the films of the Canadian super talent Xavier Dolan: I Killed My Mother, Les Amours Imaginaires, Laurence Anyways, Tom at the Farm, Mommy and Juste la fin du monde, Un Prophète of Jacques Audiard, the documentary Strike a Pose (Esther Gould & Reijer Swan) and Layla M. (Mijke de Jong).

A selection of our best titles will be released on DVD under the label 'Award Winning Cinema'; a strong brand that stands for talent and high-quality films. With ambitious plans for the future, Cinemien will remain committed to ‘Cinema That changes the picture’.

Ready for take off?

What we do

We supply extras, walk-ons and actors to productions of every shape and size across Scotland. With talent from all walks of life and from a diverse array of backgrounds, we’ve got the talent you need on our books. Kirkwall, Oban, or the leafy suburbs of Glasgow’s West End. We know Scotland and we have the talent to perfectly meet your needs.

Why GBM?

Ask and you shall receive. No matter what you need, we have it. We take the hassle out of casting. Think Uber for SAs. Give us a call and find out. 

The technical part

We use POP, an InfoSec approved platform that makes working with GBM efficient and effective. Browse our up-to-date lookbooks, see talent availability and measurements and most importantly, securely handle cast and crew data to comply with GDPR.

Name: Wemake Film - Stories
Description:

Vi lager filmer innen alle sjangre, lengder og formater: alt fra reklame- og profilfilmer til strategiske informasjonskampanjer, kunnskapsbaserte filmer, pedagogiske opplæringsfilmer, engasjerende innhold til sosiale medier, dokumentarfilm, kortfilmer og drama. 

Målet vårt er å alltid skape filmer på et høyt kreativt og filmfaglig nivå, og formidle kunnskap og historier på en måte som gir innsikt, engasjerer og beveger.

adapted for any market within a short time.

Not only that but we offer our quality studio for rental at a competitive price and we hire out our top-notch production equipment.

Name: AG Kurzfilm - Bundesverband Deutscher Kurzfilm
Description:

Ziel ist es, die öffentliche Wahrnehmung deutscher Kurzfilme im In- und Ausland zu verbessern. Der Bundesverband versteht sich ebenso als Servicestelle für Filmemacher*innen und Produzent*innen von Kurzfilmen sowie für diverse Kurzfilminstitutionen, gleichermaßen aber auch als Ansprechpartner für Politik, Filmwirtschaft, Kinos und Filmfestivals.

Nossa Missão é dar palco para quem não tem e tornar autoridade quem já tem acesso a seu próprio público.  
Grava, produz e edita músicas que prioritariamente respeite as pessoas, a diversidade e o amor. 
Atua, a priori, no segmento Gospel, porém, por ser plural, também performa em outros clusters em parceria com as administrações de cada segmento. 
A nossa produção original segue critérios de alta qualidade para artistas de alta performance com as mais atuais tecnologias de produção.
Nossa editoração de música garante os direitos autorais e demais direitos conexos dos artistas filiados. 
Nossa atividade é de total respeito aos artistas de todas as pontas: intérpretes, compositores, instrumentistas, produtores e todos os envolvidos na produção musical.

Name: Independent Entertainment

Previously Independent have worked with Jim Jarmusch on GIMME DANGER, Duncan Jones on MOON, David Mackenzie on STARRED UP and HALLAM FOE, OASIS: SUPERSONIC from Mat Whitecross, Lynne Ramsay on WE NEED To TALK ABOUT KEVIN and Kelly Reichardt on MEEK’S CUTOFF.

Raconter votre histoire, créer de l’émotion.

Name: Alchemy
Description:
Noise is up, trust is down, and their attention is dwindling. 

Yet, you create something that matters and more people should know about it. 
And that’s where we come in.

You should know that we like to do things a little differently. 

We conduct anthropological research, meticulously select each character, and craft every plot point to build an authentic story, one that leverages the latest research in neuroscience and psychology, and makes a real difference for you and your mission.

We make films that delight your audience, make you memorable, and drives real results. But more than that – we listen deeply, care more, and craft with a fiery passion.

We combine the science with the craft of storytelling.   We are Alchemy.

Pegasus realizza contenuti per un mercato sempre più internazionale e sviluppa progetti dal carattere e dal linguaggio universali prodotti e distribuiti in ogni parte del mondo. In questo modo inserisce e valorizza la creatività italiana all’interno di una struttura organizzativa e di una visione dagli standard internazionali per collaborare con le realtà produttive e distributive di altri Paesi.

Attenta da sempre al tema dell’eco-sostenibilità, Pegasus dà voce a contenuti green nelle proprie produzioni e si preoccupa che gli uffici e i set rispettino i criteri dell’economia circolare.

Description:

Description: La Selva Ecosistema Creatiu is a not-for-profit cooperative film production company founded in Barcelona in 2018. By a group of Ibero-American filmmakers specialized in independent auteur cinema with a mixed experience over ten years. Our objective is to produce independent auteur cinema that allows the creation of other narratives, from perspectives little explored or common in cinema, with feminist, decolonial and anti-racist visions. Besides film production we also focus our activities in creative workshops for young talents having attended filmmakers of more than 26 nationalities worldwide. On past editions of our workshops, we offered as tutors’ personalities such as the Argentinian director Lucrecia Martel (2019) or the German Werner Herzog (2021) where several short films in international co-production were generated. Besides the program for filmmakers, we also create training programs for groups at risk of exclusion and in 2020 we have offered initial training to the world of cinema for migrant teenagers under guardianship in Spain, enabling them to tell their stories through images in movement, the result was a trilogy of short films that told the story of migrant female teenagers in Spain.

Name: Independent Cinemas Australia
Description:
A not-for-profit industry association representing independent exhibitors in Australia and New Zealand

We believe independent cinemas are the heart of the community and we are dedicated to supporting them.

For more than 25 years, the ICA has been on a mission to represent and advance the interests of independent exhibitors in an increasingly competitive and complex industry.

We have members in every Australian state and territory, and a partnership with the New Zealand Motion Picture Exhibitors Association that extends our representation across the Tasman.

The strength of our cinemas is in their connection with their local communities whether it’s an arthouse in the city, a regional multiplex, or a single screen in the bush.

Name: Panther
Description:
The founder of the company and former cinematographer has been on set for many years. His high relation to the requirements of todays operators and users is based on the fact of his wealth of on set experience and his former film equipment rental companies.
Today Mr. Andy Fitz is the owner of the company and also Head of Development. The passion to meet all those requirements with a creative approach is something he was born with.

All ideas and also needs from daily set life will continuously be incorporated into new product developments and improvements. Compatibility of all Panther products has always a significant value.

Due to our traditionally high demand on quality, the majority of all ever built camera dollies by Panther, is nowadays still functional and working. A Panther is not only remarkable, but also worth preserving! High safety and quality requirements are therefore our condition.

Quality is not only the obligation to the highest manufacturing precision and technical documentation, but also the great availability of spare parts beyond many years. This quality standard is achieved through the most precise manufacturing methods, as well as with the technical know how of modern production technologies like Laser-Sintering, and also a comprehensive spare part stock.

Panthers claim is to be market leader. This means: technology-wise and also quantity-wise is Panther at the head of. Through to our long-standing customers and distributors, Panther products are present in more than 100 countries. Panther has become the epitome of column dollies – worldwide. This is proven due to thousands of manufactured dollies and international awards. Panther is a unique company with high approach. Anything we do, is influenced by the values and philosophy of the founding family Fitz. With this basic approach we remain committed to our principles and define new standards.

Name: La Casa Films
Description:
We are a films & stills production company based in Patagonia, Chile, Argentina, and Mexico. We specialize in capturing powerful stories in some of the world’s most striking and challenging environments — from remote natural landscapes to fast-paced urban settings.

Our team thrives in real-world, extreme conditions — snow, rain, wind, or heat — adapting with precision and creativity to deliver high-impact visuals.

We have collaborated with global brands such as Nike, Renault, Skims, Moncler, Discord, and Patagonia, as well as with renowned directors and production companies on projects that have earned international recognition, including Cannes Lions awards.

Our approach combines technical excellence, on-location adaptability, and artistic sensibility, ensuring each production reflects our clients’ vision and purpose. We handle the entire process: from creative development and pre-production to filming and final delivery.

In every project, our goal is not only to meet the highest industry standards but also to convey the essence of each story — creating content that endures and connects with audiences worldwide.

Name: WEARE(VR)OKAY
Description:
WeAre(VR)OkAy

WEAREOKAY is a dynamic and innovative 360° video development house, specializing in creating immersive and interactive video content that pushes the boundaries of storytelling and engagement. WEAREOKAY focuses on blending cutting-edge virtual reality (VR) technology with creative cinematography to transport viewers into fully interactive environments.

Their expertise in creating highly immersive 360° content allows brands and creators to connect with audiences in a truly engaging way, providing experiences that feel lifelike and authentic.

From breathtaking virtual tours to adrenaline-pumping action scenes, WEAREOKAY’s 360° videos are crafted to captivate and immerse, providing viewers with a sense of presence as if they are right in the middle of the action. Name: PRIM, Centre d'artistes
Description:
Fondé en 1981, PRIM (Productions Réalisations Indépendantes de Montréal) est un centre d'artistes voué à la création et à la production indépendante d’œuvres d'art visuel et médiatique. 

PRIM opère selon un double mandat, soit d’une part, celui de contribuer activement à la formation et au développement des artistes indépendantes en leur offrant un programme pédagogique. D’autre part, PRIM encourage et facilite la production d’œuvres médiatiques contemporaines avec des programmes de soutien à la création et des installations à la fine pointe de la technologie. Son engagement est de professionnaliser les artistes tout en soutenant l’amélioration de la qualité technique des productions indépendantes.

PRIM est ouvert à tout créateur, individu, artiste ou producteur indépendant, désirant utiliser ses ressources à des fins artistiques, communautaires ou de recherche.

PRIM est subventionné par le Conseil des Arts du Canada, le Conseil des arts et des lettres du Québec, le Conseil des arts de Montréal et Emploi Québec.

Maar ook livestreams voor G-STAR tot verticale video’s e-learning platformen. Van volwaardige ‘online TV’ programma’s voor L’Oréal Professionel tot podcasts welke worden opgenomen in onze eigen studio in Wormerveer. Met onze producties proberen wij mensen te raken, te informeren en te amuseren.

Name: Grey Ladder Productions
Description:
GIOVANE. COMPETENTE. DIGITALE. Questa è Grey Ladder: casa di produzione e talent hub con base a Torino, attiva nel settore del media entertainment e capofila del network OpenGrey. 

**VISIONE**

Il nome “Grey Ladder” deriva dal termine “scala di grigi”, utilizzato in particolare nella fotografia per il cinema. 

La scala è diventata una vera e propria “ladder” nel logo, per rappresentare i valori di autenticità, concretezza e “artigianato dell’arte” che sono alla base del nostro approccio al lavoro e della nostra creatività.

Grey Ladder sviluppa e produce sia prodotti originali sia adattamenti tratti da properties di culto, caratterizzati da una forte natura crossmediale, alto potenziale commerciale e appeal di tipo internazionale.

Il nostro obiettivo è costruire prodotti innovativi rispetto al panorama produttivo italiano, e applicare sempre un approccio e un registro cinematografico ai nostri lavori, a prescindere dal format e dall’output.

**SERVIZI**

Grey Ladder è una vera e propria factory, alla continua ricerca di innovazione, idee e talenti, disponibile a mettersi completamente al servizio di contenuti originali e creativi.

Questo nostro spirito si applica sia alle risorse che ai servizi offerti ai nostri clienti. Grey Ladder può sviluppare, organizzare, gestire e finalizzare qualsiasi tipo di progetto video, anche soltanto a partire da un’idea o da un semplice spunto. 

L’imperativo e la costante dietro a tutti i lavori a marchio Grey Ladder è sempre raggiungere il più alto livello di qualità possibile nel prodotto finale.

**AZIONI**

Grey Ladder offre al cliente un’ampia gamma di servizi nell’ambito della produzione audiovisiva: sviluppo ed elaborazione del concept, pre-produzione, casting, shooting, post produzione, color correction e supporto nella promozione e marketing del prodotto.

Name: I Will Tell International Film Festival
Description:
I Will Tell is an international film festival  that celebrates untold stories, challenges perspectives and catalyses change. We premiere  feature dramas, documentaries, short films and animation telling stories of transformation and tales of unlikely heroes overcoming adversity, from more than fifty countries around the world. These films contribute to a more complete global narrative, challenging perspectives and inspiring and motivating us.

Our filmmakers are talented professionals who make great sacrifices, even risking their very lives to bring these hidden treasures to us. Our post-screening discussions with filmmakers such as Tim Reid, Lily James  and Lashana Lynch, country ambassadors, subject matter experts and, of course you, our  audience, ensure that no one leaves I Will Tell unchanged.

The name of the festival comes from a word spoken in the Senna dialect Ndinadsawapanga (pronounced Nah-jah-pang-ga). Many years ago, festival director Jenny Lee met Anel, a young girl living on the plains of Thoera in northern Mozambique. Anel desperately wanted the opportunity to go to school but girls in her village were not allowed an education. Shy but undaunted she declared a phrase that has resonated across the world over the years  – I Will Tell.  

The I Will Tell International Film Festival runs in the UK, USA and Trinidad and Tobago tackling some of life’s biggest questions. Inspired by our Christian faith, we believe that there is transformative power in bringing all of our stories to all of us.

Name: The Art of Brooklyn Film Festival
Description:
The Art of Brooklyn Film Festival is the flagship indie film event of Brooklyn.
 
Founded in 2011, AoBFF is the ONLY international, independent festival in the world devoted to Brooklyn’s vibrant film and media scene. We accept films from all over, as long as they are connected to the borough in some way (e.g. cast/crew, production, content, theme, setting, etc.)
 
We are also the only indie film festival to build and program our own video-on-demand streaming platform: Brooklyn On Demand www.brooklynondemand.com We broadcast festival favorites, original series and more, online and on a Roku channel with over 10,000 subscribers, alongside Netflix, Hulu and Amazon Prime.
 
AoBFF is a creative hub, platform and showcase for independent film and media makers in Brooklyn and around the world. We partner with film distributors and media organizations, host world-class talkbacks, and create innovative programming for networking and skill building. And we screen in state-of-the-art theaters for enthusiastic audiences across Brooklyn.
 
We believe that film festivals exist for filmmakers, not the other way around.

http://theartofbrooklyn.org

BROOKLYN ON DEMAND
In 2014 we launched Brooklyn On Demand, the world's only streaming platform for Brooklyn-centric films, series and more. BKOD showcases Free and Premium content for a worldwide audience and is coming soon to Roku.

http://www.brooklynondemand.com

Name: International Film Festival Mannheim-Heidelberg
Description:
The International Film Festival Mannheim-Heidelberg (IFFMH) discovers and encourages young cinematic artists from all over the world. It’s a unique platform of cultural, political and social dialog through film and cinema. Founded in 1952, the IFFMH is the german film festival with the longest tradition apart from the Berlinale.

The IFFMH specializes in discovering new talented directors each year. Among the former newcomers from Mannheim-Heidelberg are François Truffaut, Rainer-Werner Fassbinder, Wim Wenders, Jim Jarmusch, Angela Schanelec, Atom Egoyan, Thomas Vinterberg, Derek Cianfrance, Hong Sang-soo and Guillaume Nicloux.

The IFFMH celebrates innovation as much as narrative and aesthetic courage. It stands for a new experience. The festival acts as a compass and trend scout, discovers newcomers and presents visionaries, opens up horizons and revitalizes the historical. The IFFMH creates a social experience context. As a mediator and networker of different cultural scenes, the IFFMH generates added value for filmmakers, audiences and cities.

Name: Documentary First
Description: Documentary First is dedicated to documenting the stories of liberation in Normandy, France. Our current documentary project, "The Girl Who Wore Freedom," tells the story of D-Day and its legacy told by those who lived it and those who continue to honor its lasting impact through celebrations of remembrance and gratitude. Our documentary short film, "Grueling Glory: The March on Carentan" continues to highlight the veterans who lived in Normandy through the occupation and liberation of D-Day during WWII.

Name: European Short Pitch
Description:
European Short Pitch, initiated by NISI MASA - European Network of Young Cinema, is an annual program aimed at discovering and supporting young European talents in the development of their short films, and fostering coproduction and collaboration between industry professionals from all over Europe.

European Short Pitch combines mentoring on short film development with a pitching and networking event, our Coproduction Forum.

Since its creation in 2007, European Short Pitch has accompanied over 300 scriptwriters and directors in the development of their projects. Many of those short films had a successful career and were screened at festivals such as Cannes, Berlinale, Locarno, Sundance or IFFR...

Name: Electric Park Films
Description:
Electric Park Films is a space to explore ideas and create without limitations. Our strength is intimate, character-driven, short portraits and documentaries. We develop original content and partner with brands, non-profits, makers, and independent artists of all stripes. 

Christian Bruno and Natalija Vekic are award winning filmmakers. Our films have premiered at Sundance, Telluride, SF International Film Festival, Hot Docs, and DocNYC. Natalija has a background in screenwriting with an MFA from UCLA and Christian brings his craft as a cinematographer to the collaboration. Christian’s recent work as a cinematographer and producer can be seen in the feature length documentary, Lady Buds, which tells the story of six courageous women who come out of the shadows of the cannabis underground to forge a path to legalization. Now streaming on Starz.
 
We work with clients at any stage –– from pitching ideas and initial story consultation, screenwriting, directing, producing, and overseeing post-production. Electric Park Films draws on an extended constellation of artists, storytellers, designers, and animators to bring your vision to life. We’re here to translate original ideas and inspirations into compelling, character-driven stories with a cinematic flair.

El encuentro ha sido organizado por FIBICC.

Name: LET'S FLY ! [PRODUCTION] - Imagerie Aérienne
Description:
LET’S FLY est spécialisée en prise de vue aérienne par drone : de la simple photo, au tournage dynamique en vidéo en très haute définition (jusqu'en 8K) ou immersif en VR360°.

Installée à Lille, notre rayon d’action est national. Nous disposons d’un matériel homologué par la DGAC, d’une licence de pilote avion et des assurances obligatoires.
 
En duo d’opérateurs pilote + cadreur, ou en solo, l’Inspire 2 offre incontestablement la plateforme aérienne la plus performante et la plus polyvalente disponible à ce jour, avec un choix de caméras et d’optiques premiums

Une flotte drone variée :
- Notre flotte "fiction" se compose de deux Inspire 2 : une unité complète de tournage + un backup pour chaque tournage
- Nous exploitons également une configuration légère sur base de Mavic 2 Pro, polyvalent et parfait pour des tournages à budgets serrés
- Nous disposons également d'un gros porteurs Matrice 600 Pro, capable d'emporter 6 kg de charge, incluant par exemple des caméras ciné (RED, ARRI, ...), des appareils DSLR de type A7R4 ou A7S3, ou encore des systèmes de lumières dynamique de type "drone light"

To help with this Assemble solves the problem and pain of creating a website and other audience building tools. 7 years, over 2000 films, 80 million people a year and counting... #indiefilm

Name: Kino Montréal
Description:

Par la force du réseautage, des classes de maître, des formations, du prêt d’équipement, d’un soutien logistique ou d’un soutien financier d’appoint, Kino rassemble et outille une communauté de créateurs de courts métrages pour accélérer le développement individuel des artistes et les faire rayonner ainsi que leurs œuvres.

Du cinéaste établi au jeune débutant, Kino donne la chance à tous d’entreprendre une démarche artistique de cinéma. Il accompagne les artistes dans leur développement et accorde un soutien particulier aux talents les plus prometteurs.

Name: Potemkino
Description:

This ambitious vision is put into practice by a strong pan-European team of experienced storytellers and experts in film, television, games, Social Media and apps for tablets and mobile. We focus on inventive storytelling techniques combined with innovative financing strategies.

Just like cinema a century ago, the converging media offer exciting opportunities for 21st century storytelling and audience involvement. Potemkino’s course is aimed at these opportunities.
