Our original content has been broadcast on Independent Film Channel and Current TV. We have filmed commercials and content  for Nike, GE, AirBnB, Gatorade, Pottery Barn, DelaOstia Clothing, Gattorna Wine Products, and Moet-Hennesy. We have done production fixing and full service production services for the Bachelorette, Warner Bros,  A&E, Gene Simmons Family Jewels, NAT GEO (Scam City and The Big Picture with Kal Penn), HGTV, the History Channel, Nextfilms (Canada), Delphi Film (Germany), and Red Hawk Films and Channel Nine (Australia), among others.

We look forward to working with you. info.santelmoproductions@gmail.com
mobile phone: (54 9 11) 5977 3900
International Filmmakers, local fixers for TV and film productions in Buenos Aires, Argentina.The film services you need, the content you want.

Name: KAREL film and video production
Description:
Karel nasce a Cagliari nel 1997 e si costituisce come Società Cooperativa nel 2009.
La società concentra il suo operare sulle produzioni cinematografiche, televisive e pubblicitarie, con l’obiettivo ambizioso, di porsi all'avanguardia nella produzione degli audiovisivi. 
Progettualità, velocità operativa e flessibilità, sono il punto di forza di Karel, unite ad un carattere dinamico, aperto al dialogo e alla crescita attraverso lo scambio e il confronto di esperienze.
La società può vantare di un know-how elevatissimo nel campo delle produzioni video. Particolare attenzione viene data alla ricerca effettuata, costantemente, attraverso lo studio e l'aggiornamento continuo sulle tecniche di produzione e sulle nuove tecnologie.

Karel is a film production company established in Cagliari since 1997. Planning, operational speed and flexibility are Karel's strengths: the nature of a company that is used to expansion by exchanging and comparing experience.
Karel particularly pays attention to the research constantly conducted through continuous study and updating of production techniques and new technologies.
Each production is dealt with by studying increasingly new solutions and thanks to these experiences Karel can boast advanced know-how in the video production field.
Karel's distinction lies in the professional working in production and everyone that collaborates with us: creativity, technical and organizational capacity and use of advanced technologies.

Name: SilverWater Productions LLC
Description:
People retain 95% of a message when they watch it in a video, compared to just 10% when reading it in text. Maximize your brand’s impact by harnessing the power of video. With 95% message retention, your audience will remember your story and engage with it on a deeper level.

Great video doesn’t just capture attention—it drives action. It informs, inspires, and connects. It helps you grow your brand, engage your team, and communicate your message most effectively.

Connect with us
https://calendly.com/jj-silverwaterproductions/30min

At SilverWater Productions, we specialize in turning your vision into impactful video content. Whether you're looking to market your products, train your staff, or live stream your next big event, we provide high-quality video solutions tailored to your specific needs.

With over 20 years of experience, I’ve seen firsthand how effective video can transform businesses. It’s not just about making something look good; it’s about making sure the content serves a purpose and drives real results. That’s why I founded SilverWater Productions: to help organizations like yours communicate more effectively, tell authentic stories, and achieve your goals through the power of video.
I’ve had the privilege of producing hundreds of videos over the years, working with clients across a variety of industries. 

As an Emmy-winning producer, I bring a unique blend of creativity and technical expertise to every project. My team and I pride ourselves on our ability to craft compelling, engaging videos that resonate with audiences and deliver measurable results. From motion graphics and live streaming to B2B marketing and training videos, we are committed to delivering exceptional content that moves your business forward.

Ready to take your video content to the next level? Book a call today, and let’s discuss how SilverWater Productions can help you achieve your business goals through high-impact video.
 https://calendly.com/jj-silverwaterproductions/30min

Name: Stemo Media Group
Description: Ci occupiamo di produzione e distribuzione cinematografica e per garantirne una migliore ed efficace sostenibilità energetica di recente abbiamo avviato anche l’attività di vendita e distribuzione su territorio nazionale di energia elettrica, mettendo a disposizione dei set l'energia verde certificata con Garanzia d’Origine (GO), proveniente al 100% da fonti rinnovabili.

Name: 440 Estudio
Description:
En 440 Estudio valoramos la tecnología, la creatividad y el trabajo humano que hay detrás de cada proyecto. 
Creemos que la colaboración y el trabajo en equipo es la clave para alcanzar resultados excepcionales.  

Apostamos por un vínculo a largo plazo.

Name: Piuranas Audiovisuales
Description: Es un colectivo conformado por fotógrafas, videógrafas y cineastas piuranas, con la finalidad de compartir la producción artística audiovisual realizado por mujeres de Piura y promover el desarrollo audiovisual en la Región.

Name: VideoFixers
Description: Videofixers ontwikkelt, edit en vermarkt videocontent voor bedrijven en organisaties. Videofixers verplaatst zich in uw bedrijf om videocontent te maken die aansluit op uw huisstijl en wensen. Door gebruik te maken van de nieuwste technieken en trends, bent u bij ons verzekerd van hoogwaardige content.

Name: Film Locations
Description:
An industry-disrupting locations platform. 

Say goodbye to the middleman and say hello to the owners of stunning locations across the UK.

Name: marechiarofilm
Description: La marechiarofilm è una società di produzione cinematografica sensibile alle nuove tecnologie digitali e ai nuovi sistemi di comunicazione. L’obiettivo della società è di produrre film documentari innovativi concepiti sul principio della partecipazione e condivisione, far incontrare e lavorare giovani talenti con artisti di comprovata esperienza.

Name: Produtora Viralata
Description:
Produzimos narrativas que, além de entreter, promovem uma contribuição positiva para o cenário cultural, celebrando a diversidade e fomentando a inclusão. Desde 2010, nossa paixão é contar histórias autênticas que estimulam a reflexão e inspiram mudanças, permanecendo leais aos valores inovadores que impulsionam nossa criatividade.

Em nosso extenso portfólio, destacamos a ficção "Madalena", que estreou no Festival de Rotterdam e ganhou o prêmio de melhor filme no Festival de Istambul; "Avenida Beira-mar", uma coprodução com a TELECINE e Elo Studios que foi premiado como Melhor Direção no Festival Internacional de Guadalajara e no prêmio Felix como Melhor Filme Nacional do Festival do Rio; "Sobre Essa Pele", em coprodução com a Warner Bros Discovery; "Negro Muro" para o canal GNT; e dezenas de outros programas de TV e documentários, como "Blitz, o Filme", "Roda de Choro", "Palace II", "Enjoying Rio", "Cris Pelo Mundo", "B-Side Of The Road", "Vibe de Dois" e "Euclydes". Além das estreias previstas para 2025, como "Reconhecidos", "Diário do Fogo" e "Lélia González: A Voz da Amefricanidade" .

A Produtora Viralata também se destaca como especialista em comunicação corporativa. Com mais de 800 filmes produzidos, ajudamos as maiores empresas do Brasil a contar suas histórias.

Viralata, entretenimento e comunicação.

Name: Frame by Frame
Description:
Frame by Frame was established in Rome in 1990 by a team of only a few young VFX and new technology enthusiasts, led by the revolutionary vision of its founders Davide Luchetti and Lorenzo Foschi.

In the last 30 years the company has evolved to become one of the most recognized and acclaimed visual effects and post-production houses in Italy, increasing its workforce to over 100 highly skilled artists.
Since 1990 Frame by Frame has built a strong local reputation with leading producing companies, creating award winning visual effects and content for Television, Film, Commercials, Corporate, Art and Interactive attractions.
We are always honoured when our work is acknowledged by the industry and in the last years our artists have received several Global Awards for branding, design, vfx and post-production, including Promax Europe and Promax World Awards, Key Award, Media Star, Telly Awards and a David di Donatello “Best VFX Award” in 2019 for “The Invisible Boy”.

Name: UPP a.s.
Description:
Since its establishment in 1994, UPP has become one of the most successful and versatile Visual Effects and Post Production Houses in the Central Europe.

From day one, the company was specifically designed to meet the exacting demands for high-quality Post Production in both feature film and broadcast television. We combine the latest equipment and technology with a skilled team of imaginative and creative artists.

Ideally headquartered in the heart of Europe, UPP offers everything you need to complete your feature, television series, commercial or video in a modern, spacious and convenient location.

Name: ECOPROD
Description:
Ecoprod is the leading initiative on sustainable film production in France, supporting and highlighting films and crews working towards reducing the environmental footprint of the film and TV industry. 
Ecoprod brings together over 370 companies representing all industry stakeholders: production companies, broadcasters and platforms, service providers, unions, film schools and public institutions. 
As an independant platform for cooperation and exchange, the association is pushing the subject of green production on a national and international level.
Ecoprod is also a ressource center providing free tools for the film and TV industry such as Carbon'Clap, a carbon calculator certified by the CNC, green production guides, independant studies etc. It recently launched the Ecoprod Label with the support of ADEME and Afnor Certification. Ecoprod also provides training in green production for film professionals and students in France and abroad.

Name: Ánima Estudios
Description:
Ánima Estudios es el estudio más importante y líder de animación en Latinoamérica  creado en el 2002 por los empresarios Fernando de Fuentes, José C. García de Letona y Federico Unda. Se dedica a la realización de producciones animadas que se distribuyen en todo el mundo.

Entre las producciones más sobresalientes se encuentran "Magos y Gigantes", la cual fue distribuida en gran parte de Latinoamérica, además de la serie "El Chavo animado", producción de Televisa y Roberto Gómez Bolaños basada en la serie mexicana del mismo nombre, esta serie es el show animado más visto en toda Latinoamérica.

La película "Don Gato y su pandilla" se estrenó en México el 16 de septiembre de 2011 y rompió el récord de recaudación de una película mexicana en el primer día y en el primer fin de semana de estreno. En octubre de 2011 se estrenó en cines "La leyenda de la llorona" la cuál tuvo una gran recepción en taquilla quedando en el top 5 del año en México.

A finales del 2012 se estrenó en cines la película "El Santos contra la Tetona Mendoza" que fue la primera película mexicana invitada al festival de Annecy en Francia.

En 2014 Ánima anunció la apertura de oficinas en España llamadas "Ánima Kitchent" enfocadas en crear y comercializar marcas de entretenimiento.

El 30 de octubre de 2014 se estrenó en cines La Leyenda de las momias de Guanajuato y se colocó en los primeros lugares de taquilla por varias semanas. 

El 26 de mayo de 2016 Ánima Estudios y Cartoon Network Latinoamérica lanzaron un concurso para jóvenes talentos productores o realizadores de proyectos de animación cortos y largos, la convocatoria finalizará el 18 de julio del 2016. 


La prestigiosa revista Forbes reconoce a Ánima Estudios como la compañía más importante de animación en América Latina. Revista Forbes

Name: 22DOGS
Description: 22DOGS is a visual effects studio with offices in Milan, Los Angeles, and Santa Cruz de Tenerife. We specialize in creating impactful visual content for film, TV series, and advertising. Combining innovation, talent, and technology, we collaborate with leading productions worldwide and are always looking for new challenges and top industry talent.

Name: Tiger Baby
Description:
Feline, fierce, sassy, and strong. That's Tiger Baby.

Roaring since 2019, Tiger Baby is a Film/Television Studio helmed by filmmakers Zoya Akhtar and Reema Kagti. 

At our den, we tell stories. 

We believe stories are what make us. They have the power to shape our lives and change our narratives. They can invoke inspiration, build bridges, and shift consciousness. We strive to constantly stay alive to what surrounds us and effectively tell the stories that move us. Through the Tiger's lens, we focus on creating content that addresses our social context and transports viewers into another person's reality.

So while you fine tune and fix the antenna, we at Tiger Baby are excited to welcome you into the jungle of cinema and beyond.

Catch Tiger Baby roar on:
Facebook: http://bit.ly/TigerBabyOnFacebook

Instagram: https://bit.ly/TigerBabyOnInstagram

YouTube: https://bit.ly/TigerBabyOnYouTube

Spotify: https://bit.ly/TigerBabyOnSpotify

Connect with Tiger Baby:
tigerbabyfilms@gmail.com

Name: edelkrone
Description:
At edelkrone, we've melded our passion for filmmaking with advanced engineering to create something truly unique. Recognized as an innovation leader, edelkrone is celebrated for its intelligently designed, user-friendly, and customer-oriented filmmaking solutions.

Our team prioritizes superior product design, user-friendliness, exceptional build quality, and affordability. We never settle for the status quo and consistently challenge what is considered “the best.”

Name: Zurich Film Festival
Description:
Once a year, the ZFF brings Hollywood to Zurich. Then, the curtain rises on around 100 curated films, inspiring discoveries as well as World and European premieres. For eleven days, audiences have the unique opportunity to experience today's and tomorrow's big cinema stars up close and personal. A special highlight: with the ZFF taking place in autumn, you can see the films that will win Oscars six months later.

The ZFF is committed to promoting young filmmakers and offers up-and-coming filmmakers the opportunity to network with established stars of the international film industry. Our goal: to bring top-class cinema experiences even closer to the audience, to inspire even more people - and to become the home of talent for the stars of tomorrow's stars.

Name: Folivari
Description: Founded in 2014, Folivari is an award-winning French company specializing in the production of original animated feature films, TV programs and shorts.

Name: AB VFX INC.
Description:
About The Studio
Welcome to AB VFX Inc., a visionary company dedicated to the art of VFX Roto | Paint | Keying | Match-move (Rotomation, Matchmation) for Feature Films, Commercials, and TV Shows. Our headquarters are in the bustling city of Abbotsford, BC, where we have gathered a team of passionate and talented individuals who strive for excellence in every project they undertake.

With a motto to serve the best as an Outsource Service Provider in the field of VFX, our studio has quickly risen to the top of the industry, boasting a team of 150+ VFX artists and creative team members with expertise in different verticals of VFX. 

We understand the importance of security in our line of work, which is why we build our pipeline on the TPN Security.

At AB VFX Studios, we offer competitive services to our clients, making our services accessible to all those who want to bring their creative vision to life.

Our Founders, Abhishek Kumar (Business Head), Kaustubh Athavale (CTO),Kumar Gaurav (Business Development), Chaitanya Chandratre (Business Development and production) had a clear and simple aspiration when establishing AB VFX Inc.: to be the most innovative, creative, and trusted brand in our field. 

We are passionate about delivering the highest quality work, and our international scale of operation makes us a unique player in the industry. Our artists help to shape some of the most exciting imagery on our screens, from designing simple characters to creating sports stadiums filled with thousands of VFX 'fans'. Our supervisors, producers, and artists support all stages of production, from pre-visualization and conceptual artwork to shoot supervision, 3D & 2D through to delivery of the finished project.

Choose AB VFX Inc. for your next project and let us help bring your creative vision to life with our unparalleled talent, passion for quality, and innovative solutions.

Name: Tau Films
Description: Co-founded by John Hughes, Mandeep Singh, and Walt Jones in 2014, Tau Films is a global creative content and visual effects group. Our creative solutions encompass an ever-changing landscape of story, media, and content. We service a variety of clients in the global marketplace including high-end feature films, themed entertainment, VR, commercials, and television.

Name: CPH:DOX
Description:
CPH:DOX, Copenhagen International Documentary Film Festival, is one of the biggest documentary film festivals in the world. 

Each year, the festival fills presents an abundance of the world's best new documentaries from around the world, in addition to presenting a wide variety of events, exhibitions, art installations, concerts, five whole days of professional seminars, a screening market, and the international financing and co-production event CPH:FORUM, as well as the film production and talent development programme CPH:LAB.

Name: German Producers Alliance – Film & Television
Description: Die Allianz Deutscher Produzenten – Film & Fernsehen e.V. ist mit 370 Mitgliedsunternehmen aus den Bereichen Animation, Entertainment, Dokumentation, Fernsehen, Kino und Werbung die maßgebliche Produzentenvertretung in Deutschland.

Name: SAUVAGE.TV
Description: Creativity, storytelling and a passion for graphic culture are the driving forces that make us different, that make us wild. We are a multi-award-winning creative production house based in Barcelona. We differ from most production companies in having our own in-house post-production studio, with animation as our distinctive touch. This allows us to control the entire process without limiting our creativity. Only this way can we ensure that the final result will be exactly as we imagined. Despite being a young company, we have a wide international scope that has led us to work for clients such as Nike, Coca-Cola, Adidas, Riot Games, Gatorade or Columbia Records. Together we have created real audiovisual cult works. Although it’s not our main goal, many Sauvage TV films go crazy viral, adding up to billions of plays. Just a coincidence? We don't think so. This is the result of the passion we invest in each project and the creative ideas that emerge from each one of them. We love all kinds of VFX techniques, because Sauvage is the merge of different talents united under the same vision and sharing the same goal: to reach further, be more striking and go over the top. Crazy, you think? Impossible, you said? FINE. Looks like a job for SAUVAGE.TV !

Name: Semaine de la Critique - Cannes
Description:
Section parallèle du Festival de Cannes, la Semaine de la Critique se consacre, depuis ses débuts, à la découverte des jeunes talents. Dès sa création par le Syndicat Français de la Critique de Cinéma en 1962, elle s’est fixée pour mission de mettre à l’honneur les premières et deuxièmes œuvres des cinéastes du monde entier. Bernardo Bertolucci, Jean Eustache, Otar Iosseliani, Ken Loach, Wong Kar Wai, Jacques Audiard, Arnaud Desplechin, Bertrand Bonello, Rebecca Zlotowski, Quentin Dupieux, Jeff Nichols ou encore Valérie Donzelli, ont fait leurs débuts à la Semaine de la Critique.

Dans son travail de recherche de nouveaux auteurs, la Semaine a toujours été très attentive aux courts et moyens métrages, premières étapes de la carrière d’un cinéaste. C’est en présentant leurs courts métrages, que la Semaine de la Critique a révélé François Ozon, Gaspar Noé ou Andrea Arnold.

Chaque édition donne à la Semaine de la Critique une opportunité de faire découvrir une vingtaine de réalisateurs.  
10 longs métrages sont sélectionnés (dont 7 présentés en compétition). 
2 prix sont également remis aux 10 courts et moyens métrages en compétition.

Name: Austin Film Society
Description:
Founded in 1985 by filmmaker Richard Linklater, AFS creates life-changing opportunities for filmmakers, catalyzes Austin and Texas as a creative hub, and brings the community together around great film. AFS supports filmmakers towards career leaps, encouraging exceptional artistic projects with grants and support services. AFS operates Austin Studios, a 20-acre production facility, to attract and grow the creative media ecosystem. Austin Public, a space for our city’s diverse mediamakers to train and collaborate, provides many points of access to filmmaking and film careers. The AFS Cinema is an ambitiously programmed repertory and first-run arthouse with broad community engagement. By hosting premieres, local and international industry events, and the Texas Film Awards, AFS shines the national spotlight on Texas filmmakers while connecting Austin and Texas to the wider film community. AFS is a registered 501(c)(3) non-profit organization.

To learn more about Austin Film Society visit: www.austinfilm.org and follow @AustinFilm on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram.

Name: Dada ! Animation
Description:
Powered by real-time, AI and virtual reality technologies, Dada! Animation widens the scope of animation to bring to life limitless narrative and visual imaginary universes to all its partners

The multi-format production studio based in Paris delivers the full spectrum of creativity from pre- to post-production with services covering content and editorial design development, immersion and interactivity, creative and technological consulting, and the production of original works and 3D animation projects.

Name: Umedia
Description: Umedia is one of Europe’s leading production groups, combining the activities of production, financing and visual effects. Since its inception in 2004, Umedia has invested more than $500 million via its tax shelter, equity and development funds, and has been involved in 435 films including GRACE OF MONACO, JOHN WICK, YVES SAINT LAURENT and multi-Academy Award-winning THE ARTIST.

Name: CZAR - Amsterdam
Description: Founded in 1990, CZAR – Amsterdam is an award-winning production house and photography agency. We create content ranging from commercials, images, music videos, fashion films, short documentaries or any other form of media that demands high-quality production.

Name: DOC SOCIETY
Description: Doc Society is an innovative non-profit working with the boldest, with the most inspiring filmmakers all over the world. Beyond the right to self-expression we are focused on the right of all citizens to access media in the public interest - and building the global ecosystem that makes that possible.

Name: ZERO VFX
Description:
ZERO VFX creates visual effects for feature films and commercials. 

Follow: @Zerovfx on Instagram, Facebook & Vimeo for more updates: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ZEROVisualEffects
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/zero_vfx
Vimeo: https://vimeo.com/zerovfx

Name: Artology
Description:
We’re energetic with a deep-rooted passion for the art of story-telling through film, animation & photography.
Our professional content creation and production services reflect a vibrancy that can only be found in people who LOVE what they do!
We see the detail, we sweat the small stuff.
We believe in telling beautiful emotive stories, but above all, we believe in craft.
We make a difference by BEING different. We don’t just implement and execute storyboards – we challenge briefs and like to guide our clients toward producing amazing content that makes an impact.
With our team's natural creativity and skill, we can produce fantastic solutions from inception to delivery.

Name: Fractal Picture
Description:
Fractals are boundless. An incredible feat of nature that is at once simple, complex, infinite, repetitive yet unique. A mathematical and aesthetical marvel it represents a beautiful union of the sciences and arts. A fitting muse to our endeavors at Fractal Picture. 

Fractal Picture is where industry veterans come together to create cutting-edge visuals. Carving out creatures from thin air and transporting the viewer beyond the realms of ordinary imagination, we see ourselves as the perfect partners for bold storytellers.
Our collective experience spans multiple decades of expertise in delivering high-end visual effects and animation content for international and local markets. We are a one-stop solution to the emerging demands of creativity and innovation in VFX, Animation, Special Venue Media, and Commercials.

Our mission is to assist storytellers and businesses in delivering memorable, emotive, and unique experiences while providing artists and technicians a platform to push the boundaries of creativity and innovation.

Name: SWISS FILMS
Description:
The promotion agency SWISS FILMS with offices in Zurich and Geneva is dedicated to promoting Swiss cinema abroad and supports Swiss films and talents at festivals and markets around the world.

SWISS FILMS is partner to Swiss producers and filmmakers to develop international strategies and to establish contacts with festival delegates, sales agents and distributors. We advise buyers and festival delegates on Swiss release support schemes. With a database of almost 6,000 films, the agency also provides an essential source of information for international film professionals and trade publications. SWISS FILMS is funded by the Swiss Federal Office of Culture.

SWISS FILMS is one of the ten founding members of European Film Promotion (EFP), the network of European film promotion agencies, and a patron of the European Film Academy.

Please find the latest news here: www.swissfilms.ch/de/news

Name: Fresco Film Services, A Company of the Mediapro Studio
Description:
Fresco Film Services offers service to international productions in Spain, Canary Islands, and is recognized for its work on the last four seasons of Game of Thrones, where spectacular, internationally recognized award-winning locations were achieved. The philosophy of Fresco Film is focused on the personal and exceptional attention to detail on productions, as well as an environmental commitment during filming.  Fresco Film some project shooting in Spain:House of the Dragrons S1-S2, Game of Thrones" (Seasons 5,6,7,8)Spiderman Far from home, Terminator Dark Fate, West World S3, Killing EveS3, Narcos Mexico, Warrior Nun, Little Birds, Snatch S2...

Production Film Services all over Spain and Canary Islands for all media production (features, commercials, stills).
Coproduction Partner for feature film projects in Spain.

Name: Open Slate
Description:
Open Slate offering state-of-the-art visual effects services for Films, TV and OTT :

Concept Art/Illustrations
Digital Matte Painting
CG environments
Compositing
Asset design
Layout/Match Move
FX
Roto/paint

Name: Sacrebleu Productions
Description:
Créée en 1999 par Ron Dyens, Sacrebleu Productions a commencé à produire des courts métrages en 2001. Depuis, plus de 90 films ont été produits et sélectionnés dans près de 2000 festivals en France et à l’étranger, tels que Cannes, Venise, Berlin, Sundance, Clermont-Ferrand, mais aussi Stuttgart, Brest, Hiroshima… 

Sacrebleu, c’est un juron positif. Quand on dit «Sacrebleu», on peut être bloqué devant quelque chose, mais on finit toujours par le dépasser. Dans «Sacrebleu» il y a l’idée de problème mais il y a surtout celle de défi.  

Sacrebleu développe de nombreux projets de courts-métrages, longs-métrages et séries d'animation ainsi que de réalité virtuelle et de prise de vues réelles. 

Suivez-nous sur tous nos réseaux sociaux ci-dessous :

https://www.instagram.com/sacrebleu.productions/
https://www.facebook.com/sacrebleuprod/

Name: Dream Warrior Pictures
Description: Film Production and Distribution Company, based at Chennai, India. Producers of #O2 #OkeOkaJeevitham #Sulthan #Raatchasi #NGK #Aruvi #Theeran #Kaashmora #Joker #Saguni.

Name: Elamedia Estudios
Description:
ELAMEDIA STUDIOS (ES) is a media factory that brings together all services required to turn compelling stories into successful media products for a wide array of audiences at the international and national levels. We are a dynamic, talented, and customer-oriented, sustainable company that covers the whole movie production cycle, from pre-production, shooting,  post-production and distribution. With over 25,000 sq. meters of studio space in Spain, a large team of qualified professionals in all areas of film production, and a growing international presence, ES is uniquely positioned to produce high-quality products. 

We are working with the main Spanish production companies and broadcasters, as well as international VOD streaming platforms like Netflix, HBO, Amazon, Movistar+, Atresmedia, Mediaset, TVE. Our Madrid installation has just been certified as the first Dolby Vision studio in Spain and VFX Netflix Partner Flagship.

Name: Blockhead Studios
Description:
Boutique Visual Effects Studios in Sydney specialising in Film, Advertising and Augmented Reality. Blockhead crafts amazing imagery for clients based all over the globe. Check out our website www.blockheadvfx.com
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Name: Keslow Camera, Inc.
Description:
Robert Keslow founded Keslow Camera in 1990 after spending several years in the film industry as camera assistant and support staff in rental houses. Concerned with service available at the time, he dedicated his company to delivering cutting edge equipment and top level service. With locations in Los Angeles, Vancouver, Calgary, Salt Lake City, Albuquerque, New Orleans, Chicago, Atlanta, Sudbury, and Toronto. Keslow Camera has helped clients achieve their vision in Emmy-award winning network television shows, to Academy Award-winning feature films, and nationally broadcast television commercials to award winning music videos.

[For job opportunities, please visit Indeed.com. For other inquiries, please contact us at info@keslowcamera.com]

Name: Trisna Films
Description:
Set up almost a decade back, in 2009 - Trisna Films to create new benchmarks with each passing year increasing its global reach to all the sub-continents of the world.

At Trisna, we are constantly looking to attract many more prominent film-makers from across the world to explore the new era of Indian cinema and to identify and promote new talents from not only our country but from across our shores too.

The range of activities and services offered by Trisna Films for all of the Pre Production, Production & Post Production requirements span from conducting thorough research, conception & development of scripts and storyboards, designing production, budgeting, scheduling, auditioning, casting, scouting locations besides both real time on site as well as virtual camera shoots, organization of the production team and the crew involved both for feature/documentary films, TV serials as well as other customized video shoots.

Based out of New Delhi/NCR, we are well equipped to organize and conduct film & video shooting anywhere in India or across the world.

Name: Lyca Productions
Description: Lyca Productions is an Indian entertainment company, which was established by Subaskaran Allirajah in 2014. A subgroup of Lycamobile, the production studio has been involved in the production and distribution of films made in South India. The Vision of Lyca is to create, promote and release content across varying genres.

Name: Chicago International Film Festival
Description:
Cinema/Chicago, the presenting organization of the Chicago International Film Festival, is a year-round cultural and educational non-profit organization dedicated to fostering better communication between people of diverse cultures through the art of film and the moving image. 

We serve Chicago’s diverse and under-served citizenry by providing access to world-class cinema. We aim to enrich Chicago’s cultural environment by presenting film in contexts that encourage discussion and debate.

Name: Mark Roberts Motion Control
Description:
We are the leading designers and manufacturers of quality motion control products for film and TV. Description: Established in 1972 to address the under representation and misrepresentation of women in the media industry, Women Make Movies is a multicultural, multiracial, non-profit media arts organization which facilitates the production, promotion, distribution and exhibition of independent films and videotapes by and about women. Supporting feature films, high end drama, commercials, live music, and all genres of television production.

Headquartered in West London, Procam Take 2’s reach includes rental locations in Manchester, Leeds, Edinburgh and Glasgow, and serves the US market through its New York office. We employ over 150 of the country’s most talented crew and technicians to provide our clients with the utmost quality of service for their production.

Procam Take 2’s commitment to the industry is not only to set the benchmark for exceptional service and support, but also to play an active role in promoting diversity, equality, and opportunity within the film and television sectors.

Real by Fake is an award-winning Fully Integrated Visual Production Services for Feature Films, Television, Commercials, and Music Videos, specializing in VFX.

We embody a culture of Rebels that encourage freedom with a focus on professional and personal growth.

A technology RBF brought into the Film and Motion Picture Industry for the first time, in 2016, with the award-winning HBO series, Big Little Lies. 

Properly integrated, from concept to finished product, regardless of the medium, RBF believes that Realistic VFX can maximize the creative impact and the emotions generated by the infinite visual possibilities. 

Since 1997, RBF's work includes many blockbusters: Bone Collector, Scott Pilgrim vs. the World, 300, Wild, Dallas Buyers Club, Immortals, C.R.A.Z.Y., The Aviator, among others. 

Most recently, we co-produced and supervised the complete Post-Production and VFX of HBO series: Big Little Lies and Sharp Objects, directed by Jean-Marc Vallée, as well as Apple TV+'s: The Morning Show.

We pride ourselves on guiding your project through to the finish line.

Name: Film i Väst
Description: Film i Väst is Scandinavia’s leading film fund and has co-produced more than 1 300 films and drama series since 1992. Thanks to great co-operation with Swedish and international producers over 100 films have been screened in Cannes, Berlin, Venice, Toronto. Our co-productions have received seventeen Oscar nominations since 2011 and twelve Palme d’Or nominations including Ruben Östlund’s winners The Square and Triangle of Sadness. Thomas Vinterberg won an Oscar in 2021 for Another Round, and Joachim Trier’s The Worst Person in the World was double nominated for Oscars in 2022. In 2023 Ruben Östlund’s Triangle of Sadness was triple nominated for an Oscar and Oliver Hermanus Living double nominated. Film i Väst is a part of Region Västra Götaland.

Name: Atípica Films
Description:
ATÍPICA FILMS is an award-winning, independent, audiovisual production company.  Our activity, since 1998 is centered in the production of films and TV shows of the highest quality that appeal to global audiences.
Recognized as one of the most relevant production houses in Spain, our team accumulates 150 national awards and 72 international prizes including 26 Goya Awards in all areas of production.  We have been present in most “A” List Film Festivals around the world and have attained international distribution of all our titles.

Name: CGEVVFX
Description:
Depuis 10 ans, la Compagnie Générale des Effets Visuels réalise des VFX dédiés au monde du cinéma, de la télévision et du streaming avec un souci constant d’exigence et de qualité.
Située au cœur du 10ème arrondissement, à deux pas de la place de la République, la CGEV prend en charge des projets de toutes tailles et de toutes natures, du simple générique de fin, jusqu'aux effets visuels complexes et nombreux d'un long métrage.

Elle est l'une des principales vitrines des VFX en France et c'est grâce à son directeur Alain Carsoux, qu'elle a su s’ouvrir au marché international à travers de grandes plateformes de streaming comme Amazon Prime Vidéo, Netflix ou Disney.

Forte d’une centaine de collaborateurs.trices essentiellement à Paris, mais également aux quatre coins de la France, la CGEV privilégie la qualité de ses réalisations artistiques, ainsi que le partage des connaissances à travers l’évolution interne de ses équipes.

Aujourd’hui, après avoir participé à la réalisation de plus de 700 films, la CGEV continue de mettre son expertise et sa créativité aux services des réalisateurs.trices et de leur équipe de post-production tout en faisant rayonner son savoir-faire français à l’internationale.

Name: Inventa un Film - Lenola Film Festival
Description:
Festival internazionale di cinema che si svolge a Lenola (LT) Italia, ideato e diretto da Ermete Labbadia. 
Dalla prima edizione del 1998, che ha visto la partecipazione di sei filmati locali, si è passati ad oltre 3000 lavori dell’ultima edizione, provenienti da 105 nazioni diverse, tra cui Kyrgyzstan, Iraq, Burundi, Isole Samoa,  Libano, Iran, Congo, Burkina Faso. Il festival prevede le sezioni cortometraggi Autori Italiani, esteri (Lenolafilmfestival), Animazione (internazionale) Scuole, Videoclip, Minidoc, Anteprima, Premio Migrantes, Sezione a tema, Voci dal Territorio, mediometraggi, lungometraggi (rivolta quest'ultima ad opere non adeguatamente distribuite ) . Numerosi gli eventi collaterali tra cui il concorso Letterario Tre Colori (Poesia, Narrativa e sceneggiatura), il concorso Fotocanzone, La giornata delll'Attore e la Giornata del Libro.  
 Per qualità e quantità di film pervenuti è uno dei festival cinematografici più importanti d’Italia.
Notizie aggiornate sulla manifestazione si possono trovare oltre che sul sito inventaunfilm.it, sulla pagina e su gruppo Facebook di Inventa un Film.
Una caratteristica  rilevante del festival di Lenola è stata sempre quella di lanciare e valorizzare autori, che dopo un arco di tempo hanno ottenuto un grande successo nelle sale cinematografiche o si sono imposti in premi e festival importanti (Oscar, Cannes, Venezia, David, Nastri…) e parallelamente  vedere la partecipazione di autori, che hanno deciso di spedire le loro opere al concorso “Inventa un Film” dopo essersi affermati già nei festival e nei premi più importanti del mondo.  Numerosi sono i registi che hanno partecipato in competizione ad Inventa un Film e che poi si sono affermati in campo nazionale e internazionale. Tra questi Matteo Rovere, Sydney Sibilia, Susanna Nicchiarelli, Gabriele Mainetti, Claudio Noce, Edoardo De Angelis, Alessandro Celli, Simone Massi,  Francesco Amato, Simone Isola, Piero Messina, Edoardo Leo, Laura Bispuri, Max Croci

Name: OTO Film
Description:
OTO Film is one of the most established film production companies in Poland. Throughout our 31 year journey, we have produced more than 2,000 ad campaigns, a dozen documentaries, and several feature films. We focus on commercials, feature films, and online content. Our bedrock and biggest strength is our amazing team of producers and production managers, some of whom have been with OTO since its inception. In addition to experience, we also try to bring a fresh perspective to what we do by hiring passionate young guns that bring a creative enthusiasm to new formats and unconventional projects. 

Though our work speaks for itself, but we are happy whenever we are recognized for our standards at many ad festivals around the world, including the prestigious Production Company of the Year at the KTR Festival.

Over the past two decades we have successfully worked with Coca Cola, Unilever, Reckit Benckiser, IKEA, Toyota, Mitsubishi, and many others, while creating solid working relationships with large agencies (Havas, McCann, Publicis, JWT, Ogilvy) as well as successful local creative firms (GPD, Hand Made, K2, 180 Heartbeats).

What makes OTO Film stand out is our proven track record on the international market. Though we have extensive experience shooting all over the world, we often put that knowledge to use in Poland on service jobs for production companies based in Germany, USA, UK, China, Sweden, Greece, Turkey, among others.

Vimeo: https://vimeo.com/otofilm

Description: Created in 1981, the International Festival of Films on Art (FIFA) is recognized as the most important festival of films on art in the world. It allows the public to discover, thanks to an eclectic international program, the latest documentaries on art, in addition to a selection of interactive and virtual reality works.

Name: Les Films du Poisson
Description:
Les Films du Poisson is a French film production and distribution company founded in 1994 by Yaël Fogiel and Laetitia Gonzalez. In 2006, Estelle Fialon become Head of Documentary and short films.

The company has produced more than hundred films: features, documentaries and shorts. The films produced by Les Films du Poisson have received many awards: César awards, Caméra d'Or and Best Director Award in Cannes Festival, Oscar nomination for the Academy Awards...

In 1996 Les Films du Poisson is the award winner of the Best Young Producer Grant of the Hachette Foundation.

In 2008, the company won the IFCIC Prize of Best French producer given by the prestigious financial institut IFCIC.

In 2011, Yaël Fogiel and Laetitia Gonzalez are named Best French Producer by the French Académie des arts et techniques du cinéma.

Name: CinéFabrique
Description:
To ensure diversity, we accept 35 students per year – half female, half male – into 5 tracks: screenwriting, production, photography, audio, and editing.

CinéFabrique offers an innovative, experimental programme in which students acquire technical, hands-on knowledge that will help them find a job after graduation. We are also the only school to offer sandwich courses for film careers.

The curriculum culminates in a diploma from CinéFabrique as well as a French diplôme d’état, specifically a licence professionnelle in Video and Audio Techniques granted as part of an agreement between CinéFabrique and Université Lumière Lyon 2.

CinéFabrique believes in collaboration and hands-on experience. Applied techniques are taught by leading national and international film industry professionals, while theory is taught by researchers from Lyon 2.

The school employs an open, non-discriminatory selection process to ensure a highly diverse student body.

The president of CinéFabrique is Philippe Vayssettes.
The honorary president is filmmaker Abderrahmane Sissako.
The school director is filmmaker Claude Mouriéras.

Name: Oklahoma Film and Music Office
Description: The Oklahoma Film + Music Office (OF+MO) strives to support and connect local, national and international filmmakers with Oklahoma's skilled crew, talent, production services and diverse locations which span across 12 eco-regions. OF+MO also promotes and showcases Oklahoma's rich musical heritage and connects emerging artists of all genres to music venues and businesses across the state. Our purpose is to grow the film and music industries statewide.

Name: Geneva International Film Festival - GIFF
Description:
30th GENEVA INT FILM FESTIVAL 1-10.11.2024
12th GENEVA DIGITAL MARKET 4-7.11.2024

Créé en 1995, le Geneva International Film Festival (GIFF) explore les liens entre le cinéma, la télévision et les nouvelles formes de création digitale. 

Son programme repose sur une idée simple: rappeler que les auteurs sont au cœur de la création audiovisuelle et que nos écrans se nourrissent de leur façon de regarder le monde.

Carrefour des genres et des disciplines, le GIFF se veut aussi bien un lieu de fêtes que d’expérimentations. 

Ses cinq sections compétitives mettent l’accent sur la découverte de nouveaux talents alors que ses programmes hors compétition (Nuits blanches, Rétrospective, Grandes Premières, etc.) célèbrent en images - et en musique - la diversité et la richesse des arts audiovisuels.

Un volet professionnel, le GDM, est également consacré aux nouvelles pratiques numériques.

______________________________________________________________________________________

Geneva International Film Festival (GIFF) has been exploring the relationship between cinema, television, and new forms of digital creation since 1995, with a programme based on one simple idea: Authors are at the heart of audio-visual creation and their viewpoints are expressed through our screens.

As a place where all genres and disciplines meet, the GIFF fosters an attitude of cele-bration and experimentation. Five competitive sections enforce the discovery of new talents, while the out-of-competition programme (Nuits blanches, Retrospective, Grandes Premières, etc.) celebrates - in picture and music - the diversity and wealth of audio-visual arts.

Finally, the programme for professionals, GDM, is dedicated to new digital trends.

Name: Film Fest Gent - 8 > 19 oktober 2025
Description:
Started out as a student festival in 1974, Film Fest Gent has developed into one of Europe’s foremost competitive film events. Every year in October it presents some of 100 feature films and 30 shorts from all over the world in various sections to an audience of over 125,000 spectators.

With music scores largely accounting for a film’s ability to arouse the senses, the festival has focused its official competition ever since 1985 on ‘The Impact of Music on Film’. The festival also shows films in a wide variety of fascinating categories, such as ‘Out of the Box’, ‘Eye Tunes’, ‘Global Cinema’, ‘Belgian Cinema Today’ and many more. 

Film Fest Gent created in 2001 the World Soundtrack Academy, an unbiased and non-profit structure to promote film music worldwide by organizing concerts and seminars and recording CD’s. The World Soundtrack Awards are presented annually to celebrate outstanding achievements in scoring music for motion pictures.

As The Hollywood Reporter states: “Film Fest Gent is one of the most intriguing stops on the international fest circuit.” We couldn’t agree more.

Interested in supporting this unique cultural event? We're always looking for innovative business partners and smart sponsoring concepts. You can help the festival to maintain its artistic independence and enhance its creativity. Check out our B2B services!

Name: Doclisboa - International Film Festival
Description:
One of the main film festivals in Portugal, Doclisboa happens every year towards the end of October. Organised by Apordoc (an association that promotes documentary in particular and cinema in general), it presents a selection of the best latest documentaries, in an ambitious program bringing together important retrospectives and acclaimed filmmakers.

In 2019, Doclisboa released Nebulae, the space for networking at the festival. It is a group of activities, gatherings, opportunities and people for the advancement of the creation, production and dissemination of independent film.

IN OCTOBER, THE WHOLE WORLD FITS IN LISBON.

17 >>> 27 OCTOBER 2024

______

Um dos principais festivais de cinema de Portugal, o Doclisboa acontece todos os anos no final de outubro. Organizado pela Apordoc (associação que promove o documentário em particular e o cinema em geral), apresenta uma seleção dos melhores documentários mais recentes, num ambicioso programa que reúne importantes retrospectivas e cineastas consagrados.

Em 2019, o Doclisboa lançou o Nebulae, o espaço de networking do festival. É um conjunto de actividades, encontros, oportunidades e pessoas para o avanço da criação, produção e divulgação do cinema independente.

EM OUTUBRO, O MUNDO INTEIRO CABE EM LISBOA.

17 >>> 27 DE OUTUBRO DE 2023

Name: Grafo Audiovisual
Description:
A Grafo Audiovisual é uma produtora cinematográfica que acredita no poder transformador do cinema.

Nascemos em 2007, com a missão de promover a cultura e impactar a sociedade por meio de histórias que inspiram, emocionam e provocam reflexões. Atuamos na criação e produção audiovisual, buscando não apenas entreter, mas também conectar pessoas e ideias. 

Nosso portfólio inclui obras de destaque como "Deserto Particular", escolhido como representante do Brasil no Oscar de 2022, e "Ferrugem", vencedor do Festival de Gramado em 2018. Ao todo, as produções audiovisuais realizadas chegaram aos 5 continentes. Foram cerca de 400 festivais, 200 prêmios e vendas para mais de 70 países da América Latina.

Somos reconhecidos como uma das principais produtoras de cinema no Brasil. Entre nossos projetos de destaque está o Olhar de Cinema, Festival Internacional de Curitiba, um dos maiores festivais do gênero no país e na América Latina, que desde 2012 vem reunindo cineastas, críticos e espectadores apaixonados pelo cinema independente.

Também organizamos o Cinenaguá, um festival focado nos clássicos do cinema, que ocorre na região litorânea do Paraná, iniciado em 2023. Projetos como estes são de suma importância no âmbito cultural e fomentam discussões relevantes sobre o cenário audiovisual, com a realização de oficinas, seminários e atividades de formação.

Name: 64A Films
Description:
64A FILMS

Somos una premiada productora Colombiana de cine, series de TV y branded content enfocada en el desarrollo y producción de contenido innovador y la prestación de servicios de producción internacional. Nuestro brazo de desarrollo es Room65A, cuarto de escritores que tenemos en alianza con 5 escritores.

Description:
We are producers. Producers of emotions. Producers of moments. We are a group of professionals who do not let your great ideas remain on paper as we strive to visualize and listen to what's in your imagination. 

We are the core and essential ingredient when it comes to bringing together and connecting teams who can give color, wonder, life and feeling to your ideas. 

We do all of this because we believe in your art and the medium we use together to communicate with others. We believe that you're the same as us, dreamers who never want to stop dreaming for something more. This is why we're here, to take a journey with you that leads to the next achievement, and one following behind it. This is who we are at Levector.

Name: MacGillivray Freeman Films
Description: MacGillivray Freeman Films is the world's leading documentary storyteller, from iPhone to IMAX. With 50+ years in the filmmaking business, we produce and distribute everything from IMAX and giant screen films, to television and multimedia content for audiences worldwide, working with large and small companies, museums and tourism boards, non-profits and NGOs, and foundations and associations. We are the first-ever documentary producer to reach $1 billion U.S. dollars at the box office and were nominated for 2 Academy Award nominations for our film Dolphins and The Living Sea. We harness the power of great storytelling and powerful imagery to create innovative, engaging media for all audiences, on all platforms. We are committed to lifelong learning and work with top celebrity talent to ensure only the highest quality content gets released.

Name: Fabrique Fantastique
Description:
In 2014, animator and director Tom Van Gestel founded the animation studio and production house Fabrique Fantastique (FF) in Geel, Belgium. 
Today the company is located in an old factory building in Lier and has over 50 employees. Tom Van Gestel manages a team of 2D and 3D artists, draftsmen, graphic designers, screenwriters, up- and-coming directors. It’s a close-knit team where employees are given the opportunity to learn from each other, and thus become proficient across multiple disciplines. The versatility of the group ensures that the projects, with the exception of sound finishing, can be fully realised within FF. 
From the off, FF has, as an animation studio realised a number of diverse projects: a BOIC publicity spot for the Olympic Games, concert visuals for Ellie Goulding and George Ezra, backgrounds for a theatre production, the short film The Girl by Hans Op de Beeck and the 3D animation and effects for the feature film Urbanus: De Vuilnisheld. 
Over the past two years, FF has co- produced the Dutch, award-winning mid-length feature Mind My Mind with Cinété and the feature film HEINZ with Bosbros, for which the team drew all the backgrounds. 
Currently, FF is working on the series BIM and Interstellar Ella at the moment.

Name: Space Dream Productions
Description:
The most major perceived difference between "Hollywood" projects and "Indie" projects is the level of knowledge, experience, professionalism, and an understanding that the world of film is as much a business as it is an art. 

Yet Indie projects can be (and often are) as professional as Hollywood ones given knowledge, experience, and professionalism. Really.

Space Dream Productions is run as a business with staff, contractors, collaborators, and an internship program managed by executives with over 50 years combined experience in the film industry who actually understand (and have done) every single one of the various parts of producing a film.   

Space Dream Productions handles everything from the development of well-crafted stories through well-crafted productions, managing all of the elements of production at well-organized and well-executed levels from preproduction planning through post production into festivals and distribution.

Our values include maintaining high-quality work and work ethic while continuing to innovate storytelling. We know all storytellers are ambassadors of humanity, tasked with sharing our voices. Filmmakers have the added responsibility of creating visual worlds around these stories. For this reason we focus on films that we feel will not only entertain, but aim to showcase pieces of humanity.

Since Sept 2016, over 50 projects have moved (or are moving) through our company. Over 25 completed projects have received over 140 award nominations and special mentions, and 51 awards including "Best Animation," "Best Drama: Short", "Best Short", and multiple "Best Director" (awarded to both Koura Linda and Spaceship for 5 different films) and "Best Picture" awards.

We work collaboratively in Indie film to amplify stories that may not always be front and center in large studio projects, highlighting otherwise unknown or relatively unknown exceptional artists from all walks of life.

Name: Lamantino Brothers
Description:
Lamantino Brothers è un laboratorio di arti visive e cinematografiche specializzato nella produzione di documentari storici, scientifici e naturalistici per il mercato televisivo nazionale ed internazionale.

Fondata nel 2000 dal regista e produttore Umberto Croci, ha costruito una solida rete di rapporti con i maggiori broadcaster italiani e con le migliori emittenti internazionali.

Lamantino Brothers elabora strategie di produzione innovative per tenere il passo con le sfide sempre più impegnative del mercato internazionale. Nel corso degli anni Lamantino Brothers è riuscita a raggiungere standard qualitativi elevati, grazie ad un coinvolgimento di figure professionali di grande competenza e creatività, una lunga esperienza nel campo e l’esplorazione di nuove tecnologie, come la computergrafica e l’Alta Definizione.

Name: Malta Film Commission
Description:
The Malta Film Commission is a Government entity responsible for assisting the production of films and projects in Malta, which consists of an advisory board pertaining to the promotion, development and support of the audiovisual and film servicing industry. With an experienced background of 90 years, the Malta Film Commission has supported large-scale productions such as By the Sea (2014), Captain Phillips (2013), World War Z (2013), The Da Vinci Code (2006) and Gladiator (2000). Unique, adaptable landscape and architecture makes Malta an ideal location for productions looking to double as other countries such as Italy, Afghanistan, Morocco, Israel and many more. Productions that choose Malta as its filming destination can receive financial incentives of up to 40% cash rebate.

Malta’s Film Studios boasts unique water tank facilities which are amongst the largest in the world, and one of the very few to operate with a natural sea horizon as a backdrop. In its 50+ years of operation they have been used for a variety of production purposes including water SFX, scale-model making, boat building and general set construction, serving over 200 productions from feature films to music videos and photo-shoots. For more information about filming in Malta, please visit our website at www.maltafilmcommission.com.

Name: BAFTA North America
Description:
BAFTA North America is a 501c3 nonprofit organization, comprised of members from all disciplines of the Film, Games and TV industries.

BAFTA supports, develops and promotes the art forms of the moving image by identifying and rewarding excellence, inspiring practitioners, and benefiting the public. In addition to its Awards ceremonies, BAFTA has a year-round program of learning events and initiatives – featuring workshops, masterclasses, scholarships, lectures and mentoring schemes – in the UK, USA, and Asia; it offers unique access to the world’s most inspiring talent and connects with a global audience of all ages and backgrounds. 

BAFTA North America serves as a bridge between the Hollywood and British production and entertainment business communities. Its commitment to professional and community education is at the heart of all activity, including an inner-city outreach programme, screenings, seminars, Behind Closed Doors series, Q&As, scholarships for British students studying in the US, and a Heritage Archive project, which preserves in-depth interviews with the industry's leading talents for future generations. BAFTA North America celebrates and promotes excellence through its annual Britannia Awards, Awards Season Film and Television Tea Parties and the Student Film Awards.

Name: Film Produkcja
Description:
Film Produkcja Sp. z o.o. is one of the largest and most experienced production houses in the Polish market, with numerous international collaborations. The company was founded in 1985 under the name of ITI Film Studio, and since then has produced over 3000 video films for Polish and international clients and brands.

In 2002, Stanisław Dziedzic took the leadership of the company and within just a year gathered a new and dynamic production team. In January 2007, in consultation with the Supervisory Board and ITI Group Management Board, we spun off from the Holding and started our independent activity.

We simply enjoy making good movies: commercials, films, video content for digital use and social campaigns. We have a dedicated, experienced team of professionals and a wide network of collaborators, that allows us to take on even the most ambitious projects. We are also committed to excellent customer service and real understanding of our clients' needs.

Name: Autentická média s.r.o.
Description:
Jsme studio zaměřené na video produkci! Nebojíme se klientů s fantazií, které baví odvázanost a vtip, jedinečná práce s kamerou a různé vychytávky. Rádi pro vás zpracujeme následující formáty: 

-reklama
-rozhovor nebo podcast
-konference nebo festival
-live stream
-průmyslové video
...nebo si řekněte o video na míru! 

Baví nás opravdu široké spektrum tvorby, ale uvítáme, když se zákazník nebojí jít cestou inspirativního, neotřelého snímku. Takové video vám totiž umožní prodat produkt, představit ideu i pobavit diváky.

Zábavná média v roce 2018 založil Lubomír Novohradský, kterého k točení videí inspiroval pobyt v Indii a touha uchovat si vzpomínky i jinak než v paměti. Nyní má kolem sebe tým, se kterým jej pojí stejný cíl: zaznamenávat důležité momenty v životě lidí, točit dokonalé, procítěné upoutávky nebo jiné formáty videí na přání. 

Ve světě natáčení se meze nekladou – přesvědčte se sami pohledem do naší nabídky služeb!

ENG: 
We're a video-production centered studio! We don't fear clients with imagination who like to get creative and fun! We like to draw the best out of our camera work and out of all the features offered by the universe of video making. We'll be pleased to produce the following formats for you: 

-adverts
-interviews and podcasts
-conferences and festivals 
-live streams
-industrial videos
...or ask us to make you a custom video!

We enjoy creating a wide range of formats, but we're always excited when we meet a client who asks for an inspiring, novel video. Such an outcome will allow us to sell a product, present an idea, awaken emotions and entertain the audience!

Zábavná média was founded by Lubomír Novohradský, who desired to preserve his memories also in a different form than just in his mind. Now, him and his team have one goal: preserve significant moments in the lives of people, film emotional ads, interviews or other formats!
There are no limits to video making. See for yourself by visiting our website!

Met heel veel passie en overtuiging én met – voor iedere klus – een unieke samenstelling aan professionals. Lijkt dat je wat?

Name: Trégor Cinéma
Description:
L'association Trégor Cinéma propose des résidences d'écriture individuelles et personnalisées pour le développement de film d'auteurs-rices émergents-es
Située en bord de mer, à Trébeurden dans les Côtes d'Armor, son objectif est d'offrir aux résidents un cadre propice à la concentration et un accompagnement afin de développer leur projet de scénario.
Chaque résident-e est accueilli-e individuellement sur une durée de quinze jours et bénéficie d'un accompagnement d'un an. Approfondir son sujet, affirmer son désir de cinéma, renforcer sa structure, caractériser ses personnages, dévoiler le thème global qui sous-tend son film, la méthode développée par Trégor Cinéma se veut flexible et à l'écoute du résident.

Name: Bishop Enterprises Publishing LLC (BEPC LLC)
Description:
In June 2001, Seth Usifo Nwosu trading as Bishop The Overseer published his first commercial release "Brick City's Finest (EP)." The release of the EP led to merchandising, touring, and distribution opportunities. In April 2003, Bishop released the single "B.I. Season (Keep It On Blaze)". This single secured his first major retail distribution deal with Trans World Entertainment (TWE). Both releases were physically available in over 300 brick-and-mortar FYE (For Your Entertainment), Coconuts, and Strawberries retail locations throughout the Northeastern region of the United States.

In February 2005, Bishop made his acting debut on Rescue Me (Denis Leary). Bishop went on to secure acting roles in Music & Lyrics (Drew Barrymore), Enchanted (Patrick Dempsey), American Gangster (Denzel Washington), I Am Legend (Will Smith), Bourne (Matt Damon), Taking of Pelham (Denzel Washington & John Travolta), and Salt (Angelina Jolie) to name a few.

In January 2010, Bishop released the double album “Money Spot (Part I)”. It featured hit singles including “Tag Team” and “Success Is Essential” released on “B.I. Season (Keep It On Blaze)”, featured on the “B.I. Season (Keep It On Blaze) Eastern Tour”, and charted on Billboard Magazine’s Hot 100 Single Sales (#7, #26 & #40). The single “Part-Time Hustlers” featured on “Commitment To A Positive Change National Ad Campaign (Volume 1)” charted with various Record Pools, College, and Secondary Radio Stations reaching #13 in the United States and #5 in Canada. The single “B.I.S.H.O.P” featuring Felicia Graham and Grammy Award-Winning Songwriter and Composer Gordon Chambers charted on Billboard Magazine’s Hot 100 Single Sales (#8, #21, #23, #28, #35, #39, #45 & #47). The Remastered Version of Money Spot (Part I) was released on August 29, 2017, and included additional unreleased material. Money Spot (Part I) was considered in 12 different categories for the 53rd Annual Grammy Nominations For Consideration.

Name: Atrás da Moita Filmes
Description:
Atrás da Moita is a creative and strategic audiovisual production company that transforms the essence of brands into powerful visual narratives. With cinematic standards, corporate agility, and diversity as a core value, we deliver videos that strengthen brands and generate real impact.

Founded by Jéssica Modono and Victor Hugo, we have worked with brands such as Natura and FGV, combining technical excellence with close client relationships. Our culture values diversity, creativity, and professionalism, resulting in unique solutions for each project, from training and events to strategic campaigns.

Name: Intramovies
Description:
INTRAMOVIES is an independent international distributor, with particular focus on high quality first-and second-feature films by emerging talents. For over four decades, we have strived to be the helping arm for creative producers and new directors.

Every year, the company's line up is selected from films featured at major international festivals, films that feature high artistic value.

The company also boasts a wide catalogue that includes some of the most prestigious Italian classics directed by acclaimed auteurs such as Fellini, Antonioni, Visconti, Argento, Pasolini, De Sica and many others.

Name: CMV Films
Description:
A CMV Films é a única produtora 360 do mercado que oferece um atendimento completo, próximo, humanizado, desburocratizado e totalmente atento às suas necessidades e urgências.

Você tem tudo em um só lugar, criação de roteiro, captação, animação 2D e 3D, com total flexbilidade entre estilos, criatividade e inovação. É tudo pensado e criado exclusivamente para você, desde a linguagem dos vídeos até a finalização.

Aqui nós encurtamos o seu caminho e te entregamos vídeos altamente impactantes.

Name: Films4You
Description:
A Films4You é uma distribuidora de cinema, home-video e televisão criada em 2006 e responsável pela distribuição em Portugal de títulos premiados como "American Animals", "First Reformed", "Borg vs McEnroe", "Tangerines", "Snowpiercer" e "Agnus Dei".

Lançamos anualmente 15/20 novos filmes de cinematografias independentes dos mais diferentes géneros.
Dedicamo-nos a filmes distintos, premiados e inovadores.

O nosso catálogo de títulos em dvd, tem mais de 600 filmes de realizadores indispensáveis como Godard, David Lynch, François Ozon, Michael Haneke, Emir Kusturica, Jean-Pierre Dardenne, Alejandro González Iñarritu, Jean-Pierre Jeunet, Stephen Daldry, Fellini, Jane Campion, Anne Fontaine.

Name: Film Commission Zurich
Description:
With over 600 productions per year, Zurich is the center of Swiss film production. Crews and service providers work here at an international level. Precise, efficient and creative. With our incentive program, we create new opportunities for both national and international projects.

The Film Commission Zurich is the central point of contact for audiovisual productions in Zurich. We connect producers with locations, authorities, partners and crews and create the conditions for successful filming. Our services are free of charge and available to all productions.

Zurich combines precision, quality and diversity, making it your ideal filming location in the heart of Europe.

GEDREVEN DOOR PASSIE VOOR DRONES

Wij van Drone Experience zijn gespecialiseerd in het vastleggen van bijzondere momenten vanuit de lucht. Met onze drones geven we een unieke draai aan elke situatie en bekijken we de wereld vanuit een buitengewone hoek. Samen met jou bekijken wij bij iedere situatie wat er mogelijk is en met onze ervaring en creativiteit streven wij naar onvergetelijke luchtvideo’s die voldoen aan jouw verwachtingen.

We offer solutions and characterize ourselves based on our understanding and flexibility of each project. 
A company conformed by recognized professionals in various disciplines in the same space that also share the same values: quality, velocity, and responsibility.

Name: Vamos Produções
Description:
Somos um produtora audiovisual e nossa missão (que é diferente de ambição) é para o outro, através de parcerias e com foco na beleza, na arte, harmonia e na sensibilidade do feminino. Nosso propósito é gerar conteúdo audiovisual inspirador que impacte positivamente a vida das pessoas.

Histórias autênticas, imagens cuidadosamente pensadas, relacionamentos pautados na parceria. Por aqui, acreditamos na construção coletiva e buscamos trazer novos significados para as pessoas e contar boas histórias por de trás das marcas.

Com expertise em brandend content, nos últimos 3 anos produziu mais de 100 filmes para marcas como TV Globo, Seda, Magazine Luíza, Bepantol, Suvinil, Bepantol, o Boticário, Jeep, entre outras. A Vamos se dedica a produção audiovisual para diversas plataformas e em diferentes formatos, sempre de forma inovadora, trazendo soluções criativas. 

Unimos Marketing Digital, Branding e Conteúdo para oferecer produtos que integram on e off-line otimizando os resultados de entrega ao público-alvo.

Para nós, nenhum trabalho é pequeno, grande ou complexo demais.

Name: DIE FILMAGENTUR
Description:
Die Filmagentur erstellt zuverlässig und im beauftragten Budget Ihre professionelle Videoproduktion (unterschiedlicher Typen, wie: Imagefilm, Recruitingvideos, Unternehemsnfilme, Werbevideos) für Unternehmen, Behörden, Verbände, Ministerien, Agenturen und NGOs.

Fühlen Sie immer sich gut betreut:

Starke Konzepte: Zunächst ermitteln wir welche Botschaft Sie senden wollen, wen die Botschaften erreichen soll und wie wir Ihre Zielgruppe filmisch mitten ins Herz treffen. Erst dann entstehen einzigartige Konzepte, Drehbücher und Filmideen. Aus unserer Erfahrung ist das genau der richtige Weg.

Service und Vertrauen: Während der kompletten Produktionszeit betreuen Sie unsere Geschäftsführer persönlich. Kurze Wege und schnelle Entscheidungen bringen Ihr Projekt planmäßig voran.

Zuverlässigkeit: Bis heute erhielten unsere Kunden jeden Film der insgesamt 600 Produktionen pünktlich und in herausragender Qualität. Das ist natürlich auch bei Ihrem Film unser Versprechen.

Einzigartigkeit bei Top-Preis-Leistungsverhältnis: Unsere Methoden der Filmproduktion entsprechen allen aktuellen Standarts: ausdrucksstarker Filmlook zu fairen Preisen und wann immer es inhatlich Sinn macht: Zeitlupen- und Zeitraffervideos, Kameradrohnenflüge, Makroaufnahmen,  hochwertige Kameratracking-Animationen, interaktive Filme und individuell komponierte Soundtracks.

Name: FilmShop
Description:
Making a film is a herculean endeavor. There are many creative challenges—honing your vision, finding resources, bringing out the best in your team, staying the course. Filmshop is a community that makes the process much less solitary. When you go through similar challenges with fellow filmmakers, it makes the impossible that much less daunting. When you can ask a diverse community of working cinematographers, editors, writers, and directors to pitch in to your project, somehow financial, creative, and emotional challenges dissolve.

We make films happen.

Founded in 2009, Filmshop is a nonprofit collective of independent filmmakers committed to developing new work through peer support and collaboration. Chapters in Brooklyn, Manhattan, and New Orleans meet weekly to workshop projects, offer constructive critique, and incubate new ideas.

Name: Room3 Film
Description:
Room3 partners with nonprofits, NGOs, and for-purpose organisations globally to share authentic, inclusive stories through film, animation, photography, and accessible media that inspire action and drive change.

Since 2003, we have worked with leading humanitarian and social impact organisations to produce high-quality films, animations, and visual media that inform, engage, and inspire audiences worldwide. Our projects span documentary storytelling, advocacy campaigns, educational content, and accessible media designed to amplify impact and inclusion.

Our work has supported clients such as The World Bank, CBM Australia, Oxfam, Plan International, UNHCR, UNESCO, WaterAid, Breast Cancer Network Australia (BCNA), ABC International, World Vision, and Fairtrade, among many others. These partnerships reflect our long-standing commitment to advancing social justice, climate resilience, disability inclusion, and humanitarian storytelling.

Room3 is recognised for its authentic, intelligent, and impact-driven storytelling, underpinned by a strong commitment to accessibility, trauma-informed practice, and true informed consent. With a global network of trusted collaborators across Australia, the Pacific, Asia, the Middle East, and Europe, we bring professionalism, cultural sensitivity, and ethical rigour to every production.

At our core, we believe creativity has the power to bridge worlds, turning complex challenges into stories that move hearts, shift perspectives, and spark lasting change.

Name: Lifton Media
Description:
LIFTON MEDIA specializes in visual and immersive story telling. We create artistic content that evokes emotions to establish deeper intimacy between our clients and their audiences. Our mission is to create powerful stories whereby the audience becomes the center of the story to drive consumer engagement. Our mission is to capture, entertain, enlighten, and inspire audiences in the course of just a few minutes.

Check out our latest Release: THE SPEAKER  Now available on DVD and Download Stream on iTunes, Amazon and Google Play! #TheSpeakerFilm

Name: Western Spaghetti's - video marketing agency
Description:
De content die wij maken moet gezien én geproefd worden door ons allemaal. Niets zo jammer als een plat gekookt bord spaghetti voorgeschoteld te krijgen toch? Wij gaan voor een echt p(l)akkend verhaal.

Als het blijft plakken zit het dus goed! Een toffe video is een start, maar de verspreiding ervan is minstens even belangrijk. Daarom geloven wij dat video en marketing hand in hand gaan. Zoals pasta en saus zijn ze onafscheidelijk.

Name: Rocket Box Media
Description:
Wist je dat we dagelijks met duizenden reclame uitingen geconfronteerd worden? Van advertenties in de krant en sluikreclame op tv tot posters op elke straathoek en gesponsorde content op je tijdlijn. Hoe speel je je als bedrijf nog in de kijker? Nou, met unieke content.

En laat originaliteit nou onze belangrijkste pijler zijn. Na-apen, daar houden wij niet zo van. Wel van het bedenken en maken van de beste (video)marketingcampagnes. Wij weten als geen ander hoe je video en social media inzet om je zichtbaarheid te vergroten. Wij zetten organisaties in de markt en creëren video’s in de breedste zin van het woord. Creativiteit en fantasie krijgen bij ons vrij spel. To the moon and back dus. Are you ready for take-off?
