Description: Doté de deux salles de cinéma (dont l’une est accessible aux personnes à mobilité réduite), d’un espace café-bar (modulable pour des ateliers/rencontres/animations) et d’une spacieuse cour extérieure, le cinéma La Balise est un lieu vivant. La programmation est généraliste et art et essai avec une attention portée sur les événements et les rencontres.

Name: Chilli Filmes Produtora Audiovisual
Description:
Com soluções inovadoras e criativas, a CHILLI FILMES se destaca a cada ano por apimentar suas produções, com linguagens dinâmicas e modernas, além de orçamentos competitivos, garantindo a máxima qualidade em Ultra Definição. 

Filmes publicitários e corporativos como, institucionais, treinamentos, EAD, soluções para eventos híbridos (Lives), e a cobertura audiovisual completa do seu evento, também oferecemos transmissões simultâneas. Além de imagens aéreas com Drone, videografismo 2D|3D, conteúdo digital para redes sociais e outras mídias.

Estaremos sempre prontos para atender os mais variados tipos de produção, garantindo a melhor entrega para o seu projeto, dentro do prazo e com a máxima qualidade de pré a pós produção.

Entre em contato agora mesmo com a CHILLI FILMES e saiba como apimentar as suas produções.

Name: Lake Como Film Festival
Description:
Il Lake Como Film Festival continua il suo viaggio nel cinema di paesaggio, un percorso artistico iniziato nel 2013 nello scenario naturale del Lago di Como.

Il festival negli anni ha coinvolto tanti luoghi del territorio e ha trovato la sua maturazione e sintesi nelle Lake Como Film Nights, ambientate nello scenario di Villa Erba a Cernobbio, un tempo dimora del regista Luchino Visconti, perfetta sintesi di natura, arte e cultura.

I numeri del Film Fesitval:  7 edizioni / 300 film proposti / più di 25.000 persone coinvolte / 48 diverse location / 201 film provenienti da diversi paesi del mondo / 35 cortometraggi realizzati da giovani autori sul territorio locale nell’ambito del Concorso FilmLakers / 4.000 visitatori alle 2 mostre collaterali.

Il Festival è sempre alla ricerca di business partners innovativi e persone che possano sostenere il nostro progetto artistico.
Supportare il Festival significa per le aziende sostenere la conoscenza e la divulgazione del Cinema di Qualità, in un territorio da sempre fonte d'ispirazione, e far parte di un evento di respiro internazionale.

Name: Na Mosca Produções Audiovisuais
Description:
A Na Mosca produções é uma empresa que atua na produção audiovisual, sendo vídeos para documentários, institucionais ou comerciais de tv, além de produção para rádio, como spots, chamadas, vinhetas etc. 
A NA MOSCA Produção Audiovisual e Comunicação Multidisciplinar têm como objetivo atender pessoas físicas e jurídicas para soluções de comunicação. 
Atuamos há mais de 5 anos no mercado e contamos com clientes sempre satisfeitos com nossos serviços. 
A empresa foi fundada por Cleber Silva, locutor, publicitário e produtor audiovisual, atuante como professor e coordenador do  curso de produção audiovisual desenvolveu o curso no Ponto de Cultura ONG ABENAF, onde atua ensinando as técnicas a alunos da instituição. Também fundador da Rádio Tom Social, onde desenvolveu atua como produtor, locutor e diretor artístico. 
Se sua empresa precisa desenvolver trabalhos voltados para audiovisual, você está no lugar certo. A Na Mosca Produções está pronta para entregar o material que você espera, seja em vídeo ou áudio. 
Contamos com uma equipe de profissionais multidisciplinar o que possibilita a direção certa e necessária para eficácia de sua comunicação. 
Contamos com publicitários, locutores, cinegrafistas, jornalista, roteiristas, editores, atores e muito mais.

Name: LOFT 2.2.5
Description:
Produkcja filmów artystycznych, modowych i teledysków. Nad koncepcją filmu pracujemy w pofabrycznej przestrzeni Loftów de Girarda,
a zdjęcia realizujemy w wybranym miejscu na świecie.

Właściciel- Monika Kołdacha

Name: Time Prints
Description:
Since 2005 TIME PRINTS produces documentary films for cinema and television for the German and international markets.  The main focus is based on international co-productions and historical & creative documentaries.

We also provide services such as research, (film)archive research, casting and locationscouting, eyewitness interviews with experts, production with our team or yours, transcription, translation, subtitling,…

Name: Yanzi Creative
Description: Yanzi is a creative agency that, through multimedia content and storytelling, creates unique stories capable of giving identity to the brand. Content provider, Yanzi designs and implements communication strategies in which images, words and videos find their best declination for digital, social media, websites and TV platforms.

Name: Hélicotronc
Description:
Hélicotronc is a Belgian film production company created in 2002 by Anthony Rey. The company has since produced over fifty short films, nine feature films, and four documentaries. Our films have been widely screened in
film festivals (among them Cannes, Toronto, Berlin, Rotterdam, Clermont-Ferrand) and on television (RTBF, Arte, TV5 Monde, France 3).
Our films have been recognized with international awards and accolades, with "With Thelma" winning the 2018 Magritte for Best Short Film, "Vihta" winning the Jury Award at the Clermont-Ferrand International Short Film Festival, and "Next Year" being released in theaters in Belgium and France in 2015.
The series "The Break" was broadcast on RTBF (Belgian National TV) in February 2016 was awarded for best francophone series at SERIES MANIA 2016, alongside wide critical and public success. The second season was broadcast in fall 2018 and was distributed through Netflix in 2019.

Name: PATRIOT Rental
Description:
PATRIOT Rental specializes in comprehensive provision for video-making: video shooting, lighting&grip equipment, staff, energy supply and transportation.
Our company was founded in 1999. We are currently the biggest rental company in Ukraine – with its head-office in Kiev and branches in Lviv and Odessa, and we have extensive experience in complex technical maintenance  of video shootings of any complexity.
PATRIOT Rental was the first in Ukraine who presented the world's brands of film equipment, which today have become the quality standard in the film industry.
The company's goal is the development of modern, high quality technologies of shooting that match the highest international standards.

Name: Good Pitch Brasil
Description:
O Good Pitch Brasil é um programa internacional que utiliza o poder do cinema documental como ferramenta estratégica de comunicação para a transformação social. O programa acredita na força do cinema não só para construção da nossa identidade individual e coletiva, mas também no poder que ele tem de gerar empatia e compreensão. Através da elaboração de uma campanha de impacto e da formação de parcerias com atores da sociedade civil, colocamos esse potencial para trabalhar a favor de causas gerando resultados concretos.

O modelo de sucesso do Good Pitch é reconhecido internacionalmente. Hoje, ele existe em mais de 15 países, em 5 continentes. O programa começou na Inglaterra em 2009 pela DocSociety - uma organização mundial(social) focada no desenvolvimento de documentários. No Brasil, o Good Pitch é realizado pela DOCSP, uma produtora de impacto social e cultural focada no desenvolvimento de programas e eventos de formação e fortalecimento de redes no setor audiovisual desde 2015.

Name: MAKADAM PROD
Description:
Makadam prod est né en 2004 sous l’impulsion de Nathalie Plicot d’une envie de  produire des documentaires, des projets multimédias et des institutionnels en mode réactif, souple et pertinent. A fond sur la bande passante, dans un esprit militant et collaboratif, les savoir-faire s’y sont conjugués et le catalogue de Makadam s’est étoffé. 

Au cours des 16 dernières années, des rencontres artistiques, des collaborations improbables et déterminantes ont fini par élargir le champ d’action de la compagnie. En production comme dans la vie, le chemin sinueux est plus palpitant que la ligne droite.

A l’été 2020, cinq femmes se retrouvent sous le chapiteau de Makadam avec une envie d’aventure humaine et professionnelle à poursuivre ensemble. Chacune d’elle a déjà sous le coude une vingtaine d’années d’expérience en production, réalisation, post-production, création d’effets visuels, création graphique, écriture, journalisme et animation.

Elles sont prêtes à prendre un tournant parce qu’elles ont toutes travaillé pour des compagnies enkystées dans un fonctionnement vertical. Du coup, elles ont développé une appréciation particulière pour les relations à hauteur de regard, où oui veut dire oui - quelle que soit la météo du lendemain.

Name: 615 JJ Entertainment
Description:
615 JJ Entertainment is a full service, cross genre, artist management, publishing, tour management and music entertainment company. Our team of experienced professionals work tirelessly to help artists grow and reach their full potential. With a focus on artist development, we provide a range of services tailored to meet the specific needs of each artist we work with. From songwriting and music production to marketing and promotion, we are committed to helping artists succeed in the industry.



Located in Nashville, our company is built on the collaboration of two successful entrepreneurs, Jimmy Maynes and Jenny Woldt, brought together by mutual respect and a common visionary belief

In order for the music to succeed we must focus on the creative, and the success will follow.

Name: Valiant Pictures
Description:
VALIANT PICTURES is an independent production company on a journey to share memorable stories that connect and inspire. Our diverse roster of award-winning filmmakers bring fresh and unique perspectives to fearlessly create powerful narratives across all forms of media.

Founding partners are Vincent Lin and Matthew D'Amato.

Name: Jacek Partridge Ltd
Description:
Welcome! I'm Jacek Partridge, a seasoned freelance camera operator and livestream specialist based in the vibrant city of London. Dubbed as a "Swiss Army Man for any type of production", I bring a unique blend of technical expertise and creative vision to every project I undertake.

 Professional Expertise:

With years of hands-on experience, I specialise in live camera operation and videography, along with exceptional skills in live-streaming. My journey in this field is marked by a relentless pursuit of excellence, where I combine state-of-the-art technology with innovative techniques to deliver outstanding results.

- Live Camera Operations: Spearheaded multiple live events, ensuring seamless camera work that captures the essence of each moment.
- Videography Excellence: Produced a range of video content, from corporate to creative, receiving acclaim for my attention to detail and storytelling.
- Livestreaming Mastery: Conducted numerous successful livestreams, handling everything from setup to execution with proficiency and ease.

 What Sets Me Apart:

My unique selling point lies in my ability to wear multiple hats efficiently. From operating cameras to video editing, and from photography to live streaming, I offer a comprehensive suite of services that makes me a valuable asset to any production team. Equipped with a British as well as Polish (EU) passports and owning cutting-edge videography and streaming equipment, I am readily mobile and prepared for productions around the world ensuring that your visuals are captured with precision and finesse.

 Let's Connect:

If you're looking for a skilled camera operator, a creative video producer, or a live-streaming guru, let's connect! I am always open to discussing new projects, collaborations, or just sharing insights into the world of video production. Reach out to me here on LinkedIn or at hello@jacekpartridge.com and let's create something amazing together!

Name: Prokino Filmverleih GmbH
Description: PROKINO is one of Germanys most successful and versatile Film distributors of Arhouse and selected Independent Movies based in Munich.

Name: VAL Studio
Description:
Our studio specializes in creating photorealistic computer graphics and visual effects for film, television, advertising, the music industry, as well as experimental visual installations.

We work with well-known studios and professionals of the domestic and foreign film industry. The studio participated in such projects as: "The Legend of Kolovrat", "Ghost", "Icebreaker", "T-34" and many others.

We are ready for experiments. We guide a project from the idea to the release. We help with consultations, we plan production of VFX, we create visual effects. We have experience in this field for over 10 years. We work for you around the world.

Let's make together a story brighter, more amazing, more saturated!

Name: ATP Film Studios
Description:
ATP Film Studios ontwikkelt en produceert audiovisuele content voor bedrijven, (online) evenementen en merken.  
Wij hebben ervaring met het produceren, regisseren, monteren en animeren van audiovisuele producties. Daarnaast helpen wij graag bij het ontwikkelen van een goed concept of format (TV of film). 
Zorgen dat uw boodschap zich audiovisueel kan onderscheiden van anderen, dat is wat wij doen.  

"We live to create together" is bij ATP Film Studios niet zomaar een slogan. Het creëren van een beleving, een boodschap die raakt door middel van (live) video producties in nauwe samenwerking met de opdrachtgever, dat is wat ATP Film Studios typeert. 

Met een team creatieve, gepassioneerde collega's maakt ATP Film Studios producties zoals aftermovies, promo's, businessfilms, talkshows en (live) registraties maar ook documentaires en speelfilms. Daarnaast produceert ATP Film Studios projectevenementen, zoals een jaarlijks internationaal filmfestival. 

Nieuwsgierig geworden naar wat "we live to create together" in de praktijk betekent? neem gerust contact op voor een vrijblijvende kennismaking en we laten het graag zien.

Name: Deep Cut Music
Description: Deep Cut Music is an independent, all female creative music supervision, founded by Maggie Phillips.

Name: Film Centre of Montenegro
Carpe Filmes
Description:
A Carpe é uma produtora cultural dedicada a transformar boas ideias em realidade. Nosso foco é desenvolver projetos que promovam transformações necessárias, com conteúdo relevante e alta qualidade artística.

Produzimos conteúdos originais de entretenimento, como filmes, séries, documentários e animações. Além disso, oferecemos consultoria para criativos, gestão de projetos culturais e formatação de projetos para editais.

O ano em que foi lançado o Macintosh, que foi criado o CD-Player, que Maradona reinava na seleção argentina.

E que a Companhia de Cinema abriu as portas no Brasil. 

De lá pra cá, muita coisa vem mudando.    

Criamos os primeiros comerciais da campanha “Desce Redondo”, para a Skol. O tiozinho do elevador, para a Sukita.

Sabe o “Presunto Invejoso”, da Sadia? Pois é, também é nosso. 
“É o amooor!” entrou para as cozinhas brasileiras com Sazon. Sem falar da campanha “Tem coisas que só a Philco faz por você”. 

Depois de mais de 120 prêmios, mais de 2.500 filmes, estamos nos renovando. 

Investindo em novos talentos com um olhar mais contemporâneo, mas mantendo o mesmo profissionalismo de sempre.

Prazer, essa é a Nova Compañia!

Na vanguarda da indústria cinematográfica, combinamos técnicas tradicionais com as mais recentes tecnologias para criar experiências cinematográficas cativantes e memoráveis. 
Da concepção à pós-produção, nossa equipe talentosa e dedicada trabalha incansavelmente para superar expectativas e alcançar novos patamares de excelência.

Nossa abordagem colaborativa e flexível nos permite adaptar-nos às necessidades específicas de cada projeto, garantindo resultados finais de qualidade superior. 
Além disso, estamos comprometidos em apoiar talentos emergentes e promover a diversidade na indústria, colaborando com uma ampla gama de criativos e contadores de histórias.

Seja na produção de longas-metragens, curtas-metragens, séries ou comerciais, buscamos constantemente desafiar os limites do Storytelling e inspirar audiências em todo o mundo. 
Junte-se a nós nesta jornada emocionante enquanto continuamos a moldar o futuro do cinema brasileiro e além.

Siga-nos para ficar por dentro das últimas novidades, oportunidades de colaboração e projetos emocionantes.

Vamos contar histórias juntos!

Name: KADR Film Studio
Description:
“KADR” Film Studio was the oldest state-owned film production center subject to the Ministry of Culture and National Heritage, founded in 1955. Our catalogue comprises over 600 titles, many of which have been awarded at international and Polish festivals.

The films from our catalogue are digitally reconstructed. We are involved in programs aimed at digital reconstruction of the greatest Polish cinematographic works of art. We are the initiator of digital reconstruction efforts. Our films are available through different channels in Poland and abroad. We conduct direct negotiations and sign agreements with licensees.

In 2011, according to the ordinance of the Minister of Culture and National Heritage, the OKO Film Studio was closed down and the “KADR” Film Studio became its legal successor.

Today’s “KADR” Film Studio activity combines tradition with auteur cinema that seeks artistic challenge. In particular, we strive to support directorial debuts and make historical films and documentaries as well as feature films.

Since March 2016 prof. Filip Bajon has been the Director of the “KADR” Film Studio whereas Dariusz Sidor is the Deputy Director.

Due to the decision of the Ministry of Culture and National Heritage, Studio ceased to exist on the 30th of September 2019.

Name: Istituto Cinematografico Michelangelo Antonioni
Description:

L’Istituto si è costituito grazie alla collaborazione tra il comune di Busto Arsizio e la Fondazione Cinema e Territorio, ente privato che ha come specifico compito quello di gestire l’Istituto, il quale ha avviato il suo primo ciclo triennale nel 2008.

L’Istituto Cinematografico “Michelangelo Antonioni” si occupa della formazione di professionalità specifiche nel campo del cinema, dell’audiovisivo, dell’animazione digitale e della recitazione cinematografica in un’ottica altamente professionalizzante ed è dedicato ad allievi che hanno terminato il percorso di studi secondari, provenendo da licei, istituti professionali e scuole di formazione un corso triennale, nelle competenze tipiche del cinema, dell’animazione digitale e della recitazione.

CFMDC’s collection is available for preview, rental, and sale to festivals, art galleries, cinemas, educational institutions, and individuals. We work with and distribute on multiple formats including celluloid film, video, digital, and DCP. Our knowledgeable staff members are happy to to provide guidance and recommendations on our extensive collection.

With more than 10 years in the market, PAVOREAL is a film production company who had work in social and environmental conscious documentary projects. Our portfolio includes short, feature film and documentary productions; several winners of the Colombian Film Fund, in addition to some foreign funds. These productions have been exhibited in different national and international film festivals.

Within our portfolio, we have documentaries such as EXPEDICIÓN TRIBUGÁ, PROTAGONISTAS DEL PROGRESO, and EL CONFIDENTE. Short films like EL CÁÑAMO (Best Short film in the Human Rights Film Festival - Colombia 2017, and Best short Film in IndieBO Independent film festival - Bogotá 2016), and JUANCHO EL PAJARERO with great recognition in various film festivals worldwide (Alucine Latin Film + Media Arts Festival - Canadá, Festival de Cine y Cultura Española CinEScultura - Germany, Festival Internacional de Cine de Guanajuato - México, among others). The immersive museum series PAISAJES MUSICALES (Silver Prize at the Media & Technology MUSE Awards 2019 - American Alliance of Museums) and PANAMÁ, PAÍS DE AGUA (remembrance of the 100 years of the Panamá Canal and the importance of water).

Additionally, we worked on the documentary THE MARKET OF INNOCENCE, produced by 93 Metros (Spain), allies of the Discovery Channel in the content creation and broadcast for their Latin America channel. This documentary received the Golden Medal at the New York Festival.

In 2016, we were selected as part of the Colombian producers' committee to participate in the ROTTERDAM LAB, Rotterdam International Film Festival. 

We are PAVOREAL. We are filmmakers. We are storytellers!

Name: S.U Studios
Description:
Established in 1999, S.U Studio has become a cornerstone of the South Asian music scene, thanks to the visionary talent of Shiraz Uppal. A renowned music composer, singer, music director, lyricist, and audio engineer, Uppal's expertise in audio mixing and mastering has set a standard of excellence that resonates both locally and globally.

With an impressive portfolio, Shiraz has produced approximately 70% of Pakistani film music, contributing to beloved tracks like "Hona Tha Pyar" from Khuda Kay Liye and soundtracks for blockbuster movies such as Punjab Nahi Jaungi and Jawani Phir Nahi Ani. His influence extends beyond film, having sung and produced music for the prestigious global platform Coke Studio, where he introduced five new voices that have since gained prominence, including Naseebo Lal, Rafaqat Ali Khan, Nirmal Roy, Kashif, and Jabir Abbas.

One of the defining moments in his career was producing the record-breaking rendition of "Tajdar-e-Haram" by Atif Aslam, which became an all-time favorite among music lovers. Following this, Uppal delivered another hit to Coke Studio with "Tu Kuja Man Kuja," further solidifying his reputation as a musical innovator.

Shiraz's talent is not confined to Pakistan; he has also made significant contributions to Bollywood. His work includes composing for films like Youngistan and collaborating with Oscar-winning music producer A.R. Rahman on the iconic track "Ranjhana," which remains a timeless classic. He also lent his voice to "Roya Re" from the film Dhoka, among many other successful tracks.

Throughout his career, S.U Studio has been behind the success of numerous hits by superstars, including Atif Aslam’s "Pehli Dafa" and Aima Baig’s "Kalabaaz Dil" and "Funkari." The achievements of Shiraz Uppal are truly countless, reflecting his unwavering dedication to his craft.

His talent has been recognized with numerous accolades, including two IPPA Awards, the Mirchi Music Award in India, and the ARY Music Award, showcasing his

Name: Cineclube FGV
Description:
Somos um apaixonado grupo de estudantes da Fundação Getulio Vargas, localizada em São Paulo, dedicados a explorar as profundezas do mundo cinematográfico. Nossa missão é promover uma experiência única de aprendizado e apreciação do cinema, conectando mentes criativas e curiosas em nossa comunidade acadêmica. Todos os nossos encontros acontecem com a ilustre presença do professor da Escola de Economia da FGV e um dos maiores historiadores brasileiros, Luiz Felipe Alencastro.

Através de exibições de filmes, discussões enriquecedoras, festivais e projetos colaborativos, buscamos mergulhar nas diversas facetas do cinema, desde as clássicas obras-primas até as mais inovadoras produções contemporâneas.

Name: blind sounds
Description:
Audio supervision for interactive and linear media with a strong expertise in VR, XR and a no non-sense approach to support and amplify narration.

We bring together century-old approaches with modern tools and techniques.
Wherever there's an audible signal passing through your project, we'll carefully look at the scripts, concepts, execution and will always consider sound as part of a larger ensemble. Sound, music, voice, tech, and quality of implementation are all treated equal in our approach.

We will also happily review scripts, propose sound ideas, direct voice recording sessions and help composers get onboard and deliver their scores.

We do : 
- sound design (with a strong culture of recording things ourselves)
- interactive audio systems
- voice direction
- musical direction and a bit of composition if aesthetic allows for it
- dynamic mixing and spatial audio mix for 3DOF, 6DOF (such as vr)
- game audio mastering, and audio Q&A
- interactive consultancy for design companies
- lightweight voice design pipelines
- lightweight/up to quatuor-sized location music recording

We currently don't do:
- voice casting
- music composition (as in all the bells and whistles in every genre)

We have worked with : 
- indie game studios
- industrial design companies
- XR studios
- movie productions companies
- AAA game companies

Name: Frame Force
Description:
Our motion control system is one of the fastest in the world, the 6 axis high-speed camera robot BOLT by Marc Roberts.

With a reach of 2m and a maximum camera height of more than 3m it is perfect for tabletop shots, music videos, multipass projects, cgi import/export or in combination with an LED Volume.

With 12m of track, on which it can move with 5m/s, we can increase the reach even more. 

With its Software Flair we offer a quick and reliable programming on set. 

Weather shooting tabletop, music videos, products, commercials, high-speed, virtual production, film or television – the precision motion control system adds exclusively new perspectives to filming. 

Key features of our BOLT motion control system:
-	Precisely repeatable camera moves
-	Full control over Focus, Iris and Zoom during the whole camera move
-	Payload: 20kg
-	Max Arm reach: 2m
-	Maximum camera height: 3,5m
-	12m of track
-	Maximum camera speed on tracks: 12m/s 
-	Synchronize possibilities with light/sound/SFX
-	CGI Import/Export
-	Setup in about 2 hours (studio environment)

Als inhabergeführte Agentur steuern wir den gesamten Prozess von der Ideenfindung und Strategieentwicklung über die Umsetzung der Filmproduktion. Unser Netzwerk umfasst neben professionellen Synchronsprechern sowie Make-up-Artists auch Agenturen für Darsteller, falls diese für Ihre Filmproduktion benötigt werden.

Unsere transparente Arbeitsweise schafft dabei harmonische Abläufe und erfolgreiche Resultate. Dank unserer zentralen Lage in Frankfurt, mitten in Deutschland, und der exzellenten Infrastruktur der schönen Mainmetropole, sind wir bestens vernetzt und erreichen Sie schnell und problemlos.

Uns ist es wichtig Sie, Ihr Unternehmen und Ihre Ziele kennenzulernen, um eine passende Lösung für Ihr Anliegen zu finden.
Wir laden Sie daher herzlich zu einem ersten unverbindlichen Kennenlerngespräch ein, um mehr über Ihre aktuelle Situation zu erfahren und Ihnen daraus resultierend Ihre Möglichkeiten aufzuzeigen.

Wir freuen uns auf Ihre Nachricht!

L’association souhaite accompagner la montée en compétences par le prisme de différents types d’actions :
Initier des formations continues adaptées aux différents acteurs de la filière cinéma et audiovisuel 
Favoriser l’émergence de projets de films, de leur écriture à leur diffusion 
Dynamiser les liens de la filière à échelle régionale 
Stimuler les collaborations à l’international
Mener à bien des missions de conseil et de coordination d’événements et de résidences

La Constellation du Sud coordonne actuellement le programme de la Fabrique Cinéma de l’Institut français ainsi que le nouvel événement méditerranéen à Marseille MED IN FILMS sous l’égide de la Région Sud.

With a staff that has worked in the distribution space for over 20 years, we have been involved with every aspect of film releasing, including Theatrical, VOD, DVD, Non-Theatrical, Broadcast, and international licensing. We understand that no two films are released with the same formula, and we work with all major accounts on the Transactional, Subscription, and ad-supported platforms to cater your film for the best fitting placement. Personalizing each film release with our filmmakers and distributor clients to ensure their titles are placed appropriately and widely is as big of a priority as getting our platform clients the best content that suits their audience’s needs. Collectively, we have worked with thousands of filmmakers and Star Talent understand the tough process to get to this point of release, so we are thrilled to take on the heavy lifting from here to make sure the audience it was meant to reach sees your great film.

Name: Click Film
Description:
Video øger dit salg, fordi dine kunder lærer din virksomhed bedre at kende igennem video. Og når kunderne kan se, at din virksomhed er troværdig og en god samarbejdspartner, så er det lettere for kunden at besluttte sig for at gøre forretning med jer. Du hjælper med andre ord dine kunder, når du bruger video.

Video er fremragende til at formidle alt det, kunden ikke umiddelbart kan læse på dit web-site. Autencitet, personlighed, troværdighed

Det er ikke kun smukke billeder og lækker musik, der virker, når man skal markedsføre sig med video. Interview og indhold skal være skarpt vinklet og besvare de spørgsmål, seerne sidder med. Video skal hjælpe dine potentielle kunder med at beslutte sig for at handle med dig. 

Vi har specialiseret os i at sætte os ind i dine kunders behov, så vi ved, hvad vi skal fremhæve og vise fra jeres virksomhed.

Name: Syntopias AVC film productions
Description:
Syntopias AVC Film productions is a Cyprus based company with a vision to produce distinctive, relevant, innovative independent films which have a deep social meaning and cause.

Syntopias AVC Limited was formed to give an outright call to an international audience on the whereabouts of social, economic and personal development. We believe that this will be achieved through the making of a feature film which aims to target all age groups, nationalities and social classes.

 We strongly believe that in the light of an era where work-life balance is not attained, one may be able to benefit from watching a movie that its sole aim is to sustain this balance.

Entertain the audience and pass the message of self-fulfilment through grasping and making use of every opportunity that comes to life
Operate in an effective and timely manner to deliver results through creativity and innovation
Make an impact; challenge the system and deliver a message to an international audience that work-life balance is imperative and should be achieved and sustained by each person individually.

The objectives of the movie will be achieved through the effective collaboration of a team who have the passion and willingness to surpass any obstacles that come into way.

The aim of the company is to express its passion for film-making through short and feature length films.

Talent and passion for film-making are valuable attributes that the company possesses and management believes that these will be reflected through successes in various film festivals worldwide.

Name: Alba Adventures
Description:
Alba Adventures based out of NYC, produces award-winning authentic family adventure film shorts, that capture what the spirit of skiing is all about; fun, family, friends and good turns on the mountains. But most importantly, it makes them want to go skiing with their family!

After the loss of their oldest son and  a long sabbatical from skiing; in 2010, Ray and Alicia Alba had planned on moving their family to California, to live a more outdoor lifestyle on the beach. However, Ray's job had different plans and had no option, but to stay in NYC.  With much hesitation they moved to uptown Manhattan, and were dreading another NYC winter.  

On Christmas Day, their son Sandro then only 6 and daughter Nevada  not quite 2,  were gifted a freeboard  from Santa and you can guess what happened, it snowed BIG!  Not just a little, but enough to paralyze the city.  They found a hill close by called Dead Man's Hill, a street closed off to traffic that lies parallel to a cemetery in Washington Heights. Sandro got on his freeboard and rode down the hill like he had been snowboarding his whole life. With Ray and Alicia remembering that feeling they used to have skiing down the mountains, before kids, they looked at each other and said, “how about we start skiing again?” And so Alba Adventures began, or at least filming the kids while skiing to remember these special memories, knowing how much they cherished the few videos they had of their oldest son. 

Fast forward to Winter 2018/19; Winning many film laurels and were recently selected for official screenings of  their short films “Generations” by IF3, the "Cannes of  the Ski World" and "In Maine"  at the Maine Outdoor Film Festival.  Ray and Alicia's intent is  to make films that "capture what the spirit of skiing is all about; fun, family, friends and good turns on the mountains. But most importantly, it makes its viewers want to go outside and embrace these special moments!

Name: AI Movie Awards
Description:
Pioneering AI film festival spotlighting storytelling in the AI era.

AI Movie Awards (AIMA) is an international film festival and cultural platform dedicated to cinema created with artificial intelligence.

AIMA was founded to highlight storytelling in the age of AI, focusing on narrative vision, cinematic language, and authorship rather than tools alone. The festival provides a curated space where filmmakers, artists, technologists, and industry professionals can explore how artificial intelligence is reshaping the way stories are written, produced, and experienced.

Beyond the awards, AIMA operates as an ecosystem:

– AI Movie Awards — a multi-city film festival showcasing the most relevant AI-driven films and cinematic experiments
– AIMA Productions — a production and distribution arm supporting selected projects through development, production, and international distribution

Through screenings, juried awards, talks, and industry connections, AIMA aims to contribute to the emergence of a new cinematic culture — one that embraces artificial intelligence while preserving strong authorial intent and narrative depth.

AIMA is committed to supporting creators at every stage, from recognition to real-world opportunities, and to building bridges between creativity, technology, and the global film industry.

Name: GreenGo Films
Description:
“BRAZIL IS NOT FOR BEGINNERS”
This oft quoted line - coined by one of Brazil’s most important musical poets Tom Jobim - like all cliches, bears more than just a grain of truth. To navigate Brazil and its peoples requires a certain amount of experience and elan.  
That’s why we see the fact that we have been producing content of the highest level in Brazil since 2004 as a crucial selling point in our business.
We set up GreenGo Films in 2007 to provide bespoke production services to the biggest and best commercials producers from around the world. Since then we have lived through one global financial crisis, one World Cup, one Olympic Games, one global pandemic and four years of political shame. Brazil has survived and so did we.
In that time, we have also produced award-winning feature films, documentary features and series for the international and local market. 
We are proud to have developed successful and long-standing relationships with such companies as Believe Media, Epoch Films, Imperial Woodpecker, RSA Films, The Sweet Shop, HSI Productions, Wanda, Caviar, Academy Films, Media Monks, Merman and brands including Adidas, Nike, EA Sports, Heineken, Corona, Wrigleys, Coca Cola, Pepsi Cola, LVMH, Microsoft, Absolut, ESPN, Nissan, Range Rover, Unilever, Kraft and Nestle to name a few.
On the international content side we have worked with Working Title Films, BBC, Al Jazeera, Granada, France 2 and 3, Nickelodeon, Amazon Prime and ITV. 
Our ethos has always been: No job is too big nor too small. Each job is individual and we cut our cloth to accommodate the needs of our production partners.

We set and maintain high standards on all of our productions and work with our partners always to find ways of reducing our carbon footprint.

Our years of hands-on experience mean that the people we hire and vendors we contract are the best and most reliable in the business. We have developed modes of working where high standards are expected but where people can expect

Since its first year, KORK has been shown among the 90 best genre film festivals on earth by Dread Central and the 100 best genre film festivals on earth by adriantofei.com. Name: GigotinStudio
Description:
GigotinStudio is an handcrafted 3D, VFX studio located in Paris. Over the past 15 years, we have sharpened our artistic vision, spanning an array of thrilling projects, gaining a heady arsenal of technical skills for post-production field and visual effects. Our team combines innovation and creativity, covering the needs for agencies, production companies and international brands.
We work closely with our partner Noodles for the development of virtual reality productions.
GigontinStudio has its own audio department, with a particular focus on the binaural listening experience.

The virtual reality ties the best of some innovative technology as the motion detection, the 360° in stereoscopy, the binaural sound. Only one aim, bring the user to a perfect representation ofan another world, an another reality.
Everybody dreams to walk on the moon, to walk into his own oniric universe, to visit IRL unreachable places.
From artistic abstraction to full realism, Virtual reality brings you to the center of a recorded or synthetically built action. You aren't anymore a single watcher, you are the driver of your own experience through a total feeling experience.
Immersion, interactivity and emotion are the key words to define what must be an optimal VR experience. GIGOTIN STUDIO allways aims to experiment new mediums, new technologies related to the digital image. VR brings huge research opportunities and an exiting challenge to achieve through the technics, the creativity and the narration.
A new visual grammar has to be built to this new world. The heads of VR industry, as Oculus, Sony, and HTC, allied to build the VR technology, are at the very beginning of their stories to deliver and expand an unended better immersing quality.
Today, the implications and application universe tied to VR are large and sustainable, and beyond the "mode" tendance, this new technology aims to change our lives and our habits in long term future.
In short, this trip is at the beginning.

Depuis sa fondation en 1994 par la CEO Martien Uyttendaele, le distributeur de films indépendant Paradiso Filmed Entertainment est un nom connu dans le Benelux, avec un catalogue impressionnant des meilleurs films d’art et essai, entrecoupé de titres grand public reconnus. Name: MOTOR
Description:
Danish production company founded in 2018 by writer and producer team Christian Torpe and Jesper Morthorst. 

MOTOR focuses on exclusive, high-profile content and work both nationally and internationally with feature films and TV series.

Torpe and Morthorst’s previous works include acclaimed TV series such as RITA (2012-2020), NORSKOV (2015) and THE MIST (2017), not to mention Academy Award and two-time Palme d’Or winner Bille August’s films SILENT HEART (2014) and THE PACT (2021), both written by Torpe and produced by Morthorst. Both were nominated for Best Film and Best Screenplay at the Danish Academy Awards, and SILENT HEART was later remade in the US with Kate Winslet, Susan Sarandon, and Mia Wasikowska with a new script by Torpe.

MOTOR’s first production, the TV series DELIVER US (a co-production with DR and ZDF) premiered in fall 2019 in Denmark, Sweden, Norway, Finland, Iceland and Germany. The series was awarded a Reflet d’OR prize for ‘Best International TV Series’ at Geneva International Film Festival.

Most recently, MOTOR produced the internationally acclaimed debut feature by Tea Lindeburg, AS IN HEAVEN, a two-time award winner at the San Sebastian International Film Festival 2021, and winner of ‘Best Nordic Film’ at Göteborg Film Festival 2022. MOTOR’s Icelandic co-production BEAUTIFUL BEINGS by Gudmundur Arnar Gudmundsson won the Europa Cinemas Label prize for ‘Best European Film’ at the 72nd Berlin International Film Festival.

Description:
Jeunesse Tout Courts, festival international dédié aux courts-métrages explorant les thématiques de l'enfance et de la jeunesse, s’adresse aux réalisateurs du monde entier, jeunes et moins jeunes, qui, par l’image, interrogent, célèbrent ou bousculent les multiples facettes de l’enfance, de l’adolescence et du passage à l’âge adulte.

Plus qu’un Festival, Jeunesse Tout Courts est un acte militant en faveur de la jeunesse comme sujet d’art et de société, un espace de liberté pour les voix émergentes, une tribune pour celles et ceux qui osent filmer l’intime, l’invisible, le réel parfois brut. 
C’est aussi un engagement profond pour :
L’éducation à l’image, par la sensibilisation de jeunes jurés, d’élèves, de familles, à la puissance du court-métrage.
La démocratisation culturelle, avec un accès totalement gratuit, ouvert à toutes les générations, dans un territoire rural qui devient scène internationale.
La transmission, en offrant un espace de rencontre entre publics, réalisateurs, enseignants, professionnels du cinéma et mécènes de la culture.

Artists, directors, and some of the greatest talents worldwide trust Kouz Studio’s mixing or recording facilities: Eva Green, Diane Kruger, Matthew Fox, Denis Villeneuve, Taika Waititi, Penelope Cruz, Antoine Bardou-Jacquet, Gustave Kervern & Benoit Delepine, Matthijs Van Heijningen, Mathieu Kassovitz, Wes Anderson, Gwen Stefani, Karl Lagerfeld, Gesaffelstein, Joseph Arthur, Mirwais, Brodinski…

Name: Pulsão Filmes
Description:
Pulsão é um impulso energético que parte de dentro e molda nossas ações e nos conduz em direção às nossas realizações. E não há nada melhor para definir a nossa maneira de trabalhar. O cinema sempre foi uma paixão, desde criança quando assistíamos extasiados aos filmes das décadas de 80 e início de 90. Atiçou tanta a curiosidade que nos fez buscar entender como aquilo, que só acontecia dentro daquela tela gigante, era possível. Essas experiências colocaram no sangue a necessidade de criar as nossas próprias histórias. E através de muito empenho, conseguimos transformar esse sonho em realidade. Já contamos inúmeras histórias, nossas e de muitos outros. E é essa paixão que nos faz pulsar para seguir contando.

Em uma era digital e extremamente dinâmica, soluções audiovisuais são cada vez mais requisitadas e necessárias para se comunicar com o público de forma direta e assertiva. Seja por meio de vídeos corporativos, entrevistas, canais de youtube, conteúdo para as redes sociais, programas de televisão, branded-content, comerciais, clipes, podcasts, documentários ou curta-metragens, nossa equipe é apaixonada por contar histórias e está preparada para entregar um resultado de qualidade, de forma ágil, com soluções para todos os tamanhos de projetos!

Name: Lund International Fantastic Film Festival
Description:
The festival is a proud member of the European Federation for Fantastic Film and takes place in Lund, Sweden, in September-October every year since 1995.

Fantastic film is usually used as a collective term for film genres like science fiction, fantasy and horror. But we do not set narrow limits for what can be screened at the festival. In short fantastic cinema is about imagination. The aim of the festival is to help stretch the limits of the imagination, and to reinforce the intrinsic value of imagination in films.

Name: Cinéma(s) d'Iran
Description:
Portée par un même intérêt, celui d’améliorer la compréhension de la culture iranienne en France, l’Association Cinéma(s) d’Iran, composée d’étudiants, de professionnels de cinéma et de cinéphiles amoureux de l’Iran, tous bénévoles, a été créée en 2011 pour mettre en place des manifestations culturelles suscitant rencontres et dialogues franco-iraniens.

Ses activités se traduisent notamment par :
• « Les Samedis du Cinéma Iranien » : un rendez-vous mensuel réunissant plus de 100 personnes autour d’un film iranien au cinéma Le Nouvel Odéon et d’un débat des spécialistes du cinéma iranien et certains réalisateurs venus depuis l’étranger présenter leur film.
• Un site internet, une page Facebook, un compte Instagram, et un compte Twitter dédiés à l’histoire et l’actualité du cinéma iranien.
• L’organisation annuelle du Festival Cinéma(s) d’Iran.
• L’organisation d’avant-premières de films inédits en vue de leur sortie nationale, en collaboration avec le distributeur français.
• L’élargissement du répertoire cinématographique iranien pour la France par la traduction et le sous-titrage de films inédits.
• L’établissement de partenariats avec diverses institutions culturelles et artistiques pour la promotion et le soutien des relations culturelles franco-iraniennes.

Cada empresa se encuentra en un estado diferente, hay empresas que recién se lanzaron al mercado, otras llevan muchos años activas y se encuentran en situaciones sin crecimiento, otras empresas no logran la retención de sus clientes y pierden movimiento en ciertas etapas del año. Para los diferentes desafíos que el emprendimiento puede enfrentar, se encuentran oportunidades para sobrellevarlos utilizando contenidos de video marketing.
Chromatic Video Marketing consiste en una preparación estratégica del cliente para crear una campaña especifica e impulsar su negocio según el estado que tiene en el mercado actualmente y según el camino que desea tomar para el crecimiento de su empresa.

By funding our films through donors rather than investors, we get to put people to work and our profits go toward future stories and philanthropy, rather than investors and filmmakers.

ImaginColor développe sans cesse des outils et des méthodes de colorisation, avec un important travail de recherche sur le rendu naturel des couleurs. Nous faisons des investigations approfondies pour retrouver la couleur juste avec le concours de nombreux historiens.

Nos studios sont à Paris, et toutes les étapes de la colorisation et de la restauration numérique sont assurées en France ce qui autorise une grande proximité avec les réalisateurs, les producteurs et les diffuseurs. C’est aussi le meilleur gage d’une parfaite cohérence historique et artistique.

Name: Films Femmes Afrique Festival
Description:
Films Femmes Afrique presents the 6th edition of its film festival from April 26 to 10, 2024 in Dakar and the regions. The theme of this year's festival is "Climate Emergency & Peace". 

We are a festival that shows films made by African women and/or about the experiences of women and girls from Africa and the diaspora. We have already organized 5 editions, showing 220 films in 100 cinemas. Our ambition is to screen films from the African continent and the Diaspora to the widest possible audience. Since 2003, the date of our first edition, 32,000 spectators have gathered in front of the screen. 

All screenings, whether in high schools, social centers, open air or movie theaters, are free and open to all. They are followed by debates between professionals and the public. It's also an opportunity to reward female directors, who receive a jury prize at the end of the festival. The festival also encourages the training of women filmmakers, with 12 young women selected for free training each year. At the end of the training, a film is made as a collective. 

This year, an ecological village will be set up on the Place de la Mairie to raise environmental awareness among young audiences.

Name: MTPIFF - MONTPELLIER INDEPENDENT FILM FESTIVAL
Description:
MTPIFF – Montpellier Independent Film Festival

Le MTPIFF est un festival international hybride consacré exclusivement aux films de fiction indépendants – courts et longs métrages.
Basé à Montpellier, il met en lumière chaque mois les talents émergents et confirmés du cinéma indépendant à travers une sélection en ligne mensuelle (régionale, nationale et internationale).

Chaque mois, un jury récompense les meilleures créations avec des lauriers officiels, certificats et distinctions (Meilleur court métrage, Meilleur long métrage, Meilleure réalisation, Meilleur scénario, Meilleur acteur et actrice, etc.).

 Les lauréats de chaque mois concourent automatiquement pour la finale annuelle 2025/2026, qui culminera lors d’un événement physique au cinéma de Montpellier en juillet 2026.
Au programme : projections des films primés, remise des prix, débats, masterclass et rencontres entre cinéastes et professionnels du secteur.

Notre mission est simple : soutenir la création indépendante et offrir une visibilité concrète aux réalisateurs, acteurs et scénaristes, en France et à l’international.

 Le festival est déjà accessible sur deux grandes plateformes :
	•	FilmFreeway : https://filmfreeway.com/MTPIFF-MontpellierIndependentFilmFestival
	•	Festhome : https://filmmakers.festhome.com/festivals#9717

Nous sommes également ouverts aux partenariats culturels, institutionnels et privés, afin de développer ensemble un événement unique qui met à l’honneur le cinéma indépendant dans toute sa diversité.

 MTPIFF – Mettre en lumière les films indépendants, courts et longs, venus du monde entier.

Akasacara Film is a small independent multimedia company based in Yogyakarta, Indonesia. Akasacara Film has a role to provide creative innovation in multimedia. Akasacara Film produced a film and distributed it to film festivals and cinemas. The creations which have been produced by Akasacara Film include narrative films, documentary films, company profiles, advertisements, video tutorials, infographic videos, 2D and 3D animation, video projection mapping, and visual effects.
In 2018, Akasacara Film succeeded in releasing the first feature film entitled TENGKORAK / SKULL (science fiction) which reached the national cinema market despite the zero A-list actors and the 98% of its crew being non-professional volunteers. Akasacara Film succeeded to get 41,194 audiences in cinema. Not only the national cinema market, but Akasacara Film’s SKULL has also successfully reached international markets and Festivals, including Indonesia on Screen Babylon Berlin Germany, ASEAN International Film Festival, Jogja-NETPAC Asian Film Festival, Cinequest VR Film Festival, Asia Africa International Film Festival & BaliNale International Film Festival. It was brought by Taiwan Television and legal streaming in the USA. It is also planned to be launched in a new legal streaming service in Indonesia.
Location: Perumahan Mranggen Baru, Nomer 6, Sinduadi, Mlati, Sleman, Yogyakarta

Name: Film and Projection Heritage Network
Description:
Between 2011 and 2013 the film industry in the UK rapidly converted to digital cinema. This was a decision taken for commercial reasons and was indeed an important and historic moment in the development of cinema. However, we are of the standing that digital as a medium is not a replacement for celluloid and where possible films already on celluloid should be continued to shown as such. There are plenty of arguments to support the continued running of 35mm with many of them related to aesthetics and the requirement of a projectionist to ensure faultless presentation – this however can only be achieved with well maintained equipment, screen-able prints and highly trained staff.

Celluloid in recent years has made a comeback and its value (as many things do when they diminish) has started to increase. Now going to see a film print is considered an experience and a renewed appreciation for the medium has surfaced. We are firmly of the belief that prints held in archives should continue be accessible to audiences and not be left to gather dust on shelves unseen. We encourage and fully support the continued exhibition of these prints in line with FIAF standards. We also recognise and fully support cinemas who continue to run distribution (non - archive) prints on platter systems and we pledge to offer our services where they may be required.

 However, this cannot happen if equipment, skills and prints are lost to history. It is critical that we ACT now to PRESERVE this heritage for the FUTURE.

les Bobines du paysage expérimentent de nouveaux outils d’observation, d’analyse, de sensibilisation et de médiation dans les domaines du paysage.

Les Bobines s’appuient sur des moyens de représentation et de dialogue alternatifs (vidéo, photo, animation graphique), dans le but d’offrir un regard neuf sur les problématiques paysagères. L’équipe propose ainsi de nouvelles formes de débat public sur les questions territoriales contemporaines (politiques publiques, dynamiques citoyennes, urbanisme, agriculture, cadre de vie, transition énergétique, patrimoine, écologie, histoire, etc...).

Depuis 2012, le collectif développe son approche au travers de projets portant sur des thématiques diverses et auprès d’acteurs publics, associatifs ou dans un cadre universitaire.

À l’image de l’approche du paysagiste, le collectif propose d’aborder chaque territoire et chaque situation dans ses spécificités, tout en les inscrivant dans les échelles territoriales, dans les dynamiques et dans les problématiques qui les transcendent.

Als artiest heb ik jarenlang voor de camera gestaan. Door de vele foto en videoshoots was mijn interesse voor foto en videografie ontstaan. Ik begon zelf met een smartphone te experimenteren en kwam erachter dat er veel meer voor nodig is om een mooi plaatje te schieten. Ik begon mij te verdiepen in verschillende foto & filmtechnieken en toen ik mijn eerste camera kocht wist ik dat dit mijn nieuwe passie zou worden.

La sceneggiatura al centro.

Mentre altri festival assegnano riconoscimenti come migliore regia, migliore fotografia, miglior montaggio, il Written by Script e FIlm Festival premia le principali componenti della scrittura cinematografica: migliore sceneggiatura, miglior soggetto, migliori dialoghi, miglior plot dei cortometraggi che verranno selezionati e proiettati il 7 e 8 Giugno durante il festival al TheCineclub in Via Lidia 46.


                      

Come si fa a premiare la sceneggiatura di un corto già realizzato?

Oltre al cortometraggio, verrà richiesto l’invio della sceneggiatura utilizzata durante le riprese (shooting script). Questa sarà consultabile fisicamente negli spazi del festival per dare la possibilità a tutti di conoscere la penna degli autori e delle autrici.

Il nostro obiettivo è creare un ponte tra artisti e produzioni, consentendo un'interazione fluida e proficua. Grazie alla nostra identità distintiva, siamo certi di poter attrarre compositori di ogni calibro, dai talenti emergenti ai noti maestri di composizione, offrendo soluzioni personalizzate a case di produzione cinematografica, music supervisor e registi.
Ezechiele 25:17 nasce dall'esperienza e dalla passione di professionisti del settore musicale e audiovisivo, unendo competenze artistiche e gestionali. La nostra agenzia è il risultato di anni di lavoro nel campo della musica per l'immagine, durante i quali abbiamo osservato le sfide e le opportunità affrontate dai compositori.
Ezechiele 25:17 è stata fondata con l'intento di colmare un gap nel mercato, dove spesso le produzioni faticano a trovare il talento giusto, abbiamo creato Ezechiele 25:17 per  diventare un nuovo punto di riferimento, unendo artisti e produzioni in modo sinergico.

Name: Short&Sweet
Description:
Welcome to Short&Sweet! We curate, distribute, exhibit and promote short film and are dedicated to giving short filmmakers a platform to share their art with the world.

Short&Sweet has done the hard yards, we have witnessed the power of the medium, screening short films across cultures and borders. Launched as London’s only weekly short film evening in 2006, Short&Sweet has curated short film programmes for audiences in 21 cities and continues to connect moving image art to new audiences.

According to the founder, Julia Stephenson, the short film medium has the power to ‘liberate, educate, connect and delight. It is the most important medium of the future’.

Short Film isn’t merely a condensed version of a feature film, it is a critical art form on its own. Short film is a vehicle for those important messages that fall through the cracks of a worldwide media machine. It doesn’t need grand story arcs, dialogue or even actors, it allows filmmakers to stretch their imagination and experiment with new techniques – and so even just by its mere existence as an artform, it changes our idea of storytelling. Short film crosses borders, languages, cultures and creeds.

Name: Cinemajestic Zutphen
Description:
Cinemajestic verwelkom jaarlijks 130.000 bezoekers. Sinds 2005 heeft de bioscoop in Zutphen een grote aantrekkingskracht voor jong en oud. Niet alleen voor de gewone bezoeker is er veel te beleven, ook op zakelijk gebied is er veel mogelijk. Zo kun je hier als bedrijf adverteren op het witte doek maar Cinemajestic is ook uitermate geschikt voor zakelijke bijeenkomsten van 2 tot 300 personen.

Een bezoek brengen aan Cinemajestic bied je vele voordelen. De bioscoop beschikt over de nieuwste technieken zoals 3D HFR films en 360 graden geluid, waardoor het lijkt alsof u zich middenin de film bevindt. Hiernaast kun je heerlijk genieten van een goede film waarbij je goed zicht hebt op het scherm en ook nog eens wordt bediend bij je stoel. Je hoeft bij deze servicebioscoop alleen maar op het knopje te drukken en er komt iemand bij je om je bestelling op te nemen. Deze wordt dan zo snel mogelijk naar je toe gebracht, zodat je onder het genot van een hapje of drankje de film verder kunt kijken. Naast deze service is er ook een gratis parkeerplaats naast de bioscoop. 

De bioscoop organiseert kinderfeestjes, maar heeft ook veel specials voor groot en klein. De VIP-middag voor 50-plussers en kindermiddagen voor de kleintjes. Er zijn heel veel specials. Van ladiesnights tot mannenavonden en van ontbijtvoorstellingen tot filmmarathons. Reserveren kan heel gemakkelijk via de website. 

Genoeg redenen dus om eens een bezoekje te brengen aan Cinemajestic.

Name: Boston Arts, Sports, and Entertainment LLP
Description:
We are a new kind of entertainment company. We are at the nexus of the entertainment industry, offering world-class services designed to bring the very best in arts, sports, and entertainment to the world. We represent world-class entertainers, artists, comedians, social media influencers, musicians, film/movie professionals, television professionals, writers, professional athletes, and entertainment industry talent. Like our clients, we are the very best of the best. Our professionals understand not only the legal aspects of the industry but also the practical industry standards that are critical to maximizing our clients success. Ideally, artists, athletes, and entertainment professionals should spend their time perfecting their craft rather than dealing with the important, yet otten mundane, aspects of maximizing the financial return on their talent. We represent clients from around the world and specialize in bringing world-class talent together to create a synergy that benefits all parties involved. It's no secret that success in one area can create ripple ettects that stretch into numerous other opportunities. For example, a successful athlete likely has opportunities in television, promotion, movies, music, and various types of entertainment that are readily avallable to those who know how to take advantage of them. We offer our technology and contacts around the globe to set us apart and share
innovative, cutting-edge opportunities to our clients, and connect them with other successful professionals to create unique and lucrative relationships that benefit all parties involved. We also believe In social
consciousness, supporting altruistic organizations such as Fine Artists, BBF, the Light Foundation, the Cannabis Series, the Shriners, the Lupus Foundation, and many others. In short, we are a philanthropic "one-stop creative shop" for worldwide entertainment professionals.

Name: Poolhert Productions
Description:
Ellen and Marie. Marie and Ellen. Doesn’t matter whose name comes in first, because we’re a package deal. We complete each other. Like well-glued wallpaper. As friends, and as co-directors. Marie is researcher and script writer, Ellen is our cinematographer and editor.

 

Looking for green screens or special effects? Don’t bother. We tell everyday stories from everyday people, from your grandma to our DHL guy. Because they’re grand in their own small way. We capture their beauty and point it out to the world. As a documentary or a piece of fiction, with music or without, but always in their full glory.

 

 “What about your name? Poolhert. Is that some kind of animal?” That’s what you’re thinking, right? It’s both of our last names glued together. Made it up at a bar one night. But after six years of making films together it’s more than that. It’s our mark. Our signature. It’s our way of looking at the world. A world in which ordinary people with ordinary lives just might have the most extraordinary stories to tell. 

 

Today, there’s three of us. Maxim, our editor, is in charge of post-production. From editing to grading, he has the technical skills to get any film ready to be seen.

 

Yes, we’re filmmakers, but Poolhert is a production company too. Just not in the traditional sense of the word. For commercial work, you can just hire us to tell your story, whether it’s a music or campaign video, a company film, or any other type of video content. Documentaries and fiction on the other hand, we only (co)produce if we’re free do our own thing with it. Why? Because this is what we love to do. So, we’re in it completely or not at all.

Name: Supreme Music Group
Description:
Musikaufnahmen im audiophilen Bereich. Die hybride SACD im physischen und Dolby Atmos im digitalen Bereich, sind für uns Standard und nicht Luxus!

Die Supreme Music Group versteht sich nicht nur als Tonträgerproduzent, sondern als Botschafter einer visionären Klangkultur. Jede Aufnahme ist eine Momentaufnahme der Ewigkeit und eine Hommage an die Kunst des bewussten Zuhörens: »Es geht nicht darum, den Moment einzufangen. Es geht darum, die Musik für die Ewigkeit zu gestalten.« Mit dieser Philosophie möchte die Supreme Music Group Hörer weltweit berühren und begeistern.

Label: Supreme Classics (LC102095)
Die beiden Gründer Paul Halwax und Harry Gruber verfolgen das Ziel, eine unverwechselbare Klangkultur zu schaffen, wie sie in der Tradition der Wiener Philharmoniker tief verwurzelt ist. Mit dem reichen Erbe der Wiener Klassik, interpretiert von renommierten internationalen Künstlern, will die Supreme Music Group mit dem Label Supreme Classics weltweit Furore machen. Vorgesehen ist auch die Zusammenarbeit mit hochkarätigen Musikern aus der internationalen Klassikszene. »Qualität beginnt dort, wo der Standard endet« – dieser Gedanke ist das Fundament aller Projekte der Supreme Music Group.
WIr sehen es als unsere Verantwortung, die visionären Gedanken von Herbert von Karajan fortzuführen. Seine Überzeugung, dass »eine Aufnahme ein Werk für die Ewigkeit ist«, prägt die Mission des Unternehmens weit über die musikalischen Einspielungen hinaus.

Label: Supreme Music Group (LC102097)
Auf diesem Label erscheinen alle anderen Musikgenres, die nicht in die reine Definition der Klassik fallen. Das kann Klassik Crossover sein aber auch Singer Songwriter, Jazz etc. Daher auch die Bezeichnung Group im Labelnamen. Die Philosophie des Unternehmens spiegelt sich allerdings in diesem Label auch wider: Musik für die Ewigkeit zu schaffen und das in höchster Wiedergabequalität!

Name: International Crime And Punishment Film Festival
Description:
International Crime and Punishment Film Festival is a themed festival which aims to make a cultural impact on the theme of justice, using art and science’s impactful language and to enrich the socio-cultural life, regarding people’s rights and freedom.

The festival, which started in 2011 for the first time under the guidance of Istanbul University – Faculty of Law, has created a wide scientific discussion platform with the representatives of cinema, law, psychology, sociology, political science and non-governmental organizations, by meeting the justice themed films from the world cinema with the audience.

Other than the film screenings, competitions and the discussion program, which were formed with the justice volunteers who support the festival from all around the world, with the VisionIST, which was aimed towards the film industry, the festival is trying to support filmmakers and to contribute to the cinema sector.

The festival which preserves the title of being a thematic festival and brings together an academic platform with the cinema world, encourage the audience to think about and discuss justice, and make decisions for the future with the participation of the academicians and filmmakers every year in Istanbul. Festival’s motto, which has been maintained for 13 years, is “Justice For All”.

Over the years we’ve worked hard to be hyper aware of the market and create a strong but agile work ethic to better suit your needs in this ever changing industry.

But really…why would you choose JSAYcreative Productions?

The answer is simple:
Because we care.

Why Do We Care?
While we greatly regard your company, we also truly care about you and your clientele. For us, it is not just about making you a happy customer, but we truly care about you as individuals.
We believe in focusing on the value of a positive impact at both a personal and business level. Not only should the work we provide for you create a great rapport with your customers but also have a positive influence on their lives.
Besides, isn’t time to really make this world a better place? 

The best place to start with your company and ours.

Description:
Sono Max Franchini, founder di Max Franchini Studios, uno studio che supporta aziende, professionisti e creator nella loro presenza digitale attraverso servizi di web design, gestione e manutenzione siti, grafica tradizionale, brand identity e consulenza creativa. Il mio approccio unisce competenze tecniche e visione strategica per aiutare i clienti a comunicare in modo chiaro, moderno e coerente.

Accanto allo studio opera Stan Ford Video, la mia divisione dedicata alle produzioni video. Realizzo spot commerciali, contenuti corporate, video musicali, real estate video, format digitali e storytelling per brand. Unisco esperienza nel videomaking, regia, musica, scrittura creativa e post-produzione per trasformare idee complesse in contenuti visivi ad alto impatto.

Negli ultimi anni ho evoluto il mio workflow integrando strumenti avanzati di Intelligenza Artificiale, avatar digitali, animazione, sistemi 3D e pipeline ibride. Questo mi permette di creare contenuti più rapidi, versatili e innovativi, senza perdere la cura artigianale per la narrazione, il ritmo e l’estetica dell’immagine.

Il mio obiettivo è costruire un ponte tra creatività e tecnologia, mettendo a disposizione dei clienti soluzioni efficaci per comunicare meglio, diventare più riconoscibili e differenziarsi in un mercato sempre più competitivo.

Su questo profilo condivido progetti, behind the scenes, riflessioni sul futuro del videomaking, case study e sperimentazioni nel campo dell’AI applicata ai contenuti digitali.

Max Franchini Studios — Creatività, tecnologia e supporto digitale per la tua comunicazione.
Stan Ford Video — La divisione video che trasforma idee in esperienze visive.

Name: Rutger Langendonk Films
Description:
Het licht valt precies goed. De camera draait. De energie op de set is voelbaar. Wat begon als een idee op papier, is nu een productie in volle gang. Als regisseur stuur ik het geheel aan, maar in mijn hoofd draait de montage al. 

Een subtiele beweging, een blik, een geluid dat precies de juiste sfeer vangt— elk shot krijgt zijn plek, elk detail draagt bij aan het grotere geheel. Het doel? Een verhaal dat blijft hangen.

Bij het monteren zorg ik voor ritme en flow. Hier komt het verhaal écht tot leven. Elke scène en elk detail worden zorgvuldig geplaatst, zodat het eindresultaat krachtig en authentiek is. Of het nu groot of klein is, elk project verdient die aandacht — en die aandacht komt voort uit mijn passie.

Laten we samen iets bijzonders maken.

Name: SEFEX - safety film experts, s.r.o.
Description:
MAKING FILM INDUSTRY SAFER!

We are an international company operating in Central Europe with offices in the Czech Republic and Slovakia and complying with the highest quality standards.

We are a proud family-owned business specialising in top-notch health and safety services. Thanks to our family foundation, we’re committed to a personal touch and a high level of expertise. For you, this means meticulous attention to every detail and trust in the fact that your safety is not just a professional matter for us, but a personal mission. we pride ourselves on being systematic in everything we do and reducing entropy.

We specialize in the implementation full H&S service, fire protection, mental health wellbeing and management of SARS-CoV2 measures in the film industry. Including the implementation of processes, cast, crew & staff training, and the provision of protective equipment. We are here to ensure our clients don\’t have to compromise their creative intention in order to keep their project cast & crew safe.

We have extensive experience in aligning H&S standards of foreign platforms (for ex. NETFLIX, AMAZON, HBO,…) with local standards and their alignment during filming, thank to active cooperation with H&S representative of the platform. We are in close cooperation with the European Institute for H&S in the Film Industry and collaborate on scientific projects under their expert guarantee.

Name: Calov
Description:
A Calov atua na idealização e produção de filmes, séries e vídeos que promovam a representatividade, a inclusão e a diversidade, estimulando a reflexão, a ampliação da sensibilidade, a expansão de consciência e o desenvolvimento crítico e expressivo da realidade; destaque para o curta-metragem "A Travessia - Um Poema Para Sidarta" (licenciado para TV pela O2 Play, selecionado nos festivais Lift-Off Film Festival e Cinema Negro em Ação, e referenciado no Short Film Market Catalog 2022 do Festival Clermont-Ferrand).

A Calov tem como compromisso principal a inserção de pessoas negras, indígenas e LGBTQIA+ em funções-chave e de liderança no audiovisual, como produção, roteiro, direção, fotografia e arte, dando protagonismo a essas comunidades no desenvolvimento das histórias e na inserção como elenco principal. A intenção é propor a construção de novas narrativas em filmes, séries e demais conteúdos audiovisuais através de histórias contadas sob o viés de novos olhares, e dessa forma, desconstruir estereótipos e o olhar hegemônico presente no audiovisual.

Some other titles include THE ELEPHANT KING with Academy Award winner Ellen Burstyn for Unison Films,  SECRET SHARER, directed by Oscar winning film-maker Peter Fudakowski (TSOTSI).

De Warrenne Pictures also produced acclaimed movies such as GHOST OF MAE NAK, MINDFULNESS AND MURDER, THE LAST EXECUTIONER and SOI COWBOY (Un Certain Regard - Cannes Film Festival 2008) and is a member of the Federation of National Film Associations of Thailand. De Warrenne Pictures recently produced THE CAVE, the first narrative feature film about the dramatic cave rescue in Thailand (summer 2018), which was released in 2019. A new international version, CAVE RESCUE, is distributed by Lionsgate in the US.

Description:
Flow is an international sales & production company based in Paris dedicated to short films.

The distribution arm is dedicated to representing eclectic short films on the international market. Driven by a desire to work in different media, Fløw acquires animated, live-action and documentary films.

We choose to work on a limited number of films per year, in order to establish a personalized distribution strategy for each film.

We like to spotlight directors and production companies from all over the world. Our line-up includes films from all over the world, from the Ivory Coast to Burma and the USA.

Fløw currently has 33 films in its catalog, which has diversified with each new acquisition.

12 are first films, 27 are French, including 5 international co-productions, and 6 others come exclusively from abroad (Burma, Spain, USA, Poland). The company has 2 animated films, 2 documentaries, 4 genre films and 2 musicals.

These include Snow in September directed by Lkhagvadulam (Dulmaa) Purev-Ochir (Golden Lion at Venice Film Festival, Best Short Film at Toronto IFF), La Pursé, a Brazilian stop-motion short (SITGES, Palm Spring), Sol Béni by Belgian collective Bleunuit (Tribeca Champs-Élysées Film Festival, Hamptons IFF, Cinemania, Brussels SFF) Better Than Earth by Sherif El Bendary (Clermont Ferrand, Tirana, Fespaco) Contadores by Irati Gorostidi Agirretxe (Cannes - Semaine de la Critique, San Sebastian) The Weight of Light by Anna Hints (Tampere, Odense, POFF) and more.

The company is also developing its production division. We have just completed post-production on two live-action short films, which we will be supporting in distribution.

Name: Contingent Films
Description:
Contingent Films is a boutique production company based in Western Australia, specialising in crafting socially impactful documentaries that resonate with audiences worldwide. We combine authentic storytelling with technical expertise to produce high-quality observational documentaries that educate, inspire, and connect people across cultures.
Our work has reached over 50 territories through partnerships with major broadcasters and platforms, including Warner Discovery, Channel 7, RAI Italy, NTV Germany, Ushuaïa TV France, ByteDance, Al Jazeera, and iQiyi.

Our mission is to tell stories that spark meaningful conversations and foster real-world change. We aim to become a global leader in socially impactful storytelling, creating a legacy of visually stunning, emotionally resonant content that connects audiences across the globe.
Notable Titles:
Extreme Animal Transport (10 x 30 minutes): A behind-the-scenes look at the logistics of transporting animals, distributed to Warner Discovery (New Zealand), Channel 7 (Australia), RAI Italy, NTV Germany, and Ushuaïa TV (France).
Saving the Wild (4 x 60 minutes 4K): An exploration of wildlife conservation efforts, distributed to over 40 territories, including China, South Korea, the USA, France, and Canada.
Our Goals:
Expand Global Reach: Increase distribution to 70+ territories by partnering with international broadcasters and distributors.
Grow the Slate: Develop and produce three new projects annually, covering topics like mental health, environmental conservation, and cultural exploration.
Leverage Technology: Use AI-powered tools to streamline production.
Collaborate Globally: Strengthen partnerships at industry events like Mipcom, World Congress of Science and Factual Producers, and the Australian International Documentary Conference.
Foster Talent Development: Support emerging filmmakers with training in storytelling and production.

Name: Festival Films Femmes Afrique (Women's African Film Festival)
Description:
Films Femmes Afrique presents the 6th edition of its film festival from April 26 to 10, 2024 in Dakar and the regions. The theme of this year's festival is "Climate Emergency & Peace". 

We are a festival that shows films made by African women and/or about the experiences of women and girls from Africa and the diaspora. We have already organized 5 editions, showing 220 films in 100 cinemas. Our ambition is to screen films from the African continent and the Diaspora to the widest possible audience. Since 2003, the date of our first edition, 32,000 spectators have gathered in front of the screen. 

All screenings, whether in high schools, social centers, open air or movie theaters, are free and open to all. They are followed by debates between professionals and the public. It's also an opportunity to reward female directors, who receive a jury prize at the end of the festival. The festival also encourages the training of women filmmakers, with 12 young women selected for free training each year. At the end of the training, a film is made as a collective. 

This year, an ecological village will be set up on the Place de la Mairie to raise environmental awareness among young audiences.

Name: Owl Eye Records
Description:
Owl Eye Records, a division of Owl Eye Entertainment Group is a production music library or original works and label for independent artists. 

A partnership with Owl Eye Records is ideal for artists who:

    * Write and compose their own material
    * Wish to have their original works placed into visual media
    * Prefer to delegate promotional efforts to a third party
    * Focus 90% or more of their energies on their craft
    * Have little time for self promotion
    * Lack the know-how to self-promote
    * Seek to draw on the resources of industry professionals
    * Can afford to commit a minimal investment toward self promotion

More importantly, our service fees are within reason, up front and with no surprises -- we don't own you or your music. You're the boss!

Our mission is to create a promotional atmosphere where artists both vocal and instrumental can thrive and grow in their art without worrying about promotional representation. In our experience as musicians, we've learned that talent alone may not land an artist where they're trying to go -- the path can be much smoother with the support of others who have traveled along that piece of road. We invite you to add Owl Eye Records to your team.
