Support us and enable us to continue to be pioneers in social change! 

Moldox International Documentary Film Festival for Social Change aims to contribute to a better society through documentary film that invites the public to reflect on current issues and identify solutions.

Name: Bello Films
Description:
A Bello Produções trabalha com três pilares fundamentais para oferecer a mais alta qualidade em cada serviço. 

Criatividade: Nossa filosofia é estar sempre criando/inovando. Não queremos fazer sempre os mesmos tipos de filmes. Estamos em contínuo aprendizado e desenvolvimento criativo para oferecermos algo muito além do convencional. Há um investimento constante em cursos e novas técnicas. Queremos surpreender você!

Experiência e expertise: O tempo gera amadurecimento profissional, sensibilidade com o cliente e refinamento de habilidades. Colocamos ao seu dispor mais de 30 anos de experiência em produções que emocionam e causam impactos. Todo esse tempo tem aperfeiçoado nossa expertise em produções cinematográficas. Confiar é fundamental quando seu negócio ou projeto é o foco do serviço.

Alta Tecnologia: O investimento pesado em equipamento de alta tecnologia e desempenho é uma de nossas marcas principais. Estamos sempre buscando no exterior o que de melhor podemos oferecer a nossos clientes em termos de tecnologia para produção de filmes. Queremos sempre oferecer o que há de melhor em imagem, som e edição. Prezamos pelas mais alta qualidade de nossos equipamentos.

Name: Cinema Planeta, Festival Internacional de Cine y Medio Ambiente de México
Description:
Cinema Planeta es el festival de cinematográfico que promueve la protección del medio ambiente a través de lo mejor de la cinematografía mundial más importante de México. Se lleva a cabo anualmente en la ciudad de Cuernavaca en México.
En sus 14 años de vida ha proyectado innumerables producciones cinematográficas, que a través de documentales o ficciones, largometrajes y cortometrajes, abordando distintas temáticas como son la conservación, el desarrollo sustentable, el cambio climático, los recursos naturales, las energías, la salud, la alimentación entre muchos otros temas.

Cinema Planeta es una organización de la sociedad civil galardonada por la Comisión Nacional de Áreas Naturales Protegidas (CONANP) en el 2010, así como por la Fundación Miguel Alemán A.C. con el premio de Ecología y Medio Ambiente en el año 2017.

Name: Film Location Riviera
Description:
The goal of Film Location Riviera is to promote the Swiss Riviera Montreux-Vevey-Lavaux as a filming region.

Welcome to the Montreux-Vevey area. Here you will find an incredible variety of film locations, from the deep blue waters of Lake Geneva to the year-round winter landscapes of Glacier 3000.

Along the way, enjoy a wide array of architectural masterpieces, from century-old castles to Le Corbusier’s Villa Le Lac near Vevey.

Local expertise is also readily available for film crews: location scouts, set decorators, camera assistants, sound engineers... you name it, we’ve got it! If you need help finding a local crew to work with, just give us a call!

The Montreux-Vevey region is one big open-air studio where most locations can be reached within minutes, and no single location is more than an hour away from your hotel. Enjoy the comfort of shooting in one of Switzerland’s most picturesque areas, while getting your work done quickly and efficiently, thereby saving precious time and money.

Name: Frame2Frame Filmproduktion
Description: „Unser Ziel ist es, Bilder und Videos mit herausragender Qualität, echten Emotionen und hohen Wiedererkennungswert zu erschaffen. Der Fokus liegt darauf, mithilfe von modernstem Kamera-Equipment und kreativen Konzepten individuelle Lösungen für unsere Kunden und Partner zu realisieren.“

Name: Creating A Space
Description:
Creating A Space is a video production company based in Belfast that specialises in creating story-led video & photography content for creative brands.

With Creating A Space, I want to help creative business owners maximise their video content for their brand and help generate sales for their business. 

Video has become such an important form of media when it comes to building your brand and selling products/services online. 

I focus solely on storytelling, and how we can create visually impactful video content that really engages your customer. To create video content that evokes emotion and represents your brand with your tone of voice.

My aim is to make it a seamless process for you, by taking control in creating your video content. I help free up time for you so that you can focus on the other sides of your business. 

I also specialise in telling stories through documentaries, and I always push myself to create projects that include a diversity of perspectives. 

My most recent project is called 'How They See Us' which investigates how people from different backgrounds navigate their lives.

I am curious to see how people think society sees them as an individual, and what labels & stereotypes have been placed upon them based on how they look or where they are "from".

In this season, I interviewed 5 amazing individuals from different cultural backgrounds, who shared their experiences of what it is like being a person of colour in Northern Ireland and what their experiences have been like growing up here.

We talked about the struggles of navigating identity, representation, grief, belonging, race, discrimination and self-love & acceptance.

Name: Verama Filmes

Mesclando sempre o valor artístico e o potencial comercial em seus projetos, a Verama Filmes tem como objetivo tornar-se uma referência no mercado na criação e formação de grandes histórias, que fujam do lugar comum, seja misturando gêneros ou transitando entre os diferentes formatos midiáticos.

Asimismo, nos caracterizamos por contar historias fuera de lo común sobre personajes usualmente marginados, para así explorar la realidad a través de personajes que la cuestionan. Utilizando para la creación de nuestras historias aproximaciones tanto psicológicas como filosóficas.

We are living in a fast-paced era, especially in this generation, we need high-quality and digestible content FAST! What better way to serve up a tasty treat to your user’s eyes then a perfectly presented video.
Professional business video production offers a massive benefit to your online presence. Statistics show that audience engagement with video content is much higher compared to text-based posts; using a professional video production company can make the difference between standing out or being lost in the crowded world of online media.
We offer a range of videography services under this umbrella covering; business and corporate overview videos, product explainer and commercial product presentation videos also known as product commercials, music videos, electronic press kits, marketing videos and everything in between. Name: Mick Vogels Video
Description:
ROCK 'N ROLL THE CAMERA... AND ACTION!
 
Mick Vogels Video is een onderneming van freelance cameraman en video-editor Mick Vogels. Enthousiasme, aandacht voor detail, kwaliteit en creativiteit spelen de hoofdrol in het gehele proces.

U kunt bij Mick Vogels Video o.a. terecht voor commercials, corporate video, after movies, music video en andere vormen van promotionele en visuele content.

Uw ideeën en wensen worden zorgvuldig doorgenomen.

Mick is gecertificeerd cameraman en editor met uitstap naar Cinematografie. Hij werkt nauw samen met journalisten en producenten in de audiovisuele branche.



KWALITEIT:
 
Elke productie behoort kwalitatief opgenomen en afgeleverd te worden. Dat is altijd het doel.

Bij Mick Vogels Video wordt gewerkt met cinema camera's van merken als Blackmagic Design en RED Digital Cinema om kwalitatief beeld te produceren met hoge resoluties van HD tot 4.6K.

Middelen voor goede audio opname, belichting en camerabeweging behoren tot het arsenaal.

Om producties van een zo hoog mogelijke kwaliteit te voorzien worden deze middelen graag ingezet.

Mocht u vragen hebben over de inzet of werkwijze van bepaalde apparatuur kunt u gerust contact opnemen.

Hiervoor kunt u op de contact pagina kijken of mailen naar mickvogels@home.nl



WERKWIJZE:
 
Vrijblijvend kan een kennismakingsgesprek plaatsvinden. In dit gesprek bespreken we uw wensen, en bekijken we de mogelijkheden.

Vervolgens wordt overgegaan tot het maken van een of meerdere concepten.

Zodra het concept groen licht krijgt, wordt overgegaan tot het plannen van de opnames.

Na de opnames wordt het concept gemonteerd.

Mick Vogels Video beschikt over vele middelen om uw productie er persoonlijk en naar wens uit te laten zien.

Al uw wensen worden zorgvuldig besproken.
Uw film kan op verschillende manieren aangeleverd worden.

A Queer History", and "Unidad: Gay & Lesbian Latinos Unidos". The company also distributes films to a variety of platforms, including film festivals, television, and streaming services.

Film Bliss Studios is committed to producing high-quality films that tell stories that matter. The company's films are often LGBTQ-themed, and they explore a variety of social issues. info@filmbliss.net

Name: Revival Prop Hire
Description:
Revival is a retro furniture and prop hire business based in the West Midlands and operating throughout the UK, with a showroom and warehouse in South Warwickshire close to Leamington Spa.

We have a wide variety of retro/used office & commercial/institutional style furniture (desks, lockers, cabinets etc) based in various stores around the UK (North, Midlands and London). 

As a #sustainablefirst business, and an Albert (BAFTA) approved supplier, we help property companies and managers to repurpose and recycle surplus or redundant items so if you are struggling to find anything from the 1950s to present day, we will strive to get you some options even if we currently don't stock them. 

We also have a new venture which aims to recycle and repurpose sets and set-build materials and in coming months, we'll be working with a number of film and TV projects to reduce the amount of raw materials from being skipped and sent to landfill as well as helping property developers to reuse old materials.

Name: No Limits Media

Jeder Film, jedes Video, jedes Projekt hat einen eigenen Charakter und bringt andere Herausforderungen mit sich. Wir verfügen über langjährige Erfahrungen in der Filmproduktion und der Barrierefreiheit. Mit den gesetzlichen Rahmenbedingungen und Richtlinien der Filmförderanstalten sind wir bestens vertraut. Unsere ausgebildeten und erfahrenen Untertitler*innen, Übersetzer*innen und Autor*innen sind optimale Ansprechpartner*innen, wenn es darum geht, Ihre Inhalte Ihrem Publikum zugänglich zu machen.

 Based in Coimbatore | Serving brands across India & beyond.

Founded in 1982 in Lexington KY, Media Collaboratory is an award winning, boutique style, video production house, creating Script-to-Screen design for customers all around the globe.

Media Collaboratory is an incubator – where ideas and design come together in unique new-media solutions. To accomplish this, we assemble the best team of award-winning producers and collaborators with you in mind: writers, producers, directors, designers, shooters, editors, musicians, and animators – all dedicated to you – your idea, your budget, your project.

As a boutique style production house, we work nimbly with our clients to respond to the fast-changing video needs.  We work closely with our clients to tell their story effectively, accurately, and visually with the power of digital media and video, resulting in long-term partnerships.

We are an innovative start-up and independent film company, operating in the creative and cultural industry sectors, oriented to the development, production and marketing of cinematographic and audiovisual contents with high technological value, using specifically digital applications such as computers. 3D graphics, such as: CGI (computer-generated imagery) mixed with virtual reality.

Name: El Rayo Verde Producciones Audiovisuales
Description:
El Rayo Verde Producciones Audiovisuales nace en 2022 para llevar los productos de sus clientes a un nuevo nivel. La realización de vídeos y fotografías para redes sociales y webs se han convertido en un impulso único para las marcas, y nosotros cuidamos hasta el más mínimo detalle artístico para que el resultado sea el óptimo y deseado. 

La bandera de El Rayo Verde Producciones Audiovisuales es alcanzar en todos sus trabajos, grandes y pequeños, el mejor resultado visual, sin olvidarnos de la parte promocional del anunciante. Trabajamos junto al cliente para alcanzar el el resultado que siempre han estado soñando.

Name: Godoy
Description: A Godoy é uma produtora audiovisual que transforma visões em realidade. Com uma equipe talentosa e apaixonada, oferecemos soluções audiovisuais de alta qualidade para projetos diversos. A empresa possui uma abordagem colaborativa, buscando entender as necessidades dos clientes e utilizando equipamentos de ponta e técnicas inovadoras para criar momentos autênticos e histórias impactantes. Oferecemos um conjunto completo de serviços, incluindo produção de vídeos promocionais e publicitários, conteúdo cinematografico, vídeos corporativos, documentários, animações, conteúdo para redes sociais e serviços de pós-produção.

Description:
Our work is sometimes offbeat and unexpected. At times it’s sensitively treated and research driven. Whichever way you prefer, we take your story and make it epic.

We are an award-winning production company based in Cape Town, South Africa. We believe in shaping a story to speak to its audience and its purpose be it in documentary film, TV series and creative promotional content.

We also offer full production services in South Africa, Namibia and Botswana using our logistical mastery to ensure your production runs smoother than a dolly on tracks! We’ve helped roll out several international productions for reality shows, documentaries, photo shoots, and branded content.

Name: 218Films
Description:
Permíteme presentarte a 218films, una productora especializada en la creación de contenido audiovisual de alta calidad. Nos enorgullece ofrecer servicios integrales de producción y desarrollo, abarcando una amplia gama de formatos, desde documentales hasta comerciales, videos institucionales, videos corporativos, videoclips, cortometrajes y largometrajes.

En 218films, creemos en la importancia de la comunicación colaborativa con nuestros clientes. Trabajamos estrechamente con ellos para comprender sus objetivos y visibilizar sus productos o servicios de manera efectiva. Nuestro enfoque se basa en la generación de piezas audiovisuales innovadoras y originales que transmitan mensajes claros y tengan un impacto social significativo.

Nos enorgullece crear contenido que va más allá de lo convencional, utilizando técnicas y enfoques creativos para destacar y diferenciar a nuestros clientes en el mercado. Nuestro objetivo es generar altos índices de recordación en el público objetivo, dejando una impresión duradera y estableciendo conexiones emocionales con la audiencia.

En 218films, nos esforzamos por mantener altos estándares de calidad en cada proyecto que emprendemos. Contamos con un equipo de profesionales experimentados y apasionados, así como con tecnología de vanguardia y equipos de última generación para garantizar resultados excepcionales.

Si estás buscando una productora que pueda llevar tus ideas al siguiente nivel y crear contenido audiovisual de primer nivel, no dudes en contactarnos. Estaremos encantados de colaborar contigo y hacer realidad tus visiones.

Únete a 218films y juntos hagamos que tus ideas cobren vida en la pantalla!

Name: Les Films Alexandre Eymery
Description:
Créée par Alexandre Eymery, producteur et réalisateur, la société développe des projets de films court et long métrage pour le cinéma, ainsi que des projets documentaires pour la télévision. Elle effectue également des prestations sur commande : films institutionnels, reportages événementiels, captation de spectacles, ingénierie audiovisuelle, apportant le regard et l'expérience d'une équipe constituée au fil des tournages pour le petit et le grand écran.

La société a produit un long-métrage pour le cinéma, Pari(s) d'exil (sélection Festival Paris Cinéma 2009, Silver Award au 33e Festival International du Caire) et mis en œuvre un second projet. 

Elle s'est vue confier la production déléguée d'émissions pour OneTv, le bouquet de télévision sur mobiles. Elle a réalisé des prestations pour des entreprises telles que HSBC, General Electric Healthcare, sanofi aventis, Schuller Automobiles, et la Ville de Sceaux, ainsi que de nombreuses captations de spectacles. 

Elle s’oriente actuellement vers les nouveaux modes de communication sur Internet, avec la réalisation de petites fictions drôles et décalées destinées à circuler sur les plates-formes vidéos et servant de support promotionnel pour des marques. Films réalisés pour Tempting-Places, Ton Jules aux enchères et Schuller Automobiles.

Name: Albus Studios Ltd
Description:
Albus Studios was founded in 2014 and specialises in Film, Photography and Art, delivering exciting and effective content for B2B and B2C clients.

Fundamentally, we are storytellers who deliver the best results for our clients by creating content that audiences want to view and engage with.

Using a scalable business model that enables us to selectively pick the key skills and talents that best match a project’s needs, we work with clients from brief, through ideation and production to final product.

Our award winning team have worked with top brands across automotive, lifestyle & tourism, technology and current affairs, and are always keen to explore new avenues! 

Interested in working with us? Give us a call, or contact us using our contact page.
...

Name: Blake Films
Description: Productora cinematográfica dedicada al mundo audiovisual, marketing, fotografía y música original.

Name: Ramos Films
Description: A Ramos Films produz filmes para marcas que entendem o peso da imagem.  Cada projeto nasce do entendimento claro do objetivo, passa por um processo criterioso e chega a uma entrega com rigor técnico, sensibilidade estética e intenção definida. Cada escolha de enquadramento, luz e ritmo existe para construir percepção, transmitir credibilidade e reforçar posicionamento. Cinema com propósito claro, do início ao fim.

Name: Soulset Studios
Description:
Soulset Studios is a sanctuary of story, sound, and meaning. We help creators, brands, filmmakers, and mission-driven projects capture what truly matters: the emotional depth, the message behind the art, and moments in time worth preserving.

Soulset Studios was created to answer a soul longing:

A longing for stories that feel true.

For music that awakens something real.

For creativity rooted in truth and emotional depth, made to last for generations—not the quick flick of a finger.

In a world drowning in surface-level content, manipulative marketing, and emotionally hollow media, Soulset Studios is different. We saw the creative landscape shifting toward speed, noise, and emptiness, and we felt called to build a sanctuary for something different. Something human.

We create with purpose and integrity, crafting music and film that bring universes to life. We’re not in the business of content. We’re in the business of creating meaning.

Creators come to us when they’re ready to make work with:

Purpose

Clarity

Soul

Ethical intention

Emotional depth

Name: ALLUMAGE
Description:
Allumage offers bespoke support across every stage of post-production. Whether you're working in film, streaming platforms, or television, our experienced team is here to guide and assist you throughout your technical and creative journey.

We are structured around three dedicated divisions :

- Laboratory
- Sound (voice-over, sound design, audio restoration, voice synthesis, edit, mix)
- Image – Studio Gouache

Our setup is designed to ensure a streamlined and efficient workflow. Each technical space is tailored to meet the highest industry standards, enabling us to deliver comprehensive, top-quality services while fostering strong collaboration between teams.

Name: La Bobine
Description: La Bobine permet de trouver des séances de cinéma inattendues. On met en avant les films les mieux notés, les classiques comme les dernières sorties. Découvrez le programme des petites salles indépendantes de votre quartier !

Name: Part & Parcel
Description: Part & Parcel Creative is an Austin based creative group providing consultation, production and post-production services for television, film, and video companies and creators. If you have a story, we can help deliver.

Name: Niskala Studio

Niskala Studio is a creative agency based in Bali that focuses on branding through visual media such as film, videos, and photos with holistic details. Our process will be a journey to discover your true self by considering various aspects including brand values and how to introduce those values to society and more importantly, the environment. We start our path with client’s purposes, then translate those intentions into meaningful storyboard as we believe our creativity and value will be thriving through this process. Thus we will be able to create and let the soul of the brand come alive.

Our goal is to create exclusive meaningful concepts just for you. We take our aim seriously as symbolised in our name. Niskala translates to “noetic, or abstract”, and it also means “the unseen world” in Balinese. Our designs and values will deliver beyond what naked eyes could see. We are committed to present our assets to give our clients the value they wish to have.

Consist of people from various backgrounds and interests, we build different perspectives of each projects equally. We craft each concept with boldness and attention to detail.

Name: SPOTI STUDIO
Description: The Visual Content Agency. Professional table-top commercial studio, with in-house staff and end-to-end production. Based in Budapest, Hungary.

Name: Gregory Koefer
Description:
{ Currently writing a feature & short film } || Swiss film director & filmmaker with an affinity for creating captivating motion pictures that generate curiosity evoke mystery, and challenge viewers to explore their perception of reality. 

At the age of 14, Gregory produced his first short movie—an experience that lit a creative spark that would lead him to his professional career. Every day since, Gregory has worked to expand his skills, hone his craft, and push the limits of his imagination and productions.   

Being completely self-taught, Gregory is a filmmaking polymath with an intimate understanding and interest in all aspects of the craft. His expertise in story development, composition, cinematography, post-production, music & composition led him to focus on film directing in particular. Gregory’s wide breadth of knowledge and skills enable him to be intimately involved in every step of the creative & technical process, something that is highly advantageous as a director. With every production, Gregory has an extremely vivid mental image of what he wants to create. From there, he uses his innate sense of story flow, spatial perception, imagination, and understanding of human psychology to seamlessly bring his mental images to life. 

While Gregory’s main focus is on larger film projects, he brings the same level of skill and attention to each and every project, whether it’s a feature film or a short commercial. He’s worked with many big-name brands such as Red Bull, Audi, Coco-Cola.

Gregory has a special interest in creating psychologically stimulating thrillers and dramas that encourage people to expand their minds, explore alternate perspectives, and question the very fabric of reality. Whether you’re viewing one of Gregory’s commercials, short films, or feature-length movies, one thing’s for sure: you’re in for an imaginative spectacle that will hold a place in your memory for a long time to come.

Name: Sinergia
Description:
Sabor es aquella mezcla de ingredientes que genera ese gusto, sentimiento, percepción, sabor único y agradable a cualquier paladar.
Bajo esta premisa, Sabor es una productora creativa donde cada uno de nuestros proyectos tienen una identidad distinta al igual que cada uno de nuestros clientes y lo que buscan transmitir.

Nuestro trabajo siempre está en diseñar emociones y experiencias nuevas en cada uno de ellos. A través de: Producción audiovisual, Producción fotográfica, Diseño, Animación 2D y Animación 3D, todos desarrollados con mucha pasión y profesionalismo.
Te invitamos a conocer nuestros resultados llenos de Sabor.

Name: Iskool Filmes
Description: Somos uma produtora de filmes que nasceu do sonho de quatro colegas de faculdade, que desejavam crescer e expandir seus conhecimentos dentro do mercado cinematográfico. Formados em publicidade e com a paixão comum por cinema, criamos a Iskool Filmes. Uma produtora capaz de atender o mercado publicitário com intimidade e desenvolver-se dentro do mundo do cinema. Buscamos todos os dias o aprimoramento de nossas técnicas e conhecimentos, e o bom relacionamento com clientes, parceiros e fornecedores que nos ajudam na busca de nosso objetivo: tornar-se referencia nacional e assim contribuir para o crescimento do mercado cinematográfico brasileiro perante o mundo.

Name: Austin South Asian Film Festival
Description:

Name: Delta Studios AB
Description:
Delta Studios är en kreativ byrå med fokus på att berätta bra historier. Vi är en samarbetspartner genom hela kedjan - från idé och planering till produktion och distribution.

I huset arbetar vi med TV-program, dokumentärfilm och kommunikation för företag och organisationer.

Vårt team jobbar nära dig som kund och vi tar tillsammans fram ett skräddarsytt erbjudande. Hos oss och i vårt nätverk finns några av branschens bästa medarbetare och vi anpassar alltid vårt team efter typ av uppdrag.

Name: GENERATIONS cinemastories
Description:
The company was started in 2004 by Jack Brotman and Naomi Raiselle.

Jack is an Emerson College alum, a practicing DJ with an encyclopedic knowledge of music, a soundtrack designer, video producer and editor of special event, corporate and wedding videography and films. He has legendary status in the medium of montage.

Naomi is a CCNY alum, a practicing stylist, film maker and director, who admits to a lifelong fascination with humans and their stories. She mentors film students in the studio’s educational program, and is obsessed with color and texture.

Jack and Naomi are always interested in considering new and different ideas, enjoy collaborating with clients, photographers and wedding planners. They have gone on location to film Love Stories concurrently with photographer’s engagement shoots; filmed proposals, and have designed and produced décor–coordinated montages. In Fall 2010, we introduced The Modern Love Poem.

Name: Mar Vivo Films
Description:
Mar Vivo Films is a film and TV production house with offices in Paris, Hong Kong and Los Angeles. 

With over 10 years of experience in film & TV, we are providing local production services in Asia for European and American shoots.

We also create our own content and our films and documentaries have won awards in festivals in Asia, Europe and the USA.

Name: Going Rogue Films
Description:
Going Rogue was founded in 2016 to create an artistically driven production company that combines the best of commercial and narrative filmmaking. We are writers, artists, conmen, and gamblers. We mix art and logic, which shouldn’t make sense, but it does.  
We move mountains with big productions and climb mountains with small crews. We value our craft, have a deep passion for cinema, and exist to solve challenges for brands we believe in.

Name: NORA Films
Description:
Especializada en documentales creativos y docupromos de alto impacto.

Optimizamos la producción para que el contenido sea único y la rentabilidad máxima. 

Plataformas como FILMIN y clientes como Banca ING y Fundación Ashoka confían en nosotros.

Name: La Rosa Productions

Founded with the vision and purpose to help create and promote Documentary, Film & TV productions both locally within Australia and across the world.

Feel free to follow on here, some exciting things are coming!

Name: Soul Film Production
Description:
Soul Film Production srl nasce dalla volontà di Roberta Santoro e Giada Gentili, entrambe freelance nel settore cinematografico. In diverse circostanze e momenti, incrociano le loro esperienze con quelle di Federico Giovannini e Marco Zingaretti, due filmmaker legati da un solido rapporto prima di amicizia e negli anni diventato lavorativo. Il team dal 2016 collabora per diversi progetti: videoclip e cortometraggi, e spot pubblicitari fino ad approdare alla realizzazione del primo lungometraggio documentaristico nel 2019, distribuito da Mediaset Infinity+, “Alé”. Il sodalizio e il modus operandi si confermano efficaci anche per la realizzazione di 58BPM,  una miniserie documentaristica che racconta il lockdown dagli occhi di tre atleti professionisti legati al mondo outdoor. Attualmente la società è in pre-produzione con due documentari, un film e un cortometraggio.

- Con il supporto del Programma FESR LAZIO 2021-2027 Avviso ISF 2022 -

Name: Ruben Smit Productions
Description: Ruben Smit Productions is het productiehuis voor Nederlandse natuurdocumentaires en -films. Opgericht door ecoloog en natuurfilmer Ruben Smit maken en distribueren we in eigen beheer hoge kwaliteit natuurfilms. Onze passie en motivatie is om de schoonheid en rauwheid van de natuur in al haar samenhang zo puur mogelijk in beeld te brengen. Met respect naar dier en mens, voor het gehele systeem en natuurlijk zoveel mogelijk zonder allerlei filters en manipulatie. Onze productie WAD ging in oktober 2018 in premiere. Dit was de eerste echte Nederlandse natuurfilm over ons meest bijzondere Unesco Werelderfgoed beschermde natuurgebied; De Waddenzee. Op 7 juli 2022 gaat onze nieuwste productie in premiere: Grutto! De reis van onze nationale vogel.

Description: Als junge hessische Produktionsfirma legen wir  unseren Fokus auf die Schnittstelle zwischen unterhaltendem Genre-Kino und künstlerisch anspruchsvollem Arthouse. Wir sehen uns als eine unabhängige Plattform für die Entwicklung und Produktion von anspruchsvollen Dokumentar und Spielfilmen. Dabei fokussieren wir uns vor allem auf junge Autor:innen und Regisseur:innen, um ihnen eine Anlaufstelle zu bieten, ihre Stoffe frei entfalten zu können. Durch eine kollektive Arbeitsweise wollen wir neue Synergien für außergewöhnliche Geschichten schaffen. Name: Lebanese Film Festival in Canada
Description:
The Lebanese Film Festival in Canada has showcased Lebanese movies in five major Canadian cities having as primary goal building cultural bridges, facilitating intercultural dialogue, as well as sharing and promoting Lebanese art and heritage. Canada is a rich mosaic of cultures, the Lebanese Film Festival aims to compliment and celebrate this diversity.

Le festival du film libanais au Canada a présenté un bouquet de films libanais dans 5 villes principales sur le territoire canadien ayant comme mission de créer des ponts culturels, faciliter le dialogue inter culturel et promouvoir l’héritage et l’art libanais. Le festival cherche à contribuer à la richesse de la mosaïque culturelle canadienne et sa diversité.

Name: ConejoPanda
Description:
Nacimos en el 2008 y a lo largo del tiempo nos hemos enfocado en la producción de contenidos audiovisuales acordes a las necesidades de nuestros clientes, contamos con experiencia en videos institucionales y educativos, producción televisiva, campañas de comunicación & eLearning, para lo que hemos desarrollado el Método de Síntesis Creativo Educativa (CRED) desde el cual diseñamos y creamos cursos virtuales que se ajustan a las necesidades del cliente, con contenidos dinámicos y claros para las personas usuarias. 
Además, la defensa de los Derechos Humanos es un tema que llegó a nosotros de manera circunstancial, pero lo hemos hecho parte de nuestras producciones, por lo que siempre velamos por crear contenidos inclusivos y respetuosos de todas las poblaciones.

Description: PORTRAY (previously Satu Bumi Jaya) is a network of creatives from across the world – writers, film makers, photographers and designers – with extensive experience, understanding and engagement with communities, development programmes and stakeholders across Asia-Pacific and globally. Our goal is to tell stories directly from those who we seek to support and empower. We don’t just document, we engage; ensuring ownership of stories for communities, and promoting the voices, hopes and challenges of those so often left out. Our methods are inclusive, not invasive. All aspects of our impact are considered and aligned to ensure the comfort and ease required to obtain real and meaningful information and stories of change. Our work speaks for itself.

Name: Mindsoul Production INC.
Description:
Mindsoul Production, une entreprise artistique et dévouée. 
Grâce à ses services de vidéaste, photographe et conception de site web, l’entreprise Mindsoul Production sait comment mettre votre entreprise en valeur. Avec nos vidéos de qualité 4K et nos images uniques, nous saurons comment faire briller votre entreprise d’un simple clic. 

Toujours déterminé à donner le meilleur service et dépasser les attentes, Mindsoul Production est LA référence à Québec pour vos projets corporatifs que ce soit pour vos vidéos, photos ou conception de site web. 

Nous restons à l’affût des dernières tendances en photographie et sommes toujours à la recherche de nouveau défi. Nous saurons mettre en valeur les attraits spécifiques de votre entreprise. Résultat : des images uniques qui feront certainement des jaloux! 

La passion avec laquelle nous réalisons nos différents projets se ressent dans chacun d’eux. Afin d’offrir un service sans égal, notre équipe reste toujours à l'affût des tendances et des nouveautés dans le domaine afin de vous offrir un résultat créatif et impeccable. 
Que ce soit pour faire la promotion de votre nouveau service ou pour présenter votre entreprise, Mindsoul met son savoir-faire et son expertise à votre service afin de préparer des vidéos efficaces qui attirent l’attention. Notre équipe hors pair de réalisation créera pour vous un produit sur mesure. 

Vous désirez des prises de vue sensationnelles? Notre équipe détient les accréditations nécessaires et l'équipement pour des prises d'images à l'aide de drones. De quoi vous en mettre plein la vue ! Simplifiez la gestion de votre projet en choisissant un contrat clé en main. 

Nous sommes fiers de pouvoir participer au développement de vos projets afin de vous aider à propulser votre entreprise à un tout autre niveau. Notre objectif est de vous donner le meilleur à travers votre marque, votre histoire et vos valeurs. 

Pour une équipe compétente, sympathique et à l'écoute de vos besoins, pensez à nous.

Name: Letní filmová škola Uherské Hradiště
Description:
Letní filmová škola (LFŠ) je festival pořádaný nepřetržitě každé léto od roku 1975. Kořeny akce sahají až do roku 1964, kdy se začaly konat semináře filmových klubů.

LFŠ je festival, který nabízí filmový program pečlivě sestavený do sekcí přibližujících historii i nové směry světové a české kinematografie. Každý film má v programu své opodstatnění, každý film je opatřen lektorským úvodem či besedou s tvůrci nebo filmovými odborníky.

LFŠ je festival, který je rozmanitý. V jeho programu nechybí koncerty, cimbálovky, divadla, workshopy ani diskuze o aktuálních společenských tématech.

LFŠ je festival, který poskytuje prostor pro dialog – mezi historií a současností, mezi filmovými odborníky a tvůrci, mezi hvězdnými hosty a návštěvníky, mezi všemi lidmi s otevřenou myslí a srdcem.

LFŠ je festival, který se koná v srdci Slovácka proslaveném svým folklórem, vinařstvím, pohostinností a jedinečnou letní atmosférou.

51. ročník se bude konat 25.7.–31.7.2025.

@letnifilmovaskola #letnifilmovaskola

Name: Počudište
Description:
A series of short documentary films about the myths, legends, and folk customs of the Balkans, through the eyes of ethnologists and visual artists.

In Počudište, you will encounter the mysteries of the Balkans, creatures that have existed in human imagination for centuries, mysterious cities, magical phenomena, urban and rural legends, the afterlife and rituals, and the life of marginalized groups.

Get to know the rich folk and spiritual culture without sensationalism where various phenomena are shown as they are. We hope that Počudište will help preserve cultural heritage and convey the beauty of social diversity by illuminating all rare and cultural oddities

Name: Lighting and Thunder GmbH
Description:
We are Lighting and Thunder.
Die Filmproduktion mit dem Anspruch an das Außergewöhnliche. 

KINOQUALITÄT. Wir haben einen cineastischen Anspruch an unsere Arbeit - sowohl im Bild, als auch im Ton. 
Deshalb drehen wir auf den 6k- und 8k-Kameras, die auch in Hollywood verwendet werden und arbeiten mit Sounddesignern, Komponisten, 3D-Artists und Motion Designern zusammen.

MULTI-CHANNEL-KONZEPTION: Moderne Konzeption besteht nicht nur aus guten Ideen. Moderne Konzeption ist ganzheitlich gedacht.
Sie funktioniert nicht nur auf der großen Leinwand oder im TV, sondern auch auf im Web auf dem Laptop und auf Social Media in der Hosentasche. So wird aus einem Spot von Anfang an eine ganze Kampagne - inklusive Adaptionen für die verschiedenen Formate.

LEVEL UP. Wir wollen, dass deine Marke das nächste Level erreicht.

Deine Corporate Identity erlebbar machen und deine Produkte ins rechte Licht rücken.
Damit eine Filmproduktion mit uns das beste ist, was deiner Brand passieren konnte.

Name: BOOC

In 2018, he took the rights of Eflatun Tv and became a content payer for an active and dynamic media like YouTube. TN Productions produced reality shows, cultural and art programs for YouTube and a mini-series called "Icten Sesler Korosu."

In 2019, Tanay Abbasoglu was the producer of many festive films, box office films and television films.

Name: Human Rights Contents
Description:
A Human Rights Content é uma produtora de conteúdo especializada em direitos humanos, usando imagens, lives e seminários virtuais para conscientização. Fundada e dirigida por Juliano Bacelar, um homem trans, profissional do mercado audiovisual com mais de 20 anos de experiência, a empresa aborda uma ampla gama de tópicos, incluindo educação, direitos humanos, política, arte, gastronomia, entretenimento e publicidade.

Em 2020, Juliano Bacelar dirigiu a websérie "Saúde na Saúde", focada na segurança dos trabalhadores da saúde, tornando-se ainda mais relevante durante a pandemia de COVID-19. A empresa investiu em inovação e parcerias para fornecer conteúdo digital de alta qualidade e transmissões ao vivo com tradução simultânea em diferentes continentes.

A Human Rights Content também desempenhou um papel importante na ativação e desenvolvimento do Canal Àwúre, um projeto do Ministério Público do Trabalho e da Organização Internacional do Trabalho com o apoio da UNICEF. Além disso, incubaram projetos como o Canal Preto, que aborda questões étnico-raciais no mundo do trabalho e alcançou um grande público nas redes sociais.

A empresa valoriza a diversidade em sua equipe e busca informar, entreter e criar identificação com a audiência, usando o audiovisual como uma ferramenta para combater discriminações e promover transformações sociais. 

juliano@humanrightscontents.com

Name: Filmpodium
Description:
Zürich ist berühmt für sein erstrangiges Kinoangebot, das sich mit dem von Paris und Berlin messen kann. Das Filmpodium, das Programmkino der Stadt Zürich, trägt wesentlich zu dieser Vielfalt bei, denn es zeigt allein an die 350 verschiedene Filme jährlich – mehr als alle kommerziellen Kinos zusammen. Thematische Reihen und Retrospektiven von Klassikern der Filmgeschichte sind ebenso zu sehen wie Premieren eigenwilliger Autorenfilme aus aller Welt; Sonderveranstaltungen mit Live-Musik und Star-Gästen runden das Programm ab. Das Filmpodium-Kino, 1949 erbaut und 2003 umfassend renoviert, ist nicht nur der schönste Kinosaal von Zürich, sondern bietet das ganze Jahr ein Festival der Filmkunst im Herzen der Stadt.
Das Filmpodium ist eine Kulturinstitution der Stadt Zürich und ein Partnerkino der Cinémathèque suisse.

Name: Pilou Films
Description:
Welcome to PILOU FILMS, a creative video production company dedicated to the creation of compelling visual content for corporate, commercial, and entertainment endeavors.

PILOU FILMS is a video production company based in Vilnius, Lithuania. We operate across numerous media channels and categories. 

We create dynamic motion pictures for companies and artist alike. PILOU FILMS isn’t in the business of being creative. We’re in the business of using creativity to persuade and move audiences.

Our work is influenced by an array of cultural stimuli—science, history, photography, and architecture, blended with music, modern art and sports, topped off with a dash of pop culture, a splash of childlike curiosity, and a triple shot of serendipity.

Stories are the way we discover our world and the things we need from it. Stories give us something to rally around. They push us out of our comfort zone and force us to consider new ways of doing things. PILOU FILMS connects with its audiences through creative storytelling. We apply narrative principles to everything we produce. We don’t want audiences to sit back and watch. We want them to lean forward and participate. We want our work to be additive to their lives.

We welcome the impossible idea.

Name: Beyond Borders | Kastellorizo International Documentary Festival
Description:
Since 2016, on the initiative of the Hellenic History Foundation (IDISME) and in collaboration with Les Ecrans de Mondes (Paris) and the Revival Association Megistis (Sydney) for its international promotion, “Beyond  Borders” offers the Mediterranean, European and general international audience an annual, exciting "experience" consisting of films with historical and multicultural content, events and personalities that shaped and forged , our people and our cultures. The aim of this "boutique" Festival is to celebrate and emphasize the beauty and contribution of cinematic narrative through History and Society. To "bridge" people, ideas and visions from all over the world through a variety of iconographic mosaics. To inspire, reflect and feed with creative concern for the past, present and future. “Beyond  Borders” concerns, in conclusion, the human footprint in the now and then, in the here and everywhere.

Extending during the last week of August , the Festival takes place in the beautiful and remote Castellorizo, a border line of the Aegean between West and East. In this way, the celebration of culture and pioneering cinema is vertically and inextricably linked with the conduct of parallel cultural activities (art and photography exhibitions, training programs, children's workshops, lectures, workshops and masterclasses, pitching labs, etc.) attract both the local community and the international public who arrive at the "edge of the blue" every year to attend the Festival.
Indicative of the Festival's desire for extroversion and collaboration with the wider field of Arts and Letters is the existence of honored academic institutions and personalities, honored media and honored Festivals. In all the above categories, the collaborations are both domestic and international, really praising and emphasizing the title of the Festival as "Beyond  Borders".

POR QUE RIZOMA?

Na filosofia, um rizoma consiste num modelo de organização de elementos que não segue uma hierarquia verticalizada, onde qualquer informação pode afetar ou incidir sobre outra, sem que estejam ligadas a um núcleo central. Nada melhor em um mundo plural, onde as pessoas estão hiperconectadas.

Acreditamos que devemos expressar nosso potencial artístico, cultural, educativo e principalmente informativo, através de projetos que ajudem a compreender nossa relação com o mundo, com os outros indivíduos e espécies, promovendo uma consciência crítica e social.

Name: Festival international du film d'histoire de Montréal
Description:
The Montreal International History Film Festival (FIFHM) is an annual cultural event devoted to history cinema. Its founders, filmmakers and historians, are passionate about the expression of history through cinema.

Our Mission
FIFHM’s mission is to spread films and media productions that focus specifically on the treatment of history. The event was born from the founders’ passion about these fields, while in a momentum of various commemorations (Montreal’s 375th, Canadian Confederation’s 150th, First World War Armistice Centennial, among others). The festival’s founders wish to bring forward the dialogue between history and cinema for the better comprehension of current social issues, in Quebec, Canada and throughout the world.

The festival is interested in the diffusion, popularization and transmission of historical knowledge through film, be it fictional, animation or documentary. The festival’s aim is to promote exchanges between filmmakers, historians and the general public, offering a showcase of films of any genre or other media products (especially television series or, eventually, video games) where history is presented and represented. In the future, the festival intends to develop a youth section to promote contact between the younger generations and the representations of historical content. Correspondence could also be drawn between the festival’s programming and the curricula in history, geography or ethics and religion.

The Event
The festival will hold its very first edition from May 3-5 2019. Film and history professionals are welcome to join the public in a wide discussion about cinema as a medium of historical knowledge.

The Founders
Richard D. Lavoie, filmmaker, Albédo Films.
Éliane Bélec and Mathieu Trépanier, historians.

With special thanks to Annabel Loyola, filmmaker, special collaborator of the FIFHM since its inception in early 2018.

Name: Stradisphere Film Audio
Description:
Stradisphere specializes in the curation of contemporary classical music culture in South Africa through film scores, commercial recordings highlighting the most important and prominent composers, artists and works in the country, and through publications and global awareness of South Africa's artistic and cultural movements. Similarly, Stradisphere is an initiative for collaboration between international industries and South African artisans, as well as a platform by which South African artists can share their art with the world.

Partnered with world class institutions, orchestras, conductors, musicians and studios, Stradisphere believes that there is a unique and vibrant aesthetic to contemporary experimental and avant-garde classical music in South Africa; An aesthetic is impossible to replicate elsewhere. It is an aesthetic formed through the disparate and multifaceted cultures that narrate the identity of South Africa in general; Both inherited traditions of the European concert hall, and the ethos and grandeur of an ancient folk mythology, South African composers and artists have imagined worlds full of myth, magic, and social commentary; musical textures that are at once primordial and natural, and at other point devilishly virtuosic and complex in its harmonic language. 

It is music that is unlike anything else represented in the classical culture, and yet so readily familiar and inviting to international audiences. 

 Stradisphere is committed to securing opportunities for South Africa's artists to engage with wide audiences, collaborate with disciplines and in multifarious mediums, and to promote South African arts and culture as a competing and important art form within the internationally accepted canon of arts and culture.

Stradisphere is co-founded by an American composer, and a veteran production specialist working in the South African film industry for 30+ years. Stradisphere's network thus spans and marries these two continents.

Name: The L.H. Baekeland Project, LLC
Description:
In 1907, Leo Hendrik Baekeland, a Belgian-born American chemist, made one of the most transformative discoveries of the 20th century: Bakelite. It was the first wholly synthetic plastic and it ushered in an explosion of new man-made materials that marked the beginnings of our modern industrial age.

The L.H. Baekeland Project was established by Leo's great grandson, Hugh Karraker, to celebrate and promote Leo's achievements. The Project released “All Things Bakelite: The Age of Plastic” in 2018. It was shown at film festivals and won a Platinum Remi Award at WorldFest Houston before a successful run of over 500 broadcasts on national public television. Content from the film has been used internationally in various television broadcasts including STEM education programs and podcasts. June 2021, the film launched globally in over 100 countries/territories. It’s now available on Amazon Prime Video, iTunes, AppleTV+, Google Play, YouTube, VUDU Domestic with English closed-captioning, and subtitles in Chinese, French, German, and Spanish.

With the film as a tool, The Project’s mission is to reach worldwide audiences of students, professionals and the general public of all ages – interested in history, science, industry, entrepreneurship, engineering and design. Another goal is to spark interest and appreciation in those who’ve had no previous experience with these subjects. It intends to continue its role in the global debate about the political, social and ecological significance of chemistry and plastics, and encourage a new generation of innovators to find essential solutions to today’s plastics problems through action.

Hugh unfortunately passed away August 17, 2022. 

In pursuit of Hugh’s vision, Marc Huberman assumed leadership of The L.H. Baekeland Project, LLC in February of this year thanks to a transfer of ownership authorized by Hugh’s beloved wife Sherry Arell Karraker.

Marc has a long history with the Project.

Contact us at info@allthingsbakelite.com

L’objectif principal de PHILARTMEDIA STUDIO est d’assurer la mise en relation des acteurs du secteur de l'audiovisuel avec les artistes du son. Nous sommes disposés à nous adapter à toutes les demandes de réalisation sonore grâce à une maîtrise répartie sur tous les styles, et nous pouvons nous conformer à n’importe quel genre artistique. 
Nos équipes possèdent également les compétences nécessaires pour répondre à vos besoins d’arrangement, d’orchestration ou d’enregistrement sur vos projets musicaux. 

Les diverses aptitudes des membres de nos équipes amène une expertise touchant à un grand nombre de domaines. Cela nous permet de répondre aux challenges de la post-production sonore.

Name: Andaras Traveling Film Festival
Description:
Our Festival is dedicated to all of those for whom traveling around the world, knowing distant lands and people, is the shortest way to reach oneself.
Even if the journey can not be determined by movement alone, by the pure geographic shift from one place to another, because, more than any other human activity, traveling is a mood, a search, a knowledge of oneself and of others, a witness, the starting point of every arrival. Ulysses was traveling, today's migrants are traveling like yesterday's, cruise tourists are traveling and the world is making a living, solitary navigators and NGO volunteers, journalists and writers, photographers and filmmakers who would want to tell the worlds stories.
"Andaras" in the Sardinian language indicates travel, but also the paths that the shepherds used to travel during the long winter transhumance in search of more lush pastures, the same paths that, since the antiquity, were travelled by the miners.
And it is in Sardinia, in Fluminimaggiore, a village of mines and shepherds, that the Festival will be held, from 4th to 7th July, between the sea and the mountains of the coast to the South-West, the most evocative and wild of the island.
The Festival will be divided into four days, each of which is dedicated to the screening of the works in competition, to meetings with filmmakers, writers and photographers, good food and good music.

Кинокомпания СТВ создана в 1992 году.

Основной вид деятельности — производство и продвижение новых фильмов, в том числе и анимационных, созданных совместно со студией «Мельница».

Руководитель кинокомпании СТВ — продюсер Сергей Сельянов.

На сегодняшний день кинокомпания СТВ является одним из самых известных кинопроизводителей в России. Так, в рейтинге российских кинокомпаний, составленном по результатам исследования, проведенного в марте 2010 года компанией «Movie Research«, кинокомпания СТВ названа лидером на рынке кинопрозводства России.

Картины кинокомпании СТВ представлены на большом количестве российских и международных кинофестивалях и получили более 100 наград. В их числе номинации на премию Академии кинематографических искусств и наук США «Оскар» в категории «Лучший короткометражный анимационный фильм» («Любовная история» Константина Бронзита) и «Лучший фильм, снятый на иностранном языке» («Монгол» Сергея Бодрова-ст.). А съемочная группа фильма «Кукушка» в 2004 году удостоена Государственной премии России.

С кинокомпанией СТВ работали и работают такие известные российские кинорежиссеры как Алексей Балабанов, Сергей Бодров-младший, Александр Рогожкин, Сергей Бодров-старший, Игорь Волошин, Бакур Бакурадзе, Филипп Янковский, Павел Лунгин и другие.

Name: imperfections are beautiful
Description:
imperfections are beautiful est une association tournée vers le cinéma et les arts plastiques et s'intéresse à la notion d'expérimentation, aussi bien dans le domaine artistique, que social ou éducatif. Depuis 2016, elle s'implique à la Grange Mélot, une exploitation en agriculture biologique sur la commune de la Chevillotte, à proximité de Besançon. Concrètement, imperfections are beautiful a conçu et organisé, avec l'association A'phone les deux premières éditions de la fête des poulettes. La dernière édition en mai 2019 a réunit près de 600 personnes pour une journée festive (spectacles, ateliers participatifs, vente de plants). Grâce aux choix des produits et matériaux, grâce à un stand de vaisselle en autonomie, cet événement n'a produit que deux sacs de déchets de 50l (un ménager et un recyclable). En 2019, nous avons organisé une rencontre professionnelle autour de l'édition indépendante dans le milieu du cinéma avec l'association les petites caméras. Cette soirée était tournée autour de l'expérience d'Antoine Page, réalisateur de documentaire jurassien. Nous avons enfin initié la première résidence de création au sein de la ferme, en accueillant le photographe Quentin Coussirat pendant une quinzaine de jours. Le rendu a été une exposition dans le magasin de vente directe, ainsi qu'une édition en série limitée réunissant un texte et 12 cartes postales couleur. Nous avons co-organisé à la Grange Mélot la Fête à DéDé (Décalée et Déconfinée) le 11/07/20, réunissant 2 spectacles, un marché de producteurs et un débat mouvant sur l'horizontalité dans l'engagement associatif. Le 26/09/20, nous avons apporté notre soutien technique lors d'une journée pour les AMAPiens de la Grange Mélot, accueillant une conférence gesticulée « de la fourche à la fourchette et non l'inverse, pour une sécurité sociale alimentaire. »
Le projet principal de l'association depuis 2018 est la production du film documentaire de Laure Saint-Hillier : Essaimons-nous.

Name: Soura Film Festival
Description:
Soura Film Festival is a Berlin-based queer film festival that sheds light on cinematic talents from the SWANA (South West Asia & North Africa) region.

Soura—which means ‘image’ in Arabic, is about sharing a vision of life that is poignant, defiant, and unique.

The festival's mission is to create a safe and welcoming space for filmmakers whose creative vision has challenged heteronormativity and patriarchal environments, and have explored queerness and what it represents to them.

Queerness, as seen by the festival, is not exclusive to efforts related to the LGBTQ+ community, but also tackles themes such as feminism, migration and human relationships that defy oppressive social constructs. Every fight for basic human rights is our fight when it comes to seeing the world from a queer gaze.

The festival's program presents the current queer film scene from the region within various festival sections including feature films, short films, documentaries, animation, essay-films and queer-classics.

Name: Composers Summit Prague
Description:
Composers Summit Prague is Europe’s largest platform dedicated to film, television, and video game music. The summit brings together world-renowned composers, producers, and audiovisual music professionals, creating a unique space for inspiration, education, and meaningful international networking.

For students of composition, audiovisual studies, film music, sound design, and production, it represents a rare opportunity to measure their work against the world’s leading professionals and to build connections that would normally take years of practice to establish.

The program includes masterclasses, workshops, panel discussions, public lectures, and showcases of emerging talent led by Oscar, Emmy, and Grammy winners. Composers Summit Prague fosters collaboration between Czech and international artists, strengthens the global reputation of the Czech music scene, and opens new creative and career opportunities worldwide.

An integral part of the summit is a series of exceptional public concerts that bring to Prague the composers behind world-famous film, television, and video game soundtracks. Iconic works — from epic orchestral scores to intimate emotional themes — are performed on a single stage.

The music is brought to life by the Czech National Symphony Orchestra, conducted by Hollywood composers who personally present their works. Each concert explores a distinct musical world, together creating an experience unmatched anywhere else in Europe.

The main annual peak of Composers Summit Prague takes place each April, from April 23 to 28, when Prague becomes a vibrant meeting point for the international film music community.

Composers Summit Prague is a celebration of audiovisual music, creativity, and human talent — a place where education, artistry, and global connection meet.

We aim to kindle the creative fire in filmmakers, light their way by providing comprehensive professional guidance, and set ablaze a burning passion for creating art. We believe it takes a village to create great memories and our goal is to provide meaningful guidance to others.

This pride in our community keeps us operating at our very best and is the primary reason that Central Texas filmmakers can count on Aduro to field up-to-date grip and lighting equipment and studio facilities.

Independent community based film distribution. Experiment risk free sustainable distribution models on world cinema. We design and enable paths between films with stakes and their audiences. We surprise, shock and empower communities. Our mission is to navigate through the sea of content with reliable taste, creative preparedness and transparent business model.

Scope 50 set off to rethink the acquisition and release processes of independent European films, to educate and stimulate future audiences, to simplify licensing and to discover slick navigation techniques. In 2015, Scope 100 oversaw a hundred arthouse aficianados discussing 10 films' domestic horizons and vote for one to be subsequently released theatrically. They also become ambassadors for the selected film, Out of Nature in 2015 and Sparrows in 2016. With Creative Europe's support the initiative paves the way between filmmakers and audience towards a legal and sustainable, yet simple and flexible digital content market. CinefilCo develops Scope100 in collaboration with Aerofilms (Czech Republic), Stadtkino (Austria), Imagine (Belgium), Arthaus (Norway), Soda Pictures (UK) and Gutek Film (Poland).

Description:
Proetic is the creative partnership of Adelaide-based producers David and Erica Ockenden — two long-time visual storytellers with deep roots in both producing and production design.
For over a decade, we’ve brought ideas to life from the inside out — building bold concepts, designing elaborate sets, and producing standout content that cuts through the noise. Whether it’s a tight 15-second spot or an expansive branded film, we create work that’s as smart as it is striking.
Our edge? We don’t just manage logistics — we shape the whole visual world. From art direction to post-production, we’ve been hands-on in every part of the process, which means nothing gets left to chance and everything gets elevated.
We collaborate with an exceptional network of creative specialists to build tailor-made teams for each project — no cookie-cutter solutions, no filler. Just the right people for the job, every time.
At Proetic, we believe great work doesn’t shout — it hits. It lands with style. With humour. With intention. And whether it’s playing on a phone or a cinema screen, it leaves an impression.
If you’re looking for producers who care as much about the texture of a wall as they do about the strength of a narrative, we’re your people.
Let’s make something great — and maybe have a little fun doing it.

Name: STARLING
Description:
We launched Starling in late 2021, with optimism, energy and a small blue notebook. Since then our feet haven't touched the ground. Which is just the way we like it.

As a production company, we are committed to making beautiful work and pushing the boundaries of what is possible. But Starling is not just about the end product. It is about a creative and collaborative journey.

Our approach blends ambitious vision with practical production solutions. We've brought together an exceptional roster of directing talent – from emerging visionaries to Oscar nominees – each bringing distinctive storytelling approaches to their craft. Alongside our curated roster, our innovative Studio approach enables us to adapt to the changing production landscape and connect with an even wider pool of creative talent.

Founded by Executive Producer Charlie Stanfield, formerly head of Indy8 at Independent, Starling delivers quality work with a no-nonsense, can-do approach to production. Charlie's expertise in ensuring "all the cogs work together" brings creativity and honesty alongside a steady head for budgets – making Starling the ideal partner for agencies and brands seeking both creative excellence and production efficiency.

What sets us apart is our genuine commitment to nurturing talent and fostering collaborative relationships. We support our directors, believe in the people we work with and create an environment where everyone enjoys the process of working together. This philosophy has attracted exceptional directors to our roster, including Jessica Sanders (Cannes Award winner and Oscar nominee), Jim Pilling and Jess Journo, among others who bring distinctive visual styles and storytelling approaches.

At Starling, we strongly believe that in order to tell stories that matter and to make films that people want to see, all the cogs need to be working together. In sync and in flight.

Connect with us to explore how we can bring your creative vision to life.

Name: Studio Grün
Description:
ON AIR IM STUDIO GRÜN!
Das Greenscreen-Studio von gemeinsam werben
Unser kompaktes Greenscreen Studio zentral in Hamburg Schanzenviertel ist ideal für kleinere Produktionen. Von Corporate-TV über Präsentationen bis Live-Stream ist kreative Vielfalt angesagt. Ihr Team dreht im Basispaket mit Licht und wenn Sie mehr Technik oder Personal benötigen, stehen wir bereit. Die hintere grüne Wand (Chroma Key) am Set ist etwa 5,5 Meter breit und drei Meter hoch. Die Wände und der Boden sind ca. 2 Meter in den Raum gezogen, sodass eine Greenbox entsteht.

Ein fest installiertes Deckenschienensystem mit vier LED-Spots an Scheren (Pantographen) leuchtet die Darsteller aus, zwei Kopflichter von hinten helfen bei einer sauberen Stanze (Helligkeit und Lichtfarbe fernsteuerbar). Die Greenscreen-Ausleuchtung durch Röhren (CRI > 93) ähnlich wie Kinoflos sichern eine gleichmäßige Ausleuchtung. Zwei variable Fresnel-Spots auf Rollstativen runden das Lichtset in Tageslichtfarbe (ca. 5.400K) für Ihr virtuelles Studio oder Ihre Film-Produktion ab.

Ideal ist diese Art des Studios für alle, die unkompliziert Material mit einem variablen Hintergrund brauchen – als Aufzeichnung oder live: News-Studio, Präsentation, Corporate-TV, Coaching, E-Learning, Interview, Tutorial, 3D, Training, Lehrfilm, Musikvideo-Produktion, Animation, Trickfilm, VR, Gaming usw.

Name: whygen
Description:
Innovative FPV-Drohnenaufnahmen aus Berlin
Unsere Piloten fliegen mit einer Videobrille und sehen genau das, was die Drohne sieht. So sind präzise Flüge und Aufnahmen aus einzigartigen Perspektiven möglich. Unser Equipment reicht von kleinen, leisen Micro-Drohnen (ausgestattet mit einer Gopro) bis hin zu professionellen “Cineliftern”, die eine Blackmagic Pocket Cinema 4k tragen können. Durch spezielle Setups für indoor (mit Propellerschutz) und outdoor sind unsere Drohnen sehr vielseitig einsetzbar.

„whYgen“? Unser Firmenname setzt sich aus den Begriffen „Generation Y / Why“ zusammen. Was bedeutet das?

“Generation Y (kurz Gen Y) […] bezeichnet die […] Generation, die im Zeitraum der frühen 1980er bis zu den späten 1990er Jahren geboren wurde. Der Buchstabe Y wird englisch why („warum“) ausgesprochen, was auf die teils als charakteristisch für die Generation Y beschriebene Neigung zum Hinterfragen verweisen soll.”  (vgl.:Thomas Huber und Christian Rauch)

Warum haben wir uns danach benannt? Ganz einfach – wir sind Teil eben dieser Generation Why / Y und gehen neue Wege in der Videoproduktion. Wir hinterfragen das Bestehende / Etablierte. Drohnen bieten eine unzählige Vielfalt an Möglichkeiten für kreative Videoaufnahmen, wie sie zuvor nicht möglich waren. Es ist eine spannende Zeit – auch Hollywood-Regisseure haben mittlerweile die Möglichkeiten erkannt und setzen vermehrt auf Drohnenpiloten als „Kameramänner“ in der Luft. Wir haben das technische Know-how und bieten auch Beratung für ihre Projekte an – bei Bedarf werden durch uns Drohnen konstruiert, die genau für die von Ihnen gewünschten Aufnahmen konzipiert sind. Ihrer Kreativität sind keine Grenzen gesetzt. Wir betreiben tagesaktuelle Marktschau und wissen immer sofort Bescheid, wenn die rasante technische Entwicklung im Drohnenmarkt wieder eine neue Möglichkeit geschaffen hat, um spektakuläre Aufnahmen zu kreieren.

Name: Palestine Cinema Festival, Doha
Description: The Palestine Cinema Festival-Doha brings Palestine and Qatar’s finest cinema, narratives and cultures to a wide range of audience in Doha. Moreover and besides celebrating established and emerging filmmakers from geographical zones, DPCF aims to develop a film-appreciation society with grounds for dialogue among diverse cultures and to reinforce film culture amongst the community in Qatar.

Name: Kino Kavalírka
Description:
Jsme parta lidí kolem spřátelených festivalů a kina. Provozujeme eventové Kino Kavalírka na Praze 5 s Audiovizuálním centrem, organizujeme Mezinárodní filmové festivaly ELBE DOCK a Young Film Fest, mimo jiné realizujeme i malou filmovou distribuci. Věnujeme se také audiovizuální výchově, která se prolíná většinou našich aktivit.

Ve 30. letech minulého století vzniklo kino Na Zámečnici, které začátkem 90. let ukončilo svůj provoz. V roce 2021 se našemu spolku krutón, z.s. podařilo kino oživit, od roku 2022 funguje provoz celoročně. Kino jsme přejmenovali na Kino Kavalírka a odkazujeme na historické filmové ateliéry na Kavalírce.

Celkem působíme v 5 zemích (Německo a země V4), ale Kino Kavalírka je naše jediné a nejlepší kino!

Jsme e-cinema, standardní sezení je 50 pohodlných retro křesel, maximální kapacita kina je 90 míst. Prostor je variabilní (umožňuje taneční, divadelní i hudební akce). Zahrada kina má přes 500m2 a kapacitu až 150 návštěvníků.

Name: OHÚN - Mostra de Cinema Negro de Pelotas
Description:
A Mostra de Cinema Negro de Pelotas foi fundada em 2017 por alunas e alunos negros dos cursos de Cinema e Design da Universidade Federal de Pelotas (Daniela Azeredo, Gabriel Pimenta, Gil Vera Cruz, Jackeline Nunes, Lucas Honorato, Maressa Carvalho, Marília Mortican e Vinicius Silva). Nesta primeira edição, a integração com a universidade foi crucial para a sua fundação, onde além da exibição de filmes, seminários e rodas de debates acerca das questões da negritude no cinema foram realizados nos espaços da Universidade. A Mostra obteve apoio institucional do colegiado dos cursos de Cinema, recebendo salas para as atividades, assim como o Cine UFPel para a exibição dos filmes e abono de faltas para alunos dos cursos de Cinema poderem fruir o evento. 

A palavra de origem Yorubá  OHÚN  se traduz por VOZ, e representa o desejo da mostra se fazer ouvida e ser uma referência de acesso ao cinema negro, desde Pelotas onde nasce em 2017 a outros territórios alcançados através da virtualidade inerente ao seu formato online.

SYNCLATINO is a one-stop, full-service creative music licensing agency, specializing in the vibrant rhythms of independent Latin artists. We serve as the gateway to the world of independent Latin music, connecting our clients with unique and authentic curated selections that add the perfect sound to their visions.

We assist creative teams in finding the perfect match, to the most memorable latin songs that unites imagery, storytelling and feeling. If we can’t find it, our music production and songwriting team will make it from scratch! 

Our team of latin music industry professionals, is dedicated to ensuring the success of every project, providing world-class service to our diverse global clientele, and leveraging the power of Latin music to connect people, cultures, and brands around the world.

Our comprehensive range of services includes music supervision, music editing, licensing & clearance, playlist curation, music production, and songwriting. 

At SYNCLATINO we're not just about meeting expectations - we're about exceeding them. We're ready to take on new challenges and contribute our skills to amazing projects.

Name: Fuelblue
Description:
Fuelblue is the independent studio of Bobby Donohue, creating films and story worlds built on empathy, equity, and agency. Our world is shaped by division, where superficial differences are exploited so that unbridled greed and concentrated power can flourish. 
 
Fuelblue flips the script.

These stories reject the lie that we are separate, and insist instead on our shared responsibility to one another. How can we band together inside systems shaped by power, fear, and inequality? What is possible when we choose cooperation, accountability, and care instead?

Let’s find out together.

Name: Marcel Milbich Filmproduktion
Description:
Wir produzieren Unternehmensfilme, Eventaufnahmen, Erklärvideos, Konzertaufnahmen, ... oder kurz: Ihren ganz persönlichen Film.

FULL SERVICE. FILME JEDER ART.
Filme kommen in der heutigen Zeit in vielen betrieblichen Szenarien zur Anwendung. Vom Imagefilm über den Rückblick der Jahresversammlung bis hin zum Schulungsvideo. Wir sind Ihr kompetener Partner in diesen Bereichen. Film ist für uns ein Medium, welches keine Grenzen kennt und sich in vielen Bereichen erst noch etablieren muss. Gehen Sie mit uns diesen Schritt und entdecken Sie das gesamte Potenzial!

IMAGEFILM. WERBEFILM. PRODUKTFILM.
Präsentieren Sie Ihr Unternehmen einem breiten Publikum wirksam und zeitgemäß mit einem individuellen Unternehmensfilm. Ideal für die eigene Homepage, Messen, gezielte Werbemaßnahmen oder für den internen Gebrauch!

MESSEFILM. SCHULUNGSFILM. ANSPRACHE.
Die Einsatzmöglichkeiten für Filme in Ihrem Unternehmen sind groß. Eine Chance, die Sie nutzen sollten. Denken Sie zum Beispiel auch an die Stärkung der internen Kommunikation, indem Sie kurze Filme im Intranet für Schulungszwecke bereitstellen.


ERÖFFNUNG. DISKUSSION. FEIER.
Ihre Veranstaltung für die Nachwelt erhalten. Spüren Sie die Atmosphäre und die Emotionen eines wichtigen Ereignisses. Stärker als mit Fotos. Ideal für Mitarbeiter, die nicht teilnehmen konnten oder für einen emotionalen Rückblick auf Ihre Veranstaltung.

LEINWAND. LIVESTREAM. BEIDES.
Übertragen Sie Ihre Veranstaltung auf Großleinwände neben der Bühne oder per Live-Stream weltweit. Natürlich ist während der Übertragung auch beides kombinierbar und eine Aufzeichnung des Programms erfolgt ebenso. Erreichen Sie mehr Zuschauer.

Name: The Wedding Storytellers
Description:
We have the best job in the world!

We listen to your story of how you met, when and where you fell in love, how you got engaged, and everything in between.

We get to capture the wedding day moments when you’re getting ready, when you’re laughing and crying with friends and family, when your flower girl realizes everyone is staring at her, when you link arms with your tearful dad, and when your groom sees you in your dress for the first time.

We’re also there when you say your “I dos” and when you take your first steps hand-in-hand as husband and wife. There’s no smile like that smile.

And then we work our magic right there on the spot to bring the past, present and hopes for the future together in your Wedding Movie. We reveal it on the big screen during your reception, without a dry eye in the place. It’s a unique experience that you and your guests will never forget.

Getting married is a big deal. And whether you’re getting married in front of 40 people or 400, you want the memories of that day to be shared and enjoyed long after the wedding is over.

He participated in the conquest of Montese, and Rannochio Bertocchio, reaching the siege to German and Italian Armies in Colecchio. He received the gun from General Otto Fretter Pico in surrender to 20,000 men, 1,500 vehicles and 4,000 horses. The greatest achievement of Brazilian Army until today.

We are starting the production of an epic action/war movie. This is an awesome opportunity to show Brazil´s greatness to the world. We are already recruiting all those Brazilians, Americans and Europeans who want to make part of this Historical venture. Looking forward.

A  BV Licenciamento Audiovisual, nome de fantasia de BV Consultoria, Licenciamentos e Representações Ltda  foi criada a partir da necessidade do mercado audiovisual,  para Produtores e Empresas que executam projetos com a utilização de obras audiovisuais com exibições públicas, há mais de 10 anos atuando como responsável por efetuar licenciamentos para diversos estúdios cinematográficos nos suportes em VHS, DVD, Blu-ray Disc do segmento de vídeo doméstico ou Home Entertainment ( H.E.) desenvolvendo, ampliando e alavancando resultados positivos e crescentes durante esse período, com o Know-How necessário para poder atender de maneira mais ágil, justa e legal o mercado Brasileiro, assim, a BV Licenciamentos com a parceria com a Filmbankmedia UK, acaba de oferecer a nova opção no Licenciamento de filmes da Warner Media, Sony Pictures, Disney, 20th Century Studios, Lionsgate, Cirque du Soleil, entre outros estúdios para exibição de filmes de forma pública no Brasil.  

Filmbankmedia UK, nosso parceiro, é o nome comercial de Filmbankmedia Distributors Limited, uma empresa de joint venture de propriedade de Warner Bros. Sony Pictures Releasing e NT Digital Partners.

Criada para administrar a distribuição fora dos cinemas (sessões públicas não cinematográficas e residenciais) em nome de vários estúdios e distribuidores do Reino Unido. Representa diversos estúdios e distribuidores de Hollywood, Bollywood e independentes de mais de 100 países, disponibilizando conteúdo para vários setores, dentre eles: hoteleiro, ferroviário, rodoviário, escolar, clubes de cinema, sessões ao ar livre e muitos outros.

Assim, passamos a oferecer um portfólio de mais de 3000 obras de sucesso para seu  projeto, seja ele, Drive-in, Cinema ao Ar livre - Open-air, Festivais e Mostras de Cinema Itinerante, Centros Culturais, Cineclubes entre diversos locais no Brasil.

Name: Thapar Movie Club
Description:
-- Introduction to Society
Cinema is not only about making people dream. It's about changing things and making people think. 
-   David Lynch.               
What's the first trend that strikes our mind when we hear the names of Vicky Kaushal, Taapsee Pannu, Biswapati Sarkar, Kumar Varun, Naveen Polishetty and Late Sushant Singh Rajput. They all started normal, did engineering and then chose to follow their passion and achieve the apex of fame.
Thapar Movie Club is a society in TIET, working solely in the field of CONTENT CREATION which ranges from short films, Song Covers to Class songs and other exclusive content. 
 We enter Engineering college with sparkling eyes, dreams in our heart and clay-like mind, which can be moulded into any shape we like.  For this advantage, We arrange workshops for students to bring out, not only their hidden actors inside them, but to also train them in handling back of the camera procedures ranging from Cinematography to Scriptwriting cause we know, that an idea can be contagious, but converting that idea into a well-written script is a rough technique.

Name: Images_AF
Description:
Somos especialistas em criações audiovisuais que transcendem a simples captura de momentos, focando na tradução de experiências em imagens em movimento. A essência do nosso trabalho reside na habilidade de contar histórias visualmente, transformando eventos, ideias e conceitos em narrativas cinematográficas envolventes.

Acreditamos no poder do storytelling como uma ferramenta essencial para não apenas registrar momentos, mas para criar conexões emocionais significativas. Utilizamos técnicas narrativas cuidadosamente elaboradas para não apenas capturar a atenção do espectador, mas para envolvê-lo em uma jornada visual que ressoa com autenticidade e impacto.

Em cada projeto, buscamos ir além da mera documentação visual. Nosso objetivo é valorizar o posicionamento de nossos clientes, capturando a essência de suas marcas, eventos ou histórias pessoais de uma maneira que seja autêntica e memorável. Com uma abordagem centrada no cliente, buscamos compreender profundamente os valores e a visão de cada cliente, transformando esses insights em narrativas visuais que ressoam com o público-alvo.

Nossa fundadora e colaboradores são apaixonados e talentosos e compreendem a importância de cada detalhe, desde a composição visual até a trilha sonora, garantindo que cada criação audiovisual seja uma expressão única e poderosa. Seja para promover marcas, documentar eventos significativos ou contar histórias pessoais, estamos comprometidos em oferecer um serviço que vai além das expectativas, criando experiências visuais que perduram na memória e deixam uma impressão duradoura.

Ao escolher nossos serviços de criação audiovisual, você está optando por uma narrativa visual que transcende o comum, oferecendo uma abordagem única e emocionalmente envolvente para traduzir experiências em imagens em movimento. Estamos prontos para transformar suas ideias em narrativas visuais impactantes e autênticas que ressoam com seu público e fortalecem sua presença no mercado,
