Name: MoveMe
Description:
MoveMe Studio creates inspiring media that compels action. We are reimagining the way media is produced and how audiences engage. One way we do this is by sharing our net profits in a meaningful way with the people, communities, and regions where the media is created.  

Our first project as MoveMe Studios, is CHARLIE, an inspiring film focused on the elicit world of animal welfare and anti-poaching efforts in South Africa.
	 
As part of our impact campaign for the movie, we are introducing MoveMe South Africa. Our 8-episode docuseries focusing on the treasure, talents, and tales of Bushbuckridge, a community on the border of the world-famous Kruger National Park. The website has the trailer if you want to get a glimpse of what we are creating.
	 
MoveMe Studios will share 50% of the net profits, once all the expenses have been covered and investors repaid, to the people and communities where the content is created.
  
We will use those profits to create Abundant Village, which is a resource-rich set of sustainable solutions providing water, food and energy security, housing, education, wellness care, career opportunities, transportation and finance solutions.

Once proven, we will create more than 100 of these villages over the next decade. 

MoveMe will move us…What moves you?

Name: "Eagle Without Wings" Movie
Description:
Eagle Without Wings Movie is based on the Book “UNarmed But Dangerous,” The Tawana Williams Story of Relentless Struggle and Ultimate Victory. In the book she tells the poignant & heroic true story of being born w/out arms, surviving the trauma of gang rape, being raped by her step father, abortion, the miraculous birth of her daughter, drug addiction and marrying her childhood sweetheart “Toby.” Today, Tawana speaks to people across the country as a Les Brown Platinum Motivational Speaker, encouraging them to look beyond their circumstances and to accept God’s gift of freedom without limitations. 

Tawana's story is the Power of God’s spirit to birth destiny from despair. If you’ve ever asked the question,‘ why me?’ If you’ve ever known devastating loss, be equipped and transformed as you embark on this remarkable voyage of one extraordinary servant from the paralysis of victimization, to warrior triumphant. 

Eagle Without Wings Movie will be featured as her Debut Movie in Theaters coming soon! She became a professional speaker in 1996 and travels the country with her husband ‘Toby’ speaking at Schools, Churches, Day Cares, Youth Programs, Boys & Girls Clubs, Nursing Homes, Prisons, Drug Rehab Centers, Veterans Associations,  Universities, Colleges, Fraternities, Sororities, Corporations & Organizations. 

We are excited & would love for you to Partner with Team Eagle and have your name on the credits of the ‘Movie,’  and other perks too? The Investors for the film are in position and addition to that, perhaps you would like to Partner with us & get involved today! We are moving quickly, so at this time, we are asking you to Contribute & Donate whatever you can. Currently, we are accepting all donations; nothing’s too small. The Movie will be a game changer for the film industry and for those who fight for equality and change, those with disabilities and diverse situations.  EagleWithoutWings.com TawanaWilliams.com

Name: Return IAF
Description:
Our goal is to feature works by artists from across the globe and a wide variety of different industries. The selected works will be shown in places like cinemas in Weimar Germany.

Humanitarian and environmental issues will play a central role at our festival and our goal is to promote international cultural exchange. We are inspired by the transcendental nature of art, and the special role it plays in creating new perspectives and innovations. The term “RETURN” indicates that we want to look back at the art and artists that came before us, our cultural heritage that has laid the groundwork for our modern society and is an integral part of our communities. Therefore, the revival of historical art and culture will be an essential element of the festival throughout the entire program. 

A special characteristic of the festival is that we will focus on questions rather than themes. The answers will emerge from the works of the artists. Global challenges will play a central role when raising those questions.

The RETURN International Film & Art Festival builds an infrastructure that helps artists to create their work sustainably and that will give them a fresh start after the pandemic. We believe that art flourishes when it can be presented to and be in conversation with a live audience.

Name: Karbonshark
Description:
Welcome to Karbonshark — where innovation meets storytelling. Founded in Los Angeles by a visionary team of documentary filmmakers and technologists, we are redefining the art of documentary filmmaking by integrating blockchain technology and NFTs. Our mission is clear: to transform how stories are told, owned, and experienced in the digital age.

What We Do:
At Karbonshark, we leverage the latest advancements in blockchain to ensure secure rights management, transparent distribution, and innovative audience engagement. We are pioneers in the use of NFTs to offer exclusive content, providing a new layer of interaction and value to our audience.

Our Projects:
Our documentaries are more than just films; they are immersive experiences that invite viewers to engage with the content in a manner never before possible. From historical explorations to contemporary issues, each project is crafted to inform, inspire, and invoke change.

Innovative Funding and Distribution:
Through tokenization, Karbonshark opens up new pathways for film funding and production. Our supporters can invest directly in our projects, gaining a stake in the success and impact of our films. This model not only secures funding but also fosters a community around each documentary’s mission and message.

Educational Commitment:
Education is a cornerstone of our philosophy. We are dedicated to demystifying the technologies we use through workshops, seminars, and online resources. Our goal is to empower both creators and audiences to understand and utilize blockchain and NFTs, enhancing their engagement with digital storytelling.

Join Us:
At Karbonshark, every story counts. We invite filmmakers, tech enthusiasts, investors, and anyone passionate about the future of digital media to join our community. Together, we are setting new standards for documentary filmmaking and storytelling.

Connect with Karbonshark on LinkedIn to be part of our story-driven revolution.

Name: Elina Vox
Description:
Timbre de voix naturellement jeune et clair, je donne vie à 𝐯𝐨𝐬 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐣𝐞𝐭𝐬 𝐬𝐨𝐧𝐨𝐫𝐞𝐬 𝐞𝐭 𝐚𝐮𝐝𝐢𝐨𝐯𝐢𝐬𝐮𝐞𝐥𝐬 en tant que 𝘃𝗼𝗶𝘅 𝗼𝗳𝗳 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗳𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗻𝗲𝗹𝗹𝗲 : du livre audio au documentaire, du film institutionnel au e-learning en passant par la publicité et la création de personnage. 

 Certifiée aux techniques vocales par l’École de la Voix avec une expérience théâtrale de plus de 15 ans, j'adapte ma voix et mon interprétation à différents registres : de la voix d'enfants ou d'adolescents à une narration douce et rassurante ou plus affirmée et dynamique. 

 Équipée d’un home studio, je livre vos fichiers audio dans des délais rapides, qu’ils soient bruts ou accompagnés d’une couverture sonore. Basée à Lyon, je suis également mobile sur toute la France.

Name: VSHHH
Description:
Somos um hub criativo de especialistas conectados em construir histórias para marcas, utilizando estratégias e ferramentas de comunicação para ajudar a vender cada vez mais e melhor produtos e serviços, aproximando marcas de pessoas e pessoas de marcas. Sem firula.



ATÉ O TOPO EXISTEM DIVERSAS TRILHAS
Mas que nem sempre precisam ser criadas do zero. O segredo para encontrar o melhor caminho é conhecer bem as possibilidades e estar preparado pra refazer a rota a qualquer momento. E nisso a gente tem bastante experiência. 

BRANDING E DESIGN

Desde o naming e posicionamento estratégico de mercado até a execução criativa da marca estão em nosso escopo de trabalho para te ajudar a construir desejo e relevância no dia a dia.

PRODUÇÃO DE VÍDEOS

Um vídeo vale mais que mil palavras. Aliás, hoje é uma das ferramentas mais poderosas para alcançar seu público e despertar o desejo. E isso a gente curte fazer. Temos toda infra pra produzir o que você precisar.

IDENTIDADE E EMBALAGEM

Sem dúvida alguma conseguir ser identificado nessa avalanche de informações é um desafio. E por isso usamos técnicas para criação de signos criando padrões de identidade e facilitando o reconhecimento no oceano de informações.


TRÊS PRATOS DE TRIGO PARA TRÊS TIGRES

Nascemos em 17 janeiro de 2022, uma segunda-feira. 

Criada por Leo Spigariol, que possui mais de 20 anos de experiência em branding e design estratégico com foco em resultados para marcas. Fundou em 2001 a LAIKA, premiado escritório de design o qual criou identidades e estratégias para lista múltipla e generosa de empresas, como: T4F (Time For Fun), Braspag, MTV, Suzano Papel e Celulose, Bayer Cropscience, Diageo, Grupo João Dória Jr, Instituto Ayrton Senna, além de muitas outras.

Em 2012, na busca de aprofundar mais sobre a dinâmica do varejo, mudou para o interior de São Paulo para fundar a DECABRÓN, marca que revolucionou o mercado de molhos premium, tornando-se referência em inovação na categoria

Name: Cinema Queer International Film Festival
Description:
Cinema Queer is Sweden’s largest international LGBTQ film festival, it takes place in Stockholm every late September/early October. 

Cinema Queer was founded in 2012 with a mission to broaden the heteronormative cinematic selection in Sweden, as well as to offer Stockholm audiences a wide range of queer film. Cinema Queer focuses on films that question, discuss, and isn’t limited to existing norms while highlighting stories that otherwise wouldn’t be recognised. The aim is to create an accessible platform for LGTBQ film in Sweden, for both international and Swedish filmmakers and film lovers. During the year Cinema Queer showcase several special screenings, during events such as Stockholm Pride and Short Film Day (Kortfilmsdagen).

Keep an eye on our website or Facebook for all the latest updates!

Name: The Music Company TMC
Description:
The Music Company TMC is a 501(c)(3) organization dedicated to removing the educational, economic, and social barriers that stand between music makers and the realization of their creative visions through affordable professional music workspaces, educational programs, and collaborative project opportunities.

We rely on the generosity of donors to help us provide programs and services to our community. The Music Company is a federally-exempt 501c3 non-profit organization, so donations are both very much appreciated AND tax-deductible to the full extent of the law.

We believe in the power of music creation to make the world a little bit better place, and we exist to give music makers of all kinds a creative, welcoming, and inclusive place to do it. Our goal is to build a community of independent music makers who share our vision by providing affordable professional recording, rehearsal, and production spaces as well as educational programming. Whatever your age, color, gender, orientation – if you want to make music, TMC is for you.

Name: Cinema De Keizer
Description:
Agnes Debaillie neemt in 1972 Cinema De Keizer over van haar vader Gerard, die als pionier in Lichtervelde zijn eerste filmzaal start in 1924. Wanneer Agnes in 2010 op 82-jarige leeftijd ziek wordt, krijgt ze hulp van een aantal vrienden die de cinema open houden, met nog steeds de analoge 35mm-projectie.

Na het overlijden van Agnes in 2012 werden 7 investeerders samengebracht om het gebouw over te nemen, en een nieuwe start te nemen. Zo ontstond Cinema De Keizer vzw, met als doel de uitbating, promotie en de instandhouding van het historisch en cultureel erfgoed rond Cinema De Keizer. In andere woorden: een stille droom om het levenswerk van Agnes verder te zetten.

Name: Iris Film Studio
Description:
Iris Films Studio es una productora fundada por Jacobo y Nicolás Solís Vela. Con formación y trayectoria en producción audiovisual, los hermanos aspiran a traer al cine historias centradas en la emoción pura.

Para lograr definir una línea editorial desde una productora en una industria dominada por el service, las plataformas y el fast-fiction, la única alternativa es emprender. Iris apuesta por la producción de nueva generación, con un espíritu rejuvenecido y emprendedor que pretende reconfigurar los códigos de la producción independiente y el cine vanguardista, de vocación autoral y que conquiste a un gran público.

En un mercado globalizado, y a medida que la ficción española cobra cada vez más importancia, Iris Film Studio quiere formar parte de esta gran conversación entre las voces que se dan cita en los festivales internacionales. Los hermanos fundadores tienen una gran vocación por la co-producción europea e internacional, puesto que pertenecen a una generación que entiende el mundo en estos términos globales.

Name: SPECTRASCOPE
Description: **Spectrascope** is an independent record label that specializes in blending genres such as vapor disco, techno, and movie soundtracks. With a focus on vapor disco, the label combines the nostalgic and psychedelic qualities of vaporwave with the energetic and rhythmic elements of disco. This unique fusion creates a sound that is both retro and futuristic, often featuring slowed-down or reworked disco samples with heavy reverb and repetition. Inspired by the vibrant culture of rollerskating and cinematic experiences, Spectrascope aims to produce music that captures the essence of these nostalgic scenes while pushing the boundaries of electronic music. By providing a platform for artists to explore innovative and experimental styles, Spectrascope seeks to carve out a distinctive niche in the music industry.

Name: Sounds Of Africa Records
Description:
Sounds Of Africa Records is an exciting new venture established by Ramy Ayoub, a visionary entrepreneur renowned for his multicultural fusion music projects and festivals. With a deep appreciation for the diverse musical traditions and talents originating from Africa, Ramy Ayoub has embarked on this new endeavor to create a platform dedicated to promoting the captivating sounds of the continent.

Sounds Of Africa Records is committed to discovering, nurturing, and showcasing emerging talents from Africa. The label seeks to provide a supportive and collaborative environment where artists can thrive and express their unique musical voices. By fostering a creative and inclusive space, Sounds Of Africa Records aims to empower artists to create music that reflects their cultural heritage while embracing modern influences.

The label's primary focus is on promoting genres such as Afrobeat, Afro-house, Afro-Jazz, Highlife, Afro-pop, and various traditional African music styles. With a team of experienced industry professionals and a strong network of connections, Sounds Of Africa Records is well-equipped to guide artists through the creative process, from recording and production to marketing and distribution.

Sounds Of Africa Records is dedicated to maintaining the highest standards of quality and authenticity in its releases. Each project is carefully curated, ensuring that the music resonates with listeners and captures the essence of African musical traditions. By collaborating with talented producers, engineers, and musicians, the label aims to create exceptional recordings that showcase the immense talent and diversity of African music.

Beyond promoting individual artists, Sounds Of Africa Records also aims to contribute to the growth and development of the African music industry as a whole. The label actively seeks partnerships and collaborations with other labels, artists, and industry stakeholders to foster cross-cultural exchanges.

Name: Companhia de Cinema Vernuma
Description:
Fundada em 2020 pelo produtor Franco Dafon, a Vernuma é uma empresa que atua de forma estratégica e integrada em toda a cadeia de produção do cinema, unindo criação, gestão e execução técnica. 

Tem interesse por ideias que partem de visões de mundo específicas e perspectivas singulares, apostando na investigação de questões sociais e na experimentação dos gêneros narrativos. Assim, defende filmes autorais e projetos socialmente comprometidos, valorizando processos de criação executados por vozes historicamente deslocadas dos centros de decisão.

No ano de 2024, foi reconhecida e premiada como “Empresa do Audiovisual Mineiro”, por meio da lei Paulo Gustavo do estado de Minas Gerais.

Transforma projetos em ativos econômicos duráveis, capazes de gerar emprego e renda, criar diferentes postos de trabalho, movimentar a economia local, reconhecer e dar continuidade produtiva, sem abrir mão da autonomia criativa, do rigor estético e do compromisso com o impacto social e com os territórios onde atua.

Name: Zeta Filmes
Description:
Founded in 1998, in Belo Horizonte, Brazil, Zeta is a distributor and cultural production company aimed to film distribution, film festivals, curatorship, and audiovisual exhibitions. In 2001, Zeta Films created Indie Festival, in Belo Horizonte, Brazil. Indie means independent. Indie means creative, free, experimental, cultural. Interested in exhibiting this sort of production, Zeta created the festival to stimulate an audience for independent and authorial cinema. Also, to promote the exhibition of unreleased films, not distributed in Brazil, many of them by new directors. More at www.indiefestival.com.br
In 2013 Zeta Filmes starts in film distribution of international features in the Brazilian theatrical circuit. By this time, more than 80 titles were distributed theatrically by Zeta Filmes in the country, counting a total of more than 850.000 admissions with a box office of more than 2.000.000 Euros. With the support of Brazilian institutions, many titles were shown non-theatrically among main cities and towns of the countryside of Brazil and used for cultural and educational purposes. In 2016 Zeta Filmes launched the project CLASSICA and started the releasing of classic and cult titles of international art cinema in new and restored DCP prints.
In 2019 begins to operate as an international sales agent taking advantage of the experience acquired by Zeta Filmes in this business. Our goal is to make Brazilian films circulate and to be seen in cinemas around the world as well as globally in broadcasters and digital platforms.

Name: Selo Instituto
Description:
O QUE É O INSTITUTO?
O Instituto é mais do que um estúdio de som com produtor, compositor, artista solo, DJ e projeto.
  
É uma compilação, um movimento, uma fraternidade, um núcleo criativo, se é que se pode definir assim.
 
Na música pop atual as barreiras entre categorias vêm sendo anarquicamente borradas e ignoradas.
 
E nesse sentido, o Instituto é uma resposta.
 
Resposta à ordem das coisas, que sempre pode ficar melhor quando experimentada do avesso.
 
Resposta à tecnologia, que tem obrigação de virar isqueiro para acender criatividade.
 
Resposta à “assinatura”,  que vive virando oportunidade de bagunçar a noção de autoria.
 
Aqui no Instituto, criações, invenções, inovações, remixes  são
portas. Mundo. Possibilidades sonoras que se abrem para quem tem algo novo a dizer e curiosidade para ouvir o que está estourando em volta.
QUEM É O INSTITUTO?

Tejo Damasceno e André Lucarelli.
Além de sócios, eles são produtores, criadores, engenheiros,músicos.
 
Gente que está aí pra atender você  e aquela sua necessidade de fazer do som algo mais relevante.
 O QUE FAZ O INSTITUTO?
 
O Instituto é um pouco tudo:
É Selo Instituto.
Criou, mixou e produziu som com uma pancada de gente legal: Nação Zumbi, Sabotage, Planet Hemp, Fernandinho Beatbox, Bonsucesso SambaClube, Autoload, Ultramen, Comunidade Nin-Jitsu, Mamelo Sound System, Dona Cila do Coco, Kid Koala, Gaspar, Funk Buia, Rappin’ Hood, BNegão.
á criou e produziu som para o cinema e a TV.
Para o cinema: O Invasor,Cão sem Dono de Beto Brant, Bruna Surfistinha de Marcus Baldini, Mato sem cachorro de Pedro Amorin,Besouro de João Daniel ,O Abismo Prateado de Karim Aïnouz, , Participação com trilha para  Veloses e Furiosos 5 de Justin Lin.
Para a TV (minisséries): Alice (HBO), FDP (HBO), Fora De Controle (Record), O Negócio (HBO), Psi (HBO),Cidade Dos Homens,Participação com trilhas para um dos episódios do CSI.
Documentários: Pixo, Motoboy-Vida loca,Ossário ,Bilú e João(Invisible Children) de Katia lund e Spike Lee.

We are Jules & Lyndsey, a relaxed, friendly, married couple from Yorkshire in the UK.

We would love to meet you in person so you can see that we're not your typical videographers, and don't take ourselves too seriously. 

We make story focussed wedding films for relaxed couples planning to marry in Yorkshire, around the UK and other destinations in Europe.

The way we approach wedding videography is untraditional and innovative. Our aim is to create a film that evokes emotion, portrays your personality, and captures the vibe of your day.

Our videos are filmed with a relaxed approach, using cinematic techniques and edited in a creative way. They feel natural, modern and special.

Name: Pain MD Productions
Description:
The Company:
Pain MD Productions inc. (PMDP) was formed in April of 2012 to facilitate the distribution of its first film American Addict. The company was initially funded by the owner and founder Gregory A. Smith, MD.
 
Mission:
PMDP is committed to producing high production quality feature documentary and feature narrative films with documentary enhancement that are creative, entertaining, with hard-hitting facts that enlighten and educate. We focus on medical and science related topics that are controversial and affect everyone on the planet. Answering the big questions and exposing the truth and true motivation of our healthcare system, government and big corporations; wherever it leads us is the focus of the production company.

Finally we want to actually do something about the huge issues and problems we cover and expose. A percentage of the net revenue of each film will be donated to a non-profit corporation that pays the medical bills for patients who cannot afford treatment. We want to help fund research for the underfunded alternative methods of treating medical problems such as addiction and cancer. In addition we want our website to become a resource for people looking for help and more information about the subject matter in our films that is affecting their lives.

Name: AC Audio Produtora

Adson Cruz visitou pela primeira vez o mundo do áudio através dos seus estudos musicais, em seu primeiro piano eletrônico, que permitia a gravação em multitrack (dentro do próprio sistema). Este sistema de gravação do instrumento não produzia um resultado satisfatório com facilidade, portanto Adson investiu em seu primeiro computador. Ao longo dos anos, montou seu primeiro homestudio.
Em 2004, abriu seu primeiro estúdio de gravação e produção musical chamado “Salvador BlueNote Studio”, em parceria com o músico e produtor musical Ruan de Souza. Após alguns anos de trabalho, percebeu a necessidade de se capacitar e viajou para Curitiba/PR, afim de avançar em seus conhecimentos técnicos sobre o áudio. Por melhores oportunidades de trabalho na área, decidiu morar em Curitiba/PR e o Salvador BlueNote Studio encerrou suas atividades. 
Em 2019, com seu retorno à cidade Salvador/BA, fundou o estúdio MixOffice, com o qual já trabalhou com artistas/bandas de considerável notoriedade a artistas/bandas independentes da localidade como: Araketu, Pablo, banda Eva , Magary Lord, Mario Marauak,, Adão Negro, banda Demorô, Mr Bryan (Gasparzinho), O Biruta, Micael Lucas, DJ Akani & Makonnen Tafiri, Dja Luz, Alê Santana e Araketu.

Name: Oásis Filmes
Description:
Oasis Filmes is a Brazil-based independent production company with international reach and a clear political stance. Founded in Salvador and rooted in the Global South, we are committed to developing and producing films that challenge hegemonic structures, those sustained by narratives that legitimize inequality, symbolic violence, dispossession, and the concentration of wealth.

We see cinema as a tool for critique and transformation, not through easy slogans or utopian promises, but through symbolic ruptures, aesthetic tension, and sharp engagement with dominant ideologies. We are interested in narratives that expose contradictions, reveal the mechanisms of power, and confront the status quo. Our work embraces complexity, conflict, and the dialogue between worlds that often remain in opposition.

We are political by design and do not hide behind the false comfort of neutrality. We stand firmly against fascism, racism, xenophobia, neoliberal values, the cultural dominance of the Global North, and the extractive logic that still shapes much of the film industry.

Oasis believes in cinema as a collective force, capable of connecting imaginaries and forging common ground. We don’t just look for partners, we look for allies. Our projects are developed through deep collaboration, with a strong emphasis on international co-production as a creative and political act — one that crosses borders, expands imagination, and generates shared meaning.

We defend a multilateral, open, and culturally diverse audiovisual landscape. For us, international co-production is not just a financing strategy, it’s a statement. Powerful stories travel. They build bridges. They create encounters.

Smooth and silent, they are also an excellent alternative to a jib arm with the advantage of telescopic travel. Our cranes can also be used on a standard dolly with a simple Mitchell adapter. Not only do we offer a telescopic range of up to 28’ but they are a great solution for tighter spaces, small studios, standard doorways, roof tops and more. 

Vertigo Cranes worked side by side with Technocrane developer and Academy Award winner Horst Burbulla to create the only compact & lightweight Technocrane ever built with a telescopic range of 6’ to 12’. 

We are not only experienced technicians but passionate filmmakers at heart with over 20 years of experience working in the film industry, our goal is to help make every filmmakers vision a reality.

Description:
Em meados de 2014, os amigos Leandro Ribeiro (Atos) e Wagner Mendes começaram a planejar uma expedição de bicicleta pela América do Sul, a fim de desenvolverem um documentário que mostrasse o que de essencial existe nos povoados que habitam neste continente. Após um ano de planejamento, em junho de 2015 teve início a viagem que deu origem ao documentário chamado “Em busca da identidade sulamericana”, pelo projeto O Mundo ADEUS DARÁ. Durante o trajeto, os viajantes, então, decidiram que queriam continuar produzindo esse tipo de conteúdo, e foi aí que surgiu a ideia de se transformarem em uma produtora.

O DISTROPYA, por sua vez, é um coletivo independente que trabalha como um canal de veiculação de projetos audiovisuais de cunho humanitário, e nasceu a partir de um blog (http://distropya.blogspot.com/) com o intuito de compartilhar visões que mostrem o sentido da existência humana como forma de aprendizagem e evolução. Atualmente é formado por Camila Leite e Leandro Ribeiro, uma equipe técnica em produção cultural e audiovisual, e abriga projetos como “o mundo ADEUS DARÁ” e “Brasil Sem Limites”.

Name: Cantara Lab
Description:
Here at Cantara Lab, under the supervision of Will Geraldo, we offer specialized services in mixing and mastering, both in-person and online, music production, recording, audio post-production and sound design, focusing on technical quality and agility for timely delivery. We work in various styles and setups, providing innovative solutions and the best technology.

MIXING: Involves the precise balancing of levels, frequencies and dynamics, ensuring clarity and definition for every element in the music. We use advanced tools for equalization, compression, automation and spatial effects to create depth and sonic impact. We are equipped to handle demands for various formats like LPCM 2.0, Surround 5.1 and Dolby Atmos.

MASTERING: The final sound refinement process, where we ensure tonal uniformity, dynamic control and playback compatibility across all formats and systems through advanced audio processing techniques. Each project is adjusted to meet the technical protocols for vinyl, DVD, cassette, Blu-ray and digital streaming distribution.

AUDIO POST-PRODUCTION/SOUND DESIGN: Involves complex processes such as dialogue editing, sound design, creation and manipulation of sound effects as well as final mixing for precise integration with the visual environment. We use advanced techniques in equalization, volume automation, dynamic processing, and spatialization to ensure clarity and emotional impact.

RESTORATION: A specialized process aimed at repairing and enhancing damaged or deteriorated recordings using special techniques and software to remove unwanted noise, pops and distortions, while preserving the integrity of the material.

PRODUCTION/RECORDING: We use precise audio capture techniques with both digital and analog signal processing technologies to record every detail of your project, regardless of musical style.

Name: Promise Me: The Nancy G. Brinker Story
Description:
PROMISE ME is a feature-length film in development chronicling the story of Nancy G. Brinker, founder of the Susan G. Komen Foundation, whose promise to her sister Suzy led to the creation of the most influential breast cancer advocacy movement in history. In an era when breast cancer was rarely discussed publicly, Nancy transformed grief into a global movement that united millions, advanced research, and changed public health policy. Featuring rare archival footage, intimate interviews, and a behind-the-scenes look at the political and cultural battles fought along the way, the film preserves a legacy while inspiring the next generation to carry the mission forward.

 2025 Promise Me Film, LLC. All rights reserved. Promise Me is a not-for-profit documentary project, fiscally sponsored by The Film Collaborative, and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or produced in partnership with any breast cancer organization.

We aim to put viewers inside the games and the arcades of every era. You’ll be transported through time as we show you the games, the arcade environment, and the stories of people who were there. We've already begun to uncover the rare and the forgotten, machines rumored not to exist and tales that few people have heard. TBS and its theatre partners, are part of one of the most recognizable industries in the world.  Our product is a motion picture, the world’s greatest storytelling medium and it changes every week…our partners are independent theatres owned and operated by private companies, city governments and community-owned non-profit organizations... our job is to acquire content from Hollywood studios and bring it to their screens.

We are strong advocates for independent theatre owners and understand the best thing we can do to make sure our partners and their communities continue to thrive, is help them generate strong financial performance…even not-for-profit organizations need to generate revenue.  We believe our relationship is a partnership, and doing our part means providing our partners with the best content available, at the best terms available; and sharing insights, information, analysis and data in support of them operating a successful and consumer-relevant business.

Name: Armazém de Conteúdo
Description:
A Armazém de Conteúdo é uma Produtora Audiovisual e Cultural focada no braço da PRODUÇÃO. Os principais serviços são Formatação de Projetos, Produção Executiva, Equipe de Produção (coordenação, direção de produção, etc) e Organização de Cursos e Eventos. Na área cultural realiza, principalmente, o desenvolvimento de cursos na cidade de Porto Alegre/RS desde 2012. Sempre com o objetivo maior de movimentar o cenário educacional da cidade, produzindo cursos de acordo com as necessidades de novas descobertas e curiosidades dos diversos tipos de público, possibilitando desenvolvimento intelectual e criativo através das relações humanas. Acreditando que a troca de experiências é um fator fundamental para o aprendizado, pois vivemos um momento em que promover o conhecimento já passa longe do modelo tradicional de ensino, em que só o professor prepara e faz uma aula acontecer. O aprendizado está no nosso dia a dia, a todo momento e situação, não só dentro de uma sala de aula, mas nas ruas, dentro das nossas casas ou, até mesmo, em um set de cinema. Quando ainda não era pessoa jurídica sua formação contava com a participação das produtoras Pâmela Hauber e Nicole Mariani Agra e a designer Helena Agra. Desde 2016, a Pâmela Hauber assumiu a Armazém e então o negócio cresceu se tornando pessoa jurídica e produtora audiovisual independente brasileira registrada na ANCINE e habilitada juridicamente a produzir conteúdos audiovisuais e cursos mais elaborados.
No início de 2019 a produtora ganhou uma nova sócia, Débora Palhares que também carrega consigo uma experiência vasta na área do audiovisual formada em Produção Audiovisual (Cinema) pela PUC/RS e pós-graduada em Professional & Leader Coach pelo IBC.
A produtora foi responsável pela realização do Profissa em Novo Hamburgo em 2023 e este ano está a frente da edição em parceria com a PUCRS, através da LPG junto a SEDAC RS e o Iecine. O PROFISSA AUDIOVISUAL é um projeto itinerante de qualificação profissional nas áreas audiovisuais

Name: Soamel Pictures
Description:
It’s not often that award-winning artists are able to collaborate without getting in each other’s way, and even more rare when those collaborations develop into a creative partnership that lasts for decades. 

John Soares and Jeff Mellin met way back in the 20th century when John was shooting portraits of rockstars and Jeff was designing for record labels and art magazines. John’s distinctive photographic approach, a balance of geometry and humanity, was a perfect match for Jeff’s kinetic, story-driven art direction. Their shared love of music, retro aesthetics, kitschy humor, and respect for their subject matter, sealed the deal. 

They continue to collaborate, and their collaborations continue to evolve. John brings his portraitist eye for light, color and environmental composition to his cinematography, complimenting Jeff’s musical, dreamlike narrative editing style. They both love a well planned concept and pay meticulous attention to detail, but have the good sense to let it all go and make do with the resources at hand. And they both know that, often, that’s when you get the best results. The stuff they make is fun but thoughtful, retro-inspired but experimentally aspiring, both outré and introspective.

Their works have been shown at the New York City Independent Film Festival, Philadelphia Independent Film Festival, and the Arlington International Film Festival.

Name: Music Souvenir
Description:
Music Souvenir è la prima raccolta di colonne sonore dedicate alle città turistiche. È nuovo modo di raccontare le città e di conservare le personali esperienze di viaggio. Finora i nostri ricordi sono sempre stati legati a cartoline, fotografie o gadget turistici. C'è una nuova dimensione della memoria tutta da esplorare. Perché le città non sono fatte solo di colori, sapori e immagini, ma anche e soprattutto di suoni. La musica ha il potere di trasportarci lontano, di riportarci indietro nel tempo, di farci rivivere i ricordi emozionali di una vacanza. 
Music Souvenir affida ad un compositore il compito
di riarrangiare le diverse fonti sonore, prelevate da una città, in una sinfonia per creare un ritratto musicale. Il sound design contemporaneo rielabora il paesaggio sonoro in una composizione elettroacustica che arricchisce i brani musicali originali, realizzati esclusivamente per ogni città, con campionamenti, sonorizzazioni minimali, registrazioni ambientali, dettagli e riverberi. 
Le colonne sonore di Music Souvenir sono scaricabili sullo smartphone, sul computer o sul tablet. Grazie al formato digitale è possibile rivivere in ogni momento l’esperienza e le sensazioni vissute nel viaggio.

Il progetto è stato finanziato dalla Regione Autonoma Friuli Venezia Giulia sul bando POR FESR 2014-2020, Attività 2.1.b.1.

Amfora film er et ungt produktionsselskab, der skaber visuelt indlevende fortællinger.
Vi tror på, at nærvær og nysgerrighed er fundamentet for at lave film, der berører modtageren.

Vi producerer alt fra event- og præsentationsvideoer til kampagner og andet visuelt materiale.
I samarbejde med jer, kan vi omsætte jeres ønsker til et stærkt, visuelt udtryk, der formidler dét, I finder vigtigt.

Personerne bag Amfora film er Andreas Merrald og Marie Munkner. Før vi startede Amfora film i 2022,
har vi begge arbejdet freelance med foto- og filmmediet samt fortællende podcast.
Ved siden af det kommercielle arbejde producerer vi vores egne dokumentarfilm.

Vi har erfaring med processen fra idé- og konceptudvikling, research, analyse og interview til klip og postproduktion.
Vi kan enten udføre hele produktionen fra start til slut eller indgå i en co-produktion - alt efter hvad jeres behov er.

Amfora film har base i København, men vi arbejder over hele Danmark og uden for landets grænser.

Vi har særligt blik for
- Foto- og video-portrætter, der føles ærlige og nysgerrige
- Filmisk indhold, som seeren kan mærke og huske
- Vigtigheden af bred og nuanceret repræsentation
- At skabe hurtigt afkodelige koncepter
- At omsætte indsigter til skarpe, filmiske fortællinger

Name: WW Filmes
Description:
Conhecida por sua linguagem própria, originalidade e capacidade de inovar dentro da Caatinga, oferecendo uma nova roupagem para o audiovisual e a TV brasileira, a WW Filmes, produtora independente sediada em Pernambuco há cerca de 20 anos, é responsável por produções com forte atuação no Sertão e no Semiárido.

Entre seus principais trabalhos estão os longas-metragens Guerra do Pau de Colher (drama), em fase de finalização, e DNA ORIGENS – Sertão , atualmente em produção. Assina também as duas temporadas da série Natureza Forte (Globoplay, 2018–2025) , que valoriza as mulheres sertanejas, e a série de ficção Carniceiros, disponível em plataformas como Looke, Prime Video, ClaroTV, VivoTV, premiada nacional e internacionalmente por sua originalidade e ambientação no bioma da Caatinga. Venceu o 24º Festival de Curtas de SP na categoria "Formação do Olhar" com "Ser Tão Avoador"(drama) exibido no Canal Brasil.  

A produtora também é responsável por "Drags Justiceiras", série de ação/aventura totalmente realizada na Caatinga , com drag-queens, reafirmando seu compromisso com narrativas ousadas ancoradas no território.

A WW Filmes tem atualmente(2025) o título de Melhor Filme Pernambucano de curta-metragem na última edição do Festival de Triunfo, com premiações adicionais de Melhor Produção, Direção de Arte e Som . 

No total, já realizou mais de 100 projetos e coleciona mais de 50 prêmios e indicações em festivais, inclusive gerindo  incentivos federais, estaduais, municipais ou co-produções com players.

Dirigida pelo cineasta Wllyssys Wolfgang — doutor em Educação, Arte e História da Cultura(Mackenzie-SP) —, a WW Filmes se destaca também pelo compromisso social: mantém uma equipe diversa que inclui mulheres em cargos de comando, pessoas LGBTQIAPN+ e profissionais negros, além de promover formações gratuitas em comunidades em vulnerabilidade. Mais de mil alunos já passaram por suas oficinas e programas formativos.

Description:
Founded in 2016 by Dionne Copland and Louise Weard, CyberCraft Video is a rising independent production company with a prolific and distinctive body of work. In 2013, Dionne joined forces with Louise for the featurette Computer Hearts, which we self-distributed internationally on home video in 2015. Our award-winning short films Inferno and Haxx Deadroom followed in 2016, with the CyberCraft team going into production on our feature film Cold Wind Blowing in December 2017. In 2020 Cold Wind Blowing hit the festival circuit to wide acclaim and the CyberCraft team is currently developing their sophomore feature.

 

Collectively, our films have screened at festivals around the globe, includingSalem Horror Fest, Monster Fest, Blood in the Snow, Genreblast, Brno16, Buffalo Dreams Fantastic Film Festival, South Texas Underground Film Festival, Rio Grind, PDXtreme Fest, Cinemafantastique, Little Nightmares, Bangorefest, Vancouver Badass Film Festival, Heavy Hitting Horror Fest, Sick Chick Flicks, Ax Wound Horror Film Festival, and the Women in Horror Film Festival. Most recently, Charlie’s feature-length debut Cold Wind Blowing hit the festival circuit, earning them the Best Director Award at Genreblast and delivering chills to the Salem Horror Fest.

Name: The Dude Is Legit!
Description:
The Baseball Gods must fix their decades-old mistake that ended a promising young pitcher’s career by intervening at key points in his life to ensure “everybody gets what’s coming to ‘em.” 

---
In The Dude Is Legit!, Karma and Goldy are “Baseball Gods” tasked by God to fix a decades old mistake that ended the promising career of a college pitcher.  Karma, a feisty softball catcher, and Goldy, an insightful pitching veteran of the Negro Leagues, must put aside their failed romance and use “meaningful coincidences” to realign destiny and get the pitcher a shot a playing professional baseball (which in real life, he did at age 51!). 

These comedic supernatural supervisors help tell a heart-warming baseball tale, layering themes of spirituality, guilt, forgiveness, redemption, unfulfilled dreams, and aging.  The Dude Is Legit! is a dramedy that weaves together two human-experience stories that happen to have baseball as the backdrop.  

The screenplay has won “Best Feature Screenplay” in four recent festivals, most recently at the Garden State Film Festival, which also included a table read.

Name: BG Films
Description:
BG Films is an independent film company that showcases a variety of intriguing movies. One of their standout films is "Blood and Love," an action-packed assassin movie. In this film, an assassin named Drake, played by Peter Burke, is hired by an aspiring politician, Benjamin Myers, to eliminate a potential threat to his campaign. However, things take a turn when Drake finds himself enamored with his target, a woman named Gail portrayed by Gabrielle Loneck. As they spend more time together, Drake grapples with his emotions, leading him to question his mission.

Another notable film from BG Films is "Dinner with an Assassin Recut." This action film revolves around a young assassin named Mark, played by John Jet. Mark is tasked with eliminating a member of a crime syndicate. However, his mission is sidetracked when he becomes infatuated with a mysterious woman he spots at a restaurant. This unexpected twist puts Mark in a precarious situation, torn between love and duty.

BG Films, located in New Jersey, has a rich portfolio of movies ranging from action, romance, to thrillers. Their dedication to storytelling is evident in their captivating plots and memorable characters.

Thought-Provoking Insights:

* The Complexity of Human Emotions: Both movies highlight the internal conflict faced by assassins when personal feelings interfere with their professional duties. It raises the question of how emotions can influence decision-making in high-stakes situations.
* The Morality of Choices: The characters in these films are often faced with moral dilemmas. It prompts viewers to reflect on the choices they would make when faced with similar circumstances.
* The Power of Attraction: Both films emphasize the unpredictability of attraction and how it can alter the course of one's life, even for those trained to be emotionless.

Please note that you can explore more about BG Films and their movie offerings by visiting their official website.

Name: Grinberg Bros
Description:
Grinberg Bros is an Israeli film production and distribution company founded in 2017 by film producer Konstantin Grinberg, a descendant of the Russian and Israeli futurist poet Saveliy Grinberg, together with Yoram Barsela, former Deputy Attorney General of Israel, Legal Adviser of Jerusalem.  

Our company specializes in documentaries and TV series. Our last works include the restored films of the Soviet avant-garde filmmaker Dziga Vertov “Anniversary of the Revolution” (2018) and “The History of the Civil War” (2021).  

We also aim to popularize the works of Savely Grinberg and continue developing the futurism of art. 

Our passion leads us to explore the legacy of various filmmakers, poets and artists and their influence on contemporary society and culture. We believe that in the creative heritage of our ancestors we can find answers to many questions of our daily life.
    
Our company also considers projects for films and TV series dedicated to modern issues of daily life. We will be glad to discuss with you ways to collaborate in the future.

Name: Prague POP Symphonics
Description:
Prague Pop Symphonics, zkráceně Prague POPS, je symfonický orchestr, s nímž spolupracují profesionální umělci z nejprestižnějších českých orchestrů. Při veškerých hudebních produkcích důsledně dbáme na autentičnost a vysokou kvalitu prováděných děl. Prague POPS disponuje taktéž vynikajícím smíšeným pěveckým sborem, který především skladbám z filmového plátna dodává to pravé epické vyznění. 

Prague POPS tvoří tým, jehož členové jsou aktivní a nadšení hudebníci s dlouholetými zkušenostmi především ze zahraničních hudebních produkcí, na kterých se podíleli nejen umělecky, ale i organizačně. V rámci svých hudebních aktivit se prezentovali v nejvýznamnějších sálech a koncertních halách v Česku, Německu, Rakousku, Anglii, Skotsku, Švýcarsku, Norsku, Švédsku a mnoha dalších zemích. Kromě live koncertů nasbírali cenné zkušenosti také díky spolupráci s nahrávacími studii při vzniku soundtracků pro produkci hollywoodských filmů, HBO Max a Netflixu. Mezi projekty, na nichž se členové Prague POPS podíleli, patří například velké projekty filmové hudby Hanse Zimmera a Johna Williamse, turné BBC Planet Earth II a Blue Planet II live in concert v koprodukci s jednou z největších evropských produkčních společností FKP Scorpio.

Name: KIFARU - Documentary Feature
Description: KIFARU is an award winning feature-length documentary film directed by David Hambridge. The film follows the lives of two young Kenyan wildlife rangers who are tasked with taking care of world's last male northern white rhino, 'Sudan'. Spanning over the course of their first four years on the job, KIFARU offers an intimate glimpse into the joys and pitfalls of wildlife conservation firsthand through the eyes of the rhino caretakers at Ol Pejeta Conservancy in Kenya. The film allows audiences unprecedented access to intimately witness extinction happening in real-time, a journey the world has never seen before.

Name: Mysterious Red X
Description:
Centrally located in Seattle’s SODO district, MysteriousRedX has been a deep-cut hub for musicians over the last 20 years! We have been home to countless incredible records, and the list continues to grow.

Today, as recording music continues to become easier and more accessible, we still see some of Seattle’s most beloved artists, producers, and engineers returning to this space. There’s something very special within these walls. And, when paired with our collection of vintage, analog & digital gear, the results are high quality at a low cost.

Ownership has been passed down through the years, each time opening the doors to a new wave of artists emerging from the Pacific Northwest’s diverse music community. Even amidst Seattle’s rapidly shifting economic climate, MysteriousRedX exists as a place in which artists can explore, grow, and feel at home while working to fully realize their creative vision.

We offer flexible scheduling options to accommodate any/all of your recording needs, day or night. The studio is available for both full and hourly sessions depending on how we can help you best.

The delicacy and vulnerability of songwriting, and the recording process, are deeply understood by everyone here at MysteriousRedX. We appreciate and welcome any type of sonic expression that comes through our door, and respect the minds who create it, no matter how they identify. 

We are an inclusive, judgment-free space. This means; there is no room for phrases or tones that reflect prejudiced, stereotyped or discriminatory views of any type.

We believe words have power. Everyone deserves the utmost respect and freedom to make this space their own.

We’d love to have you come check it out for yourself! Contact us through our website to schedule a tour or discuss your next project.

Name: Spanglish Media
Description:
Founded by Armando Gutierrez and Alberto de la Cruz in 2021, Spanglish Media has produced a wide range of media including feature films and TV shows, including Bezos: The Beginning (2023), a biopic about the founder of Amazon.com, currently available on Apple TV, Google Play, and Amazon Video.

The Hispanic community in the United States is experiencing rapid growth, and their enthusiasm for movies is unparalleled. According to the 2021 MPA Theme report, the global box office market for all films released in each country around the world was $21.3B. The Hispanic/Latino category had the highest per capita attendance, going to the cinema an average of 1.7 times in the year. In addition, the Hispanic/Latino category was overrepresented in the population of daily viewers in the distribution channels of physical discs (29%), EST/VOD (27%), and online subscriptions (24%) relative to their share of the population (17%). Despite progress, the Hispanic/Latino community continues to be underrepresented in the film industry.

Spanglish Media seeks to address this underrepresentation by committing to the following benchmarks:
❖ Over half of our cast shall be Hispanic.
❖ Over half of all our productions shall be helmed by a Hispanic director.
❖ Over half of all our scripts shall be written by a Hispanic writer.

W Vedit Media wierzymy w moc wideo jako narzędzia komunikacji, dlatego też dążymy do tego, aby nasze treści nie tylko były estetyczne, ale także wywoływały emocje i wzmacniały przekaz naszych klientów. 

Tworzymy treści, które angażują - to nie tylko nasz slogan, to nasza misja. Napisz do nas i dowiedz się, jak możemy pomóc Ci osiągnąć swoje cele w świecie wideo.

Name: Rush Process Fest
Description:
Rush Process (2015-2018) celebrated DIY, handcrafted animation as a vehicle for self-expression.

During its run, Rush Process was the only full-scale animation festival in the state of Texas, and the only animation festival in the US explicitly dedicated to handcrafted animation, a materials-focused practice at the intersection of DIY, auteur-driven cinema and analog animation art.

Rush Process screened visually and emotionally stunning, non-digital animation touching a wide variety of genres (narrative, documentary, essay) and techniques (stop motion, ink & paint on paper, charcoal, chalkboard films, paper cut-out & multiplane, cel, paint- and sand-on-glass, analog rotoscoping, direct animation on celluloid).

A parallel goal of the festival was to provide our audiences with the opportunity to create animation themselves, via popup animation stations, workshops and collaborative, time-based production challenges.

An emotional connection with a sense of purpose in an age of ever increasing noise.

Mike Mascoll is a producer, creative director and founder of LEV Media Group. His use of storytelling helps to document invaluable chapters in Black History, lending promise and a restructure to the American consciousness.

Mike's 1st film in New Day, On The Line highlighted one the longest voluntary school desegregation programs in the country and its’ historical impact on the city of Boston. His latest film, CodeSwitching: Race and Identity in the Suburban Schoolhouse directed by Jonathan Schwartz, takes an intimate look at the life experiences of 5 generational students and their personal encounters as they navigate self-awareness and cultural boundaries.

Mike’s collaborative efforts are taking shape as he focuses greater attention on Lifting Every Voice of those often marginalized and discounted. He's currently working with Filmmaker, Laura Seltzer-Duny as the Producer on THE GATE. A first feature-length PBS documentary about America's 1st Contraband community.

The company consists of two individuals: Ash Dibben, for video production and editing services and Mandy Dibben, for Professional Makeup and Styling for Video, Stills and Live Events.

Hot Footage has created over 250 high profile music video productions, beginning with the video for Zahara “Loliwe”. Within 1 month of its release on YouTube, it was watched over 2 million times, becoming the 12th most viewed video on Youtube for that year, later that year the video won Best Female Video at The Channel O Awards. 

More recently, Hot Footage produced Arthur Mafokate’s music video for the song “Welele We”, within 3 weeks of its release on YouTube, it was watched over a million times. Mandy’s makeup and styling was recently featured in Drum Magazine’s article for Chomee “Chilling with Chomee.

Hot Footage has also produced a TV Show on ETV boasting the highest ratings for the shows time slot for 3 consecutive years. With Ash as Creative Producer and HOD of Post Production the shows viewership increased from 149 223 to 557 891.

Hot Footage continues to be a strong provider of video production and makeup styling services to small to medium businesses and record companies around the world, offering high end and budget conscious Directorial Videography, Motion Graphics, and Makeup Styling. During the past years, commercials were designed for BondiBlu, Canon Printers, Puma, SAB Breweries, Salex, Timbercity, Bradlows, SBA Business Advisory and STA Travel, shown everywhere from television to YouTube.

Description:
Στα 37 χρόνια της πορείας του, το Πανόραμα Ευρωπαϊκού Κινηματογράφου αναδείχθηκε σε ένα καλλιτεχνικό θεσμό που κάθε φθινόπωρο, σφραγίζει την πολιτιστική ζωή της Αθήνας. Ο νέος βρετανικός κινηματογράφος, ο κινηματογράφος της περεστρόικα, ο νέος ιταλικός κινηματογράφος, η κωμωδία των στούντιο Ealing, ο κινηματογράφος του φανταστικού, οι ταινίες επιστημονικής φαντασίας, Ποιο μέλλον; Οικολογικά και άλλα προβλήματα, η λογοκρισία στον κινηματογράφο, τα 200 χρόνια της Γαλλικής Επανάστασης, τα 40 χρόνια του περιοδικού «Καγιέ ντι Σινεμά», Depression – το μεγάλο οικονομικό κραχ, έρωτας και ερωτισμός στον κινηματογράφο, είναι μόνο ορισμένα από τα αφιερώματα σε επίκαιρα θέματα, που έχει φιλοξενήσει το φεστιβάλ, όλα αυτά τα χρόνια.
Το Πανόραμα Ευρωπαϊκού Κινηματογράφου προσανατολίζεται κυρίως στην ανάδειξη του ευρωπαϊκού, μαζί και του ελληνικού κινηματογράφου, σύγχρονου αλλά και παλαιότερου, χωρίς να παραγνωρίζει κινηματογραφίες από τον υπόλοιπο κόσμο.

Improfilmi Malev on viiendat aastat toimuv filmilaager, kus luuakse ühiselt lühifilme. Malev on ideaalne võimalus järgi katsetada rolle nii kaamera ees kui ka taga!
Osaleda võivad kõik erineva kogemustasemega huvilised, kes tahavad filmindust õppida ja kogemusi saada! Alla 18-aastastel osalejatel palume SIISKI tulla koos täiskasvanuga!
Improfilmilaagris ei tegutseta range ajakava järgi, ent sellegi poolest on tegutsemist ohtralt! Iga osaleja peab laagri jooksul kokku puutuma võõraste inimeste ning rohke suhtlemisega. Seega kui eelistad üksi toimetada, tule ikkagi Improfilmi Malevasse ja õpi suurema filmigrupiga koostööd tegema! Ootame näitlejaid, operaatoreid, heliloojaid, juhte jPT.
Lisaks on meil võimalik kasutada kõiksugu põnevaid filmimis-, heli- ja muusikavidinaid.

Oleme algusest alates mittetulunduslikud, seega küsime raha vaid toidu ja majutuse eest vastavalt sellele, mitmeks päevaks tuled.

Lisainfo ja registreerimine: www. improfilm.ee või e-maili improfilmimalev@gmail.com kaudu

Name: S for 7
Description:
S for 7 was conceived on the road, and born in the air somewhere between Dublin, Rome, Belgrade, and Moscow.  

FAR OFF LANDS features 8 songs written and performed by Gerard Michael MacCarthy who explains: 

"Th songs capture personal states of mind (and heart) influenced by the relationships I'd got enmeshed in, and the many intriguing, dangerous, and predominantly seductive characters I’d encountered in ever-evolving, head-spinning cities like Moscow, St. Petersburg, Belgrade and Rome. 

In most cases, I escaped unscathed, just about alive enough to tell - or want to tell - the tale.

While some of the songs reflect 'bitter epiphanies’ that an idealistic outsider and sometime-exile will always face and - even when ironic - they are all optimistic. Each time the protagonist picks himself up and lives to fight another day, no matter how deep the cuts run. 

The darker more resilient songs are more about the consequences of wanting the wrong person (you were SO sure you wanted), while the brighter ones accept that we have nothing if we are not 'In Love', devoid of the self-awakening that comes with each new deep-dive, each new surrender to that state.

As for the musical style, the best (and most flattering) description I've heard is that the music sounds a bit like Tom Ford 'Noir' smells. Can't argue with that!"

FAR OFF LANDS reached #1 in the Bank.Link charts on November 21, holding #10 in the subsequent weekly charts.

Name: Kwadrat Kreatorski
Description:
Kwadrat Kreatorski – Twoje studio podcastowe i fotograficzne w Poznaniu

Szukasz profesjonalnej przestrzeni do nagrania podcastu biznesowego w Poznaniu? Kwadrat Kreatorski to nowoczesne studio podcastowe w centrum Poznania, oferujące najwyższą jakość nagrań audio i wideo. Nasza elastyczna przestrzeń umożliwia dostosowanie scenografii i ustawień do indywidualnych potrzeb, co sprawia, że jest idealna nie tylko dla podcastów biznesowych, ale także podcastów lifestyle’owych, webinarów i szkoleń.

Dlaczego warto wybrać Kwadrat Kreatorski?
	•	Specjalizacja w podcastach biznesowych – zapewniamy profesjonalne warunki do realizacji Twojego projektu.
	•	Możliwość personalizacji scenografii oraz profesjonalne oświetlenie w cenie.
	•	Wsparcie realizatora podczas nagrań – gwarantujemy perfekcyjny dźwięk i obraz.
	•	Gotowe materiały od razu po nagraniu dzięki usłudze Rec&Ready.

Dodatkowo oferujemy w pełni wyposażone studio fotograficzne, idealne do sesji portretowych, wizerunkowych i kreatywnych. Zapewniamy kompleksowe wsparcie, w tym przygotowanie makijażu i stylizacji, aby Twoje sesje były niezapomniane. ￼

Zrealizuj swój podcast biznesowy, sesje fotograficzne, webinary czy szkolenia w Kwadracie Kreatorskim – najlepszym miejscu w Poznaniu do tworzenia treści przyciągających uwagę w mediach społecznościowych. Skontaktuj się z nami już dziś!

Fondé en 1992, le studio d'enregistrement Fast Forward est un espace multidisciplinaire axé sur l'enregistrement et le développement de projets artistiques et musicaux. Par le passé, de nombreux artistes de renoms et productions ont traversé ses portes, tels que Pat Metheny, les productions du Cirque du soleil ou encore The Franklin Electric.



Maxime Philippe (ingénieur audio) et Rémi Hermoso (créateur visuel), forts des nombreuses collaborations qui les ont unis dans les dernières années, embarquent dans cette nouvelle expérience avec l’inspiration nécessaire pour donner un nouvel air à cet espace mythique de la culture Montréalaise. À travers cette alliance, nous bâtirons des liens entre les artistes d'ici et d'ailleurs, accompagnant vos projets de la création à la production, permettant à vos projets d’atteindre l’excellence qu’ils méritent.


Founded in 1992, Fast Forward recording studio is a multidisciplinary space focused on the recording and development of artistic and musical projects. In the past, many renowned artists and productions have passed through its doors, such as Pat Metheny, Cirque du Soleil productions and The Franklin Electric.

 

Maxime Philippe (audio engineer) and Rémi Hermoso (visual creator), strong from the numerous collaborations that have united them in recent years, are embarking on this new experience with the inspiration necessary to give a new air to this stronghold of Montreal culture . Name: The Great Disconnect Film
Description:
An award winning documentary that uncovers why, in a world seemingly more connected than ever before, people are feeling more and more socially isolated – and the true cost this has on our lives. The documentary invites us to reflect on the relationships we have with those around us and raises the question: is it possible to overcome our modern culture of disconnectedness and rediscover how truly essential we are to one other?

Keep up to date for upcoming screenings by subscribing to the newsletter on the film's website: 

www.TheGreatDisconnectFilm.com

Since its official launch in October 2019, the film has screened across Canada through multiple municipalities, non-profits, educational institutions and NGOs, and has been shown in ten countries across Europe. It has also been featured in over twelve independent film festivals, and in October 2020, the documentary won the award for Best Feature Film at the prominent Better Cities Film Festival. The judges’ panel included the famous architect Jan Gehl alongside other esteemed architects and urbanists.

We're on Facebook & Instagram as well if you'd like to follow us there , click the links below:

https://www.facebook.com/TheGreatDisconnectFilm

https://www.instagram.com/thegreatdisconnectfilm/

If you would like to screen the film in your community or city, please head to this page here - https://thegreatdisconnectfilm.com/watch-now/ - or contact us at info@TheGreatDisconnectFilm.com.

Name: CS-Copter
Description:
Atemberaubende Luftaufnahmen, wilde Verfolgungsjagden aus der Vogelperspektive oder störungsfreie Followshots. Der Einsatz von Drohnen bietet Filmschaffenden spektakuläre Blickwinkel zu einem vergleichsweise günstigen Preis. Doch es genügt nicht, Technik zu besitzen, man muss sie auch beherrschen.

Unser Team, das auf langjährige Erfahrung im Kamera- und Filmgeschäft zurückblicken kann, fliegt bereits seit 2011 mit verschiedensten Drohnensystemen. Wir verfügen über das Know-How und kennen die Stärken und Schwächen der Systeme. Egal, ob Bausatz oder Komplettsystem – wir lassen nichts abstürzen. Unsere Mitarbeiter haben Erfahrung in den unterschiedlichsten und schwierigsten Umgebungen gesammelt. Ob Berge, Flüsse, Küsten oder das offene Meer – wir wissen, welche Fluggenehmigungen sie brauchen und wie man sie bekommt.

Mit einer einzigen Akkuladung können unsere Drohnen dabei bis zu 7 km weit und bis zu 94 km/h schnell fliegen. Durch Live-Bildüberwachung von einer festen Position oder sogar aus einem sich bewegenden Fahrzeug heraus, wird sichergestellt, dass die Aufnahmen auch den hohen aktuellen Anforderungen einer 4K-Auflösung gerecht werden.

Name: Cinnamon Cinema 肉桂影社
Description:
Cinnamon Cinema is the University of Michigan’s first and largest cross-cultural film organization, founded by friends who share a passion for creating short films. We take inspiration from current events on campus, in our lives, and in society to produce original films. Our goal is not only to want the voice of Chinese movies to have a presence on the campus but also to create a mutual understanding and discussion topic of the messages conveyed through our movies for our viewers.

Just like the concept of “Open to different voices,” Cinnamon Cinema wishes to spread our own voice through a wide range of film styles. Through our first short film called “How Are You,” we showed the reality of the lives of international students, depicting an accurate image of international students to others. Then, in our second short film named “I’ve Been,” we found inspiration from societal issues to encourage viewers to reflect and raise awareness about the matter. Moving forward in the new school year, we wish to explore different concepts and perspectives through other genres, such as sitcoms, music videos or longer movies. Cinnamon Cinema also publishes self-written movie reviews and recommendations, encourages script calls, and shares bloopers for audiences to understand the fun and entertaining behind-the-scenes process of producing a movie.

Cinnamon Cinema is made up of those with years of experience producing, acting, and directing and those skilled in marketing, writing, producing music, and editing. We currently have around 55+ members. Even though we have a professional side when working, we also strive to have fun while filming and producing. If you are interested in movie production, join us, and we will create impactful, profound, and unique works together.

Name: Punktlandung Film- & Videoproduktion
Description:
Was wir tun: Punktlandung ist auf die Konzeption und Produktion strategischer Videomodule spezialisiert, die gezielt Vertrauen aufbauen und Entscheidungsprozesse im B2B-Umfeld verkürzen. Mit über 28 Jahren Erfahrung in der Werbe- und Filmwelt verbinden wir hochwertiges Handwerk mit psychologisch fundierter Strategie.

Warum Punktlandung? In einer Welt voller austauschbarem Content liefern wir das Gegengift: Video-Content, der nicht nur gesehen wird, sondern wirkt. Wir helfen Unternehmen dabei, ihre Expertise, ihre Werte und ihre Lösungen so sichtbar zu machen, dass Kunden und Bewerber die Sicherheit gewinnen, die sie für eine Entscheidung brauchen.

Unsere Schwerpunkte:

Vertrieb & Sales Enablement: Wir entwickeln Videomodule, die Einwände entkräften und Ihren Vertriebsprozess messbar beschleunigen.

Recruiting & Employer Branding: Wir schaffen authentische Einblicke, die genau die Fachkräfte anziehen, die zu Ihrer Unternehmenskultur passen.

Strategische Positionierung: Wir etablieren Sie als vertrauenswürdige Autorität in Ihrem Marktsegment.

Unsere Methode: Jedes Projekt basiert auf den 10 Hebeln des Vertrauensaufbaus. Wir produzieren keine Filme von der Stange, sondern maßgeschneiderte Kommunikationswerkzeuge für Unternehmen, die keine Kompromisse bei Qualität und Wirkung eingehen wollen.

Lassen Sie uns Ihre Botschaft auf den Punkt bringen. Besuchen Sie uns auf www.punktlandung.at oder schreiben Sie uns direkt für ein unverbindliches Erstgespräch.

Name: Moonglass Pictures LLC

Our production company was started as a way to bring more diversity into the film industry. We aim to uplift female, POC, LGBTQA+, and more voices through the media we create. Our productions foster diversity and authenticity within our cast and crew in hopes of paving the way for a more representative world of film.

We are currently in post-production for our first feature film, "Smile." This film started as the SMU Summer Film Production in the fall of 2019. After production was postponed due to the COVID-19 pandemic, we finally wrapped after 21 days on set in the summer of 2021.

For more information on this project, please visit its website: https://www.amoviecalledsmile.com

The only employees of Moonglass Pictures LLC are Brittney Hutchison, Alexa May, and Kelsey Hodge. Independent contractors were hired to work on the production "Smile".

Dit doen we door intensief overleg met de klant, jij bepaald wat er in je film komt en wij zorgen er voor dat het er goed uit ziet.

Berg Films is opgericht in 2015 door Nicole van den Berg. Wat begon in een zolderkamer bij haar ouders is nu uitgegroeid tot een goed lopend bedrijf met mooie klanten. Daarnaast zitten we sinds kort met ons kantoor in het centrum van Rotterdam, zo is een kopje koffie komen drinken en de mogelijkheden bespreken nog makkelijker geworden!

Benieuwd naar wat Berg Films voor jouw bedrijf kan betekenen? Neem dan nu vrijblijvend contact op.

Name: Biograf International Film & Moving Arts Festival
Description:
Biograf is an international film festival that explores the artistic intersections of cinema, embracing it as a complete vehicle for dialogue and reflection. Rooted in the idea of incompleteness, Biograf curates a reintroduction to regional filmmaking—one that weaves together visual and plastic arts, alternative cinematic narratives, moving images, and soundscapes.

In August 2025, Cerveira sets itself in motion through some of the most significant movements in cinema.

Biograf is part of a wider cultural revitalisation initiative in Cerveira, forming the inaugural agenda of the Palco das Artes de Cerveira, launched in 2024.

Name: IndigiStudios
Description:
IndigiStudios is a 100% owned and operated indigenous film and production company, focused on a slate of theatrical, episodic, and documentary projects, all centered around the company’s mission of reclaiming the indigenous narrative in film and television. Beyond dramas, we will strive to tell fun and fantastical stories, aspiring to create impactful films in every genre – from action to romance to documentaries and  comedy.

Indigenous people are, and have always been, storytellers.

We are building bridges for indigenous people through the art of storytelling and in the process reclaiming the inaccurate spoken and written account of connected events related to indigenous history in the United States.

Through our films we wish to coalesce an ever-growing global community in solidarity and partnership with Indian Country to advance indigenous truths and eliminate the falsehoods which have plagued indigenous people since the onset of colonization.

What is personal, is universal.

We aspire to utilize our proficiencies in filmmaking to make an impact globally. We believe that by sharing and expressing indigeneity cinematically, we will subsequently touch the spirit of people universally.

Importantly, we hope our work will serve to embolden the spirit and strengthen the resiliency of our future generations, so that they are empowered to be unwavering and fierce in their endeavors and live unashamed as indigenous people who each have a purpose on this earth.

It is a good day to be indigenous!

The oral traditions of our indigenous people will live on through each of our projects. By telling an array of stories from an indigenous perspective we are advancing our truths, preserving our values, building a global community and reclaiming the indigenous narrative – one film at a time.

To break musical boundaries and connect people through creativity and innovation. To celebrate diversity and inclusivity while standing against hate, division, and intolerance, fostering a community where artists and listeners can explore music without limits.

Description:
Stories have always driven how we connected as people since the beginning of time, from drawings on ancient caves to scary tales around a campfire to moving pictures on all sorts of screens.
We have always strived for better storytelling and ways of experiencing and conveying that narrative.
As a company, we continually align our values to ensure we are best suitable to bridge the gap between what is possible and what is not.
Making unbelievable ideas seem real and vivid, pushing those boundaries, bridging that gap more and more every day.
We made technology our second-best pal, while the first will always remain people; Our art is created by and for people. But with the ever-growing and improving technologies and innovations, we can apply those advancements to bypass the limitations of physics, chemistry, and biology into a world full of all possibilities.
The SKY is the limit, guided by your imagination, vision, and millions of ways of bringing it to life.
With those principles guiding us, we provide the best possible services to all of our clients. Ranging from Casting services, beauty department management, pre, production, and post-work, with all of our expertise to design the best line of products for each of our remarkable and talented clients.

Pero lo que realmente nos define es nuestra pasión por la creatividad, buscamos encontrar la forma más innovadora de capturar la esencia de lo que nuestros clientes quieren transmitir.

Y no solo eso, también nos importa la seguridad en todo lo que hacemos, desde el uso de nuestra tecnología avanzada de drones hasta la forma en que trabajamos en equipo. Además, estamos autorizados por AESA  para operar dentro de la ciudad y CTR de manera segura y legal!

Ya sea para cine o publicidad, siempre volamos con un propósito, y trabajamos duro para asegurarnos de que nuestros clientes estén satisfechos con nuestro trabajo. Permítenos ayudarte  en tu proyecto! Volemos alto juntos!

Name: Stilley Partners, LLC
Description:
Stilley Partners has co-founded thecinemabridge.com to assist Cinema Landlord's in Lease Restructuring during this post pandemic period and now provides
Expert Solutions for Cinema Landlords bridging from the Crisis To the New Normal.
The Cinema Bridge assist Landlords in understanding how and what the cinemas are asking for, provide industry film and market knowledge and create cinema operating proformas to confirm what the Landlords are hearing from the Cinemas to make sure there are no falsehoods. Most importantly, The Cinema Bridge takes the fear out of the transaction and can prepare the Landlord for a lease renegotiation, assist inkeeping the cinema operating through various options and make sure it stays open until a new cinema tenant can be sourced for a new long term lease. Of course, keeping the original tenant is always the 1st choice.

Contact me at chuck@stilleypartners.com or cstilley@thecinemabridge.com and learn how we can assist you with your cinema tenant.

Name: Le Café de mes Souvenirs Film Musical
Description:
Le Café de mes Souvenirs is an international, French-Finnish film musical. The film is written, directed, and produced by Valto Baltzar. The plot runs partly through songs composed originally for the film by a Finnish jazz composer Heikki Sarmanto.  The City of Prague Philharmonic Orchestra, one of the most respected and recorded symphony orchestras in the world, performs the score in the film. 

The film is filmed in Finland and France. In Finland, the film is filmed in Helsinki, Porvoo, Kauniainen and Sipoo. In France, the filming took place in Cherbourg and Paris. Finnish design plays a central part in the set design, for example, the designs of Yrjö Kukkapuro and Marimekko can be seen in the film. The cities of Helsinki and Cherbourg are in collaboration with the film. The film is filmed using eco-friendly energy. 

Awarded in the Czech Republic, Italy and Spain. Attended film festivals in the United States, Canada, Russia, and Monaco. 

French-Finnish musical The Cafe of My Memories has been awarded the Best Feature Film Award in Prague in April 2022. The film has participated at Pendance Film Festival, International Filmmaker Festival in New York, Moscow International Film Festival, Monaco Streaming Film Festival, Calella Film Festival, Ischia Film Festival, Catania Film Festival, Prague International Film Awards, and AVIFF Cannes Art Film Festival.

Ihr Dienstleister für die Erstellung von professionellen Baustellen Zeitraffer Aufnahmen. Wir übernehmen die gesamte Planung, Ausführung und Nachbearbeitung Ihrer Zeitraffer-installation.

Ein Bau-Zeitraffer kann einen beeindruckenden Einblick in den Fortschritt und die täglichen Aktivitäten auf einer Baustelle geben. Es ist eine effektive Möglichkeit, das Bauprojekt zu verfolgen und zu dokumentieren. 

Um eine lückenlose und sichere Abwicklung eines Zeitraffer-Projektes zu gewährleisten, benötigen Sie einen professionellen und erfahren Dienstleister. 

Wir bieten Ihnen die Komplettlösung an. Ein Autarkes Solar Kamerasystem mit Cloud Anbindung. Blickwächter übernimmt dabei die Zeitraffer Installation, Wartung und Überwachung des Kamerasystems.

Cineclube Padre Feijoo naceu a principios de 1970 como actividade cultural en Ourense (Galicia), herdeiro da tradición cineclubista da cidade.

No ano 2010 recibiu o premio Morogo, "por demostrar con constancia e poucos recursos económicos que cando a proposta cultural ten calidade, os ourensáns respostan  facendo honra ao vello apelativo de que ésta é a Atenas de Galicia."

En febreiro de 2019, recibíu de xeito colectivo (por medio da Federación de cineclubes de Galicia) o premio José Sellier dos Mestre Mateo 2018.

No ano 2020, a celebración do 50 aniversario víuse parcialmente modificada tanto no tempo coma nas actividades. Non se puideron celebrar as palestras e os concertos de música, nin realizar o convite a cineclubes de fóra de Galicia polas limitacións de aforo, así como extremáronse as medidas de seguridade no homenaxe aos membros das antigas directivas do cineclube.

Description:
Devoti Bharat LLP is a pioneering film production and music recording company dedicated to the creation of spiritual and devotional cinema while promoting the rich heritage of Sanatan Sanskriti. With a deep-rooted commitment to preserving and spreading Vedic wisdom, the company also engages in publishing books that reflect the profound teachings of Hindu philosophy, culture, and spirituality.

Founded by Sadhana Pandey and Bamkesh Pandey, Devoti Bharat stands as a beacon of cultural and spiritual renaissance, bridging the gap between tradition and modern storytelling. The company specializes in producing spiritually enriching films, devotional music, and literature, making ancient wisdom accessible to modern audiences across India and beyond.

Through its cinematic and literary endeavors, Devoti Bharat LLP continues to inspire individuals, fostering a deeper connection with Sanatan Dharma while redefining the role of spiritual media in contemporary times.

Com atuação na produção, formação e pesquisa, a produtora busca fomentar o cinema independente, promovendo experimentação e inovação audiovisual.

A produtora nasce a partir da trajetória de Luiz Brasileiro, roteirista e cineasta, especialista em Gestão Cultural pelo Senac-SP e graduado em Cinema pela Universidade Federal da Integração Latino-Americana (UNILA). Com mais de uma década de experiência em festivais e cineclubes, atuou na curadoria e produção de iniciativas como Cine Debate História, Cine Latino, Cineclube Jacareí e Cine Formação. Atualmente, coordena o Laboratório Criativo da Rede Formação, onde desenvolve projetos como a série Glitter, Depois do Sinal (produção executiva) e o cinema itinerante Cine Natureza.

Name: ENIAC production
Description:
ENG
Eniac Digital Cinema provides a complete solution to digital filming and postproduction in up to 4K resolution.
At our core is the RED ONE digital cinema camera and associated technologies. We offer RED ONE / RED EPIC camera equipment rental, stereoscopy filming and postproduction, color correction , special effects including, motion graphic, 2D/3D animation and picture compositing.

CZ
ENIAC digital cinema se zabývá uspořádáváním jedniček a nul do tzv. binárních soustav. Jejich unikátní estetické uspořádání vytváří bitmapový obraz, který je následně standardní cestou distribuován na sítnici diváka. Bitmapový obraz je popsán pomocí jednotlivých barevných bodů - pixelů. Naše workflow je schopné zpracovávat 19.415.040 pixelů v rámci jednoho bitmapového obrázku.
