Name: Matas Danielius
Description:
I am a Lithuanian-born actor, producer, and entrepreneur based in Bangkok. Over the past decade, I have worked on a range of groundbreaking theatre, film, and tech startup projects. I have a passion for being creative and developing business strategies. I hold a degree in Drama from Anglia Ruskin University in Cambridge. My work and performance style have been influenced by the works of Antonin Artaud, Jerzy Grotowski, Tatsumi Hijikata, Yoshi Oida, and Michael Chekhov. I co-produced and acted in more than 20 different theatre and film productions. My recent roles include acting alongside Grammy Award-winning jazz singer Keithen Carter and starring in a feature film with my co-actor William Baldwin. 

As a film producer, I co-produced the feature film "Useful Idiots," which is currently in post-production. I am currently working on a rags-to-riches film, "Nalini," in the pre-production phase. Additionally, I am actively involved in fundraising for a Romance/Drama travel film that will be shot in Thailand.

Name: Circular Ruin
Description:
Founded in 2020 by Randall Dunn, Arjan Miranda, and Ben Greenberg, Circular Ruin is a full service music house for film, television, gaming, and recording artists. Notable film and tv works (composition and production) include Panos Cosmatos’ Mandy (SpectreVision), Nathan Fielder and Benny Safdie’s The Curse (Showtime), Candyman (Universal Pictures), Fair Play (Netflix), Guillermo Del Toro’s Cabinet of Curiosities (Panos Cosmatos’ “The Viewing” episode - Netflix), Julio Torres’ Problemista (A24), It Comes at Night (A24), Kingdom of Silence (Showtime), Blow the Man Down (Amazon) and Moloch (Shudder). 

With nearly a century of combined music and studio experience that is deeply informed by old-world analog production, the Circular Ruin team brings the full creative weight and workflow wisdom of their years spent producing and mixing records to bear on every single project. Highlights from our discography include Danny Elfman, Oneohtrix Point Never, Depeche Mode, Sunn O))), Björk, Thurston Moore, Lee Ronaldo, Marc Ribot, Boris, Drab Majesty, Zola Jesus, Myrkur, and many more.

Our specialties include original composition, score production, arranging and orchestration, score supervision, score mixing, music editing (IATSE 700), and re-recording/surround/ATMOS mixing. We take a holistic approach to music and sound that maximizes creativity, efficiency, and quality.

Em nosso hall de entrada encontra-se nossa bomboniere com a pipoca quentinha e refri-geladinho e além de combos personalizados que só existem aqui no Cine3.

Nossas redes sociais, Instagram, Facebook e WhatsApp são atualizadas diariamente, além do nosso aplicativo e programa de fidelidade que você tem total acesso da palma da sua mão, isso tudo para entender e atender toda sua expectativa quanto a uma sessão de cinema.

Nossa equipe, o nosso bem mais precioso, esta esperando por você de braços abertos e com o coração cheio de boas vibrações para que sua vinda aqui seja uma experiencia incrível e inesquecível. Aqui você fica à vontade e sem preocupação. E ainda aproveita um ambiente aconchegante, com vista maravilhosa dos navios e todo o canal de Santos.

Entendemos que o cinema não é apenas para entreter e sim para fazer sonhar!

Name: Kievnauchfilm
Description:
Kievnauchfilm sometimes translated as Kiev Science Film in English, was a film studio in the former Soviet Union located in Kiev, Ukrainian SSR, established in 1941.

It was the largest European studio for non-fiction films. The name is an abbreviation for "Kiev Science Films", and its main task was production of popular science films and documentaries covering a broad range of topics. In addition it released a large number of animated films that are still popular today, such as a series about Zaporizhian Cossacks (directed by Vladimir Dakhno), Adventures of Captain Vrungel series, Doctor Aybolit, and a version of Treasure Island (all three directed by David Cherkasky). The studio's films received numerous awards at international and national film festivals. Film director Felix Sobolev (Animals' Tongue, I and Others, Can Animals Think?) and studio Editor-in-Chief Yevgeni Zagdansky are considered to be trailblazers and figures of major influence in the documentary field in the former Soviet Union.

After the dissolution of the Soviet Union, Kievnauchfilm went into decline and was renamed National Cinematheque of Ukraine.

The animated film division was split off under the name Animafilm.

Name: EVERABLE
Description:
Everable is a disability-led, award-winning production company using film to challenge stigma, expand representation, and reshape narratives around disability. With every frame we capture, we aim to educate, advocate, and push the boundaries of inclusive storytelling.

Our work spans Oscar-qualifying films, Smithsonian installations, national PSAs, feature documentaries, and immersive storytelling with the Apple Vision Pro—all exploring the intersections of disability, culture, and technology. We use cutting-edge tools and collaborate with disabled creators worldwide to ensure that those historically left out of the frame are at the center of the story.

Current Projects:
 AI & Disability Documentary – Investigating how technological advancements both empower and marginalize disabled communities, asking: How could the age of AI fail if it disregards disability’s essential lessons?
 Global Film Initiatives – Co-directing films in Syria, Denmark, Kenya, and the U.S. with disabled filmmakers, ensuring that stories are told from within communities, not about them.
 Mapping Representation in Film – Everable created the first global heat map of disability representation in cinema, identifying gaps in storytelling and working to fill them.

At Everable, we don’t just make films—we redefine who gets to tell the story.

In October 2013 Scrimmy co-starred in Renko, an action adventure horror film shot in Madrid, Spain starring Carlos Bardem. 

In 2017 Scrimmy created, wrote, executive produced, directed and hosted the world’s first global pizza travel show: Pizza Perfect in Rome, Italy.

In 2018 Scrimmy was Executive Producer, creator and writer of the award winning television show Eddie’s in Los Angeles, California. Eddie's is a feel good, single camera dramedy series starring Eddie McGee (CBS’s NCIS: Los Angeles, Amazon’s The Hunt, Fox's 911), George Wendt (Cheers - CBS Distribution), Nikki SooHoo (Paramount’s Heathers), and Jacob Zachar (ABC Family’s Greek). The show is directed and executive produced by Michael Lange (X-Files, Larry Sanders Show, Bones, Criminal Minds and Charmed revival).

In October, 2018 Eddie’s successfully screened at The Egyptian Theatre in Hollywood to an enthusiastic audience of over 300 people and was received exceptionally well. Eddie’s then went on to win Best Television Pilot at the California Film Awards 2019 and screened at the Hollywood Reel Independent Film Festival and the Irvine International Film Festival to packed sold out audiences. Eddie's also won a gold Remi Award at Worldfest Houston 2019, received special mention at the London Worldwide Comedy Short Film Festival 2019, screened and was nominated for best pilot in June, 2019 at the SOHO International Film Festival and won best pilot after screening on July 13, 2019 at the 22nd annual Long Island International Film Expo. Eddie's also screened in August 2019 at the Madrid International Film Festival.

Description:
VOCÊ TEM UMA HISTÓRIA. NÓS TEMOS A MÚSICA.

Música pra quem conta histórias:

Nascemos em 2020 com o propósito de ajudar os produtores de audiovisual na obtenção da Música Certa para que seus projetos marquem a vida das pessoas com uma mensagem forte e duradoura.

Músicos apaixonados, entendemos a diferença que uma boa música faz no atual mercado audiovisual, cada vez mais competitivo e complexo.

A paixão por montar fitas, trilhas ou playlists para cada momento nos levou a unir paixão, conhecimento e tecnologia para ajudar a trazer para o Brasil o conceito da Supervisão Musical.

Supervisão Musical é união entre arte e técnica para desenvolver estratégias musicais alinhadas com os objetivos criativos e comerciais de projetos audiovisual, seja filme, série, game ou publicidade.

O Supervisor Musical cuida de tudo. Após entender a direção artística e intenção do seu projeto, ele pesquisa as melhores músicas em condições de serem usadas, faz o licenciamento, a produção e, se necessário, a edição para garantir total sintonia entre a música e SUA mensagem.

Temos como missão supervisionar o departamento de música de produções audiovisuais para amplificar a imersão do espectador.

Nossa visão é criar um modelo de negócio onde a música é geradora de receita para o audiovisual sempre arraigados em valores fundamentais: Ir além, inovação, criatividade e rebeldia por uma boa causa.

Nos diferenciamos por ir além das soluções convencionais, trazendo inovação, criatividade e uma atitude de "rebeldia por uma boa causa. "A Áudiovibes se diferencia pela capacidade de identificar oportunidades criativas e propor soluções musicais inovadoras que elevam a qualidade dos projetos, além de atuar de forma flexível e rápida, atendendo demandas urgentes sem se prender a convenções preestabelecidas." Nos explica Leandro Abreu.

Name: Women's International Film Festival Nigeria (WIFFEN)
Description:
The Women’s International Film Festival Nigeria (WIFFEN) is a premier film festival in Nigeria and West Africa. The goal of the festival is to celebrate women in film around the world. And our extended objective is to promote women in film, to strengthen the capacities of female filmmakers and foster creative platforms for local and global female filmmakers to learn and engage while celebrating women’s achievements in the film industry. WIFFEN seeks to challenge the gender imbalance and the lack of diversity in the film and media industry through a combination of film screenings, discussions, and professional development opportunities as well as incorporating International Women’s Day events into its programming.
WIFFEN encourages female filmmakers to think, imagine, create, and share their stories with the world. And our festival accepts film submissions for FREE.

Name: Epifania 750
Description:
Epifania: termo que remete a uma súbita sensação de realização ou compreensão da essência de algo, onde um indivíduo, finalmente, encontra a última peça do quebra cabeças, conseguindo, então, vislumbrar uma imagem completa de modo quase que divino. Ter uma epifania indica o surgimento de um pensamento, num determinado instante, que foi considerado único e inspirador, de natureza quase sobrenatural.


Fruto de uma Epifania, em fevereiro de 2008, nascia o estúdio! A fim de sanar as necessidades de ensaios e demos da banda Horizonte, dois de seus integrantes decidiram montar um home estúdio, o qual logo começou a servir também como ponto de encontro. Já não se falava mais num estúdio de uma banda, mas sim num ponto de convergência da Epifania musical de vários artistas. Assim, sobre os pilares de uma espécie de Epifania coletiva, se iniciaram as atividades comerciais do estúdio, as quais, desde então, giram em torno da gravação de demos, ensaios e produção musical.

Name: Bergen Sound Works LLC
Description:
Bergen Sound Works is my personal operation that focuses on composing original music and designing sound for film, games, and other visual media. 

It also serves as a way to bridge my creative output with the needs of filmmakers, students, and independent creators looking for something more emotionally grounded or sonically experimental. 

With over 300 tracks released on streaming platforms alone, I've developed a workflow that balances creative depth with efficiency. Whether you're looking for a full score or any other custom piece built from scratch, I approach each project with the same focus: serving the story through sound. 

If you're working on something that needs original music and need someone who treats sound as more than just background, feel free to reach out in the contact section or click here.
 
Why I started Bergen Sound Works:

Although I am open to working with clients with a considerable budget, the broader purpose behind BSW is to also provide high-quality music and sound design to exceptional storytellers who don't have the necessary funding to be able to commission original work. I believe emotionally resonant sound shouldn't be limited to big-budget productions.

By working with students, independent filmmakers, and underfunded projects, I aim to contribute to a more inclusive creative ecosystem where sound can elevate stories, regardless of a creator's financial resources. 

On an annual basis, I reserve space to score 12 underfunded film or media projects. These are collaborations with creators whose stories are well-written and artistically ambitious—but may not have the budget to commission original music. This is about access because I believe great stories deserve great sound.

- Brenden Sica; musician, producer, composer, and audio engineer

Name: Epik Recording Studios
Description:
Epik Recording Studios is Houston’s premier recording, mixing, and mastering destination — credits include legends like Nipsey Hussle, Eminem, Lil Wayne, Gucci Mane, and more. Artists from across Texas and beyond come to capture the signature Epik Sound: warm, punchy, and built to move crowds.

Inside our acoustically tuned studio, you’ll find an elite signal chain — Neve 1073 preamp, 1176 compressor, Mojave MA-1000 mic, Metric Halo ULN-2 converters, and Adam A77X monitors with Sub12 — delivering Grammy-level clarity and depth.

We believe every artist deserves a professional sound, fast turnaround, and an effortless workflow. That’s why every session includes EpikSend, our instant file delivery system that organizes your stems, trackouts, and masters automatically — at no extra cost.

Whether you’re a first-time artist or a seasoned professional, Epik Recording Studios helps you unlock your best vocals, elevate your mixes, and create music that truly connects.

Description:
A Radicalize Films é a produtora audiovisual em São Paulo que transforma VISÃO em EXPERIÊNCIA. Nascemos para empoderar marcas a contarem histórias que movem pessoas e geram resultados mensuráveis. Do conceito à entrega final, unimos criatividade, estratégia e tecnologia de ponta para produzir vídeo marketing, branded content, filmes corporativos, comerciais, eventos híbridos, documentários de impacto, motion graphics e conteúdo para redes sociais que elevam a percepção de valor do seu negócio.

POR QUE RADICALIZE?
• PROFISSIONALISMO – equipes certificadas, processos padronizados e gestão em tempo real garantem prazos e orçamentos.
• SEGURANÇA – backup triplo, compliance LGPD e contratos claros protegem dados e reputação.
• CRIATIVIDADE COM ROI – storytelling guiado por dados que converte audiência em vendas.
• TECNOLOGIA CINEMATOGRÁFICA – câmeras 6K, drones FPV, áudio imersivo e color grading HDR.

SERVIÇOS
• Vídeos Institucionais & Branding
• Conteúdo para Live Marketing e Feiras
• Campanhas Publicitárias 360º
• Séries Documentais & Testemunhais
• Lives Multiplataforma
• Animação 2D/3D & Motion Design
• Pós-Produção completa (edição, VFX, sound design)

RESULTADOS
Aumentamos até 60 % o engajamento orgânico e triplicamos o ROI de clientes dos setores de energia, educação, tecnologia e varejo.

PARA QUEM
Diretores de marketing, gerentes de eventos e organizações que buscam uma produtora com autoridade, criatividade e responsabilidade para transformar ideias em projetos inesquecíveis, sem surpresas no orçamento.

Atuamos em todo o Brasil e América Latina, com base em São Paulo e estrutura móvel para gravações on-location ou em set virtual.

PRONTO PARA RADICALIZAR SEU EVENTO E SUA COMUNICAÇÃO?
Converse com a Radicalize Films e descubra como potencializar sua mensagem, posicionar sua marca como líder e alcançar crescimento sustentável através do poder do vídeo.

Name: STEMS Group Colombia
Description:
En STEMS Group Colombia somos un estudio especializado en postproducción y producción de sonido cinematográfico, con sede en Bogotá y experiencia internacional. Nuestro enfoque está en brindar soluciones sonoras de alta calidad para cine, documental y publicidad, combinando creatividad, técnica y narrativa en cada proyecto.

Contamos con una sala de mezcla Surround 7.1 equipada con tecnología de referencia (Pro Tools Ultimate, superficies de control AVID S1, plug-ins Waves, iZotope, AVID, entre otros), lo que nos permite entregar mezclas verificadas en entornos teatrales y cumplir con los más altos estándares de la industria.

Nuestros servicios incluyen diseño sonoro, edición de diálogos, ambientes y efectos (SFX), grabación de foley, gestión y grabación de ADR/doblaje, y mezcla 7.1, 5.1 o estéreo para DCP, televisión, streaming y redes sociales. Ofrecemos un modelo de trabajo flexible y seguro, con equipos dedicados a cada proyecto, ya sea de manera presencial en Bogotá o a distancia, garantizando eficiencia, confidencialidad y resultados de nivel internacional.

Description:
Oii! Sou a Bianca, fundadora e diretora da Bey Danor Filmes. Somos especializados em criar experiências visuais memoráveis no setor de alimentos e fotografia. Nosso objetivo é ajudar marcas e profissionais do setor alimentício a se destacarem através de conteúdo visual autêntico e atraente.

Oferecemos uma gama completa de serviços audiovisuais, incluindo produção de vídeos, fotografia, edição e pós-produção. Trabalhamos em estreita colaboração com nossos clientes para entender suas necessidades e transformar suas visões em realidade. Nossa equipe talentosa e comprometida possui experiência em capturar a essência única de cada prato, criando narrativas visuais que conectam emocionalmente com o público.

Ao longo dos anos, tivemos a honra de trabalhar com uma ampla variedade de clientes e  valorizamos relacionamentos duradouros e a confiança que construímos, sendo reconhecidos por nossa comunicação eficaz, profissionalismo e resultados excepcionais.

Estamos sempre em busca de novas oportunidades criativas e parcerias emocionantes. Se você está procurando contar a história do seu negócio alimentício de maneira autêntica e visualmente atraente, estamos prontos para ajudar. Vamos trabalhar juntos para criar imagens e vídeos que façam seus pratos ganharem vida e inspirem seus clientes a se deliciarem com suas criações.

Entre em contato conosco para discutir como podemos colaborar e elevar sua presença visual no mercado. Juntos, podemos criar algo verdadeiramente especial!

Daher haben wir von Asakura Productions es uns zum Zielgemacht den Menschen Coaching näherzubringen und das Coaching allgemeinweiter zu verbreiten.

Wir sehen die Vorteile dessen und was es mit sich bringt, daher haben wir uns auf die Videoproduktion von Berater und Mentor/Coaches spezialisiert und legen den Fokus für unsere Kunden zusätzlich vor allem auf den Vertrieb passender Werbevideos um bestmöglich die passende Zielgruppe zu erreichen.

Name: 山一 THE ONE
Description:
山一由女性电影节发展而来，致力于推动女性电影生产，扶持女导演以及助力更多女性文化发声的国际文化机构，由山一国际女性电影展与山一学院互动双平台共同组成。山一国际女性电影展是2017年创立的中国首个由官方立项，一年一度的非竞赛型电影节。山一学院集合了以学术、国际交流，孵化并赋能女性创作者为核心的全链条平台，为此设立了女导演短片扶持计划、长片扶持计划，山一说论坛以及女性电影国际巡展等项目。

Developed from a women's film festival, The One is an international cultural organization dedicated to promoting women's film production, supportting women directors and more women's cultural voices which consists of two sections—— The One International Women's Film Festival of China(ONEIWFF) and One’s Young. ONEIWFF is the first annual non-competitive film festival of China founded in 2017. One’s Young is a full-chain platform that focuses on academics, international exchanges, and incubating and empowering women creators. To this end, it has set up The Short Film for Women Directors, feature films support programme, Her Voice panels, and international touring of women's films.

Name: Cresta Alta Film
Description:
The Cresta Alta Film Tour is engaging audiences throughout the US with arts councils, colleges, high schools and museums at events produced by the Risan Project. The 2025 tour features Risan Media's expedition-based climate change documentary film titled, Cresta Alta, that chronicles a journey to Alaska, Iceland, Chile and Peru to document glaciological research expeditions and sustainability. 

The screenings are followed by a Q&A with environmental filmmaker and socially-conscious musician, Todd Anders Johnson, who studied development issues at the University of Washington. With a foundational perspective that more sustainable policies are imperative  and that the there are effective renewable and sustainable options to employ regionally, nationally and globally, Todd has dedicated himself to the arts in creating entertaining and educational film, music and events.

As students across the nation face an uncertain future in educational opportunities with reduced funding resources paired with the deconstruction of environmental and climate science organizations, the Cresta Alta Film Tour is a timely forum of entertainment and education focused on the practical applications of climate change scientific research, renewable energy, and sustainability initiatives. 

The film features Danish glaciologist, Dr. Sebastian Mernild, sharing how his research in the Andes was funded by the Chilean National Science Foundation and also showcases how a USAID-funded program in Huaraz, Peru, aims to use bio-remediation to clean river water of heavy metals that is occurring due to deglaciation. These expeditions and their findings highlight the efficacy of scientific organizational programs and the need for continued research funding. These salient discussion topics are now being explored in our post-film screening Q&As with students who are trying to find gravity in this changing educational environment.

Name: Roller Derby TV
Description:
**Roller Derby TV (RDTV) is the UK’s leading skater-run media company, dedicated to broadcasting the best of Roller Derby.**

Founded by members of London Roller Derby, RDTV provides high-quality live streaming and event filming services for leagues, tournaments, and teams across the UK and beyond. Our mission is simple: make Roller Derby accessible to all fans, showcase the sport’s incredible athletes, and help build a stronger, more connected derby community.

**What We Do:**

* Professional multi-camera live streaming with real-time commentary, graphics, and overlays
* Event filming and post-production, including highlight reels and promo packages
* Sponsorship activation and integration during broadcasts
* Custom streaming solutions for both free-to-watch and pay-per-view events
* Full production support, from planning to broadcast

**Why Choose RDTV?**
As a team of active and former Roller Derby skaters, we understand what matters most to leagues, athletes, and fans. Our broadcasts are produced with passion, precision, and a deep respect for the sport. We’re committed to promoting Roller Derby, supporting local teams, and helping the UK scene grow.

**For Teams & Leagues:**
Looking to stream your next event or tournament? We offer flexible packages, sponsorship opportunities, and expert support to help you reach new audiences.

**For Sponsors & Partners:**
Join us to connect with a dedicated, diverse, and rapidly growing audience. We offer creative sponsorship activations, ad placements, and branded content during live streams.

**For Fans:**
Never miss a game! Follow us for the latest live events, replays, and exclusive behind-the-scenes content from the world of Roller Derby.

---

**Ready to work with us, or want to learn more?**
Visit [rollerderbytv.net](https://rollerderbytv.net)

Description:
The Author GroupAndrew Calder, Co-Founder & Head of Content and ProductionWorldwide · Remote · Jan 2008 – Present

The Author Group is dedicated exclusively to the creation and development of impactful stories, books, films, and television show concepts, led by co-founder Andrew Calder—a dynamic creative entrepreneur, filmmaker, writer, actor, and storyteller.

Highlighted Works & Creative Contributions:

Films and Television:

Inspired and voiced a character in Alberto Mielgo’s Academy Award-winning animated short, The Windshield Wiper.

Served as inspiration and namesake for characters in acclaimed films like Gareth Edwards' Monsters and Lynn Shelton’s Humpday.

Creator, writer, and director of A Walk in the Sky, a film showcasing hidden architectural masterpieces by Frank Lloyd Wright, Julia Morgan, and Bernard Maybeck in Lake Tahoe.

Developed the television series Renaissance Academy, set in a boundary-breaking experimental high school in Los Angeles.

Writer, director, and producer of the mumblecore drama The Lowest Depths, exploring intellectual chaos in Harvard's underbelly.

Developing a high-stakes Wall Street thriller focused on Tesla’s corporate battles, examining the controversial link between Elon Musk and Bitcoin creator Satoshi Nakamoto.

Literary and Narrative Projects:

Conceptualized The Eastern Townships Children's Fiction Novel Series, intended to become a global literary phenomenon set in Quebec.

Authored and developed DUST: An Extraordinary Correspondence, a feature film narrative set in Mexico.

Created conceptual comedy Jack White vs. Jack Black – A Rock 'n' Roll Battle! and children's fantasy The Little Red Boat.

Acting and Voice Work:

Appeared on-screen in Warner Brothers' ER, created by Michael Crichton.

Lead actor in Kelp, winner of the Grand Jury Prize at the Philadelphia Film Festival, premiering at SXSW.

Voice actor in Alberto Mielgo’s Oscar-winning animated short film, The Windshield Wiper.

Name: LA BOITE DE 4
Description:
L’idée directrice de « La boite de 4 » est de laisser aux collectifs un moyen de s’exprimer en dehors du format habituel proposé par les structures actuelles.
Elle décide d’aller plus loin en proposant sur une période donnée une immersion au coeur d’univers totalement différents mis en scène par les artistes issu de sa programmation.
Nous sollicitons donc un à trois collectifs par mois qui peuvent gratuitement investir et aménager librement la salle en construisant un projet cohérent autour des quatre thématiques proposées.
(concert, exposition, projection, restauration)
Ces projets ont tous une durée de 24h, 48h ou 72h et peuvent s’échelonner successivement sur plusieurs jours ou à différents moments de la semaine, sans restriction de format.
En contre partie de cette liberté, nous attendons des collectifs qu’ils jouent le jeu et mettent sur pied des installations personnelles au risque de sortir parfois de leurs zones de confort.
L’évolution de ce lieu dépend essentiellement des collectifs, artistes et plus spécifiquement de leurs engagement et de leurs capacités à en faire un endroit exaltant qui pousse la curiosité de ses spectateurs en les entraînant sans cesse dans un étonnement permanent.
contact / laboitedequatre.contact@gmail.com

Name: Imagefilmproduktionen - Strategisch. Präzise. Hochprofessionell.
Description:
Ich produziere strategische Imagefilme, die Marken stärken, Aufmerksamkeit erhöhen und Botschaften klar und wirkungsvoll kommunizieren. Als Regisseur, Kameramann und Experte für Corporate Film verbinde ich kreative Bildgestaltung, psychologische Wirkung und moderne Filmtechnologie zu visuellen Lösungen, die Marketing, HR und Unternehmenskommunikation messbar unterstützen.

Mit über 20 Jahren Erfahrung in Regie, Kamera und Postproduktion sowie Auszeichnungen wie dem UK Film Kodak Commercial Competition, dem ANIMAGO Award und dem Publikumspreis „Respekt!“ realisiere ich Filme, die nicht nur gut aussehen, sondern strategisch funktionieren.

Ich unterstütze Marketingteams dabei, ihre Marke sichtbarer zu machen und Reichweite zu steigern. HR-Abteilungen helfe ich, passende Bewerber zu gewinnen und ihre Arbeitgebermarke authentisch zu präsentieren. Unternehmen begleite ich dabei, komplexe Inhalte verständlich darzustellen und Entscheidungen zu erleichtern.

Von der Zielklärung über Storyentwicklung und 4K-Produktion bis zur finalen Ausspielung entsteht bei mir ein Film, der präzise auf das Unternehmensziel ausgerichtet ist. Was mich auszeichnet: Ich sehe den fertigen Film bereits vor mir, bevor die erste Aufnahme entsteht, und denke in Bildern, Wirkung und Zielgruppenlogiken.
